CREATE VIEW dbo.a
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Expr2, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Expr3, dbo.icitem.nprice
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AAA
AS
SELECT     cinvno, nsalesamt, ntaxamt1
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.AG_Tax_Check

CREATE VIEW dbo.aaaa
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SP.Year, dbo.SP.Month, dbo.SP.[Item Code], dbo.SP.[Item Description], dbo.SP.Spon, dbo.SP.Final, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, 
                      CASE WHEN (citemno IS NOT NULL) THEN 'Promotion' ELSE Final END AS Fin, CASE WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'JAnuary') THEN '01' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'February') 
                      THEN '02' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'MArch') THEN '03' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'April') THEN '04' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'MAy') 
                      THEN '05' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'June') THEN '06' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'July') THEN '07' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'August') 
                      THEN '08' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'September') THEN '09' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'October') THEN '10' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'November') 
                      THEN '11' WHEN (dbo.SP.Month = 'December') THEN '12' ELSE '' END AS MON
FROM         dbo.SP LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.SP.Year = dbo.BA_Camp1.year AND dbo.SP.Month = dbo.BA_Camp1.month AND dbo.SP.[Item Code] = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.SP.[Item Code] IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY dbo.SP.[Item Code]

CREATE VIEW dbo.ABS406_Unbalanced_Deposits_Transactions
AS
SELECT     cbankno, cdepno, cdescript, dcreate, ddeposit, nregnum, nrecnum, nregamt, nrecamt, nbaseamt
FROM         dbo.ardpst
WHERE     (cbankno = 'ABS406') AND (nregamt <> nbaseamt)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ABS406_Unbalanced_Deposits
AS

FROM         dbo.ardpst
WHERE     (cbankno = 'ABS406') AND (nregnum <> nrecnum)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Unbalanced_Deposit_Amount
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cbankno, cdepno, cdescript, dcreate, ddeposit, nregnum, nrecnum, nregamt, nrecamt, nbaseamt
FROM         dbo.ardpst
WHERE     (nregamt <> nbaseamt) AND (cbankno = 'ABS423')
ORDER BY ddeposit

WHERE     (nrecnum <> nregnum) AND (cbankno = 'ABS423')

CREATE VIEW dbo.acc
AS
SELECT     cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, glacct.cdescript, apdist.cdescript AS invdesc, datename(year, dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dtrs) AS Month, dtrs, namount, ntaxamt1, 
                      namount + ntaxamt1 AS total
FROM         apdist JOIN
                      glacct ON apdist.cglacc = glacct.cacctid
UNION ALL
SELECT     cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, glacct.cdescript, apdisth.cdescript AS invdesc, datename(year, dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dtrs) AS Month, dtrs, namount, ntaxamt1, 
                      namount + ntaxamt1 AS total
FROM         apdisth JOIN
                      glacct ON apdisth.cglacc = glacct.cacctid

CREATE VIEW dbo.adddiscount
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.ccustno, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = '1') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2012-09-01' AND '2012-09-19') AND (dbo.aritrs.ccustno = '531798')
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Arcust
AS
SELECT        ccustno, csponsor, cclass, dstarter dcreate, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM            dbo.arcust  WITH (nolock) 
UNION ALL
SELECT        ccustno, csponsor, cclass, dstarter dcreate, '2.NAM' AS Company
FROM            amanniquenam.dbo.arcust  WITH (nolock)

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_arrevn
AS
SELECT     crevncode, cdescript, crevnacc, cdiscacc, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.arrevn
UNION ALL
SELECT     crevncode, cdescript, crevnacc, cdiscacc, '2.NAM' AS Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arrevn

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Auto4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.dcreate, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono)) AS [SO #], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ccustno)) AS [Member #], 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.cbcompany)) AS [Member Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.citemno)) AS [Item Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.cdescript)) 
                      AS [Item Description], dbo.sostrs.nordqty AS Qty, dbo.sostrs.cuid, dbo.sosord.dexpire AS cexpdate, GETDATE() + 14 AS Month, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.sosord.dexpire, 
                      111) AS Expiry, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail)) AS Email, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.sosord.dcreate, 111) AS StartD, LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.cemail)) 
                      AS [Sponsor Email]
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2) AND (CONVERT(char(12), dbo.sosord.dcreate, 111) = CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111)) AND 
                      (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ctranref)) <> 'N')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dcreate, LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.csono)) AS [SO #], 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.ccustno)) AS [Member #], LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.cbcompany)) AS [Member Name], 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs.citemno)) AS [Item Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs.cdescript)) AS [Item Description], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs.nordqty AS Qty, amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs.cuid, amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dexpire AS cexpdate, GETDATE() + 14 AS Month, 
                      CONVERT(char(12), amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dexpire, 111) AS Expiry, LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cemail)) AS Email, CONVERT(char(12), 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dcreate, 111) AS StartD, ltrim(rtrim(arcust_1.cemail)) as [Sponsor Email]
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs ON amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.csono = amanniquenam.dbo.sostrs.csono INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2) AND (CONVERT(char(12), amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dcreate, 111) 
                      = CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111)) AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.ctranref)) <> 'N')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_AutoIn1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.dcreate, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono)) AS [SO #], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ccustno)) AS [Member #], 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.cbcompany)) AS [Member Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.citemno)) AS [Item Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.cdescript)) 
                      AS [Item Description], dbo.sostrs.nordqty AS Qty, dbo.sostrs.cuid
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 3) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2014/05/31') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ctranref)) <> 'N')
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_AutoIn2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.dcreate, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono)) AS [SO #], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ccustno)) AS [Member #], 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.cbcompany)) AS [Member Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.citemno)) AS [Item Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.cdescript)) 
                      AS [Item Description], dbo.sostrs.nordqty AS Qty, dbo.sostrs.cuid, dbo.sosord.dexpire AS cexpdate, GETDATE() + 14 AS Month, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.sosord.dexpire, 
                      111) AS Expiry, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail)) AS Email
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2014/05/31') AND (GETDATE() + 30 > dbo.sosord.dexpire) AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.dcreate > '2014/07/31') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sosord.ctranref)) <> 'N') AND (GETDATE() < dbo.sosord.dexpire)
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.csono

WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2) AND (GETDATE() + 30 > amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dexpire) AND 
                      (amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.dorder > '2014/05/31') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.ctranref)) <> 'N') AND (GETDATE()

ORDER BY amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.sosord.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Bal1
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS March, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS May, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS June, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS July, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS August,
                       dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7
                       AS September, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7
                       + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS October, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7
                       + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS November, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7
                       + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS December, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 + dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Bal2

                      THEN March ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         AG_Bal1
WHERE     (March <> 0) and cyear < '2016'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, 'April' AS Month, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, CASE WHEN (April > 0) THEN April ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (April < 0) 
                      THEN April ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Bal3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Month, Debit, Credit, CAST(cyear + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, company, 
                      Debit + Credit AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_Bal2

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Bal4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_Bal3.company, dbo.AG_Bal3.cyear, dbo.AG_Bal3.Month, dbo.AG_Bal3.date, dbo.AG_Bal3.cacctid, dbo.AG_Bal3.cdescript, 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_Bal3.Amount) AS Amount, dbo.glcatg.cdescript AS Type, dbo.glagrp.cdescript AS Main, CASE WHEN (dbo.glcatg.cdescript IN ('Current Assets                ', 
                      'Fixed Assets                  ', 'Other Assets                  ')) THEN 'ASSETS' ELSE 'EQUITY AND LIABILITIES' END AS Top_Group, dbo.glcatg.cdescript AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.AG_Bal3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_Bal3.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid
WHERE     (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid NOT IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'L2', 'O1')) AND (LEFT(dbo.AG_Bal3.cacctid, 6) <> '700100')
GROUP BY dbo.AG_Bal3.cyear, dbo.AG_Bal3.cacctid, dbo.AG_Bal3.cdescript, dbo.AG_Bal3.Month, dbo.AG_Bal3.date, dbo.AG_Bal3.company, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype, 
                      dbo.glcatg.cdescript, dbo.glcatg.ccatgid, dbo.glagrp.cdescript
ORDER BY dbo.AG_Bal3.cacctid

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_BAL5
AS

                      'Retained Earnings' AS Description, SUM(Amount) AS amount, 'Retained Earnings' AS Type, 'Retained Earnings' AS Main, 
                      'EQUITY AND LIABILITIES' AS Top_Group
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_INC3
GROUP BY Company, cyear, Month, date

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_CAMP_Count1

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Custchanges2

                      = 'csponsor' THEN 'Sponsor' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) = 'cstatus' THEN 'Status' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) 
                      = 'ctaxcode' THEN 'Tax Code' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) = 'ndiscrate' THEN 'Discount Rate' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) 
                      = 'ccurrcode' THEN 'Currency Code' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) = 'ccompany' THEN 'Name' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) 
                      = 'lexadmfee' THEN 'Exclude Admin Fee' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) = 'lallowcmpgn' THEN 'Allow Campaign Discounts' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) 
                      = 'lprcinctax' THEN 'Price Includes Tax' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) = 'lgeninvc' THEN 'Ship SO Generate Invoice' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cfieldname))) 
                      = 'cclass' THEN 'Class' END AS Field
FROM         dbo.AG_CustChanges

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_CustChanges3
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cfieldname, codlvalue, cnewvalue, InsUpdDate, cuser, Company, Field
FROM         dbo.AG_Custchanges2
WHERE     (LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) = LEFT(InsUpdDate, 11))

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_L0
AS
SELECT     arcust_2.csponsor AS [Sponsor Code], arcust_3.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.csponsor AS [L1 Code], arcust_2.ccompany AS [L1 Name], 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor AS [L2 Code], arcust_1.ccompany AS [L2 Name], arcust_4.csponsor AS [L3 Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [L3 Name]
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.csponsor = arcust_2.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_3 ON arcust_2.csponsor = arcust_3.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_4 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_4.csponsor
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.ccustno = '517392')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.[Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [sponsor Name], dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Code, dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Name, dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.[Date Join], 
                      dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Years, dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Months, dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Sales, dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Heading, 
                      CAST(dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Years + '/' + dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.Months + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date
FROM         dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a.[Sponsor Code] = dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_L1_L2_N1a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT level1.csponsor AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.level1.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], level1.ccustno AS Code, level1.ccompany AS Name, 
                      level1.dcreate AS [Date Join], DATENAME(year, level1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, level1.dcreate) AS Months, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Sales, 
                      'Level1' AS Heading
FROM         level1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      AG_Levels_Sales1 ON level1.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, level1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND DATENAME(month,
                       level1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months

UNION
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT level2.csponsor AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.level2.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], level2.ccustno AS Code, level2.ccompany AS Name, 
                      level2.dcreate AS [Date Join], DATENAME(year, level2.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, level2.dcreate) AS Months, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 
                      'level2' AS Heading
FROM         level2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      AG_Levels_Sales1 ON level2.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, level2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND DATENAME(month,
                       level2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_L1L2_1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.ccustno AS Code, arcust_1.ccompany AS Name, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS [Date Joined], DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Months, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Sales, 'Level1' AS Type
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_1.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31') 
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_2.ccustno AS Code, arcust_2.ccompany AS Name, 
                      arcust_2.dcreate AS [Date Join], DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Months, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 'Level2' AS Heading
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_2.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_2.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_L1L2_2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT [Sponsor Code], [Sponsor Name], Code, Name, [Date Joined], Years, Months, Sales, Type, CAST(Years + '/' + Months + '/01' AS smalldatetime) 
                      AS Date
FROM         dbo.AG_L1L2_1

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Letter8_2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccustno)) AS [Sponsor Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccompany)) AS [Sponsor Name], 
                      dbo.AG_Letter8months.[Cust Code] AS [Consultant Code], dbo.AG_Letter8months.[Cust Name] AS [Consultant Name], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_Letter8months.cstatuscon IS NULL) THEN '' ELSE dbo.AG_Letter8months.cstatuscon END AS [Consultant Status], 
                      dbo.AG_Letter8months.dcreate AS [Consultant Joind Date], dbo.AG_Letter8months.sales5, dbo.AG_Letter8months.[Cust Phone], dbo.AG_Letter8months.[Cust Email], 
                      dbo.CustSPNLVL.[Level], dbo.AG_Letter8months.dcalc, dbo.arcust.cemail AS [Spon Email], dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales1, dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales2, 
                      dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales3, dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales4, dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales5, dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales6, dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales7, 
                      dbo.AG_Letter8months.msales8
FROM         dbo.CustSPNLVL INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Letter8months ON dbo.CustSPNLVL.downline = dbo.AG_Letter8months.[Cust Code] INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.CustSPNLVL.sponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Letter8months
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccustno)) AS [Cust Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccompany)) AS [Cust Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail)) 
                      AS [Cust Email], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2)) AS [Cust Phone], LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.ccustno)) AS [Sponsor Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.ccompany)) 
                      AS [Sponsor Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.cemail)) AS [Sponsor Email], LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.cphone2)) AS [Sponsor Phone], dbo.arsavg.dcreate, dbo.arsavg.dcalc, 
                      dbo.arsavg.dlastlet, dbo.arsavg.clastlet, dbo.arsavg.cstatuscon, dbo.arsavg.sales5, dbo.arsavg.sales6, dbo.arsavg.sales10, dbo.arsavg.sales11, 
                      dbo.arsavg.sales12, DATEDIFF(month, dbo.arsavg.dcreate, dbo.arsavg.dcalc) AS Months, dbo.arsavg.dlastinv, DATENAME(year, dbo.arsavg.dcalc) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arsavg.dcalc) AS Month, dbo.arsavg.sales7, dbo.arsavg.sales8, dbo.arsavg.sales9, dbo.arsavg.sales13, dbo.arsavg.msales1, 
                      dbo.arsavg.msales2, dbo.arsavg.msales3, dbo.arsavg.msales4, dbo.arsavg.msales5, dbo.arsavg.msales6, dbo.arsavg.msales7, dbo.arsavg.msales8
FROM         dbo.arsavg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arsavg.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arsavg.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (DATEDIFF(month, dbo.arsavg.dcreate, dbo.arsavg.dcalc) >= 8) AND (dbo.arsavg.clastlet IS NULL) AND (dbo.arsavg.sales8 <= 4000)
ORDER BY arcust_1.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level_Budget3
AS
SELECT        dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.cyear, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.cacctid)) AS GL_Code, dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.Company, dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.Amount AS Budget, dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.Month, 
                         CAST(CAST(dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.cyear AS varchar) + '/' + dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype)) AS Group1, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) 
                         AS Type, CASE WHEN (LEFT(glacct.cacctid, 6) = '480000') THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) = 'Revenue') THEN 'Sales' WHEN (glacct.cdescript = 'Discount Allowed') 
                         THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN ((LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) = 'Cost of Sales') AND (LEFT(glacct.cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))) THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) 
                         = 'Other Revenue') THEN 'Other Income' WHEN (dbo.glcatg.cdescript = 'Recoupment') THEN 'Recoupment' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Main_Group, glacct.cdescript AS GL_desc
FROM            dbo.AG_Level_Budget2 INNER JOIN
                         dbo.glacct WITH (nolock) ON dbo.AG_Level_Budget2.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                         dbo.glcatg  WITH (nolock) ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE        (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1', 'L2'))
UNION ALL
SELECT        *
FROM            amanniquenam.dbo.ag_level_budget3

                      ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype)) AS Cat_Type, ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) AS Cat_Desc, 'NAM' as Company

                      THEN 'Sales' WHEN (glacct.cdescript = 'Discount Allowed') THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN ((LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) = 'Cost of Sales') AND 
                      (LEFT(glacct.cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))) THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) = 'Other Revenue') 
                      THEN 'Other Income' WHEN (dbo.glcatg.cdescript = 'Recoupment') THEN 'Recoupment' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Main_Group, glacct.cdescript AS GL_desc
FROM         dbo.AG_Level_OL2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_Level_OL2.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1', 'L2'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.ag_level_ol3

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level1
AS

FROM         ag_level1_T2
where date > '2015/04/30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA') THEN 'SA' WHEN (company = '3.NAM') THEN 'NAM' END AS Company, 'General Ledger' AS Module, cyear, Month, date, GL_Code, 
                      GL_desc, Type, 0 AS amount, Main_Group, Budget, 0 AS Outlook1, CASE WHEN (rtrim(type) = 'Recoupment') THEN 'Recoupment' ELSE '' END AS Recoup
FROM         dbo.AG_Level_Budget3
where date > '2015/04/30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA') THEN 'SA' WHEN (company = '3.NAM') THEN 'NAM' END AS Company, 'General Ledger' AS Module, cyear, Month, date, GL_Code, 
                      GL_desc, Type, 0 AS amount, Main_Group, 0 AS Budget, budget AS Outlook1, CASE WHEN (rtrim(type) = 'Recoupment') 
                      THEN 'Recoupment' ELSE '' END AS Recoup
FROM         dbo.AG_Level_ol3
where date > '2015/04/30'

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level1_T1
AS
SELECT        Company, Module, year, month, Date, crevnacc, cdescript, Type, Amount, RecGroup, AmountEx, Budget, Outlook1, Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export' AND date < '2018/04/01') 
                         THEN (AmountEx) * 0.14 WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export' AND date >= '2018/04/01') THEN (AmountEx) * 0.15 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                         * 0.15 ELSE 0 END AS Calc_Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export' AND date < '2018/04/01') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.14 WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export' AND 
                         date >= '2018/04/01') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.15 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.15 ELSE AmountEx END AS Calc_Incl
FROM            dbo.AG_Level1_T1a

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level1_T1_Before
AS
SELECT        Company, Module, year, month, Date, crevnacc, cdescript, Type, Amount, RecGroup, AmountEx, Budget, Outlook1, Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                         * 0.14 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 0.15 ELSE 0 END AS Calc_Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                         * 1.14 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.15 ELSE AmountEx END AS Calc_Incl
FROM            dbo.AG_Level1_T1a

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level1_T1a
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                         CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.glacct.cdescript, 'Sales' AS Type, 
                         SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) + SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, 'Non Export' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, 0 AS Budget, 0 AS Outlook1, 
                         SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Vat, cinvno
FROM            dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB INNER JOIN
                         dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.glcatg WITH (nolock) INNER JOIN
                         dbo.glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE        (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass <> 'Export')
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.glcatg.cdescript, cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                         CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.glacct.cdescript, 'Sales' AS Type, 
                         SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) + SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, 'Export' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, 0 AS Budget, 0 AS Outlook1, 
                         SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Vat, cinvno
FROM            dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB INNER JOIN
                         dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.glcatg WITH (nolock) INNER JOIN
                         dbo.glacct WITH (nolock) ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE        (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass = 'Export')
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.glcatg.cdescript, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Level1_T1SMS
AS
SELECT        Company, Module, year, month, Date, crevnacc, cdescript, Type, Amount, RecGroup, AmountEx, Budget, Outlook1, Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                         * 0.15 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 0.15 ELSE 0 END AS Calc_Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                         * 1.15 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.15 ELSE AmountEx END AS Calc_Incl

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Levels_Sales
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Years, datename(month, dinvoice) AS Months, ISNULL(SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx), 0) 
                      AS nfsalesamt, aritrs.cinvno, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.lgenrebate = 0) AND (dbo.arinvc.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate <> 50) AND (dbo.icitem.lmlm = 1) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-02-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2015-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), datename(month, dinvoice), aritrs.cinvno, dinvoice
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Years, datename(month, dinvoice) AS Months, 
                      ISNULL(SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx), 0) AS nfsalesamt, aritrsh.cinvno, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.lgenrebate = 0) AND (dbo.arinvch.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate <> 50) AND (dbo.icitem.lmlm = 1) AND (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-02-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2015-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), datename(month, dinvoice), aritrsh.cinvno, dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1
AS
SELECT     ccustno, Years, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS Expr1, Months, cinvno, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.AG_Levels_Sales
GROUP BY ccustno, Years, Months, cinvno, dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Levels_T1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.ccustno AS [Level1 Code], 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS [Level1 Name], arcust_1.dcreate AS [Level1 Join], DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) 
                      AS Months, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS [Level1 Sales], '' AS [Level2 Code], '' AS [Level2 Name], 0 AS [Level2 Sales]
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_1.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.ccustno, arcust_1.ccompany, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS [Level1 Join], DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Months, 0 AS [Level1 Sales], 
                      arcust_2.ccustno AS [Level2 Code], arcust_2.ccompany AS [Level2 Name], dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS [Level2 Amount]
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_2.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Levels_TTest
AS
SELECT     [Sponsor Code], [Sponsor Name], [Level1 Code], [Level1 Name], [Level1 Join], Years, Months, SUM([Level1 Sales]) AS Expr1, [Level2 Code], [Level2 Name], 
                      SUM([Level2 Sales]) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.AG_Levels_T1
GROUP BY [Sponsor Code], [Sponsor Name], [Level1 Code], [Level1 Name], [Level1 Join], Years, Months, [Level2 Code], [Level2 Name]
HAVING      ([Sponsor Code] = '100042') AND (Months = N'June')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Levels1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.ccustno AS [Level1 Code], 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS [Level1 Name], arcust_1.dcreate AS [Level1 Join], 1 AS Levels
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_2.ccustno AS [Level2 Code], 
                      arcust_2.ccompany AS [Level2 Name], arcust_2.dcreate AS [Level 2 Join], 2 AS Levels
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_2.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMNEW
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SP1.dGenerate, dbo.SP1.csponsord, CASE WHEN (dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo <> dbo.SP1.csponsord AND sponsorL1.cleveld = 'Level 1') 
                      THEN dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level1, CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_1.cleveld = dbo.SponsorL1.cleveld AND SponsorL1_1.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') 
                      THEN SponsorL1_1.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level2, CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_2.cleveld <> SponsorL1_1.cleveld) THEN '' ELSE SponsorL1_2.cCustNo END AS Level3,
                       CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_3.cleveld = SponsorL1_2.cleveld AND SponsorL1_3.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') THEN SponsorL1_3.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level4, 
                      CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_4.cleveld = SponsorL1_3.cleveld AND SponsorL1_4.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') THEN SponsorL1_4.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level5, 
                      CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_5.cleveld = SponsorL1_4.cleveld AND SponsorL1_5.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') THEN SponsorL1_5.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level6, 
                      CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_6.cleveld = SponsorL1_5.cleveld AND SponsorL1_6.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') THEN SponsorL1_6.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level7, 
                      CASE WHEN (SponsorL1_7.cleveld = SponsorL1_6.cleveld AND SponsorL1_7.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') THEN SponsorL1_7.cCustNo ELSE '' END AS Level8, '' AS Level9, 
                      '' AS Level10, '' AS Level11
FROM         dbo.SP1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 ON dbo.SP1.csponsord = dbo.SponsorL1.csponsord AND dbo.SP1.dGenerate = dbo.SponsorL1.dGenerate INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_1 ON dbo.SponsorL1.dGenerate = SponsorL1_1.dGenerate AND dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo = SponsorL1_1.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_2 ON SponsorL1_1.dGenerate = SponsorL1_2.dGenerate AND SponsorL1_1.cCustNo = SponsorL1_2.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_3 ON SponsorL1_2.dGenerate = SponsorL1_3.dGenerate AND SponsorL1_2.cCustNo = SponsorL1_3.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_4 ON SponsorL1_3.dGenerate = SponsorL1_4.dGenerate AND SponsorL1_3.cCustNo = SponsorL1_4.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_5 ON SponsorL1_4.dGenerate = SponsorL1_5.dGenerate AND SponsorL1_4.cCustNo = SponsorL1_5.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_6 ON SponsorL1_5.dGenerate = SponsorL1_6.dGenerate AND SponsorL1_5.cCustNo = SponsorL1_6.csponsord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 AS SponsorL1_7 ON SponsorL1_6.cCustNo = SponsorL1_7.csponsord AND SponsorL1_6.dGenerate = SponsorL1_7.dGenerate
WHERE     (dbo.SP1.csponsord = '200082') AND (SponsorL1_1.cleveld <> 'Sponsor') AND (dbo.SP1.dGenerate = '2012/09/19')
ORDER BY dbo.SP1.csponsord, dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo, SponsorL1_1.cCustNo, SponsorL1_2.cCustNo, SponsorL1_3.cCustNo, SponsorL1_4.cCustNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMNEW1
AS
SELECT     dGenerate, csponsord, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMNEW
GROUP BY dGenerate, csponsord, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMNEWa
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SP1.dGenerate, dbo.SP1.csponsord, CASE WHEN (dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo = dbo.SP1.csponsord) 
                      THEN '' ELSE dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo END AS Level1, '' AS Level2, '' AS Level3, '' AS Level4, '' AS Level5, '' AS Level6, '' AS Level7, '' AS Level8, '' AS Level9, 
                      '' AS Level10, '' AS Level11
FROM         dbo.SP1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SponsorL1 ON dbo.SP1.csponsord = dbo.SponsorL1.csponsord AND dbo.SP1.dGenerate = dbo.SponsorL1.dGenerate
WHERE     (dbo.SP1.csponsord = '200082') AND (dbo.SP1.dGenerate = '2012/09/19') AND (dbo.SponsorL1.cleveld = 'Level 1')
ORDER BY dbo.SP1.csponsord, dbo.SponsorL1.cCustNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLM2
AS
SELECT     dGenerate, csponsord, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMNEW1
union all
select * 
from ag_MLMNEWa

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMNEWc
AS
SELECT     dGenerate, csponsord, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMNewb
GROUP BY dGenerate, csponsord, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMS1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year AS Years, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month AS Months, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.vat) AS Vat, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount 25]) AS Discount, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno)) <> 'MLM') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc)) 
                      NOT IN ('305000', '405000'))
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMS2
AS
SELECT     count(dinvoice) AS Days, Years, Months, SUM(AmountEx) AS Amount, SUM(Vat) AS Vat, SUM(Discount) AS Discount
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMSMS1
GROUP BY Years, Months
HAVING      (DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) = Years) AND months = datename(month,getdate()-1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     count(dinvoice) AS Days, Years, Months, SUM(AmountEx) AS Amount, SUM(Vat) AS Vat, SUM(Discount) AS Discount
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMSMS1
GROUP BY Years, Months
HAVING      (DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) - 1 = Years) AND months = datename(month,getdate()-1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMS3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Years, Months, SUM(AmountEx) AS Amount, SUM(Vat) AS Vat, SUM(Discount) AS Discount, dinvoice AS Days, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY 
                      years
ORDER BY dinvoice) AS ID
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMSMS1
GROUP BY Years, Months, dinvoice
HAVING      (DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) - 1 = Years) AND months = datename(month,getdate()-1)
ORDER BY Id

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMS4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ID, Years, Months,
                          (SELECT     SUM(Amount) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.AG_MLMSMS3
                            WHERE      (ID <= O.ID)) AS [Running Total Amount],
                          (SELECT     SUM(Vat) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.AG_MLMSMS3 AS AG_MLMSMS3_2
                            WHERE      (ID <= O.ID)) AS [Running Total Vat],
                          (SELECT     SUM(Discount) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.AG_MLMSMS3 AS AG_MLMSMS3_1
                            WHERE      (ID <= O.ID)) AS [Running Total Discount], 'FCPY' AS Type
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMSMS3 AS O
ORDER BY ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMS5
AS
SELECT     ID, Years, Months, Amount, Vat, Discount, 0 AS Recruits, 'FCL' AS Type
FROM         dbo.AG_MLMSMS3
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, 0 AS Recruits, 'FCT' AS Type
FROM         AG_MLMSMS2
UNION ALL
SELECT     '' AS ID, years, months, 0 AS amount, 0 AS VAT, 0 AS Discount, Recruits AS Recruits, 'Recruits' AS Type
FROM         ag_MLMSMSRECRUITS

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMSFinal3
AS
SELECT     [MTD - Incl], [MTD - Vat], [MTD - Disc], FC, Target, Outlook, Recruits, [Recruits Target], To_Date
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.AG_MLMSMSFinal3

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MLMSMSRECRUITS
AS
SELECT     COUNT(ccustno) AS Recruits, cclass, DATENAME(year, dstarter) AS Years, DATENAME(month, dstarter) AS Months
FROM         dbo.AG_CUST
WHERE     (cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (DATENAME(year, dstarter) = DATENAME(year, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(month, dstarter) = DATENAME(month, GETDATE() - 1))
GROUP BY cclass, DATENAME(year, dstarter), DATENAME(month, dstarter)

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MTD_SMS2012
AS
SELECT     'Total Sales (Inc VAT)' AS Heading, year, month, Date, Calc_Incl AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_Level1_T1SMS
WHERE     datename(year, getdate() - 1) = year AND datename(month, getdate() - 1) = month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Sales - SA + NAM' AS Heading, year, month, Date, Calc_Incl AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_Level1_T1SMS
WHERE     (Company IN ('1.SA', '2.NAM')) AND (RecGroup = 'Non Export') AND datename(year, getdate() - 1) = year AND datename(month, getdate() - 1) = month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Sales - Export' AS Heading, year, month, Date, Calc_Incl AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_Level1_T1SMS
WHERE     (RecGroup = 'Export') AND datename(year, getdate() - 1) = year AND datename(month, getdate() - 1) = month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'NSV' AS Heading, year, month, Date, CASE WHEN (type = 'Discount Allowed') THEN NAM_AR_AmountEx * - 1 ELSE NAM_AR_AmountEx END AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_Con1
WHERE     Type IN ('Discount Allowed', 'Consultant Rebates') AND NAM_AR_AmountEx <> 0 AND datename(year, getdate() - 1) = year AND datename(month, getdate() - 1) 
                      = month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'NSV' AS Heading, year, month, Date, CASE WHEN (Type = 'Discount Allowed') THEN SA_AR_AmountEx * - 1 ELSE SA_AR_AmountEx END AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_Con1
WHERE     Type IN ('Discount Allowed', 'Consultant Rebates') AND SA_AR_AmountEx <> 0 AND datename(year, getdate() - 1) = year AND datename(month, getdate() - 1) = month

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MTD_SMS2012_2
AS
SELECT     Heading, year, month, Date, CAST(ROUND(SUM(Amount), 2) AS numeric(18, 2)) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.AG_MTD_SMS2012
GROUP BY Heading, year, month, Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MTD_TOTAL1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      dinvoice AS Date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, 'Sales' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) + SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, 'Non Export' AS RecGroup, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, 0 AS Budget, 0 AS Outlook1, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Vat, cinvno
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass <> 'Export') AND dinvoice between '2016/01/01' and  '2016/01/05'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.glcatg.cdescript, cinvno, dinvoice
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      dinvoice AS Date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, 'Sales' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) + SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, 'Export' AS RecGroup, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, 0 AS Budget, 0 AS Outlook1, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Vat, cinvno
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass = 'Export') AND dinvoice between '2016/01/01' and  '2016/01/05'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.glcatg.cdescript, cinvno, dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_MTD_TOTAL2
AS
SELECT     Company, Module, year, month, Date, crevnacc, cdescript, Type, Amount, RecGroup, AmountEx, Budget, Outlook1, Vat, CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND 
                      recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 0.14 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 0.15 ELSE 0 END AS Calc_Vat, 
                      CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) * 1.14 WHEN (company = '2.Nam' AND recgroup <> 'Export') THEN (AmountEx) 
                      * 1.15 ELSE AmountEx END AS Calc_Incl
FROM         dbo.AG_MTD_TOTAL1
WHERE     (year = '2016') AND (month = 'January')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_NEW_TB1
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS August, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS December, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt12 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabal.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
where cyear < 2012
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.glabalh.cyear, dbo.glabalh.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabalh.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt1 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt5 AS August, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt6 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt9 AS December, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt10 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt12 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabalh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabalh.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
where cyear < 2012
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS May, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS August, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS October, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS December, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt11 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabal.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     cyear > '2011'
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.glabalh.cyear, dbo.glabalh.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabalh.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt2 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt3 AS May, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt6 AS August, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt7 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt8 AS October, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt10 AS December, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt11 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt1 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabalh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabalh.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     cyear > '2011'
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_Mtd

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_NEW_TB2
AS

                      THEN April ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company

WHERE     (April <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'May' AS Month, CASE WHEN (May > 0) THEN May ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (May < 0) THEN May ELSE 0 END AS Credit,
                       company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (May <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'June' AS Month, CASE WHEN (June > 0) THEN June ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (June < 0) 
                      THEN June ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (June <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'July' AS Month, CASE WHEN (July > 0) THEN July ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (July < 0) THEN July ELSE 0 END AS Credit,
                       company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (July <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'August' AS Month, CASE WHEN (August > 0) THEN August ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (August < 0) 
                      THEN August ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (August <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'September' AS Month, CASE WHEN (September > 0) THEN September ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (September < 0) 
                      THEN September ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (September <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'October' AS Month, CASE WHEN (October > 0) THEN October ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (October < 0) 
                      THEN October ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (October <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'November' AS Month, CASE WHEN (November > 0) THEN November ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (November < 0) 
                      THEN November ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (November <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'December' AS Month, CASE WHEN (December > 0) THEN December ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (December < 0) 
                      THEN December ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (December <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear as cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'January' AS Month, CASE WHEN (January > 0) THEN January ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (January < 0) 
                      THEN January ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (January <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear  as cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'February' AS Month, CASE WHEN (February > 0) THEN February ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (February < 0) 
                      THEN February ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (February <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear as cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'March' AS Month, CASE WHEN (March > 0) THEN March ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (March < 0) 
                      THEN March ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD
WHERE     (March <> 0) AND cyear < '2012'

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_New_TB3
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Month, Debit, Credit * - 1 AS Credit, CAST(cyear + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, company
FROM         dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_MTD1

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_OL
AS
SELECT     Heading, Type, Year AS Years, Month AS Months, Amount * - 1 AS Target, Company, Outlook * - 1 AS Outlook
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.AOP_AR_Budget
WHERE     (Heading = 'Marketing Target (Inc VAT)')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT '1.SA' AS Company, LTRIM(RTRIM(dmonth)) AS Month, LTRIM(RTRIM(dyear)) AS Year, LTRIM(RTRIM(citemno)) AS Item, SUM(nonhand) AS Qty, 
                      SUM(ntotcost) AS Cost
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_monthly
GROUP BY LTRIM(RTRIM(dmonth)), LTRIM(RTRIM(dyear)), LTRIM(RTRIM(citemno))
HAVING      (SUM(nonhand) <> 0)
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT '2.NAM' AS Company, LTRIM(RTRIM(dmonth)) AS Month, LTRIM(RTRIM(dyear)) AS Year, LTRIM(RTRIM(citemno)) AS Item, SUM(nonhand) AS Qty, 
                      SUM(ntotcost) AS Cost
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs_monthly
GROUP BY LTRIM(RTRIM(dmonth)), LTRIM(RTRIM(dyear)), LTRIM(RTRIM(citemno))
HAVING      (SUM(nonhand) <> 0)
union all
SELECT     Company,  Month,Year, Item, Qty , Cost
FROM         dbo.Monthly_Onhand_History

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY2
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Company, dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Month, dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Year, dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Item, 
                      dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Qty, dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Cost, dbo.AG_Item.cdescript, dbo.AG_Item.ctype, dbo.AG_Item.cclass
FROM         dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Item ON dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Company = dbo.AG_Item.Company AND dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY.Item = dbo.AG_Item.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Recruits_Sales1
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Member #], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Member Name], dbo.arcust.csponsor AS [Sponsor #], arcust_1.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], 
                      dbo.arcust.dcreate AS [Date Joined], dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], DATEDIFF(day, dbo.arcust.dcreate, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Days, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS [Amount Excl], SUM(dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Amount Incl], arcust.cclass AS [Cust Class], 
                      '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (LEFT(dbo.icitem.citemno, 2) BETWEEN '10' AND 'AS') AND (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.lmlm = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate <> 50.00)
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.csponsor, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.arcust.dcreate, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, DATEDIFF(day, dbo.arcust.dcreate,

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_AR1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.AG_glacct.cdescript, 
                      'Sales' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) + SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass = 'Export') 
                      THEN 'Export' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(ag_arcust.cclass)) = 'INTERCO') THEN 'Inter Company' WHEN ((dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass <> 'Export' OR
                      ltrim(rtrim(dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass)) <> 'INTERCO') AND ndiscrate = 0) THEN 'Non Discountable' ELSE 'Discountable' END AS RecGroup, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[RSP 80]) AS AmountEx, dbo.AG_REP_DRP.RSP80 AS DRP, cItemno, ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice) AS Day
FROM         dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.AG_glacct.ccatgid RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB ON dbo.AG_glacct.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company AND dbo.AG_glacct.cacctid = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_REP_DRP ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc = dbo.AG_REP_DRP.Account AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_REP_DRP.Company AND 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year = dbo.AG_REP_DRP.Year AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month = dbo.AG_REP_DRP.Month AND 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Discountable = dbo.AG_REP_DRP.Discountable LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.AG_glacct.cdescript, 
                      dbo.glcatg.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP_DRP.RSP80, ndiscrate, CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass = 'Export') THEN 'Export' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(ag_arcust.cclass)) 
                      = 'INTERCO') THEN 'Inter Company' WHEN ((dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass <> 'Export' OR
                      ltrim(rtrim(dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass)) <> 'INTERCO') AND ndiscrate = 0) THEN 'Non Discountable' ELSE 'Discountable' END, citemno, datename(day, dinvoice)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, 'VAT' AS Expr1, 'VAT' AS Expr2, 'VAT' AS Type, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS Amount, 'VAT' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.vat) AS AmountEx, 0 AS DRP, '' AS citemno, 0 AS ndiscrate, 
                      datename(day, dinvoice) AS Day
FROM         dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.AG_glacct.ccatgid RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB ON dbo.AG_glacct.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company AND dbo.AG_glacct.cacctid = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.glcatg.cdescript, datename(day, dinvoice)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 'Discount Allowed' AS Description, 
                      'Discount Allowed' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) AS Amount, 'Discountable' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) 
                      AS AmountEx, 0 AS DRP, '' AS citemno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate AS ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice) AS Day
FROM         dbo.AG_arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB ON dbo.AG_arrevn.crevncode = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevncode AND 
                      dbo.AG_arrevn.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Discountable = 'Discountable') AND (RTRIM(dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass) <> 'Export') AND (LEFT(dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 6) = '490000') AND 
                      dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice)
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 'Discount Allowed' AS Description, 
                      'Discount Allowed' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) AS Amount, 'Non Discountable' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) 
                      AS AmountEx, 0 AS DRP, citemno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate AS ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice) AS Day
FROM         dbo.AG_arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB ON dbo.AG_arrevn.crevncode = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevncode AND 
                      dbo.AG_arrevn.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Discountable = 'NonDiscountable') AND (RTRIM(dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass) <> 'Export') AND dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, ag_arrevn.cdiscacc, citemno, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice)
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 'Discount Allowed' AS Description, 
                      'Discount Allowed' AS Type, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) AS Amount, 'Export' AS RecGroup, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) AS AmountEx, 
                      0 AS DRP, '' AS citemno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate AS ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice) AS Day
FROM         dbo.AG_arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB ON dbo.AG_arrevn.crevncode = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevncode AND 
                      dbo.AG_arrevn.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (RTRIM(dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass) = 'Export') AND (LEFT(dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 6) = '490000') AND dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.crevnacc, dbo.AG_arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.ndiscrate, datename(day, dinvoice)
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item_BB.[Discount 25]) <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     CASE WHEN (Company = '3.NAM') THEN '2.NAM' ELSE company END AS Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, cyear, Month, date, Account_Code, 
                      [Account Description], 'Consultant Rebates' AS Type, Amount * - 1 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 'Discountable' AS RecGroup, Amount * - 1 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS DRP,

SELECT     dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Year, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Month,

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_AR4
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Year, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Month, CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_REP_AR2.cclass IS NULL) THEN '' ELSE dbo.AG_REP_AR2.cclass END AS cclass, 
                      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Main_Group, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ctrsno, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.cdescript, 
                      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.cobjno, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.creference, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.csource, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ctrstype, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble IS NULL) THEN 3 ELSE dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble END AS ldscntble, dbo.AG_Item.citemno
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Item ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company = dbo.AG_Item.Company AND dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item = dbo.AG_Item.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_Con1
AS
SELECT     year, month, Date, Type, recgroup AS Sub, RTRIM(crevnacc) AS Code, RTRIM(cdescript) AS Description, Amount AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 
                      AmountEx AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, CASE WHEN ((ndiscrate = 25.00 AND recgroup = 'Discountable') OR
                      (recgroup = 'Non Discountable')) THEN DRP ELSE 0 END AS DRP, 0 AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, citemno, CASE WHEN (type = 'Cost of Sales' AND 
                      recgroup <> 'Journal') THEN 0 ELSE Amount END AS SA_Disc, 0 AS NAM_Disc, ndiscrate AS Disc, day
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR1
WHERE     (Company = '1.SA')
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, Month, date, Main_Group AS Type, 'General Ledger' AS Sub, Account_Code, [Account Description], 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 
                      Amount * - 1 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, Amount * - 1 AS SA_GL_AmountExcll, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS DRP, 0 AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, '' AS citemno, 0 AS SA_Disc, 0 AS NAM_Disc, 0 AS Disc, 1 AS Day
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_INC3
WHERE     (Company = '1.SA') AND (LEFT(Account_Code, 6) NOT IN ('642150', '642200', '800100'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     year, month, Date, Type, CASE WHEN (RecGroup = 'Export' AND Type = 'Sales') THEN 'Export' WHEN (recgroup <> 'Export' AND ndiscrate = 0 AND type = 'Sales' AND 
                      recgroup <> 'Journal') THEN 'Non Discountable' WHEN (recgroup <> 'Export' AND ndiscrate <> 0 AND Type = 'Sales') THEN 'Discountable' WHEN (recgroup = 'Journal')
                       THEN 'Journal' ELSE recgroup END AS Sub, RTRIM(crevnacc) AS Code, RTRIM(cdescript) AS Description, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 
                      0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcl, Amount AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, AmountEx AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, CASE WHEN ((ndiscrate = 25.00 AND recgroup = 'Discountable') OR
                      (recgroup = 'Non Discountable')) THEN DRP ELSE 0 END AS DRP, 0 AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, citemno, 0 AS SA_Disc, CASE WHEN (type = 'Cost of Sales' AND 
                      recgroup <> 'Journal') THEN 0 ELSE Amount END AS NAM_Disc, ndiscrate AS Disc, day
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR1
WHERE     (Company = '2.NAM')
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, Month, date, Main_Group AS Type, 'General Ledger' AS Sub, Account_Code, [Account Description], 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 
                      0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcll, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, Amount * - 1 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 
                      AmountEx * - 1 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS DRP, 0 AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, '' AS citemno, 0 AS SA_Disc, 0 AS NAM_Disc, 0 AS Disc, 1 AS Day
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_INC3
WHERE     (Company = '3.NAM') AND (LEFT(Account_Code, 6) NOT IN ('642150', '642200', '800100'))
UNION ALL
