CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_INC3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Company, 'General Ledger' AS Module, cyear, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, RTRIM(cacctid) 
                      AS Account_Code, RTRIM(cdescript) AS [Account Description], Type, Amount, CASE WHEN (LEFT(cacctid, 6) = '480000') 
                      THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (type = 'Revenue') THEN 'Sales' WHEN (cdescript = 'Discount Allowed') THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN ((type = 'Cost of Sales') 
                      AND (LEFT(cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))) THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (type = 'Other Revenue') THEN 'Other Income' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Main_Group, 
                      Amount AS AmountEx
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_INC2
GROUP BY Company, cyear, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime), cacctid, cdescript, Type, Amount
HAVING      (CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_JNL
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT '1.SA' AS Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS Month, 
                      CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.gltrsn.cacctid)) AS GL_Code, 
                      RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.glacct.cdescript)) AS GL_Description, CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript))) = 'Revenue' THEN 'Sales' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript))) 
                      = 'Cost of Sales' THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LEFT(gltrsn.cacctid, 6)))) = '480000' THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LEFT(gltrsn.cacctid, 6)))) 
                      = '490000' THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN (rtrim(ccatgtype) IN ('Income', 'Other Income')) THEN 'Other Income' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Type, 
                      CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript)) IN ('Cost of Sales', 'Revenue')) THEN dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt * - 1 ELSE dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt END AS Amount, 
                      'Journal' AS RecGroup, CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript)) IN ('Revenue', 'Cost of Sales')) 
                      THEN dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt * - 1 ELSE dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt END AS Amount_Ex
FROM         dbo.gltrsn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.gltrsn.csource = 'GL') AND (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1')) AND (dbo.gltrsn.dtrs > '2008/12/31') AND (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript)) 
                      NOT IN ('Cost of Sales')) AND dtrs >  '2015/04/30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT '2.NAM' AS Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, DATENAME(year, amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS Month, CAST(DATENAME(year, amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) + '/' + DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, RTRIM(LTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.cacctid)) AS GL_Code, RTRIM(LTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.glacct.cdescript)) 
                      AS GL_Description, CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript))) = 'Revenue' THEN 'Sales' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(glcatg.cdescript))) 
                      = 'Cost of Sales' THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LEFT(gltrsn.cacctid, 6)))) = '480000' THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(LEFT(gltrsn.cacctid, 6)))) 
                      = '490000' THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN (rtrim(ccatgtype) IN ('Income', 'Other Income')) THEN 'Other Income' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Type, 
                      CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) IN ('Revenue', 'Cost of Sales')) 
                      THEN amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt * - 1 ELSE amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt END AS Amount, 'Journal' AS RecGroup, 
                      CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) IN ('Cost of Sales', 'Revenue')) 
                      THEN amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt * - 1 ELSE amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt END AS Amount_Ex
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.glacct ON amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = amanniquenam.dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg ON amanniquenam.dbo.glacct.ccatgid = amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.csource = 'GL') AND (amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1')) AND 
                      (amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn.dtrs >  '2015/04/30') AND (ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) NOT IN ('Cost of Sales'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP_KIT
AS
SELECT     '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS TC, ltrim(rtrim(dbo.icitem.citemno)) as citemno
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1)
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     '2.NAM' AS Company, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno, SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS TC, 
                      ltrim(rtrim(amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno)) as citemno
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1)
GROUP BY amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [RSP 100] - [RSP 80] AS [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, date, 
                      cdescript, cinvno, crevncode, crevnacc, cclass, cprodline, ncost, Total_Cost, ctype, Discountable, vat, CASE WHEN (expr1 = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Cust, CASE WHEN ([RSP 100] = [RSP 80]) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, ccustno, ccompany, cslpnno, 
                      dinvoice, Warehouse, spon
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP1a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      icitem.ctype, aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, 
                      aritrs.lstock, arcust.cstate AS Region, aritrs.nprice, aritrs.cwarehouse, aritrs.ndiscrate,  dbo.arcust.cclass as Cust_Class
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     dinvoice > '2007/12/31'
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, aritrsh.lstock, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, arcust.cstate AS Region, aritrsh.nprice, 
                      aritrsh.cwarehouse, aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.arcust.cclass as Cust_Class
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     dinvoice > '2007/12/31'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cinvno, citemno, cdescript, nshipqty, [RSP 100], Discount_Promo, [RSP 80], Discount_25, [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, crevncode, ccustno, ccompany, 
                      cclass, cprodline, Expr1, cslpnno, cterr, dinvoice, ncost, Total_Cost, ctype, spon, Discountable, lstock, vat, Region, nprice, cwarehouse, ndiscrate, cust_class
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2007/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP1b
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Comp_Code, icitem_1.cdescript, CASE WHEN (icitem_1.nprice <> 0) THEN icitem_1.nprice / dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal ELSE 0 END AS Weight, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.nUnits * dbo.icikit.nqty AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, icitem_1.nprice, dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, icitem_1.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno AS Comp_Code, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 1 AS weight, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.icitem.nprice, 
                      dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP1c
AS
SELECT     DATENAME(year, AG_REP3b.date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, AG_REP3b.date) AS Month, AG_REP3b.date, AG_REP3b.Comp_Code, AG_REP3b.cdescript, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype) AS ctype, AG_REP3b.Comp_Qty AS Qty_F, AG_REP3b.RSP100 AS RSP100_F, AG_REP3b.Disc_Promo AS DiscountPromo_F, 
                      AG_REP3b.RSP80 AS RSP80_F, AG_REP3b.Disc25 AS Discount25_F, AG_REP3b.RSP60 AS RSP60_F, AG_REP3b.Total_Cost AS TC_F, AG_REP3b.Promotion, 
                      '' AS crevnacc, AG_REP3b.cprodline AS Prod_Line, AG_REP3b.cclass AS Class, AG_REP3b.crevnacc AS revcode, '1.SA' AS Company, 'Forecast' AS Export_Type, 
                      '' AS cinvno, 'Forecast' AS Type, Discountable, ccustno, ccompany, date AS Inv_Date, '' as cwarehouse
FROM         AG_REP3b INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON AG_REP3b.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     year, month, date, Component_Code, Component_Desc, RTRIM(ctype) AS ctype, Component_Qty AS Qty_A, [RSP 100] AS RSP100_A, 
                      [Discount Promo] AS DiscountPromo_A, [RSP 80] AS RSP80_A, [Discount 25] AS Discount25_A, [Net Invoice Value] AS RSP60_A, Total_Cost AS TC_A, Promotion, 
                      crevnacc, cprodline AS Prod_Line, cclass AS Class, crevnacc AS revcode, Company, Export_Type, cinvno, 'Actual' AS Type, Discountable, ccustno, ccompany, 
                      dinvoice AS Inv_Date,cwarehouse
FROM         AG_REP5a

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REP1.citemno, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.Units) AS Units, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.[Discount Promo]) 
                      AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.[Discount 25]) AS [Discount 25], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.[Net Invoice Value]) 
                      AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REP1.year, dbo.AG_REP1.month, dbo.AG_REP1.Company, dbo.AG_REP1.date, dbo.AG_REP1.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP1.crevnacc, 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REP1.Total_Cost) AS [Total Cost], dbo.AG_REP1.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_REP1.Promotion, 0 AS nqtylimit, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP1.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REP1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REP1.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1.cinvno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.AG_REP1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP1.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo AND dbo.AG_REP1.date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REP1.citemno, dbo.AG_REP1.year, dbo.AG_REP1.month, dbo.AG_REP1.Company, dbo.AG_REP1.date, dbo.AG_REP1.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP1.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_REP1.Promotion, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_REP1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP1.ccompany, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REP1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REP1.spon, dbo.AG_REP1.cinvno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
ORDER BY dbo.AG_REP1.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP2a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REP1a.citemno, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.nshipqty) AS Units, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.Discount_Promo) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.Discount_25) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REP1a.year, dbo.AG_REP1a.month, dbo.AG_REP1a.Company, 
                      CAST(dbo.AG_REP1a.year + '/' + dbo.AG_REP1a.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.AG_REP1a.cdescript, LTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1a.cinvno) AS cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1a.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP1a.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP1a.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP1a.cclass, dbo.AG_REP1a.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1a.Expr1, dbo.AG_REP1a.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REP1a.cterr, dbo.AG_REP1a.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP1a.ncost, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1a.ctype) AS ctype, dbo.AG_REP1a.spon, dbo.AG_REP1a.Discountable, SUM(dbo.AG_REP1a.vat) AS vat, dbo.AG_REP1a.lstock, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc AS COS, dbo.AG_REP1a.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.AG_REP1a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.AG_REP1a.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REP1a.citemno, dbo.AG_REP1a.year, dbo.AG_REP1a.month, dbo.AG_REP1a.Company, dbo.AG_REP1a.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP1a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1a.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP1a.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP1a.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP1a.cclass, dbo.AG_REP1a.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1a.Expr1, dbo.AG_REP1a.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REP1a.cterr, dbo.AG_REP1a.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP1a.ncost, dbo.AG_REP1a.ctype, dbo.AG_REP1a.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1a.Discountable, dbo.AG_REP1a.lstock, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.AG_REP1a.cwarehouse
ORDER BY dbo.AG_REP1a.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP2b
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REP1b.date, dbo.AG_REP1b.ckititemno, dbo.AG_REP1b.Comp_Code, dbo.AG_REP1b.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP1b.Weight, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1b.Comp_Qty, dbo.AG_REP1b.nDollars, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN AG_REP1b.nDollars * weight ELSE comp_qty * nprice * weight END AS RSP100, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN comp_qty * nprice * weight ELSE AG_REP1b.nDollars * weight END AS RSP80, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.AG_REP1b.Comp_Qty AS Total_Cost
FROM         dbo.AG_REP1b LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1 ON dbo.AG_REP1b.date = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1.Date AND dbo.AG_REP1b.ckititemno = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1.cItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.AG_REP1b.Comp_Code = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP2c
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.Comp_Code) AS ItemCode, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.cdescript) AS ItemDescription, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.ctype) AS ItemType, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.Prod_Line) AS ItemProdLine, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.Class) AS ItemClass, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype1) AS Type1, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype2) 
                      AS Type2, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype3) AS Type3, dbo.AG_REP1c.Company, dbo.AG_REP1c.Export_Type AS ExportCustomer, dbo.AG_REP1c.Discountable, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1c.Promotion, RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.cinvno)) AS cinvno, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.Type) AS Type, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.ccustno) AS ccustno, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.ccompany) AS ccompany, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP1c.revcode) AS Revcode, dbo.AG_REP1c.Qty_F AS Units, dbo.AG_REP1c.RSP100_F AS PriceList, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1c.DiscountPromo_F AS DiscountPromo, dbo.AG_REP1c.RSP80_F AS RSP, dbo.AG_REP1c.Discount25_F AS Discount, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1c.RSP60_F AS NetInvoiceValue, dbo.AG_REP1c.TC_F AS TotalCost, dbo.AG_REP1c.date, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.AG_REP1c.Inv_Date, 
                      dbo.AG_REP1c.cwarehouse, dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass AS Cust_class
FROM         dbo.AG_REP1c INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP1c.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.AG_REP1c.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company AND dbo.AG_REP1c.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP3
AS
SELECT     dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cdescript, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Company, 
                      dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Export_Cust, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) * 1.14 ELSE (nfrcsqty * npriceexl) 
                      * 1.14 END AS RSP80, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars, CASE WHEN (nfrcsqty IS NULL) THEN nunits ELSE dbo.CB_New_Camp.nfrcsqty END AS nunits, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nprice, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars ELSE nfrcsqty * npriceexl END AS RSP100, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN nprice ELSE npriceexl END AS Special_Price, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nUnits ELSE cb_new_cost.cost * nfrcsqty END AS Total_Cost, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nQtylimit, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.ldscntble, dbo.CB_New_Cost.LRC, dbo.CB_New_Cost.STDC, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nDiscount, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cpageno, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cclass, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.cSpontype, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cpagepos, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nversion, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lfree, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lspecial, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.lportal, dbo.CB_New_Camp.csponcat, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) 
                      * 0.14 ELSE (nfrcsqty * npriceexl) * 0.14 END AS VAT, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) ELSE (nfrcsqty * npriceexl) 
                      END AS [RSP 80 Excl], dbo.CB_New_Camp.lInactive, CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END AS S1, dbo.CB_New_Camp.dfrom2, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.dto2, dbo.CB_New_Camp.dFrom, CASE WHEN (dfrom IS NULL) THEN dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date ELSE dfrom END AS Date2
FROM         dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date AND dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date > '2013/04/30')
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cdescript, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Company, 
                      dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Export_Cust, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp2.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) * 1.14 ELSE (nPriceExl * nunits) 
                      * 1.14 END AS RSP80, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars, CASE WHEN (nfrcsqty IS NULL) THEN nunits WHEN (nfrcsqty = 0) 
                      THEN nunits ELSE dbo.CB_New_Camp2.nfrcsqty END AS nunits, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cCampNO, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nprice, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars ELSE dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars END AS RSP100, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN nprice ELSE npriceexl END AS Special_Price, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nUnits ELSE cb_new_cost.cost * nunits END AS Total_Cost, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nQtylimit, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nPriceExl, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.ldscntble, dbo.CB_New_Cost.LRC, dbo.CB_New_Cost.STDC, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nDiscount, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpageno, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cclass, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpagepos, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nversion, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lfree, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lspecial, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lportal, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.csponcat, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp2.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) 
                      * 0.14 ELSE (nfrcsqty * npriceexl) * 0.14 END AS VAT, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp2.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (nprice * nunits) ELSE (nfrcsqty * npriceexl) 
                      END AS [RSP 80 Excl], dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lInactive, CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END AS S1, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dfrom2, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dto2, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dfrom, CASE WHEN (dfrom IS NULL) THEN dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date ELSE dfrom END AS Date2
FROM         dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2 ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.Date AND dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date < '2013/05/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP3a
AS
SELECT     AG_REP2a.citemno, AG_REP2a.Units, AG_REP2a.[RSP 100], AG_REP2a.[Discount Promo], AG_REP2a.[RSP 80], AG_REP2a.[Discount 25], 
                      AG_REP2a.[Net Invoice Value], AG_REP2a.year, AG_REP2a.month, AG_REP2a.Company, AG_REP2a.date, AG_REP2a.cdescript, AG_REP2a.cinvno, 
                      AG_REP2a.crevncode, AG_REP2a.crevnacc, AG_REP2a.ccustno, AG_REP2a.ccompany, AG_REP2a.cclass, AG_REP2a.cprodline, AG_REP2a.Expr1, 
                      AG_REP2a.cslpnno, AG_REP2a.cterr, AG_REP2a.dinvoice, AG_REP2a.ncost, AG_REP2a.Total_Cost, AG_REP2a.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Component_Code, icitem_1.cdescript AS Component_Desc, CASE WHEN (AG_REP2a.Units < 0) THEN (dbo.icikit.nqty * AG_REP2a.Units) 
                      ELSE dbo.icikit.nqty * AG_REP2a.Units END AS Component_Qty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'KIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS, cwarehouse
FROM         AG_REP2a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON AG_REP2a.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND dinvoice > '2007/12/31'
UNION ALL
SELECT     '' AS citemno, 0 AS Units, AG_REP2a.[RSP 100], AG_REP2a.[Discount Promo], AG_REP2a.[RSP 80], AG_REP2a.[Discount 25], AG_REP2a.[Net Invoice Value], 
                      AG_REP2a.year, AG_REP2a.month, AG_REP2a.Company, AG_REP2a.date, '' AS cdescript, AG_REP2a.cinvno, AG_REP2a.crevncode, AG_REP2a.crevnacc, 
                      AG_REP2a.ccustno, AG_REP2a.ccompany, AG_REP2a.cclass, AG_REP2a.cprodline, AG_REP2a.Expr1, AG_REP2a.cslpnno, AG_REP2a.cterr, AG_REP2a.dinvoice, 
                      AG_REP2a.ncost, AG_REP2a.Total_Cost, AG_REP2a.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, AG_REP2a.citemno AS Component_Code, 
                      AG_REP2a.cdescript AS Component_Desc, AG_REP2a.Units AS Component_Qty, AG_REP2a.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'NONKIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS, cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON icitem_1.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      AG_REP2a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON AG_REP2a.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0) AND dinvoice > '2007/12/31'

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP3b
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REP2b.date, dbo.AG_REP2b.ckititemno, dbo.AG_REP2b.Comp_Code, dbo.AG_REP2b.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP2b.Weight, 
                      dbo.AG_REP2b.Comp_Qty, dbo.AG_REP2b.nDollars, dbo.AG_REP2b.RSP100, dbo.AG_REP2b.RSP100 - dbo.AG_REP2b.RSP80 AS Disc_Promo, dbo.AG_REP2b.RSP80, 
                      CASE WHEN (AG_REP2b.RSP100 - AG_REP2b.RSP80 = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN (RSP80 - (RSP80 - RSP80 * 0.25)) ELSE 0 END AS Disc25, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN RSP80 - 0.25 * RSP80 ELSE RSP80 END AS RSP60, 
                      dbo.AG_REP2b.Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.crevnacc, dbo.icitem.csponcat, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'Non Discountable' END AS Discountable, 'Forecast' AS cinvno, 'Forcast' AS ccustno, 'Forecast' AS ccompany
FROM         dbo.AG_REP2b INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP2b.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.AG_REP2b.date

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP4
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP3.cItemNo, dbo.AG_REP3.nunits, dbo.AG_REP3.RSP100, dbo.AG_REP3.RSP100 - dbo.AG_REP3.RSP80 AS [Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REP3.RSP80, 
                      CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN dbo.AG_REP3.[RSP 80 Excl] - (dbo.AG_REP3.[RSP 80 Excl] * 0.25) ELSE rsp80 END AS FC_RSP60, DATENAME(year, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3.Date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.AG_REP3.Date) AS Month, dbo.AG_REP3.Company, dbo.AG_REP3.Date, dbo.AG_REP3.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP3.Total_Cost, dbo.AG_REP3.Export_Cust, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.AG_REP3.nprice, dbo.AG_REP3.Special_Price, dbo.AG_REP3.nQtylimit, dbo.AG_REP3.nDiscount, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3.cpageno, dbo.AG_REP3.cmajorcat, dbo.AG_REP3.cclass, dbo.AG_REP3.cgfttype, dbo.AG_REP3.cSpontype, dbo.AG_REP3.cpagepos, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3.nversion, dbo.AG_REP3.lfree, dbo.AG_REP3.lspecial, dbo.AG_REP3.lportal, dbo.AG_REP3.csponcat, dbo.AG_REP3.lInactive, dbo.AG_REP3.VAT, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3.[RSP 80 Excl], dbo.AG_REP3.S1, dbo.AG_REP3.dfrom2, dbo.AG_REP3.dto2
FROM         dbo.AG_REP3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev ON dbo.AG_REP3.cItemNo = dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP4a
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP3a.citemno, dbo.AG_REP3a.Units, dbo.AG_REP3a.[RSP 100], dbo.AG_REP3a.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REP3a.[RSP 80], dbo.AG_REP3a.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REP3a.year, dbo.AG_REP3a.month, dbo.AG_REP3a.Company, dbo.AG_REP3a.date, dbo.AG_REP3a.cdescript, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.cinvno, dbo.AG_REP3a.crevncode, dbo.AG_REP3a.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP3a.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP3a.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP3a.cclass, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.cprodline, dbo.AG_REP3a.Expr1, dbo.AG_REP3a.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REP3a.cterr, dbo.AG_REP3a.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP3a.ncost, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.Total_Cost, dbo.AG_REP3a.ctype, dbo.AG_REP3a.Kit_Code, dbo.AG_REP3a.Component_Code, dbo.AG_REP3a.Component_Desc, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.Component_Qty, dbo.AG_REP3a.Component_Cost, dbo.AG_REP3a.nprice, dbo.AG_REP3a.component_Value, dbo.AG_REP3a.Kit_Item, 
                      CASE WHEN (component_code IS NULL) THEN Units ELSE Component_Qty END AS Joint_Qty, CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN component_Value ELSE [RSP 80] END AS Joint_RSP_80, dbo.AG_REP3a.test, dbo.CB_KitSum.CompCount, dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal, 
                      CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT' AND cb_kitsum.kitval <> 0) THEN component_value / kitval ELSE 0 END AS Weighted_Ave, dbo.AG_REP3a.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REP3a.Discountable, dbo.AG_REP3a.vat, dbo.AG_REP3a.COS, dbo.AG_REP3a.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.AG_REP3a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.AG_REP3a.Kit_Code = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP5
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP4.cItemNo, dbo.AG_REP4.nunits, dbo.AG_REP4.RSP100, dbo.AG_REP4.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REP4.RSP80, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4.RSP80 - dbo.AG_REP4.FC_RSP60 AS [Discount 25], dbo.AG_REP4.FC_RSP60 AS RSP60, dbo.AG_REP4.Year, dbo.AG_REP4.Month, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4.Company, dbo.AG_REP4.Date, dbo.AG_REP4.cdescript, dbo.AG_REP4.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP4.Total_Cost, dbo.AG_REP4.Export_Cust, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4.Promotion, dbo.AG_REP4.nprice, dbo.AG_REP4.Special_Price, dbo.AG_REP4.nQtylimit, dbo.AG_REP4.nDiscount, dbo.AG_REP4.cpageno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4.cmajorcat, dbo.AG_REP4.cclass, dbo.AG_REP4.cgfttype, dbo.AG_REP4.cSpontype, dbo.AG_REP4.cpagepos, dbo.AG_REP4.nversion, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4.lfree, dbo.AG_REP4.lspecial, dbo.AG_REP4.lportal, dbo.AG_REP4.csponcat, dbo.AG_REP4.lInactive, dbo.AG_REP4.VAT, dbo.AG_REP4.[RSP 80 Excl], 
                      dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.AG_REP4.S1, dbo.AG_REP4.dfrom2, dbo.AG_REP4.dto2, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'DISCOUNTABLE' ELSE 'NON DISCOUNTABLE' END AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_REP4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP4.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP5a
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP4a.year, dbo.AG_REP4a.month, dbo.AG_REP4a.Company, dbo.AG_REP4a.date, dbo.AG_REP4a.cclass, dbo.AG_REP4a.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4a.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REP4a.ctype, dbo.AG_REP4a.Component_Code, dbo.AG_REP4a.Component_Desc, dbo.AG_REP4a.Component_Qty, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4a.Component_Cost, dbo.AG_REP4a.nprice, dbo.AG_REP4a.component_Value, dbo.AG_REP4a.Kit_Item, dbo.AG_REP4a.Weighted_Ave, 
                      CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.AG_REP4a.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (rtrim(cust2.cclass) = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Type, dbo.AG_REP4a.cinvno, dbo.AG_REP4a.COS, dbo.AG_REP4a.spon, dbo.AG_REP4a.Discountable, dbo.AG_REP4a.ccustno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP4a.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP4a.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.AG_REP4a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cust2 ON dbo.AG_REP4a.ccustno = dbo.cust2.ccustno AND dbo.AG_REP4a.Company = dbo.cust2.Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP6
AS
SELECT     citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, date, cdescript, crevnacc, [Total Cost], Export_Cust, 
                      'Actual' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, nPriceExl AS Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit, ccustno, ccompany, cinvno, spon, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.AG_REP2
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, nUnits, RSP100, [Discount Promo], RSP80, [Discount 25], RSP60, Year, Month, Company, Date, cdescript, crevnacc, Total_Cost, Export_Cust, 
                      'Forecast' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit, 'Forecast' AS ccustno, 'Forecast' AS ccompany, 'Forecast' AS cinvno, 
                      '' AS cspon, date
FROM         AG_REP5

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REP7
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP6.citemno) AS [Item No], RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP6.cdescript) AS [Item Description], dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.AG_REP6.spon, dbo.AG_REP6.Units, dbo.AG_REP6.[RSP 100] AS PRICELIST, 
                      dbo.AG_REP6.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REP6.[RSP 80] AS RSP, dbo.AG_REP6.[Discount 25], dbo.AG_REP6.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REP6.year, 
                      dbo.AG_REP6.month, dbo.AG_REP6.Company, dbo.AG_REP6.date, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP6.crevnacc) AS Account, dbo.AG_REP6.[Total Cost], dbo.AG_REP6.Export_Cust, 
                      dbo.AG_REP6.Type, dbo.AG_REP6.Normal_Price, dbo.AG_REP6.Special_Price, dbo.AG_REP6.Promotion, dbo.AG_REP6.nqtylimit, dbo.AG_REP6.ccustno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP6.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP6.cinvno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.AG_REP6 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP6.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPC1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, 
                      '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, icitem.ctype, aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, 
                      CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, aritrs.lstock, arcust.cstate AS Region, 
                      aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, arcust.cclass AS cust_class
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     LEFT(dinvoice, 11) = LEFT(getdate(), 11)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, aritrsh.lstock, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, arcust.cstate AS Region, aritrsh.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, arcust.cclass AS cust_class
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     LEFT(dinvoice, 11) = LEFT(getdate(), 11)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cinvno, citemno, cdescript, nshipqty, [RSP 100], Discount_Promo, [RSP 80], Discount_25, [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, crevncode, ccustno, ccompany, 
                      cclass, cprodline, Expr1, cslpnno, cterr, dinvoice, ncost, Total_Cost, ctype, spon, Discountable, vat, lstock, Region, nprice, cwarehouse, cust_class
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.cb_discounts
WHERE     LEFT(dinvoice, 11) = LEFT(getdate(), 11)

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPC2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REPC1.citemno, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.nshipqty) AS Units, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Discount_Promo) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Discount_25) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REPC1.year, dbo.AG_REPC1.month, dbo.AG_REPC1.Company, 
                      CAST(dbo.AG_REPC1.year + '/' + dbo.AG_REPC1.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.AG_REPC1.cdescript, LTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC1.cinvno) AS cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC1.cclass, dbo.AG_REPC1.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Expr1, dbo.AG_REPC1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC1.cterr, dbo.AG_REPC1.dinvoice, MAX(dbo.AG_REPC1.ncost) AS ncost, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Total_Cost) 
                      AS Total_Cost, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC1.ctype) AS ctype, dbo.AG_REPC1.spon, dbo.AG_REPC1.Discountable, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.vat) AS vat, dbo.AG_REPC1.lstock, 
                      CASE WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') 
                      THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') 
                      THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') 
                      THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS FinYear, CASE WHEN (expr1 = 'EXPORT') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS [Export Cusomer], 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, dbo.AG_REPC1.cust_class
FROM         dbo.AG_REPC1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REPC1.citemno, dbo.AG_REPC1.year, dbo.AG_REPC1.month, dbo.AG_REPC1.Company, dbo.AG_REPC1.cdescript, dbo.AG_REPC1.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC1.cclass, dbo.AG_REPC1.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Expr1, dbo.AG_REPC1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC1.cterr, dbo.AG_REPC1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPC1.ctype, dbo.AG_REPC1.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Discountable, dbo.AG_REPC1.lstock, CASE WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END, dbo.AG_REPC1.cwarehouse, dbo.AG_REPC1.cust_class
ORDER BY ncost

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPC3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [RSP 100] - [RSP 80] AS [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, date, 
                      cdescript, cinvno, crevncode, crevnacc, cclass, cprodline, ncost, Total_Cost, ctype, Discountable, vat, CASE WHEN (expr1 = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Cust, CASE WHEN ([RSP 100] = [RSP 80]) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, ccustno, ccompany, cslpnno, 
                      dinvoice, Warehouse, spon, cust_class
FROM         dbo.AG_REPC2

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPC4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REPC3.citemno, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.Units) AS Units, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.[Discount Promo]) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.[Discount 25]) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REPC3.year, dbo.AG_REPC3.month, dbo.AG_REPC3.Company, dbo.AG_REPC3.date, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC3.cdescript, dbo.AG_REPC3.crevnacc, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC3.Total_Cost) AS [Total Cost], dbo.AG_REPC3.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_REPC3.Promotion, 
                      0 AS nqtylimit, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_REPC3.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC3.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC3.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC3.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC3.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REPC3.spon, dbo.AG_REPC3.cinvno, dbo.AG_REPC3.cust_class
FROM         dbo.AG_REPC3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REPC3.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo AND dbo.AG_REPC3.date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REPC3.citemno, dbo.AG_REPC3.year, dbo.AG_REPC3.month, dbo.AG_REPC3.Company, dbo.AG_REPC3.date, dbo.AG_REPC3.cdescript, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC3.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPC3.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_REPC3.Promotion, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_REPC3.ccustno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC3.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC3.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC3.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPC3.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REPC3.spon, dbo.AG_REPC3.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC3.cust_class
ORDER BY dbo.AG_REPC3.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPC5
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC4.citemno) AS [Item No], RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC4.cdescript) AS [Item Description], dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.AG_REPC4.spon, dbo.AG_REPC4.Units, dbo.AG_REPC4.[RSP 100] AS PRICELIST, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC4.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REPC4.[RSP 80] AS RSP, dbo.AG_REPC4.[Discount 25], dbo.AG_REPC4.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REPC4.year, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC4.month, dbo.AG_REPC4.Company, dbo.AG_REPC4.date, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC4.crevnacc) AS Account, dbo.AG_REPC4.[Total Cost], 
                      dbo.AG_REPC4.Export_Cust, 'Actual' AS Type, dbo.AG_REPC4.nprice AS Normal_Price, dbo.AG_REPC4.nPriceExl AS Special_Price, dbo.AG_REPC4.Promotion, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC4.nqtylimit, dbo.AG_REPC4.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC4.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC4.cinvno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.AG_REPC4.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC4.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REPC4.cust_class
FROM         dbo.AG_REPC4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REPC4.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REPC1.citemno, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.nshipqty) AS Units, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Discount_Promo) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Discount_25) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REPC1.year, dbo.AG_REPC1.month, dbo.AG_REPC1.Company, 
                      CAST(dbo.AG_REPC1.year + '/' + dbo.AG_REPC1.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.AG_REPC1.cdescript, LTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC1.cinvno) AS cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC1.cclass, dbo.AG_REPC1.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Expr1, dbo.AG_REPC1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC1.cterr, dbo.AG_REPC1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPC1.ncost, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPC1.ctype) AS ctype, dbo.AG_REPC1.spon, dbo.AG_REPC1.Discountable, SUM(dbo.AG_REPC1.vat) AS vat, dbo.AG_REPC1.lstock, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc AS COS
FROM         dbo.AG_REPC1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REPC1.citemno, dbo.AG_REPC1.year, dbo.AG_REPC1.month, dbo.AG_REPC1.Company, dbo.AG_REPC1.cdescript, dbo.AG_REPC1.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPC1.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPC1.cclass, dbo.AG_REPC1.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Expr1, dbo.AG_REPC1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPC1.cterr, dbo.AG_REPC1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPC1.ncost, dbo.AG_REPC1.ctype, dbo.AG_REPC1.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REPC1.Discountable, dbo.AG_REPC1.lstock, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc
ORDER BY dbo.AG_REPC1.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD2
AS
SELECT     AG_REPD1.citemno, AG_REPD1.Units, AG_REPD1.[RSP 100], AG_REPD1.[Discount Promo], AG_REPD1.[RSP 80], AG_REPD1.[Discount 25], 
                      AG_REPD1.[Net Invoice Value], AG_REPD1.year, AG_REPD1.month, AG_REPD1.Company, AG_REPD1.date, AG_REPD1.cdescript, AG_REPD1.cinvno, 
                      AG_REPD1.crevncode, AG_REPD1.crevnacc, AG_REPD1.ccustno, AG_REPD1.ccompany, AG_REPD1.cclass, AG_REPD1.cprodline, AG_REPD1.Expr1, 
                      AG_REPD1.cslpnno, AG_REPD1.cterr, AG_REPD1.dinvoice, AG_REPD1.ncost, AG_REPD1.Total_Cost, AG_REPD1.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Component_Code, icitem_1.cdescript AS Component_Desc, CASE WHEN (AG_REPD1.Units < 0) THEN (dbo.icikit.nqty * AG_REPD1.Units) 
                      ELSE dbo.icikit.nqty * AG_REPD1.Units END AS Component_Qty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'KIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS
FROM         AG_REPD1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON AG_REPD1.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND dinvoice > '2007/12/31'
UNION ALL
SELECT     '' AS citemno, 0 AS Units, AG_REPD1.[RSP 100], AG_REPD1.[Discount Promo], AG_REPD1.[RSP 80], AG_REPD1.[Discount 25], AG_REPD1.[Net Invoice Value], 
                      AG_REPD1.year, AG_REPD1.month, AG_REPD1.Company, AG_REPD1.date, '' AS cdescript, AG_REPD1.cinvno, AG_REPD1.crevncode, AG_REPD1.crevnacc, 
                      AG_REPD1.ccustno, AG_REPD1.ccompany, AG_REPD1.cclass, AG_REPD1.cprodline, AG_REPD1.Expr1, AG_REPD1.cslpnno, AG_REPD1.cterr, AG_REPD1.dinvoice, 
                      AG_REPD1.ncost, AG_REPD1.Total_Cost, AG_REPD1.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, AG_REPD1.citemno AS Component_Code, 
                      AG_REPD1.cdescript AS Component_Desc, AG_REPD1.Units AS Component_Qty, AG_REPD1.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'NONKIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS
FROM         dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON icitem_1.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      AG_REPD1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON AG_REPD1.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0) AND dinvoice > '2007/12/31'

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD3
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REPD2.citemno, dbo.AG_REPD2.Units, dbo.AG_REPD2.[RSP 100], dbo.AG_REPD2.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_REPD2.[RSP 80], dbo.AG_REPD2.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REPD2.year, dbo.AG_REPD2.month, dbo.AG_REPD2.Company, dbo.AG_REPD2.date, dbo.AG_REPD2.cdescript, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.cinvno, dbo.AG_REPD2.crevncode, dbo.AG_REPD2.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REPD2.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPD2.ccompany, dbo.AG_REPD2.cclass, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.cprodline, dbo.AG_REPD2.Expr1, dbo.AG_REPD2.cslpnno, dbo.AG_REPD2.cterr, dbo.AG_REPD2.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPD2.ncost, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.Total_Cost, dbo.AG_REPD2.ctype, dbo.AG_REPD2.Kit_Code, dbo.AG_REPD2.Component_Code, dbo.AG_REPD2.Component_Desc, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.Component_Qty, dbo.AG_REPD2.Component_Cost, dbo.AG_REPD2.nprice, dbo.AG_REPD2.component_Value, dbo.AG_REPD2.Kit_Item, 
                      CASE WHEN (component_code IS NULL) THEN Units ELSE Component_Qty END AS Joint_Qty, CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN component_Value ELSE [RSP 80] END AS Joint_RSP_80, dbo.AG_REPD2.test, dbo.CB_KitSum.CompCount, dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal, 
                      CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT' AND cb_kitsum.kitval <> 0) THEN component_value / kitval ELSE 0 END AS Weighted_Ave, dbo.AG_REPD2.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD2.Discountable, dbo.AG_REPD2.vat, dbo.AG_REPD2.COS
FROM         dbo.AG_REPD2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.AG_REPD2.Kit_Code = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD4
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REPD3.year, dbo.AG_REPD3.month, dbo.AG_REPD3.Company, dbo.AG_REPD3.date, dbo.AG_REPD3.cclass, dbo.AG_REPD3.cprodline, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD3.dinvoice, dbo.AG_REPD3.ctype, dbo.AG_REPD3.Component_Code, dbo.AG_REPD3.Component_Desc, dbo.AG_REPD3.Component_Qty, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD3.Component_Cost, dbo.AG_REPD3.nprice, dbo.AG_REPD3.component_Value, dbo.AG_REPD3.Kit_Item, dbo.AG_REPD3.Weighted_Ave, 
                      CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.AG_REPD3.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (rtrim(cust2.cclass) = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Type, dbo.AG_REPD3.cinvno, dbo.AG_REPD3.COS, dbo.AG_REPD3.spon, dbo.AG_REPD3.Discountable, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD3.ccustno, dbo.AG_REPD3.ccompany
FROM         dbo.AG_REPD3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cust2 ON dbo.AG_REPD3.ccustno = dbo.cust2.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD5
AS
SELECT     year, month, date, Component_Code, Component_Desc, RTRIM(ctype) AS ctype, Component_Qty AS Qty_A, [RSP 100] AS RSP100_A, 
                      [Discount Promo] AS DiscountPromo_A, [RSP 80] AS RSP80_A, [Discount 25] AS Discount25_A, [Net Invoice Value] AS RSP60_A, Total_Cost AS TC_A, Promotion, 
                      crevnacc, cprodline AS Prod_Line, cclass AS Class, crevnacc AS revcode, Company, Export_Type, cinvno, 'Actual' AS Type, Discountable, ccustno, ccompany
FROM         dbo.AG_REPD4

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_REPD6
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.Component_Code) AS ItemCode, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.Component_Desc) AS ItemDescription, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.ctype) AS ItemType, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.Prod_Line) AS ItemProdLine, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.Class) AS ItemClass, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype1) AS Type1, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype2) 
                      AS Type2, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype3) AS Type3, dbo.AG_REPD5.Company, dbo.AG_REPD5.Export_Type AS ExportCustomer, dbo.AG_REPD5.Discountable, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD5.Promotion, RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.cinvno)) AS cinvno, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.Type) AS Type, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.ccustno) AS ccustno, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.ccompany) AS ccompany, RTRIM(dbo.AG_REPD5.revcode) AS Revcode, dbo.AG_REPD5.Qty_A AS Units, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD5.RSP100_A AS PriceList, dbo.AG_REPD5.DiscountPromo_A AS DiscountPromo, dbo.AG_REPD5.RSP80_A AS RSP, 
                      dbo.AG_REPD5.Discount25_A AS Discount, dbo.AG_REPD5.RSP60_A AS NetInvoiceValue, dbo.AG_REPD5.TC_A AS TotalCost, dbo.AG_REPD5.date
FROM         dbo.AG_REPD5 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REPD5.Component_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_S1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 100], 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 100] - dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80] AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (cb_discount_item.company = '1.SA' AND 
                      dbo.AG_CUST1.cclass <> 'Export') THEN dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80] * 1.14 WHEN (cb_discount_item.company = '1.SA' AND dbo.AG_CUST1.cclass = 'Export') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] ELSE dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80] * 1.15 END AS [RSP 80], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Net Invoice Value], 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cinvno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevncode, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cclass, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cprodline, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ncost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ctype, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Discountable, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.vat, 
                      CASE WHEN (expr1 = 'EXPORT') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Cust, CASE WHEN ([RSP 100] = [RSP 80]) 
                      THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccompany, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cslpnno, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Warehouse, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.spon, dbo.AG_CUST1.cclass AS Cust_Class, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80] AS [RSP 80 EXCL]
FROM         dbo.AG_GLCAT INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_GL ON dbo.AG_GLCAT.company = dbo.AG_GL.Company AND dbo.AG_GLCAT.ccatgid = dbo.AG_GL.ccatgid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_CUST1 ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company = dbo.AG_CUST1.Company AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno = dbo.AG_CUST1.ccustno ON 
                      dbo.AG_GL.cacctid = dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc AND dbo.AG_GL.Company = dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company
WHERE     (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_GLCAT.cdescript)) = 'Revenue')

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_S2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_S1.citemno, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([units]) / counts ELSE SUM([units]) END AS Units, 
                      CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 100]) / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 100]) END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) 
                      THEN SUM([discount promo]) / counts ELSE SUM([Discount Promo]) END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 80]) 
                      / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 80]) END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([discount 25]) / counts ELSE SUM([discount 25]) END AS [Discount 25], 
                      CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([Net Invoice Value]) / counts ELSE SUM([Net Invoice Value]) END AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_S1.year, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.month, dbo.AG_S1.Company, dbo.AG_S1.date, dbo.AG_S1.cdescript, dbo.AG_S1.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([Total_Cost]) 
                      / counts ELSE SUM([Total_Cost]) END AS [Total Cost], dbo.AG_S1.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_S1.Promotion, 0 AS nqtylimit, dbo.AG_Item.nprice, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_S1.ccustno, dbo.AG_S1.ccompany, dbo.AG_S1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_S1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_S1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_S1.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Item.nstdcost, dbo.AG_S1.cclass, dbo.AG_S1.Cust_Class, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nDiscount, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpageno, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cgfttype, CASE WHEN (dinvoice < '2013/05/01' AND 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype IS NULL) THEN spon WHEN (dinvoice < '2013/05/01' AND dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype = '') 
                      THEN spon ELSE dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype END AS cspontype, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpagepos, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nversion, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lfree, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lspecial, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lportal, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.csponcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lInactive, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) 
                      THEN SUM([VAT]) / counts ELSE SUM([VAT]) END AS VAT, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 80 Excl]) / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 80 Excl]) 
                      END AS [RSP 80 Excl], dbo.AG_Item.lmlm, dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble, CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) 
                      THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END AS S1, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dfrom2, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dto2, dbo.AG_S1.Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_S1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2 ON dbo.AG_S1.month = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.month AND dbo.AG_S1.year = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.year AND 
                      dbo.AG_S1.citemno = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Item ON dbo.AG_S1.citemno = dbo.AG_Item.citemno AND dbo.AG_S1.Company = dbo.AG_Item.Company
GROUP BY dbo.AG_S1.citemno, dbo.AG_S1.year, dbo.AG_S1.month, dbo.AG_S1.Company, dbo.AG_S1.date, dbo.AG_S1.cdescript, dbo.AG_S1.crevnacc, dbo.AG_S1.Export_Cust, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.Promotion, dbo.AG_Item.nprice, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_S1.ccustno, dbo.AG_S1.ccompany, dbo.AG_S1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_S1.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_S1.spon, dbo.AG_S1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Item.nstdcost, dbo.AG_S1.cclass, dbo.AG_S1.Cust_Class, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nDiscount, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpageno, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cclass, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cgfttype, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpagepos, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nversion, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lfree, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lspecial, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lportal, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.csponcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lInactive, dbo.AG_Item.lmlm, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dfrom2, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dto2, dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.Counts, CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END, dbo.AG_S1.Discountable
ORDER BY dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_S6
AS
SELECT     citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (company = '1.SA') THEN [RSP 80] ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, 
                      month, Company, date, cdescript, crevnacc, [Total Cost], Export_Cust, 'Actual' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, nPriceExl AS Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit, 
                      ccustno, ccompany, cinvno, spon, dinvoice, warehouse, cust_class, nDiscount, cpageno, cmajorcat, cclass, cgfttype, CASE WHEN (cSpontype = '') 
                      THEN LEFT(csponcat, 1) WHEN (cSpontype IS NULL) THEN LEFT(csponcat, 1) ELSE cSpontype END AS cSpontype, cpagepos, nversion, lfree, lspecial, lportal, 
                      csponcat, lInactive, VAT, [RSP 80 Excl], lmlm, ldscntble, s1, dfrom2, dto2,Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_S2
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, nUnits, RSP100, [Discount Promo], RSP80, [Discount 25], RSP60, Year, Month, Company, Date, cdescript, crevnacc, Total_Cost, Export_Cust, 
                      'Forecast' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit, 'Forecast' AS ccustno, 'Forecast' AS ccompany, 'Forecast' AS cinvno, '' AS cspon, 
                      date, 'Forecast' AS warehouse, 'Forscast' AS Cust_Class, nDiscount, cpageno, cmajorcat, cclass, cgfttype, CASE WHEN (cSpontype = '') THEN LEFT(csponcat, 1) 
                      ELSE cSpontype END AS cSpontype, cpagepos, nversion, lfree, lspecial, lportal, csponcat, lInactive, VAT, [RSP 80 Excl], lmlm, ldscntble, s1, dfrom2, dto2,Discountable
FROM         AG_REP5

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_S7
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_S6.citemno) AS [Item No], RTRIM(dbo.AG_S6.cdescript) AS [Item Description], dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.AG_S6.spon, dbo.AG_S6.Units, dbo.AG_S6.[RSP 100] AS PRICELIST, dbo.AG_S6.[Discount Promo], 
                      dbo.AG_S6.[RSP 80] AS RSP, dbo.AG_S6.[Discount 25], dbo.AG_S6.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_S6.year, dbo.AG_S6.month, dbo.AG_S6.Company, dbo.AG_S6.date, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.AG_S6.crevnacc) AS Account, dbo.AG_S6.[Total Cost], CASE WHEN (type = 'Forecast' AND ltrim(rtrim(cspontype)) = 'EXP') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE dbo.AG_S6.Export_Cust END AS Export_Cust, dbo.AG_S6.Type, dbo.AG_S6.Normal_Price, dbo.AG_S6.Special_Price, dbo.AG_S6.Promotion, 
                      dbo.AG_S6.nqtylimit, dbo.AG_S6.ccustno, dbo.AG_S6.ccompany, dbo.AG_S6.cinvno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.AG_S6.dinvoice, dbo.AG_S6.warehouse, 
                      dbo.AG_S6.cust_class, dbo.AG_S6.nDiscount, dbo.AG_S6.cpageno, dbo.AG_S6.cmajorcat, dbo.AG_S6.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.AG_S6.cgfttype, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.AG_S6.cSpontype IS NULL AND dinvoice < '2013/07/01') THEN dbo.AG_S6.spon ELSE dbo.AG_S6.cSpontype END AS cspontype, 
                      dbo.AG_S6.cpagepos, dbo.AG_S6.nversion, dbo.AG_S6.lfree, dbo.AG_S6.lspecial, dbo.AG_S6.lportal, dbo.AG_S6.csponcat, dbo.AG_S6.lInactive, dbo.AG_S6.VAT, 
                      dbo.AG_S6.[RSP 80 Excl], dbo.AG_S6.lmlm, dbo.AG_S6.ldscntble, CASE WHEN (dinvoice < '2013/07/01' AND dbo.AG_S6.Special_Price <> 0) 
                      THEN 'P' WHEN (dinvoice < '2013/07/01' AND dbo.AG_S6.Special_Price = 0 AND cspontype <> 'N') THEN 'S' WHEN (dinvoice < '2013/07/01' AND 
                      dbo.AG_S6.Special_Price IS NULL AND cspontype <> 'N') THEN 'S' ELSE dbo.AG_S6.cspontype END AS SPON2, dbo.AG_S6.Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_S6 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_S6.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SMS_Balance
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CASE WHEN (arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS Sales_MTD, 0 AS Inv_Count, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Mtd], dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS DISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS NONDISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode <> 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS OST_sales, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS RSP80, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS VAT, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE() - 1, 11)) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > GETDATE() - 1 - CAST(DAY(GETDATE() - 1) AS int)) AND (dbo.arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       ') 
                      AND (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND (dbo.arrevn.crevnacc = '300100-0000                   ')
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.arcust.ccurrcode, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, icitem.cdescript
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CASE WHEN (arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') THEN SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS Sales_MTD, 0 AS Inv_Count, SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Mtd], amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      CASE WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') THEN SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      - SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS DISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND 
                      (amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') THEN SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS NONDISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccurrcode <> 'ZAR') THEN SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      - SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS OST_sales, SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS RSP80, 
                      SUM(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS VAT, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.crevncode, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arrevn ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.crevncode = amanniquenam.dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE() - 1, 11)) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > GETDATE() - 1 - CAST(DAY(GETDATE() - 1) AS int)) AND 
                      (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       ') AND (amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND 
                      (amanniquenam.dbo.arrevn.crevnacc IN ('300100-6200                   ', '300100-0000                   '))
GROUP BY amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.lstock, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccurrcode, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.ldscntble, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.crevncode,amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SMS_Balance2
AS
SELECT     SUM(Sales_MTD) AS Sales_MTD, SUM(Inv_Count) AS Inv_Count, SUM([Qty Mtd]) AS [Qty Mtd], dinvoice, SUM(DISC_SALES) AS DISC_SALES, SUM(NONDISC_SALES) 
                      AS NONDISC_SALES, SUM(OST_sales) AS OST_sales, SUM(RSP80) AS RSP80, SUM(VAT) AS VAT, citemno, crevncode, cdescript
FROM         dbo.AG_SMS_Balance
GROUP BY dinvoice, citemno, crevncode, cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SP1
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln <> '')
GROUP BY dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice),icitem.cdescript
union all
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month,icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln <> '')
GROUP BY dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice),icitem.cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR_Graph1
AS
SELECT     Heading, Type, Date, Amount, Line
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.AG_SPR_Graph1

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR_ICIWHS
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.iciwhs.ninprocess, dbo.iciwhs.nallocate, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.iciwhs.nintransit, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.ntotcost as Value
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.citemno, nonhand, nonorder, ninprocess, nallocate, nbook, nintransit, cdescript, '2.NAM' AS Company, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse,amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.ntotcost as Value
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR_ICIWHS2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT RTRIM(citemno) AS itemno, RTRIM(cdescript) AS Description, SUM(nonhand) AS OnHand, SUM(nonorder) AS OnOrder, SUM(ninprocess) 
                      AS InProcess, SUM(nbook) AS Booked, SUM(nintransit) AS InTransit, Company, cwarehouse, Value
FROM         dbo.AG_SPR_ICIWHS
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript, Company, cwarehouse, Value
HAVING      (SUM(nonhand) + SUM(nonorder) + SUM(ninprocess) + SUM(nbook) + SUM(nintransit) <> 0)
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR_LEVEL1
AS
SELECT dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice AS Date, CASE WHEN (cb_discount_item.company = '2.NAM') THEN SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80]) * 1.15 WHEN ((cb_discount_item.company = '1.SA') AND (dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Export Cusomer] = 'No')) 
             THEN SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80]) * 1.14 WHEN ((cb_discount_item.company = '1.SA') AND (dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Export Cusomer] = 'Yes')) THEN SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80]) END AS Amount, SUM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units) AS Qty, 
             dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, DATENAME(day, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice) AS Day, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Warehouse
FROM   dbo.CB_Discount_Item INNER JOIN
             dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno AND dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
             dbo.glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript) = 'Revenue') AND (LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc)) <> '305000-0000') AND (dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass <> 'EXPORT')
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Warehouse, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Export Cusomer], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR_SUMMARY2
AS
SELECT     Heading, Date, CY, PY, [LEVEL], [PY MTD]
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.AG_SPR_Summary2 AS AG_SPR_Summary2_1

                      dbo.AG_REP2.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_REP2.year, dbo.AG_REP2.month, dbo.AG_REP2.Company, dbo.AG_REP2.dinvoice AS Date, dbo.AG_REP2.cdescript, 
                      dbo.AG_REP2.crevnacc, dbo.AG_REP2.[Total Cost], dbo.AG_REP2.Export_Cust, 'Actual' AS Type, dbo.AG_REP2.nprice AS Normal_Price, 
                      dbo.AG_REP2.nPriceExl AS Special_Price, dbo.AG_REP2.Promotion, dbo.AG_REP2.nqtylimit, dbo.AG_REP2.ccustno, dbo.AG_REP2.ccompany, dbo.AG_REP2.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP2.spon, dbo.AG_REP2.Warehouse, dbo.AG_REP2.nstdcost, dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass AS CustClass

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR2
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.AG_SPR1.citemno) AS [Item No], RTRIM(dbo.AG_SPR1.cdescript) AS [Item Description], dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.AG_SPR1.spon, dbo.AG_SPR1.Units, dbo.AG_SPR1.[RSP 100] AS PRICELIST, 
                      dbo.AG_SPR1.[Discount Promo], dbo.AG_SPR1.[RSP 80] AS RSP, dbo.AG_SPR1.[Discount 25], dbo.AG_SPR1.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_SPR1.year, 
                      dbo.AG_SPR1.month, dbo.AG_SPR1.Company, dbo.AG_SPR1.Date, RTRIM(dbo.AG_SPR1.crevnacc) AS Account, dbo.AG_SPR1.[Total Cost], dbo.AG_SPR1.Export_Cust, 
                      dbo.AG_SPR1.Type, dbo.AG_SPR1.Normal_Price, dbo.AG_SPR1.Special_Price, dbo.AG_SPR1.Promotion, dbo.AG_SPR1.nqtylimit, dbo.AG_SPR1.ccustno, 
                      dbo.AG_SPR1.ccompany, dbo.AG_SPR1.cinvno, dbo.AG_SPR1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_SPR1.CustClass, dbo.AG_SPR1.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.AG_SPR1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_SPR1.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_SPR6d
AS
SELECT     ItemNo, ItemDescription, Year, Month, EXPORT, [4100], [4200], [4300], [C-R21], [D-CPT], [D-R21], [D-NAM], TOTCOST, TOTQTY, OnHand, OnOrder, InProcess, Booked,

                      PY_Target_RSP

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Voucher
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.Voucher2.[Member ID], dbo.Voucher2.Name, dbo.Voucher2.[Sales August 2011], dbo.Voucher2.[Sales August 2010], 
                      dbo.Voucher2.[August 2010 Band], ROUND(dbo.Voucher2.[Growth Percentage] * 100, 2) AS [Growth Percentage], dbo.Voucher2.[August 2011 Band], dbo.Voucher2.Prize,

CREATE VIEW dbo.AG_Welcome
AS
SELECT     LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccustno)) AS [Consultant Code], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccompany)) AS [Consultant Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail)) 
                      AS [Consultant Email], arcust_1.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], arcust_1.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], LTRIM(RTRIM(arcust_1.cemail)) AS [Sponsor Email],

                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
