CREATE VIEW dbo.Al_Test
AS
SELECT     ccustno AS [Cust Code], ccompany AS Name, dgenerate AS Date, ngNettSales AS [Nett Sales], ngTotIncome AS [Total Income], ngTotUnits AS [Total Units], 
                      ngTotIvoice AS [Total # Invoices], ngSalesNDisc AS [Group Sales Non Disc]
FROM         dbo.GenRebComp
WHERE     (dgenerate BETWEEN '2013/02/01' AND '2013/02/28')

CREATE VIEW dbo.al1
AS
SELECT     dbo.glacct.cacctid, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS Amount, dbo.aritrs.citemno
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arrevn.crevncode = dbo.aritrs.crevncode ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glcatg.ccatgid = dbo.glacct.ccatgid ON dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2012/03/01' AND '2012/03/31') AND (dbo.glcatg.cdescript IN ('Cost of Sales                 ', 'Cost of Goods Sold                 ')) AND 
                      (dbo.arinvc.cinvno = '    865799')
GROUP BY dbo.glacct.cacctid, dbo.aritrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.al2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.gltfer.cacctid)) AS GL_Code, SUM(dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt) AS Expr1, dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltfer ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.gltfer.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.gltfer.dtrs > '2008/12/31') AND (dbo.glcatg.cdescript IN ('Cost of Sales                 ', 'Cost of Goods Sold                 ')) AND (dbo.gltfer.dtrs BETWEEN 
                      '2012/03/01' AND '2012/03/31') AND (dbo.gltfer.csource = 'AR') AND (dbo.gltfer.ctrstype = 'INVC') AND (dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = '    865799')
GROUP BY RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.gltfer.cacctid)), dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype

CREATE VIEW dbo.ARCASH_Open
AS
SELECT     ccustno, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, csono
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (npaidamt IN (192.0000, '204.0000')) AND (csono = ' ')
and dpaid > '2011-02-28'
union all
SELECT     ccustno, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, csono
FROM         dbo.arcashh
WHERE     (npaidamt IN (192.0000, '204.0000')) AND (csono = ' ') and dpaid > '2011-02-28'

CREATE VIEW dbo.ARI
AS
SELECT     dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, dbo.gltfer.cacctid, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS nqty, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS ncost, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS ntotcost
FROM         dbo.gltfer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.cacctid, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype, dbo.aritrs.citemno
HAVING      (dbo.gltfer.csource = 'AR') AND (dbo.gltfer.cacctid BETWEEN '641350-0000' AND '641850-9999') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2011-04-01' AND GETDATE())

CREATE VIEW dbo.aritrs_nulls
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cuid, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cshipno, dbo.aritrs.clineitem, 
                      dbo.aritrs.crmano, dbo.aritrs.crtncode, dbo.aritrs.csolineitm, dbo.aritrs.cshlineitm, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode1, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode2, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.cmeasure, dbo.aritrs.ccommiss, dbo.aritrs.cstatus, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, dbo.aritrs.lkititem, 
                      dbo.aritrs.lupsell, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.aritrs.lmodikit, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable1, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable2, dbo.aritrs.lowrmk, dbo.aritrs.lptrmk, dbo.aritrs.nqtydec, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.ntaxver, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt2, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nfsalesamt, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nfdiscamt, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nitmcnvqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntrscnvqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nfprice, dbo.aritrs.nfprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nweight, dbo.aritrs.nseq, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.aritrs.cvernum, dbo.aritrs.nbprice, dbo.aritrs.nextnddprc, dbo.aritrs.lfree, dbo.aritrs.cgfttype, dbo.aritrs.cSORefUId, dbo.aritrs.cSORef, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cusername, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2012-02-29')
ORDER BY Expr1

CREATE VIEW dbo.arrec
AS
select cobjno, sum(ntrsamt) as amt from gltrsn where cacctid = '200100-2600' and dtrs between '2011-04-01' and '2012-02-29'
group by cobjno
union all
select cobjno, sum(ntrsamt) as amt from gltfer where cacctid = '200100-2600' and dtrs between '2011-04-01' and '2012-02-29'
group by cobjno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_50_25
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - (dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) * (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate / 100) AS Correct, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, 
                      dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.csono
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt = '0.0000') AND (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate <> '100.00') AND (dbo.aritrs.nprice <> '0.000') AND (dbo.aritrs.nshipqty <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno

AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Blank_Email

AS

FROM         dbo.BA_Camp_BookedNew1
WHERE     (ccampuid <> '')
GROUP BY citemno, SPON

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp_Booked
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nbook) AS Booked

GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA]
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nbook) AS Booked
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
WHERE     (cwarehouse IN ('4400', '6000'))
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nbook) AS Booked
FROM         dbo.iciwhs

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp_BookedNew1
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.citemno, SUM(dbo.sostrs.nordqty) - SUM(dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AS nbooked, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.sostrs.ccampuid)) AS ccampuid, 'GWP' AS SPON
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.sostrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lvoid <> 1) AND (dbo.sosord.lquote <> 1) AND (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 0) AND (dbo.sostrs.ccampuid IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sosord.lautoinvk, dbo.sostrs.ccampuid, dbo.icitem.csponcat

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp_Ship
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Date_From, Date_To, cItemNo, Ship_Qty, ccampuid
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp_Ship1
WHERE     (ccampuid <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp_Ship1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, SUM(CASE WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN 
                      dfrom2 AND dto2) THEN ship_qty ELSE 0 END) AS Ship_Qty, dbo.BA_Camp2.ccampuid
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp2 ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp2.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.BA_Camp2.dinvoice >= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From) AND (dbo.BA_Camp1.cSpontype = 'GWP') AND (dbo.BA_Camp2.dinvoice <= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To) AND 
                      (dbo.BA_Camp2.ccampuid IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp2.ccampuid

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp1
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(dbo.socamp.cCampNo) AS ccampno, dbo.socamp.dFrom AS Date_From, dbo.socamp.dTo AS Date_To, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, DATENAME(year, 
                  dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS month, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.socamp.cDescript AS Expr1, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine, dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat, dbo.socamp.lactive, 
                  dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS dfrom2, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype, dbo.sosppr.dto AS dto2
FROM     dbo.socamp WITH (NOLOCK) RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.sosppr WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
WHERE  (dbo.socamp.lactive = 1) AND (DATEADD(dd, - 1, GETDATE()) BETWEEN dbo.socamp.dFrom AND dbo.socamp.dTo)
ORDER BY date_from

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp2
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Ship_Qty, dbo.arinvc.ctype, cast(datename(year, dinvoice) + '/' + datename(month, dinvoice) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, ccampuid
FROM         dbo.aritrs WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype IN ('', 'R'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Ship_Qty, dbo.arinvch.ctype, cast(datename(year, dinvoice) + '/' + datename(month, dinvoice) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, ccampuid
FROM         dbo.aritrsh WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.ctype IN ('', 'R'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp3_Ware
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Ship_Qty, dbo.arinvc.ctype, cast(datename(year, dinvoice) + '/' + datename(month, dinvoice) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype IN ('', 'R'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Ship_Qty, dbo.arinvch.ctype, cast(datename(year, dinvoice) + '/' + datename(month, dinvoice) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.ctype IN ('', 'R'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp1.nQtylimit, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp2.dinvoice, CASE WHEN (dinvoice BETWEEN dfrom2 AND dto2) THEN ship_qty ELSE 0 END AS Ship_Qty, dbo.BA_Camp1.cDescript, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp1.dfrom2, dbo.BA_Camp1.cSpontype, dbo.BA_Camp1.dto2
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp2 ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp2.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.BA_Camp2.dinvoice >= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From) AND (dbo.BA_Camp2.dinvoice <= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To)

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp3_CT
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp1.nQtylimit, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice, dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.Ship_Qty, dbo.BA_Camp1.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice >= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From) AND (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice <= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To) AND 
                      (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.cwarehouse = '5200')
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp1.nQtylimit, dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice, dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.Ship_Qty, 
                  dbo.BA_Camp1.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.cwarehouse
FROM     dbo.BA_Camp1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.citemno
WHERE  (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice >= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From) AND (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice <= dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To) AND (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.cwarehouse IN ('4400', '6000')) AND 
                  (dbo.BA_Camp2_Ware.dinvoice >= '2016-04-01')
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp4
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_From, Date_To, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked]
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp4a WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE     (year = current_year) AND (month = current_month)

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp4a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit) AS Qty_Limit, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) 
                      + dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked AS [Ship + Booked], DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS month, 
                      DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) AS current_year, DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) AS current_month
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked ON dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) > MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit))
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp5
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_From, Date_To, Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked]
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp5a
WHERE     (year = current_year) AND (month = current_month)

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp5
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit) AS Qty_Limit, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit) * 0.9 AS Perc, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked, 
                      SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) + dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked AS [Ship + Booked], DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS month, DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) AS current_year, DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) AS current_month
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked ON dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) + dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked > MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit) * 0.8) AND (SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) 
                      + dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked <= MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit))
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_From, Date_To, Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked], SPON
FROM     dbo.BA_Camp6c
WHERE  (DATEADD(dd, - 1, GETDATE()) BETWEEN Date_From AND Date_To)
ORDER BY cItemNo, SPON

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6a
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3.Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3.nQtylimit) AS Qty_Limit, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3.dfrom2 AS Date_FRom, dbo.BA_Camp3.dto2 AS Date_To, 
                  0 AS Perc, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, CASE WHEN (DATEADD(dd, - 1, GETDATE()) BETWEEN dfrom2 AND dto2) THEN booked ELSE 0 END AS Booked, 0 AS [Ship + Booked], DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS year, 
                  DATENAME(month, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From) AS month, DATENAME(year, DATEADD(dd, - 1, GETDATE())) AS current_year, DATENAME(month, DATEADD(dd, - 1, GETDATE())) AS current_month, CASE WHEN (datename(year, date_to) 
                  = datename(year, date_from) AND datename(month, date_to) = datename(month, date_from)) THEN datename(year, CAST('1900/01/01' AS smalldatetime)) ELSE DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To) END AS next_year, 
                  DATENAME(month, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To) AS next_month, dbo.BA_Camp3.dto2 AS Expr1, dbo.BA_Camp3.dfrom2 AS Expr2, dbo.BA_Camp3.cSpontype
FROM     dbo.BA_Camp3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.BA_Camp_Booked ON dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp3.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp_Booked.Booked, dbo.BA_Camp3.dto2, dbo.BA_Camp3.dfrom2, 
                  dbo.BA_Camp3.cSpontype
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp3.ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6a_CT
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.ccampno, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.nQtylimit) AS Qty_Limit, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_To, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.nQtylimit) * 0.9 AS Perc, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.cDescript, dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT.Booked, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Ship_Qty) + dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT.Booked AS [Ship + Booked], 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_From) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_From) AS month, DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) AS current_year,
                       DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) AS current_month
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp3_CT LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT ON dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.cDescript, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Booked_CT.Booked
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp3_CT.ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6a_PTA
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.ccampno, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.nQtylimit) AS Qty_Limit, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_To, MIN(dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.nQtylimit) * 0.9 AS Perc, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.cDescript, dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA].Booked, SUM(dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Ship_Qty) 
                      + dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA].Booked AS [Ship + Booked], DATENAME(year, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_From) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_From) AS month, DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) AS current_year, DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) AS current_month
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA INNER JOIN
                      dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA] ON dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.cItemNo = dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA].citemno
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.ccampno, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_From, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.Date_To, dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.cDescript, 
                      dbo.[BA_Camp_Booked _PTA].Booked
ORDER BY dbo.BA_Camp3_PTA.ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6a1
AS
SELECT     dbo.BA_Camp6a.ccampno, CASE WHEN (ba_camp6a.ship_qty = 0) THEN 0 WHEN (cspontype = 'GWP') 
                      THEN ba_camp_ship.ship_qty WHEN (ba_camp_ship.ship_Qty IS NULL) THEN ba_camp6a.ship_qty ELSE (ba_camp6a.ship_qty - ba_camp_ship.ship_qty) 
                      END AS Ship_Qty, dbo.BA_Camp6a.Qty_Limit, dbo.BA_Camp6a.cItemNo, dbo.BA_Camp6a.Date_FRom, dbo.BA_Camp6a.Date_To, 0 AS Perc, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp6a.cDescript, CASE WHEN (booked = 0) THEN 0 WHEN (cspontype = 'GWP') THEN nbooked WHEN (ba_bookedNew.nbooked IS NULL) 
                      THEN ba_camp6a.Booked ELSE (booked - nbooked) END AS Booked, CASE WHEN (ba_camp6a.ship_qty = 0) THEN 0 WHEN (cspontype = 'GWP') 
                      THEN ba_camp_ship.ship_qty WHEN (ba_camp_ship.ship_Qty IS NULL) THEN ba_camp6a.ship_qty ELSE (ba_camp6a.ship_qty - ba_camp_ship.ship_qty) 
                      END + CASE WHEN (booked = 0) THEN 0 WHEN (cspontype = 'GWP') THEN nbooked WHEN (ba_bookedNew.nbooked IS NULL) 
                      THEN ba_camp6a.Booked ELSE (booked - nbooked) END AS [Ship + Booked], dbo.BA_Camp6a.year, dbo.BA_Camp6a.month, dbo.BA_Camp6a.current_year, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp6a.current_month, dbo.BA_Camp6a.next_year, dbo.BA_Camp6a.next_month, dbo.BA_Camp6a.Expr1, dbo.BA_Camp6a.Expr2, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp6a.cSpontype
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp6a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_BookedNew ON dbo.BA_Camp6a.cItemNo = dbo.BA_BookedNew.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp_Ship ON dbo.BA_Camp6a.ccampno = dbo.BA_Camp_Ship.ccampno AND dbo.BA_Camp6a.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp_Ship.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Camp6b
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_FRom, Date_To, Qty_limit*0.9 as Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked], cSpontype
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp6a1
WHERE     (year = current_year) AND (month = current_month) and       (Qty_Limit <> 0) 
GROUP BY ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_FRom, Date_To, Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked], cSpontype

UNION ALL
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_FRom, Date_To, qty_limit*0.9 as Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked], cSpontype
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp6a1
WHERE     (next_year = current_year) AND (next_month = current_month) and       (Qty_Limit <> 0)  
GROUP BY ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_FRom, Date_To, Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked], cSpontype

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Changes_StdCost
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, nstdcost
FROM         dbo.icitem
WHERE     (cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_ContractAccepted
AS
SELECT        ccustno, ccompany, dcreate, daccept, cstatus
FROM            dbo.arcust
WHERE        (daccept IS NOT NULL) AND (cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Cost_Variance
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(dbo.poptrs.cpono) AS cpono, dbo.poptrs.ncost, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.poptrs.citemno, dbo.poptrs.cdescript, dbo.poptrs.cuid, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.nstdcost <> 0) THEN (dbo.icitem.nstdcost - dbo.poptrs.ncost) / dbo.icitem.nstdcost * 100 ELSE 0 END AS Perc, dbo.iciwhs.ncost AS Ave_Cost, 
                      dbo.icitem.nstdcost - dbo.poptrs.ncost AS Variance
FROM         dbo.poptrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.poptrs.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno AND dbo.poptrs.cwarehouse = dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.poptrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.poptrs.ncost <> dbo.icitem.nstdcost) AND (dbo.poptrs.citemno <> 'MISC.ITEM           ')
ORDER BY cpono

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_DAILY_INVOICE_TOTAL
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS Date, sum(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - sum(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Daily_Sales, 0 AS Inv_Count, 0 AS MTD_SAles, 
                      0 AS [Inv Count MTD], 0 AS [Qty Mtd], SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Daily]
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     aritrs.lstock = 1 and arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice = CAST(LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) AS smalldatetime) - 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dinvoice AS Date, 0 AS Daily_Sales, COUNT(cinvno) AS Inv_Count, 0 AS MTD_SAles, 0 AS [Inv Count MTD], 0 AS [Qty Mtd], 0 AS Qty_Daily
FROM         dbo.arinvc
where  arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice = CAST(LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) AS smalldatetime) - 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_DAILY_MTD_SALES
AS
SELECT     CAST(GETDATE() - 0.35 AS smalldatetime) AS Date, CAST(SUM(MTD_SAles) AS decimal) AS MTD_Sales, SUM([Inv Count MTD]) AS Inv_Count_MTD, SUM(Inv_Count) 
                      AS Inv_Count_Daily, CAST(SUM([Qty Mtd]) AS decimal) AS Qty_Mtd, CAST(SUM([Qty Daily]) AS decimal) AS Qty_Daily, CAST(SUM(Daily_Sales) AS decimal) 
                      AS Daily_Sales
FROM         dbo.BA_DAILY_MTD_SALES1

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_DAILY_MTD_SALES1
AS
SELECT     Date, Daily_Sales, Inv_Count, MTD_SAles, [Inv Count MTD], [Qty Mtd], [Qty Daily]
FROM         dbo.ba_daily_invoice_total
UNION ALL
SELECT     Date, Sales_Daily, [Inv Count Daily], [Sales MTD], [Inv Count MTD], [Qty Mtd], [Qty Daily]
FROM         dbo.ba_inv_mtd2

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Daily1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS Date, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Daily_Sales, 0 AS Inv_Count, 0 AS MTD_SAles, 
                      0 AS [Inv Count MTD], 0 AS [Qty Mtd], SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Daily], CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt)  ELSE 0 END AS DISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt)  ELSE 0 END AS NONDISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode <> 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt)  ELSE 0 END AS OST_sales
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       ') AND aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM' AND arrevn.crevnacc = '300100-0000                   '
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.arcust.ccurrcode
HAVING      (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice = CAST(LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) AS smalldatetime) - 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dinvoice AS Date, 0 AS Daily_Sales, COUNT(cinvno) AS Inv_Count, 0 AS MTD_SAles, 0 AS [Inv Count MTD], 0 AS [Qty Mtd], 0 AS Qty_Daily, 
                      0 AS DISC_SALES, 0 AS NONDISC_SALES, 0 AS OST_Sales
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice = CAST(LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) AS smalldatetime) - 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.ba_daily1

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Daily2
AS
SELECT     Date, SUM(Daily_Sales) AS Total_Local, SUM(Inv_Count) AS Inv_Count, SUM(MTD_SAles) AS MTD_Sales, SUM([Inv Count MTD]) AS INV_Count_MTD, SUM([Qty Mtd]) 
                      AS Qty_MTD, SUM([Qty Daily]) AS Qty_Daily, SUM(DISC_SALES) AS Disc_Sales, SUM(NONDISC_SALES) AS NonDisc_Sales, SUM(OST_sales) AS OST_sales, 
                      SUM(OST_sales) + SUM(DISC_SALES) + SUM(NONDISC_SALES) AS TOTAL
FROM         dbo.BA_Daily1
GROUP BY Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Discount_Changes
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.icitem
WHERE     (cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_DISCOUNTABLE_Changes
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'DISCOUNTABLE ITEM' ELSE 'NON DISCOUNTABLE ITEM' END AS DISCOUNTABLE
FROM         dbo.icitem
WHERE     (cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Enerst1
AS
SELECT     convert(char(12),getdate(),111) as Date, Total_Local AS D_Total_Local, Disc_Sales AS D_DiscSales, NonDisc_Sales AS D_NonDiscSales, OST_sales AS D_OSTSales, TOTAL AS D_Total, 
                      0 AS M_Total_Local, 0 AS M_DiscSales, 0 AS M_NonDiscSales, 0 AS M_OSTSales, 0 AS M_Total
FROM         dbo.BA_Daily2
union all
SELECT     convert(char(12),getdate(),111) as Date, 0 AS D_Total_Local, 0 AS D_DiscSales, 0 AS D_NonDiscSales, 0 AS D_OSTSales, 0 AS D_Total, [Sales MTD], DISC_SALES, NONDISC_SALES, OST_SALES, 
                      TOTAL
FROM         dbo.BA_MTD2

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Ernest2
AS
SELECT     Date, SUM(D_Total_Local) AS D_Local, SUM(D_DiscSales) AS D_Disc, SUM(D_NonDiscSales) AS D_NonDisc, SUM(D_OSTSales) AS D_OST, SUM(D_Total) AS D_Total,
                       SUM(M_Total_Local) AS M_Local, SUM(M_DiscSales) AS M_Disc, SUM(M_NonDiscSales) AS M_Non_Disc, SUM(M_OSTSales) AS M_OST, SUM(M_Total) 
                      AS M_Total
FROM         dbo.BA_Enerst1
GROUP BY Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_INV_MTD1
AS
SELECT     SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Sales_MTD, 0 AS Inv_Count, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Mtd], 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE(), 11)) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > GETDATE() - CAST(DAY(GETDATE()) AS int)) AND (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND 
                      arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.lstock
UNION ALL
SELECT     0 AS Sales_Mtd, COUNT(cinvno) AS Inv_Count, 0 AS [Qty Mtd], dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE(), 11)) AND (dinvoice > GETDATE()- CAST(DAY(GETDATE()) AS int))

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_MTD1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CASE WHEN (arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS Sales_MTD, 0 AS Inv_Count, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Qty Mtd], dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS DISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS NONDISC_SALES, CASE WHEN (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode <> 'ZAR') 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) - SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) ELSE 0 END AS OST_sales, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS RSP80, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS VAT
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE() - 1, 11)) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > GETDATE() - 1 - CAST(DAY(GETDATE() - 1) AS int)) AND (dbo.arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       ') 
                      AND (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND arrevn.crevnacc = '300100-0000                   '
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.arcust.ccurrcode, dbo.icitem.ldscntble
UNION ALL
SELECT     0 AS Sales_Mtd, COUNT(cinvno) AS Inv_Count, 0 AS [Qty Mtd], dinvoice, 0 AS DISC_SALES, 0 AS NONDISC_SALES, 0 AS OST_SALES, 0 AS RSP80, 0 AS VAT
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     arinvc.ccustno <> 'NUM       '
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice <= LEFT(GETDATE() - 1, 11)) AND dinvoice > (GETDATE() - 1 - CAST(DAY(GETDATE() - 1) AS int))
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.ba_mtd1

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_MTD2
AS
SELECT     CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE() - 1, 111) AS Date, 0 AS Sales_Daily, 0 AS [Inv Count Daily], SUM(Sales_MTD) AS [Sales MTD], SUM(Inv_Count) AS [Inv Count MTD], 
                      SUM([Qty Mtd]) AS QTY_MTD, 0 AS [Qty Daily], SUM(DISC_SALES) AS DISC_SALES, SUM(NONDISC_SALES) AS NONDISC_SALES, SUM(OST_sales) AS OST_SALES, 
                      SUM(OST_sales) + SUM(Sales_MTD) AS TOTAL, SUM(RSP80 + VAT) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.BA_MTD1

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Onhold
AS

                      CASE WHEN (dbo.changes.cnewvalue = 1) THEN 'ON HOLD' ELSE '' END AS New, LEFT(dbo.changes.InsUpdDate, 11) AS InsUpdDate, RTRIM(dbo.changes.cuser) 
                      AS cuser, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.ccompany) AS ccompany

                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.changes.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno

                      dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS month, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, 
                      dbo.socamp.cDescript AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Expr2, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Expr3, dbo.icitem.nprice

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Safety1
AS

                      AS Safety
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A')
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nreordpt) <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Safety2

FROM         dbo.BA_Safety1

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Sales_Receipts1
AS

FROM         dbo.arinvc
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-30 00:00:00', 102))

union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dpaid AS Date, 0 AS Sales, SUM(npaidamt) AS RcptAmt
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (lvoid <> 1)
GROUP BY dpaid

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Sales_Receipts2
AS

FROM         dbo.BA_Sales_Receipts1
WHERE     (dinvoice = CAST(LEFT(GETDATE(), 11) AS smalldatetime) - 1)
GROUP BY dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_SO_Pickslip_Unpaid
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono) AS csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 AS SO_Amt, 
                      dbo.arcash.npaidamt, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt AS Balance, dbo.sosord.dorder, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS Cell_No, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.sosord.lvoid
FROM         dbo.sosord WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.arcash.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt IS NULL) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2010/05/09') AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.lhold = 1) AND (dbo.sosord.cslpnno <> 'QUERY') AND (dbo.sosord.lprtlist = 1) AND (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) OR
                      (dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt > 0) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2010/05/09') AND (dbo.sosord.lhold = 1) 
                      AND (dbo.sosord.cslpnno <> 'QUERY') AND (dbo.sosord.lprtlist = 1) AND (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0)
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.BA_Unpaid_SO
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono) AS csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 AS SO_Amt, 
                      dbo.arcash.npaidamt, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt AS Balance, dbo.sosord.dorder, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS Cell_No, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcash.cuid
FROM         dbo.sosord LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.arcash.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt IS NULL) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2010/05/09') AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.lhold = 1) AND (dbo.sosord.cslpnno <> 'QUERY') OR
                      (dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.arcash.npaidamt > 0) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder > '2010/05/09') AND (dbo.sosord.lhold = 1) 
                      AND (dbo.sosord.cslpnno <> 'QUERY')
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.ba_unpaidso_sms
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT LTRIM(dbo.sosord.csono) AS csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 + dbo.sosord.nfrtamt + dbo.sosord.nadjamt AS SO_Amt, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.dorder, 
                      RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS Cell_No, dbo.arcust.ccompany, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 + dbo.sosord.nfrtamt + dbo.sosord.nadjamt AS Balance, 0 AS npaidamt
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lhold = 1) AND (dbo.sosord.cslpnno <> 'QUERY') AND (dbo.sosord.lquote <> 1) AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 <> 0) AND (dbo.sosord.dcreate = LEFT(GETDATE(), 11))
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dorder

UNION ALL

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, July AS Amount, 'July' AS Month, groups

UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, August AS Amount, 'August' AS Month, groups

WHERE     (August <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, September AS Amount, 'September' AS Month, groups
FROM         dbo.Bal1
WHERE     (September <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, October AS Amount, 'October' AS Month, groups
FROM         dbo.Bal1
WHERE     (October <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, November AS Amount, 'November' AS Month, groups

SELECT     cyear + 1 AS cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, January AS Amount, 'January' AS Month, groups

WHERE     (January <> 0)

WHERE     (March <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bal3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, RTRIM(cacctid) AS Account_Code, cdescript AS [Account Description], Segment1 AS Segement, Company, ccatgtype AS Account_Type, 
                      Type, ccatgid, Amount, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, CASE WHEN (rtrim(type) IN ('Fixed Assets', 'Other Assets')) 
                      THEN 'Non Current Assets' WHEN (rtrim(type) IN ('Current Assets')) THEN 'Current Assets' WHEN (rtrim(type) IN ('Current Liabilities')) 
                      THEN 'Current Liabilities' ELSE 'Capital and Reserve' END AS [Main Group], CASE WHEN (rtrim(type) IN ('Fixed Assets')) THEN 'Fixed Assets' WHEN (rtrim(ccatgtype) 
                      IN ('Asset 1') AND cacctid LIKE '13%') THEN 'Stock' ELSE '' END AS Group1, groups
FROM         dbo.Bal2
WHERE     (Type <> 'Other Expenses                ')
ORDER BY date

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bal4
AS
SELECT     Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, CASE WHEN ([main group] IN ('Current Assets', 'Non Current Assets')) THEN Amount ELSE Amount*-1  END AS Amount,
                       date, [Main Group], CASE WHEN (groups = 'Taxes Payable') THEN 'South African Revenue Services' WHEN (groups = 'Common Stock') 
                      THEN 'Share Capital' WHEN (groups = 'Inventory') THEN 'Stock' WHEN (groups = 'Cash') THEN 'Bank' ELSE groups END AS groups, 
                      CASE WHEN ([main group] IN ('Current Assets', 'Non Current Assets')) THEN 'Assets' ELSE 'Liabilities and Equity' END AS Sub_Group, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal3
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Total Net Income' AS Account_Code, 'Total Net Income' AS [Account Decription], Company, Amount, Date, 'Capital and Reserve' AS [Main Group], 
                      'Total Net Income' AS groups, 'Liabilities and Equity' AS sub_group, ' ' AS type, '' AS ccatgid
FROM         CB_ISF1

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bal5
AS
SELECT     CAST('2010/04/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/04/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/04/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/05/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     CAST('2010/05/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/05/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/05/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/06/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     CAST('2010/06/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/06/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/06/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/07/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     CAST('2010/07/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/07/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/07/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/08/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     CAST('2010/08/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/08/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/08/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/09/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     CAST('2010/09/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, DATENAME(year, 
                      '2010/09/01') AS year, DATENAME(month, '2010/09/01') AS month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date > '2010/03/31') AND (date < '2010/10/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bal6
AS
SELECT     Date, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, [Main Group], groups, Sub_Group, year, month, type, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.Bal5

CREATE VIEW dbo.balance
AS
SELECT     dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code AS crevenacct, 'Non Discountable' AS Discountable, SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS AmountEx, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (LEFT(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code, 6) NOT IN ('490000', '480000', '460000')) AND (dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = '470000-4300')
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code, dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item

CREATE VIEW dbo.Banks
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_CF3.cyear, dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Code, dbo.CB_CF3.[Account Description], dbo.CB_CF3.Segement, dbo.CB_CF3.Company, 
                      dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Type, dbo.CB_CF3.Type, dbo.CB_CF3.ccatgid, dbo.CB_CF3.Amount, dbo.CB_CF3.Month, dbo.CB_CF3.date, dbo.CB_CF3.Bal, 
                      dbo.glagrp.cdescript
FROM         dbo.CB_CF3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid
WHERE     (dbo.glagrp.cdescript = 'Cash                               ')
ORDER BY dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.bea_count
AS
SELECT     Year, Month, COUNT(num) AS CNum, num
FROM         dbo.Bea4b
WHERE     (Year = '2011') AND (Month = 'June')
GROUP BY Year, Month, num

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea1
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS AYear, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS AMonth, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS ADay, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS RSP, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS NIS, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost AS ncost, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cpageno AS [Page No.]
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sosppr.cpageno <> ' ') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
union all
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS AYear, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS AMonth, 
                      dbo.arinvch.dinvoice AS ADay, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS RSP, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS NIS, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.ncost AS ncost, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cpageno AS [Page No.]
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea1a
AS

                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS AUnits, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS RSP, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) 
                      AS NIS, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS Cost, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.sosppr.cpageno
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN

                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN

GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.citemno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.sosppr.cpageno
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS AUnits, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1) AS RSP, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) 
                      AS NIS, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS Cost, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, dbo.sosppr.cpageno
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN

                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sosppr.cpageno <> ' ') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.citemno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.sosppr.cpageno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea2
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea2a
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, Year, Month, SUM(AUnits) AS AUnits, SUM(RSP) AS RSP, SUM(NIS) AS NIS, SUM(Cost) AS COST, MAX(ccmpprodln) AS SPON, cpageno
FROM         dbo.Bea1a

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea3
AS
SELECT     dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS BYear, DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS BMonth, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Cost, dbo.sosppr.cpageno
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea3a
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, Year, Month, AUnits, RSP, NIS, Cost, SPON, cpageno, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY YEAR, MONTH
ORDER BY AUNITS DESC) AS Num
FROM         dbo.Bea2a

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea3b
AS

ORDER BY AUNITS, citemno) AS Num
FROM         dbo.Bea2a

CREATE VIEW dbo.Bea3c
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.beau_tot
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN ((dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3100000' AND '3104999') OR
                      (dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3200000' AND '3202999')) THEN (icikit.ccompno) ELSE (dpibdg.citemno) END AS citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate AS Date, DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS Month, 'Forecast' AS Type, 
                      CASE WHEN ((dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3100000' AND '3104999') OR
                      (dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3200000' AND '3202999')) THEN (icikit.nqty * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits) ELSE (dbo.dpibdg.nunits) END AS Forecast
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3100000' AND '3104999') OR
                      (dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN '3200000' AND '3202999') OR
                      (dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo BETWEEN 'AI/40000/09' AND 'AI/40999/09')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Beaute_Est
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs, datename(year, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Year, datename(month, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Month, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'PORG') THEN 'PO Received Goods' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'SHIP') THEN 'SO Shipment' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'IADJ') 
                      THEN 'Written Off' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'ITRF') THEN 'Transferred' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'IRCV') 
                      THEN 'Transfer Received Goods' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'ISTI') THEN 'Stock Issuance' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'PCNT') 
                      THEN 'Physical Count' WHEN (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype = 'INVC') THEN 'Invoiced' ELSE (dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype) END AS Type, dbo.ictrsn.nqty
FROM         dbo.ictrsn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.ictrsn.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.ictrsn.citemno BETWEEN '3100000' AND '3104999') OR
                      (dbo.ictrsn.citemno BETWEEN '3200000' AND '3202999') OR
                      (dbo.ictrsn.citemno BETWEEN 'AI/40000/09' AND 'AI/40999/09') AND ictrsn.ctrstype NOT IN ('CADJ', 'IMVE')
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs, datename(year, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Year, datename(month, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Month, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'PORG') THEN 'PO Received Goods' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'SHIP') 
                      THEN 'SO Shipment' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'IADJ') THEN 'Written Off' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'ITRF') 
                      THEN 'Transferred' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'IRCV') THEN 'Transfer Received Goods' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'ISTI') 
                      THEN 'Stock Issuance' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'PCNT') THEN 'Physical Count' WHEN (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype = 'INVC') THEN 'Invoiced' ELSE (dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype) 
                      END AS Type, dbo.ictrsnh.nqty
FROM         dbo.ictrsnh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.ictrsnh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.ictrsnh.citemno BETWEEN '3100000' AND '3104999') OR
                      (dbo.ictrsnh.citemno BETWEEN '3200000' AND '3202999') OR
                      (dbo.ictrsnh.citemno BETWEEN 'AI/40000/09' AND 'AI/40999/09') AND ictrsnh.ctrstype NOT IN ('CADJ', 'IMVE')
union all
select * from beau_tot

CREATE VIEW dbo.Budget_Acctual

                      AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December, SUM(January) AS January,

CREATE VIEW dbo.Budget_Act_Acc
AS
SELECT     dbo.Budget_Acctual.[Acc Year] AS Year, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.Name IS NULL) THEN 'No Budget' ELSE dbo.Budget_List.Name END AS Name, 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.cacctid AS Account, dbo.Budget_Acctual.cdescript AS Description, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.April IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.April END AS April, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.May IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.May END AS May, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.June IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.June END AS June, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.July IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.July END AS July, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.August IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.August END AS August, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.September IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.September END AS September, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.October IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.October END AS October, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.November IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.November END AS November, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.December IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.December END AS December, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.January IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.January END AS January, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.February IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.February END AS February, CASE WHEN (dbo.Budget_List.March IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 ELSE dbo.Budget_List.March END AS March, dbo.Budget_Acctual.April AS [Acc April], dbo.Budget_Acctual.May AS [Acc May], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.June AS [Acc June], dbo.Budget_Acctual.July AS [Acc July], dbo.Budget_Acctual.August AS [Acc Aug], dbo.Budget_Acctual.September AS [Acc Sept], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.October AS [Acc Oct], dbo.Budget_Acctual.November AS [Acc Nov], dbo.Budget_Acctual.December AS [Acc Dec], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.January AS [Acc Jan], dbo.Budget_Acctual.February AS [Acc Feb], dbo.Budget_Acctual.March AS [Acc Mar], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.April ELSE dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.April END AS [Var Apr], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.May ELSE dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May END AS [Var May], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.June ELSE dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June END AS [Var June], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.July ELSE dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July END AS [Var July], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.August ELSE dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August END AS [Var Aug], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.September ELSE dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September END AS [Var Sep], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.October ELSE dbo.Budget_List.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October END AS [Var Oct], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.November ELSE dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November END AS [Var Nov], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.December ELSE dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December END AS [Var Dec], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.January ELSE dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January END AS [Var Jan], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.February ELSE dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February END AS [Var Feb], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.budget_list.name IS NULL) THEN 0.0000 + dbo.budget_acctual.March ELSE dbo.Budget_List.March + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March END AS [Var Mar], 
                      dbo.glagrp.cdescript, 
                      dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_List.October
                       + dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_List.March AS [Total Budget], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September
                       + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March
                       AS [Actual Total], (((((((((((dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.April) + (dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June)) + (dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July)) + (dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September)) + (dbo.Budget_List.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November)) + (dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January)) + (dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.March + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March) AS [Variance Total], dbo.Budget_Acctual.cgrpid
FROM         dbo.Budget_List LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.Budget_List.ccatgid = dbo.glagrp.ccatgid AND dbo.Budget_List.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual ON dbo.Budget_List.Year = dbo.Budget_Acctual.[Acc Year] AND dbo.Budget_List.Account = dbo.Budget_Acctual.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.Budget_List.Name IS NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Budget_Bud_Acc
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.Budget_List.Year, dbo.Budget_List.Name, dbo.Budget_List.Account, dbo.Budget_List.Description, dbo.Budget_List.April, 
                      dbo.Budget_List.May, dbo.Budget_List.June, dbo.Budget_List.July, dbo.Budget_List.August, dbo.Budget_List.September, dbo.Budget_List.October, 
                      dbo.Budget_List.November, dbo.Budget_List.December, dbo.Budget_List.January, dbo.Budget_List.February, dbo.Budget_List.March, 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.April AS [Acc April], dbo.Budget_Acctual.May AS [Acc May], dbo.Budget_Acctual.June AS [Acc June], dbo.Budget_Acctual.July AS [Acc July], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.August AS [Acc Aug], dbo.Budget_Acctual.September AS [Acc Sept], dbo.Budget_Acctual.October AS [Acc Oct], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.November AS [Acc Nov], dbo.Budget_Acctual.December AS [Acc Dec], dbo.Budget_Acctual.January AS [Acc Jan], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.February AS [Acc Feb], dbo.Budget_Acctual.March AS [Acc Mar], dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.April AS [Var Apr], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May AS [Var May], dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June AS [Var June], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July AS [Var July], dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August AS [Var Aug], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September AS [Var Sep], dbo.Budget_List.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October AS [Var Oct], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November AS [Var Nov], dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December AS [Var Dec], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January AS [Var Jan], dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February AS [Var Feb], 
                      dbo.Budget_List.March + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March AS [Var Mar], dbo.glagrp.cdescript, 
                      dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_List.October
                       + dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_List.March AS [Total Budget], 
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September
                       + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March
                       AS [Actual Total], (((((((((((dbo.Budget_List.April + dbo.Budget_Acctual.April) + (dbo.Budget_List.May + dbo.Budget_Acctual.May)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.June + dbo.Budget_Acctual.June)) + (dbo.Budget_List.July + dbo.Budget_Acctual.July)) + (dbo.Budget_List.August + dbo.Budget_Acctual.August)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.September + dbo.Budget_Acctual.September)) + (dbo.Budget_List.October + dbo.Budget_Acctual.October)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.November + dbo.Budget_Acctual.November)) + (dbo.Budget_List.December + dbo.Budget_Acctual.December)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.January + dbo.Budget_Acctual.January)) + (dbo.Budget_List.February + dbo.Budget_Acctual.February)) 
                      + (dbo.Budget_List.March + dbo.Budget_Acctual.March) AS [Variance Total], dbo.Budget_List.cgrpid
FROM         dbo.Budget_List INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.Budget_List.ccatgid = dbo.glagrp.ccatgid AND dbo.Budget_List.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Budget_Acctual ON dbo.Budget_List.Year = dbo.Budget_Acctual.[Acc Year] AND dbo.Budget_List.Account = dbo.Budget_Acctual.cacctid
ORDER BY dbo.Budget_List.Year

CREATE VIEW dbo.Budget_List
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabud.cyear AS Year, dbo.glbugt.cbudid AS Name, dbo.glbugt.cacctid AS Account, dbo.glacct.cdescript AS Description, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS April, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS September, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS January, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS March, dbo.glacct.ccatgid, dbo.glacct.cgrpid
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glbugt.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Activity
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcact.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcact.ctype, dbo.arcact.cdescript, dbo.arcact.centerby, dbo.arcact.cstatus, 
                      dbo.arcact.ddate AS start_date, GETDATE() AS now, CAST(GETDATE() AS numeric) - CAST(dbo.arcact.ddate AS numeric) AS Time
FROM         dbo.arcact INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arcact.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcact.cstatus NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCEL'))
ORDER BY Time DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Activity_Count
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ctype, DATENAME(year, ddate) AS Year, DATENAME(month, ddate) AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Activity_Count
FROM         dbo.arcact
GROUP BY ctype, cstatus, DATENAME(year, ddate), DATENAME(month, ddate)
HAVING      (NOT (cstatus IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCEL')))
ORDER BY cstatus

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Ad1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_New4.year, dbo.CB_New4.month, dbo.CB_New4.Company, dbo.CB_New4.date, dbo.CB_New4.cclass, dbo.CB_New4.cprodline, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New4.ctype, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Qty, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.Component_Cost, dbo.CB_New4.nprice, dbo.CB_New4.component_Value, dbo.CB_New4.Kit_Item, dbo.CB_New4.Weighted_Ave, 
                      CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New4.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New4.cinvno, dbo.icitem.ccommiss, 
                      dbo.icitem.cvendno, CASE WHEN (ccommiss = '3303') THEN 0.07 ELSE 0.05 END AS Ad_V
FROM         dbo.CB_New4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_New4.Component_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.CB_New4.Company = '1.SA') AND (dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice > '2010/03/31') AND (dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice < '2011/04/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Ad2
AS
SELECT     year, month, Company, date, cclass, cprodline, dinvoice, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, SUM(Component_Qty) AS Component_Qty, ccommiss, cvendno, 
                      MAX(Ad_V) AS Ad_V, cinvno, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value]
FROM         dbo.CB_Ad1
GROUP BY year, month, Company, date, cclass, cprodline, dinvoice, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, ccommiss, cvendno, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Ad3
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Ad2.year, dbo.CB_Ad2.month, dbo.CB_Ad2.Company, dbo.CB_Ad2.date, dbo.CB_Ad2.cclass, dbo.CB_Ad2.cprodline, dbo.CB_Ad2.dinvoice, dbo.CB_Ad2.ctype, 
                      dbo.CB_Ad2.Component_Code, dbo.CB_Ad2.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_Ad2.Component_Qty, dbo.CB_Ad2.ccommiss, dbo.ad1.sup AS cvendno, dbo.ad1.ad AS Ad_V, 
                      dbo.CB_Ad2.cinvno, dbo.CB_Ad2.[Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (ad = '3303') THEN ((([Net Invoice Value] / 1.0315) * 0.45) * 0.07) WHEN (ad = '3304') 
                      THEN ((([Net Invoice Value] / 1.0225) * 0.45) * 0.05) ELSE 0 END AS Duty, CASE WHEN (date BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') 
                      THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') 
                      THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') 
                      THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS FinYear
FROM         dbo.CB_Ad2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ad1 ON dbo.CB_Ad2.Component_Code = dbo.ad1.Code
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Ad2.date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2011/04/30')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Bud1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabud.cyear, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cdescript, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS April, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS May, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS September, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS October, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS January, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS February, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS March, CASE WHEN (dbo.glabud.cdescript LIKE 'Exports%') THEN '2.Export' WHEN (dbo.glabud.cdescript LIKE 'Namibia%') 
                      THEN '3.NAM' ELSE '1.SA' END AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cyear IN ('2012', '2011'))
ORDER BY dbo.glabud.cyear

UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, Company, August AS Amount, 'August' AS Month, cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Bud3
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, Company, Amount AS Budget, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, cdescript
