CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Camp_FC
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS SP_Price, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS months, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, dbo.sosppr.cpageno, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat
FROM         dbo.socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Campaign_Lines
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Item_FC.year, dbo.CB_Item_FC.month, dbo.CB_Item_FC.year + '    ' + dbo.CB_Item_FC.month + '    ' + 'Campaign' AS Heading, 
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC.ctype AS Type, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cclass AS [Product Category], dbo.CB_Item_FC.cItemNo AS Code, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cdescript AS Description, 
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC.csponcat AS SPON, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nUnits, CAST(dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl * 0.14 + dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl AS decimal) AS special_offer, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS decimal) AS normal_price, 
                      CAST(dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl * 0.14 + dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl AS decimal) * dbo.CB_Item_FC.nUnits AS Value, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nstdcost AS COG, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl <> 0) THEN ROUND((dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl * 0.55 - dbo.CB_Item_FC.nstdcost) / (dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl * 0.55) * 100, 2) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS GP, dbo.CB_Item_FC.Variance, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cprodline, dbo.CB_Item_FC.Total_cost, dbo.CB_Item_FC.ldscntble, dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo AS Expr1, dbo.BA_Camp1.nQtylimit, dbo.BA_Camp1.nSales, dbo.BA_Camp1.cDescript AS Expr2, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nDollars, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice <> 0) THEN (CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS decimal) 
                      - CAST(dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl * 0.14 + dbo.BA_Camp1.nPriceExl AS decimal)) / CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS decimal) 
                      * 100 ELSE 0 END AS disc, '1. Campaign' AS test, CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Item_FC.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice,
                       dbo.CB_Item_FC.dcreate
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC ON dbo.BA_Camp1.month = dbo.CB_Item_FC.month AND dbo.BA_Camp1.year = dbo.CB_Item_FC.year AND 
                      dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.CB_Item_FC.cItemNo
ORDER BY Expr1

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Campainge
AS
SELECT     year, month, Heading, Type, [Product Category], Code, Description, SPON, nUnits, special_offer, normal_price, Value, COG, GP, Variance, cprodline, Total_cost, 
                      ldscntble, ccampno, Expr1, nQtylimit, nSales, Expr2, nDollars, disc, test, date, nprice, dcreate
FROM         dbo.CB_Campaign_Lines
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         cb_Standard_Lines
WHERE     code NOT IN
                          (SELECT     code
                            FROM          dbo.CB_Campaign_Lines) OR
                      date NOT IN
                          (SELECT     date
                            FROM          dbo.CB_Campaign_Lines)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Campainge1
AS
SELECT     year as years, month as months, Heading, Type, [Product Category], Code, Description, SPON, nUnits, special_offer, normal_price, Value, COG, GP, Variance, cprodline, Total_cost, 
                      ldscntble, ccampno, Expr1, nQtylimit, nSales, Expr2, nDollars, disc, test, date, nprice, dcreate
FROM         dbo.CB_Campainge
WHERE     (ldscntble = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     year as years, month as months, Heading, Type, [Product Category], Code, Description, SPON, nUnits, special_offer, normal_price, Value, COG, GP, Variance, cprodline, Total_cost, 
                      ldscntble, ccampno, Expr1, nQtylimit, nSales, Expr2, nDollars, disc, '3. Non Discountable' AS test, date, nprice, dcreate
FROM         dbo.CB_Campainge
WHERE     (ldscntble <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Campainge2
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Campainge1.years, dbo.CB_Campainge1.months, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Heading, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Type, dbo.CB_Campainge1.[Product Category], 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.Code, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Description, dbo.CB_Campainge1.SPON, dbo.CB_Campainge1.nUnits, dbo.CB_Campainge1.special_offer, 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.normal_price, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Value, dbo.CB_Campainge1.COG, dbo.CB_Campainge1.GP, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Variance, 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.cprodline, dbo.CB_Campainge1.Total_cost, dbo.CB_Campainge1.ccampno, dbo.CB_Campainge1.nQtylimit, dbo.CB_Campainge1.nSales, 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.disc, dbo.CB_Campainge1.test, dbo.CB_Campainge1.date, dbo.CB_Campainge1.nprice, dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.Units, 
                      dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.[Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (test = '1. Campaign') 
                      THEN dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.Units * dbo.CB_Campainge1.special_offer ELSE dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.Units * dbo.CB_Campainge1.normal_price END AS Actual_Value,
                       dbo.CB_Campainge1.dcreate, CASE WHEN ((test = '1. Campaign') AND (dbo.CB_Campainge1.SPON NOT IN ('O'))) THEN 'P' WHEN ((test = '2. Standard') AND 
                      (dbo.CB_Campainge1.SPON NOT IN ('O'))) THEN 'S' WHEN (DATENAME(year, dbo.CB_Campainge1.dcreate) = dbo.CB_Campainge1.years AND DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.dcreate) = dbo.CB_Campainge1.months AND dbo.CB_Campainge1.SPON NOT IN ('O')) THEN 'N' ELSE 'O' END AS SPON_NEW, 
                      CASE WHEN ((special_offer / 1.14) * 0.55 <> 0) THEN (((special_offer / 1.14) * 0.55 - COG) / ((special_offer / 1.14) * 0.55)) ELSE 0 END AS GP1
FROM         dbo.CB_Campainge1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual ON dbo.CB_Campainge1.Code = dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.citemno AND dbo.CB_Campainge1.years = dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.years AND 
                      dbo.CB_Campainge1.months = dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual.months
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Campainge1.date > '2009/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CashFlow
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_CF3.cyear, dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Code, RTRIM(dbo.CB_CF3.[Account Description]) AS [Account Description], dbo.CB_CF3.Segement, 
                      dbo.CB_CF3.Company, dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Type, dbo.CB_CF3.Type, dbo.CB_CF3.ccatgid, dbo.CB_CF3.Amount * - 1 AS Amount, dbo.CB_CF3.Month, 
                      dbo.CB_CF3.date, dbo.cashflow_groups1.Main, dbo.cashflow_groups1.Sub, dbo.CB_CF3.Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.cashflow_groups1 ON dbo.CB_CF3.Account_Code = dbo.cashflow_groups1.Code
ORDER BY dbo.cashflow_groups1.Sub

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra
AS
SELECT     '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.gltrsn.creference, CAST(CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/' + CAST(DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) 
                      + '/01' AS datetime) AS Date, 'Transactions' AS Main, dbo.gltrsn.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript AS [Account Description], CASE WHEN (SUM(gltrsn.ntrsamt) < 0) 
                      THEN SUM(gltrsn.ntrsamt) * - 1 ELSE 0 END AS Debit_1, CASE WHEN (SUM(gltrsn.ntrsamt) > 0) THEN SUM(gltrsn.ntrsamt) * - 1 ELSE 0 END AS Credit_1, 
                      dbo.gltrsn.cbatcno
FROM         dbo.gltrsn LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.gltrsn.dtrs > '2009/12/31') AND (dbo.gltrsn.cacctid NOT IN
                          (SELECT     cglacc
                            FROM          dbo.cobank))
GROUP BY dbo.gltrsn.creference, CAST(CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/' + CAST(DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/01' AS datetime), 
                      dbo.gltrsn.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.gltrsn.cbatcno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cashflow_Open
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Account_Code, [Account Description], Segement, Company, Account_Type, Type, ccatgid, Amount, Month, date, Main, Sub, 
                      '2010' AS OpenYear, CASE WHEN (ccatgid BETWEEN 'A1' AND 'G2') THEN 'BS' ELSE 'IS' END AS tttt, Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow
WHERE     (Account_Type IN ('Asset 1        ', 'Asset 2        ', 'Asset 3        ', 'Equity         ', 'Liability 1    ', 'Liability 2    ')) AND (Bal = 'O')
ORDER BY Account_Code, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
AS
SELECT     dbo.Bal4.Company, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.Bal4.Amount) > 0) THEN SUM(dbo.Bal4.Amount) ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.Bal4.Amount) < 0) 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.Bal4.Amount) ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 'Opening Balance' AS Reference, CASE WHEN (datename(month, date) IN ('September', 'April', 'June', 
                      'November')) THEN (date + 31) WHEN (datename(month, date) = 'March') THEN (date + 31) ELSE date + 31 END AS date, 'Opening Balance' AS Main, 
                      dbo.Bal4.Account_Code, dbo.Bal4.[Account Description], '' AS cbatcno
FROM         dbo.Bal4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cobank ON dbo.Bal4.Account_Code = dbo.cobank.cglacc
WHERE     (dbo.Bal4.Company <> '3.NAM')
GROUP BY dbo.Bal4.Company, dbo.Bal4.date, dbo.Bal4.Account_Code, dbo.Bal4.[Account Description]

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cashflow1
AS
SELECT     '1.SA' AS Company, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) > 0) THEN SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) < 0) 
                      THEN SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) ELSE 0 END AS Credit, dbo.gltrsn.creference, CAST(CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/' + CAST(DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/01' AS datetime) AS Date, 'Transactions' AS Main, dbo.gltrsn.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript AS [Account Description], 
                      dbo.gltrsn.cbatcno
FROM         dbo.gltrsn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cobank ON dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = dbo.cobank.cglacc LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.gltrsn.dtrs > '2009/12/31')
GROUP BY dbo.gltrsn.creference, CAST(CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/' + CAST(DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS varchar) + '/01' AS datetime), 
                      dbo.gltrsn.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.gltrsn.cbatcno
UNION ALL
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) > 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) < 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 
                      Reference, CAST('2010/01/01' AS datetime) AS Date, Main, Account_Code, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
WHERE     (date < '2010/02/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) > 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) < 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 
                      Reference, CAST('2010/02/01' AS datetime) AS Date, Main, Account_Code, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
WHERE     (date < '2010/03/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) > 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) < 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 
                      Reference, CAST('2010/03/01' AS datetime) AS Date, Main, Account_Code, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
WHERE     (date < '2010/04/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) > 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) < 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 
                      Reference, CAST('2010/04/01' AS datetime) AS Date, Main, Account_Code, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
WHERE     (date < '2010/05/01')
UNION ALL
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) > 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN ((Debit + Credit) < 0) THEN Debit + Credit ELSE 0 END AS Credit, 
                      Reference, CAST('2010/05/01' AS datetime) AS Date, Main, Account_Code, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow_Opening
WHERE     (date < '2010/06/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CashFlow2
AS
SELECT     Company, CASE WHEN (SUM(Debit) + SUM(Credit)) > 0 THEN (SUM(Debit) + SUM(Credit)) ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (SUM(Debit) + SUM(Credit)) 
                      < 0 THEN (SUM(Debit) + SUM(Credit)) ELSE 0 END AS Credit, creference, Date, Main, cacctid, [Account Description], cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_Cashflow1
WHERE     (RTRIM(cacctid) <> '205800-2600')
GROUP BY Company, creference, Date, Main, cacctid, [Account Description], cbatcno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cashflow3
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Company AS B_Company, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.cacctid AS B_Code, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.[Account Description] AS B_Desc, 
                      dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Date AS B_Date, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Debit AS B_Debit, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Credit AS B_Credit, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.creference AS B_Reference, 
                      dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Main AS B_Main, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.creference AS C_Ref, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Main AS C_MAin, 
                      dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.cacctid AS C_Code, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.[Account Description] AS C_Desc1, CASE WHEN ((dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.creference IS NULL)
                       AND (dbo.CB_CashFlow2.creference <> 'Opening Balance')) THEN dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Debit ELSE dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Debit_1 END AS C_Debit, 
                      CASE WHEN ((dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.creference IS NULL) AND (dbo.CB_CashFlow2.creference <> 'Opening Balance')) 
                      THEN dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Credit ELSE dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Credit_1 END AS C_Credit, dbo.CB_CashFlow2.cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra ON dbo.CB_CashFlow2.creference = dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.creference AND 
                      dbo.CB_CashFlow2.cbatcno = dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.cbatcno AND dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Main = dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Main AND 
                      dbo.CB_CashFlow2.Company = dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CashFlow4
AS
SELECT     B_Company, B_Code, B_Desc, B_Date, B_Debit, B_Credit, B_Reference, B_Main, C_Debit, C_Credit, C_Code, C_Desc1, CASE WHEN (B_Main = 'Opening Balance') 
                      THEN B_Debit ELSE C_Debit END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (B_Main = 'Opening Balance') THEN B_Credit ELSE C_Credit END AS Credit, C_Ref, C_MAin, cbatcno
FROM         dbo.CB_Cashflow3
WHERE     (B_Debit + B_Credit <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cat_FC
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      CASE WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'FINE FRAGR') THEN 'FRAGRANCE' WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'SALES AID') THEN 'SALESAID' ELSE rtrim(ctype) END AS ctype, 
                      CASE WHEN (icitem.ctaxcode = 'VAT - 14% ') THEN (dbo.dpibdg.nDollars * 1.14) ELSE dbo.dpibdg.nDollars END AS FC_Amount, DATENAME(year, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS Month, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, dbo.icitem.citemno, 
                      dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.dpibdg.nDollars <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cat_FC1
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Cat_FC.citemno, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.Year, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.Month, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.ldscntble, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.ctype, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.nUnits, 
                      dbo.icitem.nprice AS RSP100_Price, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.nUnits * dbo.icitem.nprice AS RSP100_Amount, dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cCampNO, 
                      dbo.CB_Camp_FC.SP_Price AS RSP80_Price, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN (dbo.CB_Cat_FC.nUnits * dbo.icitem.nprice) 
                      ELSE (dbo.CB_Cat_FC.nUnits * cb_camp_fc.sp_price) END AS RSP80_Amount, dbo.CB_Cat_FC.nstdcost, dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cclass, dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cpageno, dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cmajorcat
FROM         dbo.CB_Cat_FC INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Cat_FC.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Camp_FC ON dbo.CB_Cat_FC.citemno = dbo.CB_Camp_FC.cItemNo AND dbo.CB_Cat_FC.Year = dbo.CB_Camp_FC.Year AND 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC.Month = dbo.CB_Camp_FC.months

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Cat_FC2
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.Year, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.Month, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.ldscntble, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.ctype, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.nUnits, 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.RSP100_Amount, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.RSP80_Amount, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN (RSP100_Amount - (RSP100_Amount - RSP80_Amount) - (0.25 * RSP80_Amount)) ELSE RSP80_Amount END AS RSP60_Amount, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.RSP100_Price, 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.RSP80_Price, CASE WHEN (RSP80_Price IS NOT NULL) THEN round(RSP80_Price * 1.14, 0) ELSE round(RSP100_Price * 1.14, 0) END AS Price_PB, 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.RSP80_Amount * 1.14 AS RSP80_PB, CASE WHEN (dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno IS NULL) THEN 'NONCAMP' ELSE 'CAMP' END AS PBC, 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.nstdcost * dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.nUnits AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (rsp100_amount - rsp80_amount) 
                      = 0 THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promo' END AS Promotion, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.cgfttype, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.cpageno, dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.cmajorcat, comisc_1.cdescript AS Offers, comisc_2.cdescript AS Type1_Desc, 
                      comisc_3.cdescript AS Type2_Desc, dbo.comisc.cdescript AS Type3_Desc, CASE WHEN (cb_cat_fc1.ctype IN ('Skincare', 'Cosmetics', 'Lifestyle', 'FineFragr', 
                      'Bodycare')) THEN 'A' ELSE 'B' END AS StockG
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1 ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc ON dbo.icitem.ctype3 = dbo.comisc.ccode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc AS comisc_3 ON dbo.icitem.ctype2 = comisc_3.ccode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc AS comisc_2 ON dbo.icitem.ctype1 = comisc_2.ccode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc AS comisc_1 ON dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.cmajorcat = comisc_1.ccode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.Year = dbo.BA_Camp1.year AND dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.Month = dbo.BA_Camp1.month AND 
                      dbo.CB_Cat_FC1.citemno = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CF_PY
AS
SELECT     DATENAME(year, date) AS year, DATENAME(month, date) AS Month, SUM(Amount) AS Amount, groups, date
FROM         dbo.Bal4
WHERE     (date = CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (groups = 'Stock')
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, date), DATENAME(month, date), groups, date

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CF_STat
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Month, 'Profit Before Taxation and Interest' AS CF, SUM(Amount) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF2
WHERE     (Company <> '3.NAM') AND (RTRIM(Expense) NOT IN ('Taxation', 'Taxation - STC', 'Taxation - Deferred Tax - Provided', 'Taxation - Prior Years', 
                      'Taxation - Normal Current Year', 'Dividends Received', 'Interest Received', 'Interest Received - Personal Loans', 'Interest Received - Receiver of Revenue', 
                      'Interest Received - Bank', 'Interest Paid', 'Interest Paid SARS'))
GROUP BY cyear, Month
HAVING      (cyear = '2010') AND (Month = 'April')
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Month, 'Dividends Received' AS CF, SUM(Amount) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF2
WHERE     (Company <> '3.NAM') and rtrim(expense) = 'Dividends Received'
GROUP BY cyear, Month
HAVING      (cyear = '2010') AND (Month = 'April')
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Month, 'Interest Received' AS CF, SUM(Amount) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF2
WHERE     (Company <> '3.NAM') and rtrim(expense) in ('Interest Received', 'Interest Received - Personal Loans', 'Interest Received - Receiver of Revenue','Interest Received - Bank')
GROUP BY cyear, Month
HAVING      (cyear = '2010') AND (Month = 'April')
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Month, 'Interest Paid' AS CF, SUM(Amount) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF2
WHERE     (Company <> '3.NAM') and rtrim(expense) in('Interest Paid','Interest Paid SARS')
GROUP BY cyear, Month
HAVING      (cyear = '2010') AND (Month = 'April')
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Month, 'Profit Before Taxation and After Interest' AS CF, SUM(Amount) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF2
WHERE     (Company <> '3.NAM') AND (RTRIM(Expense) NOT IN ('Taxation', 'Taxation - STC', 'Taxation - Deferred Tax - Provided', 'Taxation - Prior Years', 
                      'Taxation - Normal Current Year'))
GROUP BY cyear, Month
HAVING      (cyear = '2010') AND (Month = 'April')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CF_Test
AS
SELECT     Company, 0 AS Debit, 0 AS Credit, creference, Date, Main, cacctid, [Account Description]
FROM         dbo.CB_CashFlow2

union aLL
SELECT     dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Company, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Debit_1, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Credit_1, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.creference, 
                      dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Date, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.Main, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.cacctid, dbo.CB_Cashflow_Contra.[Account Description]

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0,

                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CF2
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, ncpdamt0 AS Amount, 'April' AS Month, 'O' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1

UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, April AS Amount, 'April' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (April <> 0) 
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, May AS Amount, 'May' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal

WHERE     (May <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, June AS Amount, 'June' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal

WHERE     (June <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, July AS Amount, 'July' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (July <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, August AS Amount, 'August' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (August <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, September AS Amount, 'September' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (September <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, October AS Amount, 'October' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (October <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, November AS Amount, 'November' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (November <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, December AS Amount, 'December' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (December <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear + 1 AS cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, January AS Amount, 'January' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (January <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear + 1 AS cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, February AS Amount, 'February' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (February <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear + 1 AS cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, March AS Amount, 'March' AS Month, 'I' AS Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF1
WHERE     (March <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_CF3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, RTRIM(cacctid) AS Account_Code, cdescript AS [Account Description], Segment1 AS Segement, Company, ccatgtype AS Account_Type, 
                      Type, ccatgid, Amount, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, Bal
FROM         dbo.CB_CF2
ORDER BY Type DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Comp_Cost

 select *, '1.SA' as Company from arsktrh
union all

FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arsktr
union all
 select *, '2.NAM' as Company from amanniquenam.dbo.arsktrh

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Discount_Item
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Discounts.citemno, SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.nshipqty) AS Units, SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.Discount_Promo) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.Discount_25) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Discounts.year, dbo.CB_Discounts.month, dbo.CB_Discounts.Company, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_Discounts.year + '/' + dbo.CB_Discounts.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.CB_Discounts.cdescript, LTRIM(dbo.CB_Discounts.cinvno) 
                      AS cinvno, dbo.CB_Discounts.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Discounts.ccustno, dbo.CB_Discounts.ccompany, dbo.CB_Discounts.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts.cprodline, dbo.CB_Discounts.Expr1, dbo.CB_Discounts.cslpnno, dbo.CB_Discounts.cterr, dbo.CB_Discounts.dinvoice,

                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cdescript, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cinvno,

                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cprodline, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Expr1, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cslpnno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cterr, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ncost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ctype, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.spon, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Discountable, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.vat, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.lstock, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.FinYear, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Export Cusomer],

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Discounts
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.arcust.cstate AS Region, dbo.aritrs.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, aritrs.ndiscrate, arcust.cclass AS Cust_Class
FROM         dbo.aritrs WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2009/12/31') 
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrsh.lstock, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.arcust.cstate AS Region, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, aritrsh.ndiscrate, arcust.cclass AS Cust_Class
FROM         dbo.aritrsh WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2009/12/31') 
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.cb_discounts WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2009/12/31')

                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrsh.lstock, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.arcust.cstate AS Region, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, aritrsh.ndiscrate, arcust.cclass AS Cust_Class
FROM         dbo.aritrsh WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2015/04/30')
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.cb_discounts WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2015/04/30')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Discounts2
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount Promo], 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.date, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cdescript, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cinvno, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevncode, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccompany, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cprodline, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Expr1, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cslpnno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cterr, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ncost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Component_Code, icitem_1.cdescript AS Component_Desc, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units < 0) 
                      THEN (dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units) ELSE dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units END AS Component_Qty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS Component_Cost, 
                      icitem_1.nprice, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'KIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     '' AS citemno, 0 AS Units, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[RSP 80], 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Discount_Item.year, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.month, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Company, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.date, '' AS cdescript, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cinvno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevncode, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccustno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ccompany, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cclass, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cprodline, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Expr1, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cslpnno, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cterr, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.dinvoice, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ncost, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno AS Component_Code, 
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item.cdescript AS Component_Desc, dbo.CB_Discount_Item.Units AS Component_Qty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'NONKIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat
FROM         dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON icitem_1.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Discount_Item INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Discount_Item.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Discounts3
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Discounts2.citemno, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Units, dbo.CB_Discounts2.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_Discounts2.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_Discounts2.[RSP 80], 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Discounts2.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Discounts2.year, dbo.CB_Discounts2.month, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Company, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.date, dbo.CB_Discounts2.cdescript, dbo.CB_Discounts2.cinvno, dbo.CB_Discounts2.crevncode, dbo.CB_Discounts2.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.ccustno, dbo.CB_Discounts2.ccompany, dbo.CB_Discounts2.cclass, dbo.CB_Discounts2.cprodline, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Expr1, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.cslpnno, dbo.CB_Discounts2.cterr, dbo.CB_Discounts2.dinvoice, dbo.CB_Discounts2.ncost, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Total_Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.ctype, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Kit_Code, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Component_Code, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Component_Desc, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.Component_Qty, dbo.CB_Discounts2.Component_Cost, dbo.CB_Discounts2.nprice, dbo.CB_Discounts2.component_Value, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.Kit_Item, CASE WHEN (component_code IS NULL) THEN Units ELSE Component_Qty END AS Joint_Qty, CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN component_Value ELSE [RSP 80] END AS Joint_RSP_80, dbo.CB_Discounts2.test, dbo.CB_KitSum.CompCount, dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal, 
                      CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT' AND cb_kitsum.kitval <> 0) THEN component_value / kitval ELSE 0 END AS Weighted_Ave, dbo.CB_Discounts2.spon, 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts2.Discountable, dbo.CB_Discounts2.vat
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.CB_Discounts2.Kit_Code = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Discounts4
AS
SELECT     citemno, year, month, Company, date, cinvno, crevncode, crevnacc, ccustno, ccompany, cclass, cprodline, dinvoice, ctype, Kit_Code, Component_Code, 
                      Component_Desc, Component_Qty, Component_Cost, nprice, component_Value, Kit_Item, Weighted_Ave, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, spon, Discountable, ncost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, Expr1, CASE WHEN (date BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (date BETWEEN 
                      '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (date BETWEEN 
                      '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (date BETWEEN 
                      '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS FinYear
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts3

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Name, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Budget > 0) AND 
                      name NOT IN ('SAF120002 ', 'NAM12 6202') THEN budget * - 1 ELSE budget END AS Budget, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Date, dbo.GL_Group.Heading, 
                      dbo.GL_Group.Expense, dbo.GL_Groupings.Description, dbo.GL_Groupings.Type, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype AS Account_Type, 
                      CASE WHEN (RIGHT(rtrim(dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account), 4) IN ('0000', '2000', '2100', '2200', '2600', '2800')) 
                      THEN 'Normal' WHEN (RIGHT(rtrim(dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account), 4) IN ('2400')) THEN 'Marketing' ELSE 'Distribution' END AS Distribution, 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Date) AS Year
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GL_Group ON dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account = dbo.GL_Group.[Account ID] INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GL_Groupings ON dbo.GL_Group.[Account ID] = dbo.GL_Groupings.account ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Budget <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Name

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Export1
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New4.year, dbo.CB_New4.month, dbo.CB_New4.Company, dbo.CB_New4.date, dbo.CB_New4.cclass, dbo.CB_New4.cprodline, dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.ctype, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Qty, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.nprice, dbo.CB_New4.component_Value, dbo.CB_New4.Kit_Item, dbo.CB_New4.Weighted_Ave, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New4.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New4.ccustno, dbo.CB_New4.ccompany, 
                      dbo.arcust.cclass AS Class
FROM         dbo.CB_New4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.CB_New4.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.CB_New4.Company = '1.SA') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'EXPORT    ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Inc_Func1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, RTRIM(cacctid) AS Account_Code, cdescript AS [Account Description], Segment1 AS Segement, Company, ccatgtype AS Account_Type, 
                      Type, ccatgid, Amount, Month, CAST(CAST(cyear AS varchar) + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, RIGHT(RTRIM(cacctid), 4) AS Dept
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St2
ORDER BY Type DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Inc_Func2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.cyear, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Account_Code, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.[Account Description], dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Segement, 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Company, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Account_Type, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Type, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.ccatgid, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Amount, 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Month, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.date, dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Dept, dbo.glsegv.cdescript, dbo.GL_Group.Exp_Old, dbo.GL_Group.[GL Rank], 
                      dbo.GL_Group.Expense, dbo.GL_Group.Heading, dbo.GL_Group.[Dept Discription], RTRIM(dbo.glagrp.cdescript) AS Main
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_Func1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glsegv ON dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Dept = dbo.glsegv.csegvalue INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Account_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.GL_Group ON dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Account_Code = dbo.GL_Group.[Account ID]
ORDER BY dbo.CB_Inc_Func1.Account_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Inc_St2
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, April AS Amount, 'April' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (April <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, May AS Amount, 'May' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (May <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, June AS Amount, 'June' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (June <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, July AS Amount, 'July' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (July <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, August AS Amount, 'August' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (August <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, September AS Amount, 'September' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (September <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, October AS Amount, 'October' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (October <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, November AS Amount, 'November' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (November <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, December AS Amount, 'December' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (December <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear+1 as cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, January AS Amount, 'January' AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (January <> 0)
union all
SELECT     cyear+1 as cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Company, ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid, February AS Amount, 'February' AS Month

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_ISF1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Inc_St3.cyear, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Account_Code, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.[Account Description], dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Segement, 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Company, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Account_Type, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Type, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.ccatgid, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Amount * - 1 AS Amount, 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Month, dbo.CB_Inc_St3.date, dbo.GL_Group.[Dept Discription], dbo.GL_Group.Heading, dbo.GL_Group.Expense, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading = 'Sales') THEN '1.Sales' WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading = 'Cost of Sales') 
                      THEN '2.Cost of Sales' WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading = 'Sundary Recoveries') THEN '3.Sundry Recoveries' WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading = 'Expense') 
                      THEN '4.Expense' WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading = 'Net Interest and Dividends') THEN '5.Net Interest and Dividends' ELSE '' END AS Group1, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading IN ('Sales', 'Cost of Sales')) THEN 'Gross Profit' ELSE 'Net Profit' END AS Main, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0 ELSE dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget END AS Budget, dbo.CB_Bud3.cdescript, CASE WHEN (dbo.GL_Group.Heading IN ('Expense', 'Net Interest and Dividends')) 
                      THEN (dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget - dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Amount) ELSE (dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget - (dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Amount * - 1)) END AS [Var], dbo.GL_Group.Exp_Old, 
                      dbo.GL_Group.[GL Rank]
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_Bud3 ON dbo.CB_Inc_St3.cyear = dbo.CB_Bud3.cyear AND dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Account_Code = dbo.CB_Bud3.cacctid AND 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Company = dbo.CB_Bud3.Company AND dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Month = dbo.CB_Bud3.Month AND 
                      dbo.CB_Inc_St3.date = dbo.CB_Bud3.date LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.GL_Group ON dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Account_Code = dbo.GL_Group.[Account ID]
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Inc_St3.Type NOT LIKE 'Current Assets%')
ORDER BY dbo.GL_Group.[Dept Discription]

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_ISF2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cyear, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, SUM(Amount) AS Amount, date, [Dept Discription], Heading, Expense, Group1, Main, 
                      SUM(Budget) AS Budget, CASE WHEN (cdescript IS NULL) THEN '' ELSE rtrim(cdescript) END AS cdescript, CASE WHEN (Group1 IN ('4.Expense', 
                      '5.Net Interest and Dividends')) THEN ((SUM(Budget) - (SUM(Amount) * - 1))) ELSE SUM(BUDGET) - SUM(AMOUNT) END AS [Var], Segement, Account_Type, Type, 
                      ccatgid, Month, [GL Rank], Exp_Old, 0 AS Amount_PY, 0 AS amount_ytd, 0 AS PY_YTD
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF1
GROUP BY cyear, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, date, [Dept Discription], Heading, Expense, Group1, Main, cdescript, Segement, Account_Type, Type, ccatgid, 
                      Month, [GL Rank], [Var], Exp_Old

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_ISF4
AS
SELECT     cyear, Account_Code, [Account Description], Company, Amount, date, [Dept Discription], Heading, Expense, Group1, Main, Budget, cdescript, [Var], Segement, 
                      Account_Type, Type, ccatgid, Month, [GL Rank], Exp_Old, Amount_PY, amount_ytd, CASE WHEN ([dept discription] = 'Depot : Bloemfontein') 
                      THEN 'DepotBloemfontein' WHEN ([dept discription] = 'Depot : Capetown') THEN 'DepotCapetown' WHEN ([dept discription] = 'Depot : Durban') 
                      THEN 'DepotDurban' WHEN ([dept discription] = 'Depot : Ermelo') THEN 'DepotErmelo' WHEN ([dept discription] = 'Depot : Head Office') 
                      THEN 'DepotHead Office' ELSE [dept discription] END AS department, PY_YTD AS amount_py1
FROM         dbo.CB_ISF3

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Item_FC
AS
SELECT     dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo, dbo.dpibdg.cWarehouse, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.icitem.nprice, 
                      ROUND(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 1) AS Value, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars - dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Variance, DATENAME(year, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) AS month, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, 
                      dbo.icitem.nstdcost * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Total_cost, CASE WHEN (ROUND(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 1)) 
                      = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ROUND(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 1) - dbo.icitem.nstdcost * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits) / ROUND(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 1) 
                      * 100 END AS GP, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.dcreate
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_ITem_FC1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Item_FC.cItemNo, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cWarehouse, dbo.CB_Item_FC.dEndDate, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nUnits AS [FC Qty], 
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC.nDollars AS [FC Value], dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS [Item Price], dbo.CB_Item_FC.Value AS [Item Value], 
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC.Variance AS [Item FC Variance], dbo.CB_Item_FC.year, dbo.CB_Item_FC.month, dbo.BA_Camp1.ccampno, 
                      dbo.BA_Camp1.nSales AS [Campaign Sales], dbo.BA_Camp1.nQtylimit, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cdescript, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cprodline, dbo.CB_Item_FC.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_Item_FC.nstdcost, dbo.CB_Item_FC.nstdcost * dbo.CB_Item_FC.nUnits AS [Total Cost], 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.CB_Item_FC.Value <> 0 THEN (((dbo.CB_Item_FC.Value) - (dbo.CB_Item_FC.nstdcost * dbo.CB_Item_FC.nUnits)) / dbo.CB_Item_FC.Value) 
                      * 100 ELSE 0 END AS [GP %], dbo.CB_Item_FC.ctype, dbo.CB_Item_FC.ldscntble, dbo.CB_Item_FC.csponcat
FROM         dbo.CB_Item_FC LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.CB_Item_FC.cItemNo = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo
ORDER BY [FC Qty]

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_KitSum
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ckititemno, COUNT(dbo.icikit.ccompno) AS CompCount, SUM(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.icikit.nqty) AS KitVal
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno
GROUP BY dbo.icikit.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Major
AS
SELECT     dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_New5.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New5.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New5.year, dbo.CB_New5.month, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_New5.Component_Qty) AS Qty, SUM(dbo.CB_New5.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM(dbo.CB_New5.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_New5.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], SUM(dbo.CB_New5.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, dbo.comisc.cdescript AS M_Desc
FROM         dbo.CB_New5 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.CB_New5.year = dbo.BA_Camp1.year AND dbo.CB_New5.month = dbo.BA_Camp1.month AND 
                      dbo.CB_New5.Component_Code = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat = dbo.comisc.ccode
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_New5.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New5.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New5.year, dbo.CB_New5.month, dbo.comisc.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat <> '')
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_Discounts.citemno, dbo.CB_Discounts.cdescript, dbo.CB_Discounts.year, dbo.CB_Discounts.month, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.nshipqty) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[RSP 100]) AS Expr2, SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[RSP 80]) AS Expr3, 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.[Net Invoice Value]) AS Expr4, SUM(dbo.CB_Discounts.Total_Cost) AS Expr5, dbo.comisc.cdescript AS M_Desc
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Discounts.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo AND dbo.CB_Discounts.year = dbo.BA_Camp1.year AND 
                      dbo.CB_Discounts.month = dbo.BA_Camp1.month INNER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat = dbo.comisc.ccode
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
GROUP BY dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_Discounts.citemno, dbo.CB_Discounts.cdescript, dbo.CB_Discounts.year, dbo.CB_Discounts.month, dbo.comisc.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.BA_Camp1.cmajorcat <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Market_Dash1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * 1.14 * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, CASE WHEN (aritrs.ntaxamt1 <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrs.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Rev, 
                      CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) <> 0) THEN aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Cost, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.arcust.cRace, dbo.icitem.lchkonhand, dbo.icitem.lupdonhand, icitem.lkititem, 
                      round(aritrs.nprice, 0) AS PE, round(aritrs.nprcinctx, 0) AS PI, aritrs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/12/31') 
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * 1.14 * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, CASE WHEN (aritrsh.ntaxamt1 <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrsh.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) 
                      <> 0) THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Rev, 
                      CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, 
                      dbo.arcust.cRace, dbo.icitem.lchkonhand, dbo.icitem.lupdonhand, icitem.lkititem, round(aritrsh.nprice, 0) AS PE, round(aritrsh.nprcinctx, 0) AS PI, 
                      aritrsh.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * 1.14) * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [RSP 100 Incl],
