                      CASE WHEN (aritrs.ntaxamt1 <> 0) THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrs.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + aritrs.ntaxamt1 - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '2.NAM' AS Company, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.crevncode, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cprodline, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cslpnno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cterr, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ncost, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ncost * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, icitem.ctype,
                       aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], 
                      CASE WHEN ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) <> 0) 
                      THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Rev, 
                      CASE WHEN ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) <> 0) 
                      THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ncost * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Cost, '' AS ctype1, '' AS ctype2, '' AS ctype3, '' AS csponcat, 
                      '' AS cRace, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lchkonhand, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lupdonhand, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lkititem, 
                      round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprice, 0) AS PE, round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, 0) AS PI, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/12/31') 
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * 1.14) * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo,
                       CASE WHEN (aritrsh.ntaxamt1 <> 0) THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrsh.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '2.NAM' AS Company, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cprodline, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cslpnno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cterr, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ncost, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ncost * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], 
                      CASE WHEN ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) 
                      <> 0) THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Rev, 
                      CASE WHEN ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) 
                      <> 0) THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ncost * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty ELSE 0 END AS Prom_Cost, '' AS ctype1, '' AS ctype2, '' AS ctype3, '' AS csponcat, 
                      '' AS cRace, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lchkonhand, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lupdonhand, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.lkititem, 
                      round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprice, 0) AS PE, round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx, 0) AS PI, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Market_Dash2
AS
SELECT     year, month, Company, CASE WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'FINE FRAGR') THEN 'FRAGRANCE' WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'SALES AID') THEN 'SALESAID' ELSE rtrim(ctype) 
                      END AS ctype, SUM([RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM([RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, SUM([RSP 100 Incl]) AS [RSP 100 Incl], SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) 
                      AS [RSP 80 Incl], SUM([Net Invoice Value Incl]) AS NIV_Incl, Discountable, spon, SUM(Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (SUM([Net Invoice Value]) <> 0) 
                      THEN (SUM([Net Invoice Value]) - SUM(Total_Cost)) / SUM([Net Invoice Value]) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS GP, SUM(Prom_Rev) AS Prom_Rev, SUM(Prom_Cost) 
                      AS Prom_Cost, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, csponcat, cRace, citemno, cdescript, SUM(nshipqty) AS Qty, lchkonhand, lupdonhand, lkititem
FROM         dbo.CB_Market_Dash1
WHERE     (LEFT(citemno, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL')) OR
                      (LEFT(citemno, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))
GROUP BY year, month, Company, ctype, Discountable, spon, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, csponcat, cRace, citemno, cdescript, lchkonhand, lupdonhand, lkititem

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Marketing_Actual
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(Units) AS Units, SUM([RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM([Discount Promo]) AS [Discount Promo], SUM([RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM([Discount 25]) 
                      AS [Discount 25], SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], year AS years, month AS months, Company, date, cdescript
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item
WHERE     (Company = '2.NAM')
GROUP BY citemno, year, month, Company, date, cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Marketing_DRP_Promo
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Code, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.cdescript, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Weight, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Qty, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.nDollars, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP100, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Disc_Promo, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP80, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Promotion, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Disc25, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP60, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Total_Cost * dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Qty AS TC, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date) AS Month
FROM         dbo.CB_NewDRP3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Qty <> 0) AND (dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Promotion = 'Promotion')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Marketing_PB
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT year, month, CASE WHEN (nshipqty <> 0) THEN round([RSP 80 Incl] / nshipqty, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PB, SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) AS [RSP 80 Incl], 
                      SUM(nshipqty) AS nshipqty, cinvno
FROM         dbo.CB_Market_Dash1
GROUP BY year, month, CASE WHEN (nshipqty <> 0) THEN round([RSP 80 Incl] / nshipqty, 0) ELSE 0 END, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Camp
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS month, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cpageno, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.sosppr.cSpontype = '') THEN LEFT(csponcat, 1) ELSE dbo.sosppr.cSpontype END AS cSpontype, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos, dbo.sosppr.nversion, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lfree, dbo.sosppr.lspecial, dbo.sosppr.lportal, dbo.sosppr.csponcat, CASE WHEN (dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE nfrcsqty END AS nfrcsqty, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS dfrom2, dbo.sosppr.dto AS dto2, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo
FROM         dbo.socamp RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
WHERE     (dbo.sosppr.lInactive = 0) AND (dbo.socamp.ldrp = 1) AND (dbo.sosppr.cItemNo <> '') AND (dbo.socamp.dFrom IS NOT NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit) AS nQtylimit, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nSales) AS nSales, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS month, MAX(dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl) AS nPriceExl, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cpageno) AS cpageno, 
                      MAX(dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat) AS cmajorcat, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cSpontype) AS cSpontype, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cpagepos) 
                      AS cpagepos, MAX(dbo.sosppr.nversion) AS nversion, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lfree) AS lfree, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lspecial) AS lspecial, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lportal) AS lportal, 
                      MAX(dbo.sosppr.csponcat) AS csponcat, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty) AS nfrcsqty, dbo.sosppr.lInactive
FROM         dbo.socamp RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
WHERE     (dbo.socamp.ldrp = 1) AND (dbo.socamp.dFrom > '2009/12/31') AND (dbo.sosppr.cItemNo <> '')
GROUP BY dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom), DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom), CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime), dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.socamp.dFrom
HAVING      (dbo.sosppr.lInactive = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Camp1a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit) AS nQtylimit, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nSales) AS nSales, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS month, MAX(dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl) AS nPriceExl, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cpageno) AS cpageno, 
                      MAX(dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat) AS cmajorcat, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cSpontype) AS cSpontype, MAX(dbo.sosppr.cpagepos) 
                      AS cpagepos, MAX(dbo.sosppr.nversion) AS nversion, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lfree) AS lfree, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lspecial) AS lspecial, MAX(dbo.sosppr.lportal) AS lportal, 
                      MAX(dbo.sosppr.csponcat) AS csponcat, SUM(dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty) AS nfrcsqty, dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.socamp.dFrom AS dfrom2, dbo.socamp.dTo AS dto2, 
                      dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo
FROM         dbo.socamp RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
WHERE     (dbo.socamp.dFrom < '2013/05/01') AND (dbo.sosppr.cItemNo <> '')
GROUP BY dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom), DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom), CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime), dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo
ORDER BY dfrom2

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nQtylimit, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nSales, dbo.CB_New_Camp.year, dbo.CB_New_Camp.month, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nDiscount, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cpageno, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cclass, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cgfttype, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cSpontype, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cpagepos, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nversion, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lfree, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lspecial, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lportal, dbo.CB_New_Camp.csponcat, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nfrcsqty, dbo.CB_New_Camp.lInactive, dbo.CB_New_Camp.dfrom2, dbo.CB_New_Camp.dto2, dbo.AG_CAMP_COUNT2.Counts, dfrom, dto
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Camp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_CAMP_COUNT2 ON dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo = dbo.AG_CAMP_COUNT2.cItemNo AND dbo.CB_New_Camp.year = dbo.AG_CAMP_COUNT2.Year AND 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.month = dbo.AG_CAMP_COUNT2.Month

UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, nQtylimit, nSales, year, month, nPriceExl, Date, cCampNO, nDiscount, cpageno, cmajorcat, cclass, cgfttype, cSpontype, cpagepos, nversion, lfree, lspecial, 
                      lportal, csponcat, nfrcsqty, lInactive, dfrom2, dto2, 1 AS Counts, dfrom, dto
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Camp1a

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Cost
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New_SC.citemno, dbo.CB_New_LRC.LRC, dbo.CB_New_SC.STDC, CASE WHEN (LRC IS NULL) OR
                      (LRC = 0) THEN stdc ELSE lrc END AS Cost
FROM         dbo.CB_New_LRC RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_SC ON dbo.CB_New_LRC.citemno = dbo.CB_New_SC.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Final
AS
SELECT     DATENAME(year, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date) AS Month, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.date, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Code, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.cdescript, RTRIM(dbo.icitem.ctype) AS ctype, 0 AS Weighted_A, 0 AS Qty_A, 0 AS RSP100_A, 0 AS DiscountPromo_A, 0 AS RSP80_A, 
                      0 AS Discount25_A, 0 AS RSP60_A, 0 AS TC_A, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Weight AS Weighted_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Qty AS Qty_F, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP100 AS RSP100_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Disc_Promo AS DiscountPromo_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP80 AS RSP80_F, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Disc25 AS Discount25_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.RSP60 AS RSP60_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Total_Cost AS TC_F, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Promotion, 
                      '' AS crevnacc, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.cprodline AS Prod_Line, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.cclass AS Class, dbo.CB_NewDRP3.crevnacc AS revcode, '1.SA' AS Company, 
                      'Forecast' AS Export_Type, '' AS cinvno, '' as COS
FROM         dbo.CB_NewDRP3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_NewDRP3.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     year, month, date, Component_Code, Component_Desc, RTRIM(ctype) AS ctype, Weighted_Ave AS Weighted_A, Component_Qty AS Qty_A, [RSP 100] AS RSP100_A, 
                      [Discount Promo] AS DiscountPromo_A, [RSP 80] AS RSP80_A, [Discount 25] AS Discount25_A, [Net Invoice Value] AS RSP60_A, Total_Cost AS TC_A, 0 AS Weighted_F, 
                      0 AS Qty_F, 0 AS Expr1, 0 AS DiscountPromo_F, 0 AS RSP80_F, 0 AS Discount25_F, 0 AS RSP60_F, 0 AS TC_F, Promotion, crevnacc, cprodline AS Prod_Line, 
                      cclass AS Class, crevnacc AS revcode, Company, Export_Type, cinvno, COS
FROM         dbo.CB_New5

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Final2
AS
SELECT     Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, SUM(Weighted_A) AS Weighted_A, SUM(Qty_A) AS Qty_A, SUM(RSP100_A) AS RSP100_A, SUM(DiscountPromo_A) 
                      AS DiscountPromo_A, SUM(RSP80_A) AS RSP80_A, SUM(Discount25_A) AS Discount25_A, SUM(RSP60_A) AS RSP60_A, SUM(TC_A) AS TC_A, SUM(Weighted_F) 
                      AS Weighted_F, SUM(Qty_F) AS Qty_F, SUM(RSP100_F) AS RSP100_F, SUM(DiscountPromo_F) AS DiscountPromo_F, SUM(RSP80_F) AS RSP80_F, 
                      SUM(Discount25_F) AS Discount25_F, SUM(RSP60_F) AS RSP60_F, SUM(TC_F) AS TC_F, Promotion, crevnacc, 0 AS MLM, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, 
                      Export_Type, cinvno, COS
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Final
WHERE     (date > '2008/12/31') AND comp_code <> 'MLM'
GROUP BY Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, Promotion, crevnacc, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, Export_Type, cinvno, COS
UNION ALL
SELECT     Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, 0 AS Weighted_A, 0 AS Qty_A, 0 AS RSP100_A, 0 AS DiscountPromo_A, 0 AS RSP80_A, 0 AS Discount25_A, 
                      0 AS RSP60_A, 0 AS TC_A, 0 AS Weighted_F, 0 AS Qty_F, 0 AS RSP100_F, 0 AS DiscountPromo_F, 0 AS RSP80_F, 0 AS Discount25_F, 0 AS RSP60_F, 0 AS TC_F, 
                      Promotion, crevnacc, sum(rsp80_a) AS MLM, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, Export_Type, cinvno, COS
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Final
WHERE     (date > '2008/12/31') AND comp_code = 'MLM'
GROUP BY Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, Promotion, crevnacc, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, Export_Type, cinvno, COS

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New_Final3
AS
SELECT     Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, Weighted_A, Qty_A, RSP100_A, DiscountPromo_A, RSP80_A, Discount25_A, RSP60_A, TC_A, Weighted_F, Qty_F, 
                      RSP100_F, DiscountPromo_F, RSP80_F, Discount25_F, RSP60_F, TC_F, Promotion, Weighted_F - Weighted_A AS weighted_v, Qty_F - Qty_A AS Qty_v, 
                      RSP100_F - RSP100_A AS rsp100_v, DiscountPromo_F - DiscountPromo_A AS discountpromo_v, RSP80_F - RSP80_A AS rsp80_v, 
                      Discount25_F - Discount25_A AS discount_v, RSP60_F - RSP60_A AS rsp60_v, TC_F - TC_A AS tc_v, crevnacc, MLM, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, 
                      Export_Type, CASE WHEN (date BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') 
                      THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') 
                      THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') 
                      THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS FinYear, cinvno, COS
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Final2
WHERE     (Qty_A - Qty_F <> 0) AND MLM = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     Year, Month, date, Comp_Code, cdescript, ctype, Weighted_A, Qty_A, RSP100_A, DiscountPromo_A, RSP80_A, Discount25_A, RSP60_A, TC_A, Weighted_F, Qty_F, 
                      RSP100_F, DiscountPromo_F, RSP80_F, Discount25_F, RSP60_F, TC_F, Promotion, Weighted_F - Weighted_A AS weighted_v, Qty_F - Qty_A AS Qty_v, 
                      RSP100_F - RSP100_A AS rsp100_v, DiscountPromo_F - DiscountPromo_A AS discountpromo_v, RSP80_F - RSP80_A AS rsp80_v, 
                      Discount25_F - Discount25_A AS discount_v, RSP60_F - RSP60_A AS rsp60_v, TC_F - TC_A AS tc_v, crevnacc, MLM, Prod_Line, Class, revcode, company, 
                      Export_Type, CASE WHEN (date BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') 
                      THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') 
                      THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') 
                      THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS FinYear, cinvno, COS
FROM         dbo.CB_New_Final2
WHERE     MLM <> 0
union all
select * from amannique.dbo.cb_new_Final3
where date < '2015/05/01'

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      icitem.ctype, aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, 
                      aritrs.lstock, arcust.cstate AS Region, aritrs.nprice, aritrs.cwarehouse, aritrs.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, aritrsh.lstock, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, arcust.cstate AS Region, aritrsh.nprice, 
                      aritrsh.cwarehouse, aritrsh.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     dinvoice > '2015/04/30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.ag_new
WHERE     dinvoice > '2015/04/30'

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_New1.citemno, SUM(dbo.CB_New1.nshipqty) AS Units, SUM(dbo.CB_New1.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_New1.Discount_Promo) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.CB_New1.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM(dbo.CB_New1.Discount_25) AS [Discount 25], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_New1.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_New1.year, dbo.CB_New1.month, dbo.CB_New1.Company, 
                      CAST(dbo.CB_New1.year + '/' + dbo.CB_New1.month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, dbo.CB_New1.cdescript, LTRIM(dbo.CB_New1.cinvno) AS cinvno, 
                      dbo.CB_New1.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New1.ccustno, dbo.CB_New1.ccompany, dbo.CB_New1.cclass, dbo.CB_New1.cprodline, dbo.CB_New1.Expr1, 
                      dbo.CB_New1.cslpnno, dbo.CB_New1.cterr, dbo.CB_New1.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New1.ncost, SUM(dbo.CB_New1.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, RTRIM(dbo.CB_New1.ctype) 
                      AS ctype, dbo.CB_New1.spon, dbo.CB_New1.Discountable, SUM(dbo.CB_New1.vat) AS vat, dbo.CB_New1.lstock, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc AS COS, 
                      dbo.CB_New1.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.CB_New1 WITH (nolock) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn WITH (nolock) ON dbo.CB_New1.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
GROUP BY dbo.CB_New1.citemno, dbo.CB_New1.year, dbo.CB_New1.month, dbo.CB_New1.Company, dbo.CB_New1.cdescript, dbo.CB_New1.cinvno, dbo.CB_New1.crevncode, 
                      dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New1.ccustno, dbo.CB_New1.ccompany, dbo.CB_New1.cclass, dbo.CB_New1.cprodline, dbo.CB_New1.Expr1, dbo.CB_New1.cslpnno, 
                      dbo.CB_New1.cterr, dbo.CB_New1.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New1.ncost, dbo.CB_New1.ctype, dbo.CB_New1.spon, dbo.CB_New1.Discountable, dbo.CB_New1.lstock, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.CB_New1.ndiscrate
ORDER BY dbo.CB_New1.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New3
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New2a.citemno, dbo.CB_New2a.Units, dbo.CB_New2a.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_New2a.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_New2a.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_New2a.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_New2a.year, dbo.CB_New2a.month, dbo.CB_New2a.Company, dbo.CB_New2a.date, dbo.CB_New2a.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.cinvno, dbo.CB_New2a.crevncode, dbo.CB_New2a.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New2a.ccustno, dbo.CB_New2a.ccompany, dbo.CB_New2a.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.cprodline, dbo.CB_New2a.Expr1, dbo.CB_New2a.cslpnno, dbo.CB_New2a.cterr, dbo.CB_New2a.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New2a.ncost, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_New2a.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, icitem_1.citemno AS Component_Code, icitem_1.cdescript AS Component_Desc, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New2a.Units < 0) THEN (dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CB_New2a.Units) ELSE dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CB_New2a.Units END AS Component_Qty, 
                      dbo.icikit.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'KIT' AS Kit_Item, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS, CB_New2a.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.CB_New2a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_New2a.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) 
UNION ALL
SELECT     '' AS citemno, 0 AS Units, dbo.CB_New2a.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_New2a.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_New2a.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_New2a.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_New2a.year, dbo.CB_New2a.month, dbo.CB_New2a.Company, dbo.CB_New2a.date, '' AS cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.cinvno, dbo.CB_New2a.crevncode, dbo.CB_New2a.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New2a.ccustno, dbo.CB_New2a.ccompany, dbo.CB_New2a.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.cprodline, dbo.CB_New2a.Expr1, dbo.CB_New2a.cslpnno, dbo.CB_New2a.cterr, dbo.CB_New2a.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New2a.ncost, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_New2a.ctype, dbo.icitem.citemno AS Kit_Code, dbo.CB_New2a.citemno AS Component_Code, 
                      dbo.CB_New2a.cdescript AS Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New2a.Units AS Component_Qty, dbo.CB_New2a.ncost AS Component_Cost, icitem_1.nprice, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprice AS component_Value, 'NONKIT' AS Kit_Item, dbo.icikit.nqty * icitem_1.nprcinctx AS test, spon, Discountable, vat, COS, 
                      CB_New2a.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON icitem_1.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New2a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_New2a.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New4
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New3.citemno, dbo.CB_New3.Units, dbo.CB_New3.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_New3.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_New3.[RSP 80], dbo.CB_New3.[Discount 25], 
                      dbo.CB_New3.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_New3.year, dbo.CB_New3.month, dbo.CB_New3.Company, dbo.CB_New3.date, dbo.CB_New3.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_New3.cinvno, dbo.CB_New3.crevncode, dbo.CB_New3.crevnacc, dbo.CB_New3.ccustno, dbo.CB_New3.ccompany, dbo.CB_New3.cclass, 
                      dbo.CB_New3.cprodline, dbo.CB_New3.Expr1, dbo.CB_New3.cslpnno, dbo.CB_New3.cterr, dbo.CB_New3.dinvoice, dbo.CB_New3.ncost, dbo.CB_New3.Total_Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_New3.ctype, dbo.CB_New3.Kit_Code, dbo.CB_New3.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New3.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New3.Component_Qty, 
                      dbo.CB_New3.Component_Cost, dbo.CB_New3.nprice, dbo.CB_New3.component_Value, dbo.CB_New3.Kit_Item, CASE WHEN (component_code IS NULL) 
                      THEN Units ELSE Component_Qty END AS Joint_Qty, CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT') THEN component_Value ELSE [RSP 80] END AS Joint_RSP_80, dbo.CB_New3.test, 
                      dbo.CB_KitSum.CompCount, dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal, CASE WHEN (Kit_Item = 'KIT' AND cb_kitsum.kitval <> 0) 
                      THEN component_value / kitval ELSE 0 END AS Weighted_Ave, dbo.CB_New3.spon, dbo.CB_New3.Discountable, dbo.CB_New3.vat, dbo.CB_New3.COS, 
                      dbo.CB_New3.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.CB_New3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.CB_New3.Kit_Code = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New5
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New4.year, dbo.CB_New4.month, dbo.CB_New4.Company, dbo.CB_New4.date, dbo.CB_New4.cclass, dbo.CB_New4.cprodline, dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.ctype, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Qty, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.nprice, dbo.CB_New4.component_Value, dbo.CB_New4.Kit_Item, dbo.CB_New4.Weighted_Ave, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New4.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (rtrim(cust2.cclass) = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Type, dbo.CB_New4.cinvno, dbo.CB_New4.COS, dbo.CB_New4.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.CB_New4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cust2 ON dbo.CB_New4.ccustno = dbo.cust2.ccustno AND dbo.CB_New4.Company = dbo.cust2.Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New5a
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_New4.year, dbo.CB_New4.month, dbo.CB_New4.Company, dbo.CB_New4.date, dbo.CB_New4.cclass, dbo.CB_New4.cprodline, dbo.CB_New4.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.ctype, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Desc, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Qty, dbo.CB_New4.Component_Cost, 
                      dbo.CB_New4.nprice, dbo.CB_New4.component_Value, dbo.CB_New4.Kit_Item, dbo.CB_New4.Weighted_Ave, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 100] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 100] END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount Promo] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount Promo] END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [RSP 80] * weighted_ave ELSE [RSP 80] END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Discount 25] * weighted_ave ELSE [Discount 25] END AS [Discount 25], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN [Net Invoice Value] * weighted_ave ELSE [Net Invoice Value] END AS [Net Invoice Value], CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') 
                      THEN Total_Cost * weighted_ave ELSE Total_Cost END AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (kit_item = 'KIT') THEN [vat] * weighted_ave ELSE [vat] END AS vat, 
                      CASE WHEN ([Discount Promo] = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New4.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (rtrim(cust2.cclass) = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Type, dbo.CB_New4.cinvno, dbo.CB_New4.COS, dbo.CB_New4.ndiscrate, dbo.CB_New4.citemno AS KitItem
FROM         dbo.CB_New4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.cust2 ON dbo.CB_New4.ccustno = dbo.cust2.ccustno AND dbo.CB_New4.Company = dbo.cust2.Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_New6
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT year, month, date, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, SUM(Component_Qty) AS Qty, SUM(Weighted_Ave) AS Weighted_Ave, 
                      SUM([RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM([Discount Promo]) AS [Discount Promo], SUM([RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM([Discount 25]) AS [Discount 25], SUM([Net Invoice Value]) 
                      AS [Net Invoice Value], SUM(Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, SUM(vat) AS Vat, Promotion, crevnacc, 0 AS MLM, cprodline, cclass, company, export_Type
FROM         dbo.CB_New5
WHERE     (Component_Code <> 'MLM')
GROUP BY year, month, date, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, Promotion, crevnacc, cprodline, cclass, company, export_Type
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT year, month, date, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, 0 AS Qty, 0 AS Weighted_Ave, 0 AS [RSP 100], 0 AS [Discount Promo], 
                      0 AS [RSP 80], 0 AS [Discount 25], 0 AS [Net Invoice Value], 0 AS Total_Cost, 0 AS Vat, Promotion, crevnacc, SUM([RSP 80]) AS MLM, cprodline, cclass, company, export_Type
FROM         dbo.CB_New5
WHERE     (Component_Code = 'MLM')
GROUP BY year, month, date, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, Promotion, crevnacc, cprodline, cclass, company, export_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_NewDRP
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Comp_Code, icitem_1.cdescript, CASE WHEN (icitem_1.nprice <> 0) THEN icitem_1.nprice / dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal ELSE 0 END AS Weight, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.nUnits * dbo.icikit.nqty AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, icitem_1.nprice, dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, icitem_1.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) 
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno AS Comp_Code, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 1 AS weight, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.icitem.nprice, 
                      dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_NewDRP2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_NewDRP.date, dbo.CB_NewDRP.ckititemno, dbo.CB_NewDRP.Comp_Code, dbo.CB_NewDRP.cdescript, dbo.CB_NewDRP.Weight, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP.Comp_Qty, dbo.CB_NewDRP.nDollars, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.CB_NewDRP.nDollars * weight ELSE comp_qty * nprice * weight END AS RSP100, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN comp_qty * nprice * weight ELSE dbo.CB_NewDRP.nDollars * weight END AS RSP80, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.CB_NewDRP.Weight AS Total_Cost
FROM         dbo.CB_NewDRP LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.CB_NewDRP.date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date AND dbo.CB_NewDRP.ckititemno = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.CB_NewDRP.Comp_Code = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_NewDRP3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_NewDRP2.date, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.ckititemno, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.Comp_Code, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.cdescript, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.Weight, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP2.Comp_Qty, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.nDollars, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP100, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP100 - dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP80 AS Disc_Promo, 
                      dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP80, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP100 - dbo.CB_NewDRP2.RSP80 = 0) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, 
                      CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN (RSP80 - (RSP80 - RSP80 * 0.25)) ELSE 0 END AS Disc25, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN RSP80 - 0.25 * RSP80 ELSE RSP80 END AS RSP60, dbo.CB_NewDRP2.Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.crevnacc
FROM         dbo.CB_NewDRP2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_NewDRP2.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.CB_NewDRP2.date

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_OC1
AS
SELECT     dbo.BAL1.cyear, dbo.BAL1.April, dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May AS May, dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June AS June, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July AS July, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August AS August, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September AS September, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October AS October, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October + dbo.BAL1.November AS November,
                       dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October + dbo.BAL1.November + dbo.BAL1.December
                       AS December, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October + dbo.BAL1.November + dbo.BAL1.December
                       + dbo.BAL1.January AS January, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October + dbo.BAL1.November + dbo.BAL1.December
                       + dbo.BAL1.January + dbo.BAL1.February AS February, 
                      dbo.BAL1.April + dbo.BAL1.May + dbo.BAL1.June + dbo.BAL1.July + dbo.BAL1.August + dbo.BAL1.September + dbo.BAL1.October + dbo.BAL1.November + dbo.BAL1.December
                       + dbo.BAL1.January + dbo.BAL1.February + dbo.BAL1.March AS March, dbo.BAL1.ncpdamt0, dbo.BAL1.Company, dbo.BAL1.cacctid, dbo.BAL1.cdescript
FROM         dbo.BAL1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.BAL1.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid
WHERE     (dbo.glagrp.cdescript = 'Inventory                          ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_OC2
AS
SELECT     cyear, SUM(April) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS April, SUM(May) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS May, SUM(June) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS June, SUM(July) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS July, 
                      SUM(August) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS August, SUM(September) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS September, SUM(October) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS October, SUM(November) 
                      + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS November, SUM(December) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS December, SUM(January) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS January, SUM(February) + SUM(ncpdamt0) 
                      AS February, SUM(March) + SUM(ncpdamt0) AS March, Company
FROM         dbo.CB_OC1
GROUP BY cyear, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_PriceBand1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, ((dbo.aritrs.nbprice * 1.14) * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - dbo.aritrs.nprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, CASE WHEN (aritrs.ntaxamt1 <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrs.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + aritrs.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, icitem.ctype, 
                      aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], 
                      round(aritrs.nprcinctx,0) as nprcinctx
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, ((dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * 1.14) * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) 
                      AS [RSP 100 Incl], dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - dbo.aritrsh.nprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo, CASE WHEN (aritrsh.ntaxamt1 <> 0) 
                      THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrsh.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.arcust.cslpnno, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], round(aritrsh.nprcinctx,0) as nprcinctx
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN

                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * 1.14) * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo,

                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + aritrs.ntaxamt1 - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '2.NAM' AS Company, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.crevncode, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cprodline, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cslpnno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cterr, 
                      arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.ncost * aritrs.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, icitem.ctype, aritrs.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS vat, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx,0) as nprcinctx
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.citemno, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, ((amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * 1.14) * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS [RSP 100 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Discount_Promo,
                       CASE WHEN (aritrsh.ntaxamt1 <> 0) THEN amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt * 1.14 ELSE aritrsh.nsalesamt END AS [RSP 80 Incl], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS Discount_25, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + aritrsh.ntaxamt1 - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value Incl], DATENAME(year, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '2.NAM' AS Company, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cprodline, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cclass AS Expr1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cslpnno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cterr, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ncost, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ncost * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nbprice * amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS [RSP 100], 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt AS [RSP 80], amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Net Invoice Value], 
                      round(amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx,0) as nprcinctx
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.cinvno AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_PriceBand2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_PriceBand1.year, dbo.CB_PriceBand1.month, dbo.CB_PriceBand1.Company, dbo.CB_PriceBand1.[RSP 80 Incl], 
                      dbo.CB_PriceBand1.nshipqty, dbo.CB_PriceBand1.nprcinctx AS Price_Incl, CASE WHEN (nprcinctx <= 50) THEN 'A' WHEN (nprcinctx <= 100) AND (nprcinctx >= 51) 
                      THEN 'B' WHEN (nprcinctx <= 200) AND (nprcinctx >= 101) THEN 'C' WHEN (nprcinctx <= 400) AND (nprcinctx >= 201) THEN 'D' WHEN (nprcinctx <= 500) AND 
                      (nprcinctx >= 401) THEN 'E' WHEN (nprcinctx >= 500) THEN 'F' ELSE 'ZZZ' END AS PB, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'NONCamp' ELSE 'CAMP' END AS PBC
FROM         dbo.CB_PriceBand1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BA_Camp1 ON dbo.CB_PriceBand1.year = dbo.BA_Camp1.year AND dbo.CB_PriceBand1.month = dbo.BA_Camp1.month AND 
                      dbo.CB_PriceBand1.citemno = dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo
WHERE     (LEFT(dbo.CB_PriceBand1.citemno, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL')) OR
                      (LEFT(dbo.CB_PriceBand1.citemno, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))
ORDER BY dbo.CB_PriceBand1.year

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_All
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvc.ccustno NOT IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Gross Sales', dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, dbo.arinvc.ctype, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Amount Less Disc], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvc.ccustno IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Inter Company'
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/03/31')
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, cclass, cprodline, cinvno, nshipqty, [Gross Sales], dinvoice, nprice, ndiscamt, cwarehouse, 'NAM' AS Company, ctype, [Amount Less Disc], 
                      [Inter Company]
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.CB_Sales_Nam_All
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvch.ccustno NOT IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Gross Sales', dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, dbo.arinvch.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Amount Less Disc], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvch.ccustno IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Inter Company'
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/03/31')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, '' AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvc.ccustno NOT IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Gross Sales', dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, dbo.arinvc.ctype, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS [Amount Less Disc], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvc.ccustno IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Inter Company'
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/03/31') AND dbo.aritrs.citemno LIKE 'NONSTOCK%'
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, '' AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvch.ccustno NOT IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Gross Sales', dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, dbo.arinvch.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt AS [Amount Less Disc], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.arinvch.ccustno IN ('EXP', 'NUM')) THEN dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS 'Inter Company'
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/03/31') AND dbo.aritrsh.citemno LIKE 'NONSTOCK%'

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Cat
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'FINE FRAGR') THEN 'FRAGRANCE' WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'SALES AID') THEN 'SALESAID' ELSE rtrim(ctype) END AS ctype, year, month, 
                      SUM([RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], Discountable, Company, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, SUM([RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], Component_Code, SUM(vat) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts5
WHERE     (LEFT(Component_Code, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL'))
GROUP BY ctype, year, month, Discountable, Company, Component_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Cust_Item
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, cclass, cprodline, ccustno, ccompany, Sponsor_Code, Customer_Class, cinvno, Sponsor_Name, nshipqty, nsalesamt, dinvoice, nprice, ndiscrate, 
                      cwarehouse, Company, ctype, Cost, GP, ndiscamt, GP_Perc, Total_Cost, Year, month, nsalesamt - ndiscamt AS Sales_Less_Disc, base
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Cust_Item1

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Cust_Item1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Sponsor_Code, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Customer_Class, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, arcust_1.ccompany AS Sponsor_Name, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, arinvc.ctype, dbo.aritrs.ncost AS Cost, 
                      (dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) - dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS GP, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt)
                       <> 0) THEN ((dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) - dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) / (dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) 
                      * 100 ELSE 0 END AS GP_Perc, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost AS Total_Cost, datename(year, arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, datename(month, arinvc.dinvoice) 
                      AS month, aritrs.nbprice AS base
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt <> 0.00
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, cclass, cprodline, ccustno, ccompany, Sponsor_Code, Customer_Class, cinvno, Sponsor_Name, nshipqty, nsalesamt, dinvoice, nprice, ndiscrate, 
                      cwarehouse, 'NAM' AS Company, ctype, Cost, GP, ndiscamt, GP_Perc, Total_Cost, year, month, base
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.CB_Sales_cust_item
WHERE     nsalesamt <> 0.00
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Sponsor_Code, dbo.arcust.cclass AS Customer_Class, dbo.arinvch.cinvno, arcust_1.ccompany AS Sponsor_Name, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, arinvch.ctype, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost AS Cost, (dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) - dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS GP, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, 
                      CASE WHEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) <> 0) THEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) - dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) 
                      / (dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS GP_Perc, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.ncost AS Total_Cost, datename(year, 
                      arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, datename(month, arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, aritrsh.nbprice AS Base
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt <> 0.00

CREATE VIEW dbo.test
AS
SELECT     SUM(nshipqty) AS Qty, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Sales, DATENAME(year, dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dinvoice) AS Month, DATENAME(Day, dinvoice) 
                      AS Day
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Test
WHERE     (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-04-01 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dinvoice), DATENAME(Day, dinvoice)
union all
SELECT     SUM(nshipqty) AS Qty, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Sales, DATENAME(year, dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dinvoice) AS Month, DATENAME(Day, dinvoice) 
                      AS Day
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Test
WHERE     (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2009-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-01 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dinvoice), DATENAME(Day, dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Item_Category
AS
SELECT     year, month, Company, ccustno, ccompany, cclass, dinvoice, cprodline, ctype, Component_Code, Component_Desc, Component_Qty, Component_Cost, nprice, 
                      component_Value, [RSP 100], [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND 
                      dinvoice < '2008/04/01') THEN 'Year1' WHEN (dinvoice > '2008/03/31' AND dinvoice < '2009/04/01') THEN 'Year2' WHEN (dinvoice > '2009/03/31' AND 
                      dinvoice < '2010/04/01') THEN 'Year3' WHEN (dinvoice > '2010/03/31' AND dinvoice < '2011/04/01') THEN 'Year4' END AS FY
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts4

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Item_Category2
AS
SELECT     Company, ccustno, ccompany, Component_Code, Component_Desc, cclass, cprodline, ctype, SUM(Component_Qty) AS Qty, SUM([RSP 100]) AS RSP_100, 
                      SUM([RSP 80]) AS RSP_80, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, FY
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Item_Category
GROUP BY Company, ccustno, ccompany, Component_Code, Component_Desc, cclass, cprodline, ctype, FY

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Item_Kit
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.icitem.lkititem, 'NON KIT' AS classification, '' AS Kit_Item, icitem.ctype, icitem.cclass, icitem.cprodline
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/12/31') AND dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, icitem.lkititem, 'NON KIT' AS classification, '' AS Kit_Item, icitem.ctype, icitem.cclass, 
                      icitem.cprodline
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/12/31' AND dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, icitem_1.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.icikit.nqty as nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.icitem.lkititem, 'KIT' AS classification, dbo.icikit.ckititemno AS Kit_Item, icitem_1.ctype, icitem_1.cclass, 
                      icitem_1.cprodline
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/12/31') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, icitem_1.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.icikit.nqty as nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.icitem.lkititem, 'KIT' AS classification, dbo.icikit.ckititemno AS Kit_Item, icitem_1.ctype, 
                      icitem_1.cclass, icitem_1.cprodline
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/12/31') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [RSP 100] - [RSP 80] AS [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, 
                      dinvoice AS Date, cdescript, cinvno, crevncode, crevnacc, cclass, cprodline, ncost, Total_Cost, ctype, Discountable, vat, CASE WHEN (expr1 = 'EXPORT') 
                      THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS Export_Cust, CASE WHEN ([RSP 100] = [RSP 80]) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.citemno, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Units) AS Units, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.[Discount Promo]) AS [Discount Promo], SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.[Discount 25]) AS [Discount 25], SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.year, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.month, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Company, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.date, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.crevnacc, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Total_Cost) AS [Total Cost], dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Export_Cust, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Promotion,
                       0 AS nqtylimit, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo AND dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date
GROUP BY dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.citemno, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.year, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.month, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Company, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.date, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.cdescript, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Export_Cust, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.Promotion, dbo.icitem.nprice, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl
ORDER BY dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cdescript, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Company, 
                      dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Export_Cust, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN nunits * nprice ELSE nunits * npriceexl END AS RSP80, 
                      dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nUnits, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nprice, 
                      dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nDollars AS RSP100, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl AS Special_Price, dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.nUnits AS Total_Cost,
                       dbo.CB_New_Camp.nQtylimit, dbo.CB_New_Camp.nPriceExl, dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.ldscntble, dbo.CB_New_Cost.LRC, dbo.CB_New_Cost.STDC, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost, dbo.CB_New_Camp.cSpontype
FROM         dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.Date = dbo.CB_New_Camp.Date AND dbo.FC_Sales_Main_Kit.cItemNo = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.cItemNo, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.nUnits, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.RSP100, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.RSP100 - dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.RSP80 AS [Discount Promo], dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.RSP80, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN rsp80 - (rsp80 * 0.25) ELSE rsp80 END AS FC_RSP60, DATENAME(year, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Date) AS Month, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Company, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Date, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.cdescript, 
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Total_Cost, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Export_Cust, CASE WHEN (ccampno IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.nprice, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.Special_Price, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.nQtylimit, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.cSpontype
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_DRP_Rev ON dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC2.cItemNo = dbo.CB_DRP_Rev.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main4
AS
SELECT     citemno, Units, [RSP 100], [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], year, month, Company, date, cdescript, crevnacc, [Total Cost], 0 as Total_STD_Cost, Export_Cust, 
                      'Actual' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, npriceexl AS Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC1
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, nUnits, RSP100, [Discount Promo], RSP80, [Discount 25], RSP60, Year, Month, Company, Date, cdescript, crevnacc, Total_Cost, Total_STD_Cost, Export_Cust, 
                      'Forecast' AS Type, nprice AS Normal_Price, Special_Price, Promotion, nqtylimit
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main4a

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main4a
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.cItemNo, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.nUnits, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.RSP100, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.[Discount Promo], 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.RSP80, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.RSP80 - dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.FC_RSP60 AS [Discount 25], 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.FC_RSP60 AS RSP60, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Year, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Month, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Company, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Date, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.cdescript, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Total_Cost, 
                      CASE WHEN (icitem.nstdcost = 0) THEN 0 ELSE dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.nUnits * icitem.nstdcost END AS Total_STD_cost, CASE WHEN (ltrim(rtrim(cspontype)) 
                      = 'EXP') THEN 'Yes' ELSE dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Export_Cust END AS Export_Cust, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Promotion, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.nprice, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Special_Price, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.nQtylimit, dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.Special_Price AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.cSpontype
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Sales_Main_FC3.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Main5
AS
SELECT     dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.citemno, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Units, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[RSP 100], dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[Discount Promo], dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[RSP 80], 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[Discount 25], dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.year, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.month, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Company, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.date, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.cdescript, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.crevnacc, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.[Total Cost], 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Export_Cust AS Expr1, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Type, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Normal_Price, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Special_Price, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Promotion, dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.nqtylimit, 
                      CASE WHEN (date BETWEEN '2007/04/01' AND '2008/03/31') THEN '2007to2008' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2008/04/01' AND '2009/03/31') 
                      THEN '2008to2009' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2009/04/01' AND '2010/03/31') THEN '2009to2010' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2010/04/01' AND '2011/03/31') 
                      THEN '2010to2011' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2011/04/01' AND '2012/03/31') THEN '2011to2012' WHEN (date BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2013/03/31') 
                      THEN '2012to2013' ELSE 'Contact Accountmate' END AS [Fin Year], dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.Total_STD_Cost
FROM         dbo.CB_Sales_Main4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.CB_Sales_Main4.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Test
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Sponsor_Code, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, arcust_1.ccompany AS Sponsor_Name, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, 'SA' AS Company, arinvc.ctype
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno

                      dbo.CB_Sales_Var_MKT1.crevncode, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_MKT1.ccustno, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_MKT1.ccompany, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_MKT1.cclass,

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.citemno, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.nshipqty) AS nshipqty, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.[RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.Discount_Promo) AS Discount_Promo, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.[RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], 
                      SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.Discount_25) AS Discount_25, SUM(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.[Net Invoice Value]) AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.year, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.month, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.Company, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.cprodline, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.cclass, 
                      MAX(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.FC_Qty) AS FC_Qty, MAX(dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.FC_Sales) AS FC_Sales, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.Discountable, 
                      dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript

                      dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.cprodline, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.cclass, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.Discountable, dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.ctype, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript
ORDER BY dbo.CB_Sales_Var_Mkt2.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Standard_Lines
AS
SELECT     year, month, year + '    ' + month + '    ' + 'Campaign' AS Heading, ctype AS Type, cclass AS [Product Category], cItemNo AS Code, cdescript AS Description, 
                      csponcat AS SPON, nUnits, 0 AS Special_Price, CAST(nprice * 0.14 + nprice AS decimal) AS normal_price, CAST(nprice * 0.14 + nprice AS decimal) * nUnits AS Value, 
                      nstdcost AS COG, CASE WHEN (nPrice <> 0) THEN ROUND((nPrice * 0.55 - nstdcost) / (nPrice * 0.55) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS GP, Variance, cprodline, Total_cost, 
                      ldscntble, 'Standard' AS ccampno, cItemNo AS expr, 0 AS nqtylimit, 0 AS nsales, '' AS expr2, nDollars, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice <> 0) THEN (CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS decimal) 
                      - CAST(nPrice * 0.14 + nPrice AS decimal)) / CAST(dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice * 0.14 + dbo.CB_Item_FC.nprice AS decimal) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS disc, '2. Standard' AS test, 
                      CAST(year + '/' + month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, nprice, dcreate
FROM         dbo.CB_Item_FC
WHERE     (nUnits <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CB_Stock_Value
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.ncost, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.icwhse.cdescript AS warehouse_desc, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nonhand * dbo.iciwhs.ncost AS value, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.lmlm = 1) THEN 'MLM' ELSE 'NOT MLM' END AS MLM, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1) THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'Not Discountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icwhse ON dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.icwhse.cwarehouse

                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.ctype, aritrsh.ccmpprodln AS spon, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 'Discountable' ELSE 'NonDiscountable' END AS Discountable, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS vat, aritrsh.lstock, arcust.cstate AS Region
