CREATE VIEW dbo.La
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Pccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Pcompany, arcust_1.ccustno AS L1ccustno, arcust_1.ccompany AS L1ccompany, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS L1dcreate, arcust_2.ccustno AS l2ccustno, arcust_2.ccompany AS l2ccompany, arcust_2.dcreate AS L2Dcreate
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '1995-02-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (arcust_1.dcreate <= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2050-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (arcust_2.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '1995-02-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (arcust_2.dcreate <= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2050-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (dbo.arcust.ccustno <> '100000') OR
                      (arcust_1.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '1995-02-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (arcust_1.dcreate <= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2050-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (arcust_2.dcreate IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno <> '100000')
ORDER BY Pccustno, L1ccustno, L2ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.La2
AS
SELECT     dbo.La.Pccustno, dbo.La.Pcompany, dbo.La.L1ccustno, dbo.La.L1ccompany, dbo.La.L1dcreate, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 'Level1' AS Type, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.La INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON dbo.La.L1ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.La.Pccustno, dbo.La.Pcompany, dbo.La.L1ccustno, dbo.La.L1ccompany, dbo.La.L1dcreate, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.La.L1dcreate BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, '1995-02-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2050-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.La.Pccustno, dbo.La.Pcompany, dbo.La.l2ccustno, dbo.La.l2ccompany, dbo.La.L2Dcreate, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 'Level2' AS Type, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.La INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON dbo.La.l2ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.La.Pccustno, dbo.La.Pcompany, dbo.La.l2ccustno, dbo.La.l2ccompany, dbo.La.L2Dcreate, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1, dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.cinvno, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.La.L2Dcreate BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, '1995-02-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2050-12-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.La3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Pccustno, Pcompany, L1ccustno, L1ccompany, L1dcreate, Amount, DATENAME(year, L1dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, L1dcreate) 
                      AS Months, Type, cinvno, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.La2
ORDER BY dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.la3_mk
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Pccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Pcompany, arcust_1.ccustno AS L1ccustno, arcust_1.ccompany AS L1ccompany, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS L1dcreate, arcust_2.ccustno AS l2ccustno, arcust_2.ccompany AS l2ccompany, arcust_2.dcreate AS L2Dcreate
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-03-16 00:00:00', 102)) AND (arcust_1.dcreate <= '2015-DEC-31') AND (arcust_2.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, 
                      '2014-03-16 00:00:00', 102)) AND (arcust_2.dcreate <= '2015-DEC-31') AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno <> '100000')
ORDER BY Pccustno, L1ccustno, L2ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.LB1
AS
select  TOP (100) PERCENT 
	level1.csponsor AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.level1.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], 
	level1.ccustno AS Code,level1.ccompany AS Name,level1.dcreate AS [Date Join], 
	DATENAME(year, level1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, level1.dcreate) AS Months, 
	dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Sales, 'Level1' AS Heading, 
	level1.csponsor AS Sponsor
		from level1 
		left outer join AG_Levels_Sales1 
		ON level1.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno 
			AND DATENAME(year, level1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
			DATENAME(month, level1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
		
union all
select TOP (100) PERCENT 
	level2.csponsor AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.level2.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], 
	level2.ccustno AS Code,level2.ccompany AS Name, level2.dcreate AS [Date Join], 
	DATENAME(year, level2.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, level2.dcreate) AS Months, 
	dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 'Level2' AS Heading, 
	(select csponsor from level1 where ccustno =level2.csponsor) as SponsorLvl1
		from level2 left outer join AG_Levels_Sales1 
			ON level2.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno 
			AND DATENAME(year, level2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
            DATENAME(month, level2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months

CREATE VIEW dbo.Lb2
AS
SELECT     dbo.LB1.Sponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.LB1.Code, dbo.LB1.Name, dbo.LB1.[Date Join], dbo.LB1.Years, dbo.LB1.Months, dbo.LB1.Sales, dbo.LB1.Heading
FROM         dbo.LB1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.LB1.Sponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.LB1.Sales IS NOT NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Link_no_ship
AS
SELECT     csono, ccustno, Balance
FROM         dbo.SO_Open
WHERE     (csono NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csono
                            FROM          dbo.MLM_Open))

CREATE VIEW dbo.List_vs_Special
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AND dbo.icitem.nprice <= dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl

CREATE VIEW dbo.liveitem
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.*
FROM         dbo.icitem

CREATE VIEW dbo.LL1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_1.ccustno AS Code, arcust_1.ccompany AS Name, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS [Date Joined], DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) AS Months, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Sales, 'Level1' AS Type
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_1.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.LL2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_2.ccustno AS Code, arcust_2.ccompany AS Name, 
                      arcust_2.dcreate AS [Date Join], DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Months, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS Amount, 'Level2' AS Heading
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 ON arcust_2.ccustno = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno AND DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years AND 
                      DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) = dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months
WHERE     (arcust_2.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31') AND (arcust_1.ccustno NOT IN
                          (SELECT     [Sponsor Code]
                            FROM          dbo.LL1))

CREATE VIEW dbo.LL3
AS
select * from ll1
union all
select * from ll2

CREATE VIEW dbo.LRC_Kits
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, SUM(iciwhs_1.nlrecvcost * dbo.icikit.nqty) AS LRC
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs AS iciwhs_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = iciwhs_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (iciwhs_1.cwarehouse = '4400')
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.nlrecvcost

CREATE VIEW dbo.Andre_Budgets
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Name, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Budget, 
                      dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Date, dbo.glacct.cdescript, dbo.glagrp.cdescript AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid
ORDER BY dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Account, dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets.Name

CREATE VIEW dbo.[mark journal test]
AS
SELECT     dbo.arjtrs.cjtype, dbo.arjtrs.cjrnlno, dbo.gltrsn.cobjno, dbo.gltrsn.ctrsno, dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt, dbo.arjtrs.namt
FROM         dbo.arjtrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltrsn ON dbo.arjtrs.cjrnlno = dbo.gltrsn.ctrsno AND dbo.arjtrs.ccustno = dbo.gltrsn.cobjno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Marketing_OC1
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs_monthly.citemno, CAST(RTRIM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dyear) + '/' + RTRIM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dmonth) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS CDate, 
                      dbo.iciwhs_monthly.nonhand AS Onhand, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.ntotcost AS Total_Cost, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dmonth, dbo.icitem.lchkonhand, dbo.icitem.lupdonhand, 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, RTRIM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dyear) AS Year, RTRIM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dmonth) AS Month
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_monthly INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs_monthly.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Marketing_OC2
AS
SELECT     citemno, CDate, SUM(Onhand) AS On_Hand, SUM(Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, Year AS CloseYear, Month AS CloseMonth, cdescript, RTRIM(ctype) AS ctype, 
                      RTRIM(cclass) AS cclass, RTRIM(cprodline) AS cprodline, ldscntble, RTRIM(ctype1) AS ctype1, RTRIM(ctype2) AS ctype2, RTRIM(ctype3) AS ctype3, DATENAME(Year, 
                      CDate + 1) AS OpenYear, DATENAME(Month, CDate + 1) AS OpenMonth, lchkonhand, lupdonhand, lkititem
FROM         dbo.Marketing_OC1
GROUP BY citemno, CDate, Year, Month, cdescript, ctype, cclass, cprodline, ldscntble, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, lchkonhand, lupdonhand, lkititem
HAVING      (SUM(Onhand) <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.MArketing_Tracking
AS
SELECT     year, month, Company, CASE WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'FINE FRAGR') THEN 'FRAGRANCE' WHEN (rtrim(ctype) = 'SALES AID') THEN 'SALESAID' ELSE rtrim(ctype) 
                      END AS ctype, SUM([RSP 100]) AS [RSP 100], SUM([RSP 80]) AS [RSP 80], SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, SUM([RSP 100 Incl]) AS [RSP 100 Incl], SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) 
                      AS [RSP 80 Incl], SUM([Net Invoice Value Incl]) AS NIV_Incl, Discountable, spon, SUM(Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, CASE WHEN (SUM([Net Invoice Value]) <> 0) 
                      THEN (SUM([Net Invoice Value]) - SUM(Total_Cost)) / SUM([Net Invoice Value]) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS GP, SUM(Prom_Rev) AS Prom_Rev, SUM(Prom_Cost) 
                      AS Prom_Cost, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, csponcat, cRace, citemno, cdescript, SUM(nshipqty) AS Qty, dinvoice, PE, PI, CASE WHEN (ctype IN ('Skincare', 'Cosmetics', 
                      'Lifestyle', 'Fine Fragr', 'Bodycare', 'FRAGRANCE')) THEN 'A' ELSE 'B' END AS StockG
FROM         dbo.CB_Market_Dash1
WHERE     (LEFT(citemno, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL')) OR
                      (LEFT(citemno, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))
GROUP BY year, month, Company, ctype, Discountable, spon, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, csponcat, cRace, citemno, cdescript, dinvoice, PE, PI, CASE WHEN (ctype IN ('Skincare', 
                      'Cosmetics', 'Lifestyle', 'Fine Fragr', 'Bodycare', 'FRAGRANCE')) THEN 'A' ELSE 'B' END

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Martin Training]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cterr, dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvc.centerby, dbo.arinvc.ctype, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS value, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx AS RSP, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Martin Traning 1]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cwarehouse AS Warehouse, SUM(nshipqty) AS [Ship Qty], ctype, ccustno, ccompany, cterr
FROM         dbo.[Martin Training]
GROUP BY cwarehouse, ctype, ccustno, ccompany, cterr
HAVING      (ctype = '') AND (cterr <> '')
ORDER BY cterr, SUM(nshipqty)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Min
AS
SELECT     dbo.levels.[Item number], dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icibin.nonhand, dbo.levels.Item_Weight, dbo.levels.Box_Weight, dbo.levels.Box_Qty, 
                      ROUND(dbo.levels.Box_Item_Weight, 3) AS Box_Item_Weight, dbo.levels.Stock_levels * dbo.levels.Box_Qty AS Max_Units_levels, ROUND(dbo.levels.Stock_levels, 
                      2) AS Max_Stock_levels, ROUND(dbo.levels.Min_Stock_Level, 0) AS Min_Stock_Level, CASE WHEN (Min_Stock_Level = '0') 
                      THEN '0' ELSE (dbo.levels.Box_Qty * ROUND(dbo.levels.Min_Stock_Level, 0)) END AS Min_Units_Level, dbo.levels.Warehouse, dbo.levels.Bin
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icibin ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icibin.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.levels ON dbo.icibin.cbin = dbo.levels.Bin AND dbo.icibin.cwarehouse = dbo.levels.Warehouse AND dbo.icibin.citemno = dbo.levels.[Item number]
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Min_2
AS
SELECT     [Item number], cdescript, nonhand, Item_Weight, Box_Weight, Box_Qty, Box_Item_Weight, Max_Units_levels, Max_Stock_levels, Min_Stock_Level, Min_Units_Level,
                       CASE WHEN (Min_Stock_Level = '0') THEN '0' ELSE (nonhand - Min_Units_Level) END AS Replenish_Units, CASE WHEN (Min_Stock_Level = '0') 
                      THEN '0' WHEN (Box_Qty = '0') THEN '0' ELSE Round(((nonhand - Min_Units_Level) / Box_Qty), 0) END AS Replenish_Shipper, Warehouse, Bin
FROM         dbo.Min

CREATE VIEW dbo.Min_3
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      [Item number], cdescript, nonhand, Item_Weight, Box_Weight, Box_Qty, Box_Item_Weight, Max_Units_levels, Max_Stock_levels, Min_Stock_Level, Min_Units_Level, 
                      Replenish_Units, Replenish_Shipper, Warehouse, Bin
FROM         dbo.Min_2

CREATE VIEW dbo.Min_4
AS
SELECT     dbo.Min_3.*
FROM         dbo.Min_3
UNION ALL
SELECT     amanniquenam.dbo.Min_3.*
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.Min_3

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Active/Inactive]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno > '0') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno < 'AS') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-11-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-10-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (NOT (dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno LIKE 'j')) AND (NOT (dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno LIKE 'm'))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Active/Inactive MLM]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_arinvc.lautoreb
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno > '0') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno < 'AS') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-11-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2015-01-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno > 'k')
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.lautoreb, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM AI4EP]
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sosord.lautoinvk
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM All Beautes]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Auto Invoked], dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-12-01 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript LIKE '%beaute%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Anita SO]
AS
SELECT     csono, centerby, dorder
FROM         dbo.vw_sosord
WHERE     (dorder > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-12-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM AR Inv]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cinvno AS [Invoice Number], ccustno AS [Member Number], cbcompany AS Name, csaddr1 AS [Address 1], csaddr2 AS [Address 2], 
                      cscity AS Suburb, csstate AS Province, cszip AS Code, cscountry AS City, dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], nsalesamt AS RSP, nsalesamt - ndiscamt AS [Nett Value]
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-01-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY [Invoice Number]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM AR Itrs]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csono, cdescript AS Expr2, citemno, nsalesamt AS Expr5, ndiscamt AS Expr3, ntaxamt1 AS Expr4
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs
WHERE     (citemno > 'Zy')
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM arcust]
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcust.*
FROM         dbo.arcust

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Item Nr], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS [Sales Amount], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) 
                      AS [Ship Qty], dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice AS Price, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-06-18 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3207011') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke Beaute]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Item Nr], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS [Sales Amount], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) 
                      AS [Ship Qty], dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice AS Price, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-04-19 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3207011') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice = 0)

ViewName: MJM Auto Invoke Beaute Single > R0
ViewDefinition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke Beaute Single > R0]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Item Nr], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS [Sales Amount], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) 
                      AS [Ship Qty], dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice AS Price, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-04-19 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3207011') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice > 0) AND (MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno) <> 'NUM')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke Beaute Sold]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], dbo.icikit.ccompno, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Ship Qty], dbo.icikit.nqty, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) * dbo.icikit.nqty AS [Total Sold], dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-04-19 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'AI/40048/13')
ORDER BY [Invoice Date]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke Replique Promo]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno, SUM(dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].nqty) AS Expr1, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrstype, 
                      dbo.vw_icisti.dissue
FROM         dbo.vw_icisti INNER JOIN
                      dbo.[vw_ictrsn union] ON dbo.vw_icisti.cissueno = dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrsno
GROUP BY dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrstype, dbo.vw_icisti.dissue
HAVING      (dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno = 'AI/70011/12') AND (dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.vw_icisti.dissue > CONVERT(DATETIME, 
                      '2012-06-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_icisti.dissue

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Auto Invoke Sold]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Item Nr], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS [Sales Amount], 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Ship Qty], dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice AS Price, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-06-18 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'AI/70011/12') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice > 0)
ORDER BY [Invoice Date]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Backdate]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cuid, cinvno, crevision, ctype, ccustno, cwarehouse, coriginvno, corderby, cslpnno, centerby, cbaddrno, cbcompany, cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, 
                      cbstate, cbzip, cbcountry, cbphone, cbcontact, csaddrno, cscompany, csaddr1, csaddr2, cscity, csstate, cszip, cscountry, csphone, cscontact, cshipvia, cfob, cpono, 
                      crmano, cfrgtcode, cfrtaxcode, ctaxcode, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno, ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname, cpayref, ccurrcode, caracc, ctogl, ccommiss, csource, dcreate, 
                      dorder, dinvoice, ddiscount, ddue, dlastpaid, dcharge, dfinance, dclosed, lvoid, lfinchg, lusecusitm, lfrttax1, lfrttax2, lapplytax, lprcinctax, lprtinvc, lprtslip, lprtcod, 
                      lprtlbl, lmultiso, lsavecard, ndiscday, ndueday, ntermdisc, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nfrtaxver, ntaxable1, ntaxable2, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, nfrtamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, 
                      ntaxamt3, nfrttax1, nfrttax2, nfrttax3, nadjamt, nfinamt, ntotpaid, ntotdisc, ntotadj, ntotdebt, ntotmcvar, nmcround, nbalance, nftaxable1, nftaxable2, nfsalesamt, 
                      nfdiscamt, nffrtamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nffrttax1, nffrttax2, nffrttax3, nfadjamt, nffinamt, nftotpaid, nftotdisc, nftotadj, nftotdebt, nfbalance, nweight, 
                      nxchgrate, cpklsno, lposinvc, lsource, lmlm, lgenrebate
FROM         dbo.[MJM Backdate Prelim]
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2013/01/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Backdate Prelim]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_arinvc.ctype, dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_arinvc.centerby, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.vw_arinvc.cshipvia, dbo.vw_arinvc.cpono, dbo.vw_arinvc.cpaycode, dbo.vw_arinvc.dcreate, dbo.vw_arinvc.dorder, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.sosord.centerby AS [Captured by]
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.vw_aritrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_arinvc.ctype, dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_arinvc.centerby, dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.cshipvia, dbo.vw_arinvc.cpono, dbo.vw_arinvc.cpaycode, dbo.vw_arinvc.dcreate, dbo.vw_arinvc.dorder, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.sosord.centerby
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dcreate > dbo.vw_arinvc.dorder) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-07-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.ctype <> 'R') 
                      AND (NOT (dbo.vw_arinvc.cpono LIKE 'W%')) AND (DATENAME(month, dbo.vw_arinvc.dorder) <> DATENAME(month, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.dcreate) = DATENAME(month, GETDATE()))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Berco]
AS
SELECT     WAYBILL_NUMBER, WAYBILL_DATE, DIMENSIONS, FREIGHT_VALUE, INVOICE_DATE, INVOICE_NUMBER, TOTAL_MASS, TOTAL_PARCELS, TOTAL_VALUE, 
                      TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, TOTAL_VOLUME, VAT, TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES
FROM         dbo.be_waybill
WHERE     (INVOICE_DATE > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-08-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (INVOICE_DATE < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Courier]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cinvno, cshipvia, dinvoice, nsalesamt, nfrtamt
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-08-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY nfrtamt DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM CR Income Report]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor AS Customer, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.arcust.cpcustno AS Parent, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, 
                      SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngrebateamt) AS [GS Rebate], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt AS [PS Rebate], 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25 AS [PS VolDisc], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales AS [PS Total], SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.GRsales) 
                      AS [GS Total (add PS Total)], SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nsalesdisc) AS [GS Add (add PS Add)], dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Sponsor, 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS [Parent Name], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth AS Dt
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.cpcustno = arcust_1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor, dbo.arcust.cpcustno, dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25
HAVING      (dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date = '2015/11/30')
ORDER BY Customer, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Credit Report]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty AS Expr3, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS Expr1, dbo.arirmk.mremark AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arirmk ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arirmk.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-11-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-09-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno < 'A') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno > '0') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty < '0')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice

ViewName: MJM Crystal First Time Kit Purchase
ViewDefinition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Crystal First Time Kit Purchase]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SA_NAM_Com.Customer, dbo.SA_NAM_Cust.Name, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.ndiscrate, SUM(dbo.SA_NAM_Com.MLMValue) AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.SA_NAM_Com.dinvoice, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.cwarehouse, dbo.arcust.csponsor, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.dcreate
FROM         dbo.SA_NAM_Com INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SA_NAM_Cust ON dbo.SA_NAM_Com.Customer = dbo.SA_NAM_Cust.[Cust No] INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SA_NAM_Com.Customer = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SA_NAM_Com.Customer, dbo.SA_NAM_Cust.Name, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.ndiscrate, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.dinvoice, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.cwarehouse, 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SA_NAM_Com.dcreate
HAVING      (dbo.SA_NAM_Com.ndiscrate = 50)
ORDER BY dbo.SA_NAM_Com.Customer

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.nbalance, MAX(dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.nbalance
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Dashboard L1 Recruits]
AS
SELECT     Csponsor, COUNT(Downliner) AS Expr1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), RegDate, 112) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.[MJM Downline Total]
WHERE     ([Level] = 'L01')
GROUP BY Csponsor, CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), RegDate, 112)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Dashboard Recruits All]
AS
SELECT     Csponsor, COUNT(Downliner) AS Expr1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), RegDate, 112) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.[MJM Downline Total]
WHERE     ([Level] <> 'L00')
GROUP BY Csponsor, CONVERT(VARCHAR(6), RegDate, 112)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM DB Income]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor AS Customer, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt AS [PS Rebate], SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngrebateamt) AS [GS Rebate], 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25 AS [PS VolDisc], dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Sponsor, arcust_1.ccompany AS [Parent Name], 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth AS Dt
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.cpcustno = arcust_1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor, dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25
HAVING      (dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date = '2013/11/30')
ORDER BY Customer, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.[DB L1 Recruits]
AS
SELECT     csponsor AS Expr3, COUNT(ccustno) AS Expr1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dcreate, 112) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arcust
GROUP BY csponsor, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dcreate, 112)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM DB Sales]
AS
SELECT     dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ccustno, MIN(dbo.arcust.ccompany) AS Expr2, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngsalesamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngsalesdisc, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nSalesamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nsalesdisc, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Expr1, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth) - 1), dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ccustno, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngsalesamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngsalesdisc, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nSalesamt, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nsalesdisc, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Expr1, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth) - 1), 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Dischem]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr2, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS Expr3, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06020/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06080/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06100/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06120/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08300/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08323/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08324/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08325/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08326/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08328/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06160/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06180/11') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06200/06') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06202/06') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08327/08') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ad/06140/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'ae/08343/11')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Distribution Costs]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.soshiph.nshipcost, dbo.vw_aritrs.csono
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.soshiph ON dbo.vw_aritrs.csono = dbo.soshiph.csono
WHERE     (dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno > '1000006670' AND dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno < '5000005338')
GROUP BY dbo.soshiph.nshipcost, dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vw_aritrs.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Downline Total]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Csponsor, dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Downliner, dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level], 
                      dbo.arcust.dcreate AS RegDate
FROM         dbo.[MJM Union Downliner] INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Downliner = dbo.arcust.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Downliner]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Level01, Arcust_1.ccustno AS Level02, Arcust_2.ccustno AS Level03, Arcust_3.ccustno AS Level04, 
                      Arcust_4.ccustno AS Level05, Arcust_5.ccustno AS Level06, Arcust_6.ccustno AS Level07, Arcust_7.ccustno AS Level08, Arcust_8.ccustno AS Level09, 
                      Arcust_9.ccustno AS Level10, Arcust_10.ccustno AS Level11, Arcust_11.ccustno AS Level12, Arcust_12.ccustno AS Level13, Arcust_13.ccustno AS Level14, 
                      Arcust_14.ccustno AS Level15, Arcust_15.ccustno AS Level16, Arcust_16.ccustno AS Level17
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = Arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_2 ON Arcust_1.ccustno = Arcust_2.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_3 ON Arcust_2.ccustno = Arcust_3.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_4 ON Arcust_3.ccustno = Arcust_4.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_5 ON Arcust_4.ccustno = Arcust_5.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_6 ON Arcust_5.ccustno = Arcust_6.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_7 ON Arcust_6.ccustno = Arcust_7.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_8 ON Arcust_7.ccustno = Arcust_8.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_9 ON Arcust_8.ccustno = Arcust_9.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_10 ON Arcust_9.ccustno = Arcust_10.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_11 ON Arcust_10.ccustno = Arcust_11.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_12 ON Arcust_11.ccustno = Arcust_12.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_13 ON Arcust_12.ccustno = Arcust_13.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_14 ON Arcust_13.ccustno = Arcust_14.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_15 ON Arcust_14.ccustno = Arcust_15.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_16 ON Arcust_15.ccustno = Arcust_16.csponsor
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.csponsor > 99998)
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM EP SO Match]
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].npaidamt, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.cpono
FROM         dbo.[vw_arcash&h] RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.[vw_arcash&h].csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.cpono LIKE '%W-%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Exploded Items]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS Expr2, 
                      dbo.icikit.ccompno AS Expr3, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-03-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-02-29 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno < '530000') AND (dbo.icikit.ccompno > 'aa/00040/02' AND dbo.icikit.ccompno < 'AA/00321/12') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno > 'aa/00040/02' AND 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno < 'AA/00321/12')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM First Time Kits]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, MIN(dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice) AS Expr2, dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscrate, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-05-01 00:00:00', 102) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-04-30 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscrate
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscrate = 50)
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Freight Recovery]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno AS Expr1, cbcompany AS Expr2, cinvno AS Expr3, dinvoice AS Expr4, ndiscrate AS Expr5, nsalesamt AS Expr6, ndiscamt AS Expr7, 
                      nfrtamt AS Expr8, ntaxamt1 AS Expr9, nfrttax1 AS Expr10, ntotpaid AS Expr11, ntotdisc AS Expr12, cshipvia, cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-06-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-08-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY Expr8

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Greece Targets]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csponsor AS Customer, Date, PSalesDisc
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical
GROUP BY csponsor, dmonth, Date, PSalesDisc
HAVING      (dmonth > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-03-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY Customer, Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Income Report]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno AS [Member No.], nSalesDisc AS [Discountable Personal Sales], nrebateamt AS [Personal Sales Discount], 
                      nrebateamtd - nrebateamt AS [Additional Rebate], nrebateamtd AS [Total Earnings], dmonth AS Date, lTL
FROM         dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY
WHERE     (lTL = '0' OR
                      lTL = '1') AND (ccustno > '100002')
ORDER BY [Member No.], Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Inv & Items]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.cclass AS Class, dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno AS [Invoice #], dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Item #], dbo.vw_aritrs.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice Date], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Ship Qty], dbo.icitem.ldscntble AS [Disc/Non Disc], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      AS [Sales Amount], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscamt) AS [Discount Amount], SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS [Tax Amount], dbo.vw_aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.vw_aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.vw_aritrs.crevncode, 
                      dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-08-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-12-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (NOT (dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno LIKE '%M%')) AND (NOT (dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno LIKE '%J%')) AND (NOT (dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno LIKE '%A%'))
ORDER BY [Invoice #]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Invoice Refresh]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_arinvc.centerby, 
                      COUNT(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_arinvc.centerby
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-05-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno < 'A')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Invoices]
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cbcompany, cinvno, cwarehouse, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-12-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE '%M%') AND NOT (cinvno LIKE '%J%') AND NOT (cinvno LIKE '%A%'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Item Qty]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.citemno AS ItemNo, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty / 12) AS [Ave Ship Qty], MIN(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS [Inv Date], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.icikit.ccompno IS NULL) THEN (dbo.aritrs.citemno) ELSE (dbo.icikit.ccompno) END AS Total
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= DATEADD(MONTH, - 12, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno
ORDER BY Total

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Item Qty Components]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Total, SUM([Ave Ship Qty]) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.[MJM Item Qty]
GROUP BY Total
ORDER BY Total

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Lifestyle Analysis]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript) AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS Expr2, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Expr3, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS Expr4, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr5, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice) AS Expr6, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.ncost) AS Expr7, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-02-28 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-03-01 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
HAVING      (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'TEABN') OR
                      (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'FORHEALTH') OR
                      (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'MREPLBN') OR
                      (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'SLIMBN') OR
                      (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'H&WBN')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Low Stock Alert]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].citemno AS Item, dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].cdescript AS [Item Desciption], 
                      dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].nonhand AS [SOH less 500u in 4400], dbo.[MJM Item Qty Components].Expr1 AS [Ave Unit Sales], 
                      dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].nonorder AS [On Order], dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].Expr1 AS [Delivery Date of PO], 
                      dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].Expr2 AS Available
FROM         dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder] LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.[MJM Item Qty Components] ON dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder].citemno = dbo.[MJM Item Qty Components].Total
ORDER BY Item

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Lucid]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS Expr2, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00041/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00061/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00321/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00141/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00191/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00202/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00280/12') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00040/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00060/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00140/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00142/13') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = ' aa/00143/14') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00190/06') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00192/13') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00200/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00203/13') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00285/03') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00320/02') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = 'aa/00321/12')
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM MLM Invoices Audit]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, cinvno, dinvoice, ntotpaid, lautoreb
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-03-01 00:00:00', 102) AND dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2014-11-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (lautoreb = 0) AND 
                      (cinvno LIKE '%M%')
ORDER BY ccustno, dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM MyGate to SO]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.csono AS [SO #], dbo.sosord.ccustno AS [Cust #], dbo.sosord.corderby, dbo.sosord.centerby AS [Sales Person], 
                      dbo.sosord.cpono AS [PO #], dbo.sosord.dcreate AS Created, dbo.sosord.dorder AS Ordered, dbo.sosord.lquote, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.lvoid, dbo.sosord.cfob, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 + dbo.sosord.nfrtamt AS Expr1, dbo.arcash.npaidamt
FROM         dbo.sosord FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.arcash.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.centerby = 'Web Order')
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM New Beate Report]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS [Auto Invoked], dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-01-10 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript
HAVING      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3102021') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3102022') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3102023') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3102068') OR
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = '3102079')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM OnHand vs OnOrder]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, MIN(dbo.popord.dorder) AS Expr1, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook AS Expr2, dbo.icitem.csponcat
FROM         dbo.popord RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.poptrs ON dbo.popord.cpono = dbo.poptrs.cpono RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.poptrs.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.icitem.csponcat <> 'o' AND dbo.icitem.csponcat <> 'n')
GROUP BY dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook, 
                      dbo.icitem.csponcat
HAVING      (dbo.icitem.citemno BETWEEN 'A' AND 'AS') AND (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook < 500)
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Open Rereg]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccustno, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccompany, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].nbalance, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].Expr1, 
                      dbo.vw_sostrs.nordqty, dbo.vw_sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.vw_sostrs.citemno
FROM         dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv] INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_sostrs ON dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccustno = dbo.vw_sostrs.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccustno, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccompany, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].nbalance, dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].Expr1, dbo.vw_sostrs.nordqty, 
                      dbo.vw_sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.vw_sostrs.citemno
HAVING      (dbo.vw_sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02')
ORDER BY dbo.[MJM Cust 2 Inv].ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Open SO Query]
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono AS Expr1, dbo.sosord.dorder AS Expr2, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.dorder > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-08-19 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno = '3207003')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Pay Method]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1, cpaycode, dpaid
FROM         dbo.[vw_arcash&h]
GROUP BY cpaycode, dpaid

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Premiere Personal]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, SUM(PSalesDisc) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical
WHERE     (Expr1 > '20140131' AND Expr1 < '20140501')
GROUP BY ccustno
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Rate of Sale]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/0041/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00061/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00321/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00202/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00203/13') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00141/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00142/13') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00191/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00192/13') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00280/12') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00040/02') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00060/02') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00320/02') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00200/02') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00141/02') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00190/06') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.icikit.ccompno = 'aa/00285/03') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno > 'AI/19008/02') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno < 'AI/19009/03') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-04-01 00:00:00', 102)) 
                      AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-08-26 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno < 'A')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg Purchases]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg].ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.ncost, dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg].citemno AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg] ON dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg].ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg].citemno > 'AI/190008') AND (dbo.[MJM Reg&Rereg].citemno < 'AI/19009') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript > 'Kit: Standard Business') AND 
                      (dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript < 'L') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-03-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Region Crystal]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dinvoice, csstate AS Expr2, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Expr3
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (NOT (cinvno LIKE '%M%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE '%J%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE '%A%'))
GROUP BY dinvoice, csstate
HAVING      (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Reregistration Open Sales OrderReport]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Member #], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.[vw_sosord union].dcreate AS [Rereg Date], 
                      dbo.[vw_sosord union].csono AS [SO #], dbo.[vw_sosord union].nsalesamt AS Amount, MAX(dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice) AS [Last Transaction Date], 
                      dbo.arcust.cstatus AS Status, dbo.arcust.lhold AS [On Hold]
FROM         dbo.[vw_sosord union] LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.[vw_sosord union].ccustno = dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.[vw_sosord union].csono = dbo.sostrs.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.[vw_sosord union].ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.nshipqty < dbo.sostrs.nordqty)
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.[vw_sosord union].dcreate, dbo.[vw_sosord union].csono, dbo.[vw_sosord union].nsalesamt, dbo.arcust.cstatus, 
                      dbo.arcust.lhold, dbo.sostrs.citemno
HAVING      (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02')
ORDER BY [Member #]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM RJ Beaute]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-11-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript LIKE '%Beaute%') AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt > 0)
ORDER BY dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM RJ Replique]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-11-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript LIKE '%Replique%')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Shuffle]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor AS Customer, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.arcust.cpcustno AS Parent, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, 
                      SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngrebateamt) AS [GS Rebate], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt AS [PS Rebate], 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25 AS [PS VolDisc], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales AS [PS Total], SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.GRsales) 
                      AS [GS Total (add PS Total)]
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.cpcustno = arcust_1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor, dbo.arcust.cpcustno, dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25
HAVING      (dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date = '2014/01/31')
ORDER BY Customer, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Staff]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt AS Expr1, dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vw_aritrs.ncost
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-04-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'STAFF')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_arinvc.cbcompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Tea]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno AS ItemNo, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS [Ship Qty], MIN(dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice) AS [Inv Date], 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.icikit.ccompno IS NULL) THEN (dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno) ELSE (dbo.icikit.ccompno) END AS Total, MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice
HAVING      (MIN(dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript) LIKE '%Tea%') AND (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY ItemNo, Total

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Transaction Lines]
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vw_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cspectype1, dbo.icitem.cspectype2, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Type Colour]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-09-30 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno
HAVING      (dbo.icitem.ctype = 'COSMETICS')
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Type Fine Fragrance]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt
FROM         dbo.vw_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-09-30 00:00:00', 102))
GROUP BY dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.vw_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt
HAVING      (dbo.icitem.ctype = 'FINE FRAGR')
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Union Downliner]

FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]

UNION SELECT Level02 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L02' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level02 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level03 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L03' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level03 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level04 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L04' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level04 is not Null

FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level05 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level06 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L06' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level06 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level07 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L07' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level07 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level08 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L08' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level08 is not Null

FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level09 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level10 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L10' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level10 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level11 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L11' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level11 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level12 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L12' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]
Where Level12 is not Null
UNION SELECT Level13 as Downliner, Csponsor, 'L13' AS [Level]
FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]

FROM dbo.[MJM Downliner]

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Web Courier Query]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.arinvc.cfrgtcode, dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.cpono, dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid
FROM         dbo.aritrs RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.arinvc.cfrgtcode, dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.cpono, dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid
HAVING      (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-12-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.arinvc.cpono > 'v')
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Web Orders]
AS
SELECT     cinvno, cpono, dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
WHERE     (cpono LIKE '%W-%') AND (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-05-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJM Xen Stock]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, MIN(dbo.popord.dorder) AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.csponcat, 
                      dbo.icitem.cstatus
FROM         dbo.popord RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.poptrs ON dbo.popord.cpono = dbo.poptrs.cpono RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.poptrs.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.csponcat
HAVING      (dbo.iciwhs.citemno BETWEEN '0' AND 'AS')
ORDER BY dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MJMAuto Invoke Beaute Promo]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_icisti.dissue, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno, SUM(dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].nqty) AS Expr1, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse, 
                      dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrstype
FROM         dbo.vw_icisti INNER JOIN
                      dbo.[vw_ictrsn union] ON dbo.vw_icisti.cissueno = dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrsno
GROUP BY dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse, dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].ctrstype, dbo.vw_icisti.dissue
HAVING      (dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].citemno = 'AI/40048/13') AND (dbo.[vw_ictrsn union].cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.vw_icisti.dissue > CONVERT(DATETIME, 
                      '2013-03-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_icisti.dissue

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_BR
AS
SELECT     dbo.mk_BR3a.Items, dbo.mk_BR3a.cdescript, dbo.mk_BR4a.citemno, dbo.mk_BR4a.QtyRec, dbo.mk_BR4a.costRec, dbo.mk_BR4a.totcostrec, dbo.mk_Br4c.Itemno, 
                      dbo.mk_Br4c.TotOnHand, dbo.mk_Br4c.MainWh, dbo.mk_Br4c.wh4300, dbo.mk_BR4d.ItemNo AS Expr1, dbo.mk_BR4d.rsp, dbo.mk_BR4d.Units, 
                      dbo.mk_BR4d.RSPExcl, dbo.mk_BR3a.citemno AS Miancode, dbo.mk_BR3a.Kitdescript, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Description, dbo.mk_BR4a.Year, 
                      dbo.mk_BR4a.Month, dbo.mk_BR4d.year AS Expr2, dbo.mk_BR4d.month AS Expr3, dbo.mk_BR4d.dinvoice, dbo.mk_BR4a.dtrs
FROM         dbo.mk_BR3a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.mk_BR3a.Items = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mk_BR4d ON dbo.mk_BR3a.Items = dbo.mk_BR4d.ItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mk_Br4c ON dbo.mk_BR3a.Items = dbo.mk_Br4c.Itemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mk_BR4a ON dbo.mk_BR3a.Items = dbo.mk_BR4a.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_BR3
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cfdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.cpmeasure, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                      dbo.icitem.dcreate, dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.icitem.nrtrncost, dbo.icitem.nlfnhcost, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx, dbo.icitem.nspprice, 
                      dbo.icitem.csubcat, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.cdescript AS Kitdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty AS Kitqty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS kitcost, 
                      dbo.icitem.deffective, dbo.icitem.lpoitem
FROM         dbo.icitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'Beaute')

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_BR3a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cdescript, cfdescript, ctype, cstatus, cpmeasure, cclass, cprodline, dcreate, lkititem, nstdcost, nrtrncost, nlfnhcost, nprice, nprcinctx, 
                      nspprice, csubcat, ckititemno, ccompno, Kitdescript, Kitqty, kitcost, CASE WHEN ckititemno IS NULL   THEN citemno ELSE ckititemno END AS Items
FROM         dbo.mk_BR3
union all 
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cfdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.cpmeasure, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.icitem.dcreate, dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.icitem.nrtrncost, dbo.icitem.nlfnhcost, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx, 
                      dbo.icitem.nspprice, dbo.icitem.csubcat,citemno as ckititemno, citemno as compno,cdescript as kitdescript, 1 as kitqty,0 as kitcost,citemno as items

            

 FROM         dbo.icitem
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'Beaute') 
Order by items

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_BR3b
AS
SELECT DISTINCT TOP (100) PERCENT Items AS Itemno, cdescript AS Itemdescription
FROM         dbo.mk_BR3a
ORDER BY itemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_Br4a2

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_Br4Bb

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_budget_1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS March, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS April, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS May, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS September, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS October, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS January, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS February, 
                      '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'AOP%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear <= '2014')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS March, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS April, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS May, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS September, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS October, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS January, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS February, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'AOP%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear > '2015')
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS March, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS April, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS May, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS September, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS October, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS January, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS February, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'AOP%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear = '2015')
