CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_MLM_CRSP
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(nshipqty * nprice) AS CareerSalesValue
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (CustomerClass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (lmlm = 1)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_MLM_PSV
AS
SELECT     ccustno, MAX(Invoicemonth) AS Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * nprice) AS PersonalSalesValue, SUM(TotalInv) AS CurrentInvVal, SUM(TotalDisc) AS CurrentDiscount, 
                      SUM(TotalTax) AS CurrentTax
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= DATEADD(m, - 2, Currentmonth)) AND (Invoicemonth < DATEADD(m, - 1, Currentmonth)) AND (CustomerClass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (lmlm = 1)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_MLM_Sales
AS
SELECT     dbo.mk_MLM_CRSP.CareerSalesValue, dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.CurrentInvVal, dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.CurrentDiscount, dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.CurrentTax, 
                      dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.Invoicemonth, dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.PersonalSalesValue, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cstatus, dbo.arcust.cclass
FROM         dbo.mk_MLM_CRSP INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mk_MLM_PSV ON dbo.mk_MLM_CRSP.ccustno = dbo.mk_MLM_PSV.ccustno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.mk_MLM_CRSP.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'Consultant') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_new_tb3
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, Month, Debit, Credit * - 1 AS Credit, CAST(cyear + '/' + Month + '/01' AS datetime) AS date, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd1

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_NotStartedCust
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cphone1, dbo.arcust.cphone2, dbo.arcust.cemail, dbo.arcust.cstatus, dbo.arcust.dstarter, dbo.arcust.daccept, dbo.arcust.dcreate, arcust_1.ccustno AS Sponsor, 
                  arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName, arcust_1.cphone2 AS SponPhone
FROM        dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.dstarter IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcust.dcreate > '2022-05-01') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno NOT LIKE 'TEST%') AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno > '600000') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.MK_Open_Orders
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.arcust.cclass, 
                      DATEADD(day, - 90, dbo.sosord.dcreate) AS fromdate, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sosord.lautoinvk, dbo.sosord.dcreate AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.sostrs.cuid
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.sosord.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.sostrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.nordqty <> dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AND (dbo.sosord.dcreate > DATEADD(day, - 90, GETDATE())) AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk <> 2)

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_reorderpoints
AS
SELECT        dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.nsafestock, dbo.iciwhs.nreordpt, dbo.iciwhs.nreordqty, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.icitem.lkititem
FROM            dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                         dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS May, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS August, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS October, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS December, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt11 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabal.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.glabalh.cyear, dbo.glabalh.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabalh.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt0, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt2 AS April, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt3 AS May, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt6 AS August, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt7 AS September, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt8 AS October, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt10 AS December, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt11 AS January, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt1 AS March, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glabalh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabalh.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.CB_Trial_Bal_Mtd
WHERE     cyear > '2012'

CREATE VIEW dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd1
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'April' AS Month, CASE WHEN (April > 0) THEN April ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (April < 0) 
                      THEN April ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (April <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'May' AS Month, CASE WHEN (May > 0) THEN May ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (May < 0) THEN May ELSE 0 END AS Credit,
                       company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (May <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'June' AS Month, CASE WHEN (June > 0) THEN June ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (June < 0) 
                      THEN June ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (June <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'July' AS Month, CASE WHEN (July > 0) THEN July ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (July < 0) THEN July ELSE 0 END AS Credit,
                       company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (July <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'August' AS Month, CASE WHEN (August > 0) THEN August ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (August < 0) 
                      THEN August ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (August <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'September' AS Month, CASE WHEN (September > 0) THEN September ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (September < 0) 
                      THEN September ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (September <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'October' AS Month, CASE WHEN (October > 0) THEN October ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (October < 0) 
                      THEN October ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (October <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'November' AS Month, CASE WHEN (November > 0) THEN November ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (November < 0) 
                      THEN November ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (November <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'December' AS Month, CASE WHEN (December > 0) THEN December ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (December < 0) 
                      THEN December ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (December <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'January' AS Month, CASE WHEN (January > 0) THEN January ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (January < 0) 
                      THEN January ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (January <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'February' AS Month, CASE WHEN (February > 0) THEN February ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (February < 0) 
                      THEN February ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (February <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'
UNION ALL
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, 'March' AS Month, CASE WHEN (March > 0) THEN March ELSE 0 END AS Debit, CASE WHEN (March < 0) 
                      THEN March ELSE 0 END AS Credit, company
FROM         dbo.mk_trail_bal_mtd
WHERE     (March <> 0) AND cyear > '2012'

CREATE VIEW dbo.MLM
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, SUM(nbalance) AS Expr2, SUM(Expr1) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.MLM_BF_No_Details
GROUP BY ccustno
ORDER BY Expr1

ViewName: MLM Forever Young Sales per Invoice
ViewDefinition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.[MLM Forever Young Sales per Invoice]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT SUM(dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
FROM         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.vw_aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.vw_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = dbo.icitem.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno
HAVING      (dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-01-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'FORYOUNG')
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.cclass

CREATE VIEW dbo.[MLM LTD & Bal]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Member #], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, MAX(dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice) AS [Last Transaction Date], 
                      dbo.arcust.nbalance AS Balance
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vw_arinvc.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.nbalance, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cstatus, dbo.arcust.cclass
HAVING      (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
ORDER BY [Member #]

CREATE VIEW dbo.MLM_BF_No_Details
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.ccustno, SUM((dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt + dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1) * - 1) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.arinvc.nbalance) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.cinvno LIKE ' MLM0%') AND (dbo.arinvc.dclosed IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcust.cbankacc <> ' ') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2012-09-22') AND 
                      (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.ccustno
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvch.ccustno, SUM((dbo.arinvch.nsalesamt + dbo.arinvch.ntaxamt1) * - 1) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.arinvch.nbalance) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.cinvno LIKE ' MLM0%') AND (dbo.arinvch.dclosed IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcust.cbankacc <> ' ') AND (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2012-09-22') AND 
                      (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')
GROUP BY dbo.arinvch.ccustno
ORDER BY 3

CREATE VIEW dbo.MLM_Import
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cinvno
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.cinvno LIKE ' MLM0%') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice = '2011-02-28') AND (dbo.arcust.cbankacc <> ' ') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.MLM_Mark
AS
SELECT     ccustno, csponsor, csponsor0, cstatus1, cLevel, cstatus, ltl, nSalesamt, ngsalesdisc, nsalesdisc, ngsalesamt, nrebate, ngrebateamt, ccompany, cphone1, cphone2, 
                      nPSalesAmt, nPSalesDisc, SponComp, caddr1, caddr2, ccity, cstate, czip, ccountry, Status, nrebateamt, cemail, Co, custstatus, lemail, ReportDate, Rebate, cLevel1, 
                      Sponsor1, dcreate
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM
WHERE     (Co = 'SA') AND (custstatus = 'A') AND (lemail = 1) AND (cemail <> '') AND (csponsor NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csponsor
                            FROM          dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSales0))

CREATE VIEW dbo.MLM_Open
AS
SELECT Distinct     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SO_Open.csono, dbo.SO_Open.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.SO_Open.Balance, dbo.arcust.nbalance AS [Cust Balance], 
                      dbo.arcust.cstate, '1.SA' AS Company

WHERE     (dbo.SO_Open.csono NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csono
                            FROM          dbo.ARCASH_Open))
UNION ALL
SELECT Distinct     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.NAM_SO

CREATE VIEW dbo.MN_arinvc
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.ctype, dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cstatus, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.lkititem, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.icitem.lprebkit
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.lprebkit = 0) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-05-22 00:00:00', 102))
union all
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.arinvch.ccustno, dbo.arinvch.ctype, dbo.arinvch.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvch.cbcompany, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cstatus, dbo.aritrsh.cbin, dbo.aritrsh.lkititem, dbo.aritrsh.lstock, dbo.icitem.lprebkit
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrsh.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.lprebkit = 0) AND (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-05-22 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.mn_kits
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arikit.cinvno, dbo.arikit.citemno, dbo.arikit.nqty, dbo.arsktr.cinvno AS Expr1, dbo.arsktr.citemno AS Expr2, dbo.arsktr.nqty AS Expr3, 
                      dbo.MN_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.MN_arinvc.citemno AS Expr4, dbo.MN_arinvc.cdescript, dbo.MN_arinvc.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.arikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.MN_arinvc ON dbo.arikit.cinvno = dbo.MN_arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arsktr ON dbo.arikit.citemno = dbo.arsktr.citemno AND dbo.arikit.cinvno = dbo.arsktr.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arsktr.cinvno IS NULL)
ORDER BY dbo.arikit.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.mn_shipments_orders
AS
SELECT     dbo.soship.cshipno, dbo.soship.ccustno, dbo.soship.cwarehouse, dbo.soship.centerby, dbo.soship.cbcompany, dbo.sosptr.citemno, dbo.sosptr.cdescript, 
                      dbo.soship.dship, dbo.soship.dorder, dbo.sosptr.nshipqty, dbo.sosptr.nprcinctx, dbo.sosptr.nsalesamt - dbo.sosptr.ndiscamt + dbo.sosptr.ntaxamt1 AS sales, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.soship.dship) AS Ship_Month, DATENAME(month, dbo.soship.dorder) AS Order_month

                      dbo.sosptr ON dbo.soship.cshipno = dbo.sosptr.cshipno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_ArInv_ArTrans
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_AutoInvokeRef
AS

                      dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].citemno, dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].cdescript, dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].ncost, 
                      dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].dinvoice, dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].crevncode, dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].nshipqty, 
                      dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].Total, dbo.[vw_SL_arinvc and aritrs combo].csono, dbo.[VW_SL_AUTOINVOKE JOIN].cSORef,

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_AVG
AS
SELECT     a.cinvno, a.citemno, a.ccustno, a.nsalesamt, a.nshipqty, AVG(a.nsalesamt) AS AvgSales, b.dinvoice, e.Provice, YEAR(b.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(b.dinvoice) 
                      AS InvMonth
FROM         dbo.aritrs AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc AS b ON a.cinvno = b.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn AS d ON a.crevncode = d.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS c ON a.ccustno = c.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS e ON c.czip = e.PostalCode
WHERE     (b.dinvoice > '2014-06-30') AND (b.dinvoice < '2016-01-01') AND (d.crevnacc = '300100-0000') AND (a.cinvno LIKE '%1208224')
GROUP BY a.cinvno, a.citemno, a.ccustno, a.nsalesamt, a.nshipqty, e.Provice, b.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_AVG_Kit
AS
SELECT DISTINCT b.ckititemno, b.ccompno
FROM         dbo.icitem AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit AS b ON a.citemno = b.ckititemno
WHERE     (a.lkititem = '1')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Avg_Sales
AS
SELECT     arinvc.cinvno, arinvc.ctype, arinvc.ccustno, arinvc.cwarehouse, aritrs.citemno, aritrs.cdescript, aritrs.crevncode, aritrs.nsalesamt, aritrs.nshipqty, aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.nweight, arinvc.lmlm, icikit.ccompno, icikit.ckititemno, icikit.nqty * aritrs.nshipqty AS KitQty, YEAR(arinvc.dinvoice) AS InvYear, 
                      MONTH(arinvc.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, SUM(aritrs.nsalesamt / aritrs.nshipqty) AS AVGSales, SUM(aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) AS GP, icitem.nstdcost, 
                      aritrs.ndiscamt, arinvc.nfrtamt, aritrs.cshipno, arcust.cclass
FROM         aritrs INNER JOIN
                      arinvc ON arinvc.cinvno = aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      icitem ON aritrs.citemno = icitem.citemno 
                      LEFT OUTER JOIN icikit ON aritrs.citemno = icikit.ckititemno
                      Join arcust on aritrs.ccustno = arcust.ccustno
                      
WHERE     (arinvc.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01') AND (arinvc.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (arinvc.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
GROUP BY arinvc.cinvno, arinvc.ctype, arinvc.ccustno, arinvc.cwarehouse, aritrs.citemno, aritrs.cdescript, aritrs.crevncode, aritrs.nsalesamt, aritrs.nshipqty, aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      arinvc.dinvoice, aritrs.nweight, aritrs.ndiscamt, arinvc.lmlm, icikit.ccompno, icikit.ckititemno, icikit.nqty, aritrs.nshipqty, icitem.nstdcost, aritrs.ndiscamt, arinvc.nfrtamt, 
                      aritrs.cshipno, arcust.cclass
UNION ALL
SELECT     arinvch.cinvno, arinvch.ctype, arinvch.ccustno, arinvch.cwarehouse, aritrsh.citemno, aritrsh.cdescript, aritrsh.crevncode, aritrsh.nsalesamt, aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      aritrsh.ntaxamt1, arinvch.dinvoice, aritrsh.nweight, arinvch.lmlm, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.nqty * aritrsh.nshipqty AS KitQty, 
                      YEAR(arinvch.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(arinvch.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, SUM(aritrsh.nsalesamt / aritrsh.nshipqty) AS AVGSales, 
                      SUM(aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) AS GP, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, aritrsh.ndiscamt, arinvch.nfrtamt, aritrsh.cshipno,arcust.cclass
FROM         aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      arinvch ON arinvch.cinvno = aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      icitem ON aritrsh.citemno = icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      icikit ON aritrsh.citemno = icikit.ckititemno
                      Join arcust on aritrsh.ccustno = arcust.ccustno

WHERE     (arinvch.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01') AND (arinvch.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (arinvch.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
GROUP BY arinvch.cinvno, arinvch.ctype, arinvch.ccustno, arinvch.cwarehouse, aritrsh.citemno, aritrsh.cdescript, aritrsh.crevncode, aritrsh.nsalesamt, aritrsh.nshipqty, 
                      aritrsh.ntaxamt1, arinvch.dinvoice, aritrsh.nweight, aritrsh.ndiscamt, arinvch.lmlm, icikit.ccompno, icikit.ckititemno, icikit.nqty, aritrsh.nshipqty, icitem.nstdcost, 
                      aritrsh.ndiscamt, arinvch.nfrtamt, aritrsh.cshipno,arcust.cclass

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Avg_SalesV1
AS
SELECT     cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, csono, cshipno, clineitem, crmano, crtncode, csolineitm, cshlineitm, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cdescript, cmeasure, 
                      ccommiss, cstatus, crevncode, cbin, ctaxcode, lkititem, lupsell, lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, 
                      ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, 
                      nfprcinctx, nweight, nseq, ccmpprodln, cvernum, nbprice, nextnddprc, lfree, cgfttype, cSORefUId, cSORef, nshipcost, csppruid, ldisc, lmlm, ldscntble, dinvoice, 
                      crevnacc, Invoicemonth, ccompany, centerby, cclass, cprodline, ctype, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, lautoreb, CustomerClass, csponsor, cpcustno, dcreate, TotalInv, 
                      TotalDisc, CustomerZip, ccampuid, TotalTax, Currentmonth, PostalDel, cscity, cphone1, PostalCode, Town, Provice, YEAR(dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(dinvoice) 
                      AS InvMonth

WHERE     (crevnacc = '300100-0000') AND (dinvoice >= '2014-06-01 00:00:00')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_BercoShip
AS

Select * From soship
union all 
Select * From soshiph

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_CourierCost
AS
SELECT     invoicenumber, ccustno, Provice, TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, SUM(TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL + TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES) AS Berco, cshipvia, 
                      nfrtamt AS Recovery, YEAR(dinvoice) AS myyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS mymonth, 
                      CASE WHEN fw_colour = 'LIME' THEN 31.57 WHEN fw_colour = 'BROWN' THEN 26.31 WHEN fw_colour = 'RED' THEN 48.24 WHEN fw_colour = 'ORANGE' THEN 57.01 WHEN
                       fw_colour = 'YELLOW' THEN 39.47 WHEN fw_colour = 'PURPLE' THEN 87.71 WHEN fw_colour = 'EXCESS' THEN 8.77 ELSE 0 END AS FastWayLabelCost, 
                      CASE WHEN cshipvia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'Fastway' WHEN cshipvia = 'BERCO' THEN 'Berco' WHEN cshipvia = 'CREDIT' THEN 'Credit' WHEN cshipvia = 'COLLECT' THEN
                       'Colletion' WHEN cshipvia = 'POST' THEN 'Post' WHEN cclass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'Export' WHEN cclass = 'INTERCO' THEN 'Namibia' WHEN cclass = 'STAFF' THEN 'Staff'
                       END AS Myshipvia, DAY(dinvoice) AS InvDay, CAST(dinvoice AS date) AS MyinvDate, DATEPART(ww, dinvoice) AS WeekNumber, CASE WHEN ([TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL]) 
                      IS NULL AND NOT (([FW_Labelcost]) IS NULL) THEN 'Fastway' WHEN ([FW_Labelcost]) IS NULL AND NOT (([TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL]) IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'Berco' ELSE 'Not recorded' END AS InvShipper
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2015/01/01')
GROUP BY invoicenumber, ccustno, Provice, TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, cshipvia, FW_Colour, cshipvia, cclass, dinvoice, nfrtamt, FW_Labelcost

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Downliner
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CASE WHEN (GROUPING(dbo.arcust.csponsor) = 1) THEN 'ALL' ELSE ISNULL(dbo.arcust.csponsor, 'UNKNOWN') END AS Spon, 
                      dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Level01, Arcust_1.ccustno AS Level02, Arcust_2.ccustno AS Level03, Arcust_3.ccustno AS Level04, 
                      Arcust_4.ccustno AS Level05, Arcust_5.ccustno AS Level06, Arcust_6.ccustno AS Level07, Arcust_7.ccustno AS Level08, Arcust_8.ccustno AS Level09, 
                      Arcust_9.ccustno AS Level10, Arcust_10.ccustno AS Level11, Arcust_11.ccustno AS Level12, Arcust_12.ccustno AS Level13, Arcust_13.ccustno AS Level14, 
                      Arcust_14.ccustno AS Level15, Arcust_15.ccustno AS Level16, Arcust_16.ccustno AS Level17, SUM(dbo.arcust.nytdsamt) AS Total
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = Arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_2 ON Arcust_1.ccustno = Arcust_2.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_3 ON Arcust_2.ccustno = Arcust_3.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_4 ON Arcust_3.ccustno = Arcust_4.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_5 ON Arcust_4.ccustno = Arcust_5.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_6 ON Arcust_5.ccustno = Arcust_6.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_7 ON Arcust_6.ccustno = Arcust_7.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_8 ON Arcust_7.ccustno = Arcust_8.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_9 ON Arcust_8.ccustno = Arcust_9.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_10 ON Arcust_9.ccustno = Arcust_10.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_11 ON Arcust_10.ccustno = Arcust_11.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_12 ON Arcust_11.ccustno = Arcust_12.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_13 ON Arcust_12.ccustno = Arcust_13.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_14 ON Arcust_13.ccustno = Arcust_14.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_15 ON Arcust_14.ccustno = Arcust_15.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS Arcust_16 ON Arcust_15.ccustno = Arcust_16.csponsor
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.csponsor > 99998)
GROUP BY ROLLUP (dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccustno, Arcust_1.ccustno, Arcust_2.ccustno, Arcust_3.ccustno, Arcust_4.ccustno, Arcust_5.ccustno, Arcust_6.ccustno, 
                      Arcust_7.ccustno, Arcust_8.ccustno, Arcust_9.ccustno, Arcust_10.ccustno, Arcust_11.ccustno, Arcust_12.ccustno, Arcust_13.ccustno, Arcust_14.ccustno, 
                      Arcust_15.ccustno, Arcust_16.ccustno)
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_FastWayDelCost
AS
SELECT     a.cConsignmentID, a.cShipno, c.cColour, c.cCost
FROM         dbo.fw_consignment AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.fw_items AS b ON a.cConsignmentID = b.cConsignmentID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.MoFwCostTemp AS c ON b.cColour = c.cColour

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_High_Level_1
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, SUM(a.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RSP, SUM(a.nfrtamt) AS Delivery, SUM(a.nfrtamt + a.nffrttax1) AS DeliveryVAT, a.dinvoice, 
                      YEAR(a.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(a.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, b.cclass, d.citemno
FROM         dbo.arinvc AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.ccustno = b.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS c ON a.cszip = c.PostalCode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs AS d ON a.cinvno = d.cinvno
WHERE     (a.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, a.dinvoice, a.nffrtamt, b.cclass, d.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_High_Level_Report_Bucket
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, SUM(a.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RSP, SUM(a.nfrtamt) AS Delivery, SUM(a.nfrtamt + a.nffrttax1) AS DeliveryVAT, a.dinvoice, 
                      YEAR(a.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(a.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, b.cclass
FROM         dbo.arinvc AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.ccustno = b.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS c ON b.czip = c.PostalCode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs AS d ON a.cinvno = d.cinvno
WHERE     (a.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, a.dinvoice, a.nffrtamt, b.cclass, d.citemno

/*, i.cdescript*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_HighLevelGP
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, SUM(a.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RSP, SUM(a.nfrtamt) AS Delivery, SUM(a.nfrtamt + a.nffrttax1) AS DeliveryVAT, a.dinvoice, 
                      YEAR(a.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(a.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, b.cclass, SUM(a.nsalesamt - a.ndiscamt) AS GP
FROM         dbo.arinvc AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.ccustno = b.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS c ON b.czip = c.PostalCode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs AS d ON a.cinvno = d.cinvno
WHERE     (a.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000') AND (a.ccustno <> 'TEST01')
GROUP BY c.Provice, a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, a.dinvoice, a.nffrtamt, b.cclass, d.citemno, a.nsalesamt

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Inv_OpenBal
AS
SELECT     cuid, citemno, cperiod, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cwarehouse, csernum, cinvtacc, cintracc, crevncode, dlastrecv, dlastrepd, nsafestock, nreordpt, nreordqty, nonhand, 
                      nonorder, ninprocess, nallocate, nbook, nintransit, ncost, nlrecvcost, ntotcost, nlrepdcost, nrmaonhand, nrmacost, nreprcost, dmonth, dyear, csponcat
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_monthly
WHERE     (dyear = '2016')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Inv_SoNo
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.arinvc.dcreate, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.cSORef, dbo.aritrs.cSORefUId
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (dbo.arinvc.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_Kit_OnHandQty
AS
SELECT     a.ccompno, a.ckititemno, b.nonhand, b.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.Mo_AVG_Kit AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs AS b ON a.ccompno = b.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_KitItem
AS
SELECT DISTINCT b.ckititemno, b.ccompno, b.nqty
FROM         dbo.icitem AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit AS b ON a.citemno = b.ckititemno
WHERE     (a.lkititem = '1')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_NotInvoiced
AS
SELECT     csono, ccustno
FROM         dbo.sosord
WHERE     (csono NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csono
                            FROM          dbo.sostrs
                            WHERE      (csono = csono)))

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_NotInvoicedV1
AS

FROM         dbo.Mo_NotInvoiced AS b INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord AS a ON a.csono = b.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_OpsHighLevelReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.cwarehouse, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.ncost, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.CustomerClass, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.Provice, dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.FW_Labelcost, dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.TrsCost, dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.FW_Labelcost AS Expr1, 
                      YEAR(dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.dinvoice) AS myyear, MONTH(dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.dinvoice) AS mymonth, 
                      CASE WHEN fw_colour = 'LIME' THEN 31.57 WHEN fw_colour = 'BROWN' THEN 26.31 WHEN fw_colour = 'RED' THEN 48.24 WHEN fw_colour = 'ORANGE' THEN 57.01 WHEN
                       fw_colour = 'YELLOW' THEN 39.47 WHEN fw_colour = 'PURPLE' THEN 87.71 WHEN fw_colour = 'EXCESS' THEN 8.77 ELSE 0 END AS lablecost, 
                      CASE WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cshipvia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'Fastway' WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cshipvia = 'BERCO' THEN 'Berco'
                       WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cshipvia = 'CREDIT' THEN 'Credit' WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cshipvia = 'COLLECT' THEN 'Colletion'
                       WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cshipvia = 'POST' THEN 'Post' WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cclass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'Export' WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cclass
                       = 'INTERCO' THEN 'Namibia' WHEN amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.cclass = 'STAFF' THEN 'Staff' END AS Myshipvia, DAY(dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.dinvoice) 
                      AS InvDay, CAST(dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.dinvoice AS date) AS MyinvDate, DATEPART(ww, dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.dinvoice) AS WeekNumber, 
                      CASE WHEN ([TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL]) IS NULL AND NOT (([FW_Labelcost]) IS NULL) THEN 'Fastway' WHEN ([FW_Labelcost]) IS NULL AND 
                      NOT (([TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL]) IS NULL) THEN 'Berco' ELSE 'Not recorded' END AS 'InvShipper', CASE WHEN RIGHT(rtrim(RateAres), 1) 
                      = 'R' THEN ' Regional' ELSE ' Main' END AS ' Main_Region', dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14 AS 'NettVat', 
                      CASE WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 0 THEN '<0' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 0 AND 
                      (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 1000 THEN 'a)     0 -    999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 1000 AND 
                      (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 2000 THEN 'b) 1 000 -  1 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 2000 AND
                       (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 3000 THEN 'c) 2 000 -  2 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      > 3000 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 4000 THEN 'd) 3 000 -  3 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14)
                       > 4000 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 5000 THEN 'e) 4 000 -  4 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14)
                       > 5000 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 10000 THEN 'f) 5 000 -  9 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 10000 AND 
                      (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 15000 THEN 'g)10 000 - 14 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      > 15000 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 20000 THEN 'h)15 000 - 19 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 20000 AND 
                      (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 30000 THEN 'i)20 000 - 29 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      > 30000 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 40000 THEN 'j)30 000 - 39 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 40000 AND 
                      (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) < 50000 THEN 'k)40 000 - 49 999' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      > 50000 THEN 'l)50 000 +' ELSE 'unKnow' END AS 'InvBand', CASE WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 0 THEN 'Credits' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 0 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 1500 THEN 'Less R1500' WHEN (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) > 1500 AND (amanniquelive.dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.nsalesamt * 1.14) 
                      < 1750 THEN 'Less R1750' ELSE 'More than' END AS 'Less than'
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4 ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_allcourier4.invoicenumber
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.Invoicemonth = '2015-12-01 00:00:00') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov_Cust.crevnacc = '300100-0000')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_PersonalSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.nsalesamt AS PSales, 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.nSalesDisc AS PSalesDisc, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Date, dbo.arcust.ccompany
FROM         dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno)
ORDER BY dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_PersonalSalesForRollup
AS
Select a.ccustno, SUM (a.nshipqty * a.nprcinctx) As PersonalSales,  b.dinvoice, 
YEAR(dinvoice) AS InvYear, 
MONTH (dinvoice) AS InvMonth
From aritrs a
Join arinvc b on a.ccustno = b.ccustno 
Where b.dinvoice >= '2014-01-01 00:00:00.000'
and b.dinvoice <= '2014-12-31 00:00:00.000'
Group By a.ccustno, a.nshipqty , a.nprcinctx, b.dinvoice
UNION ALL 
Select a.ccustno, SUM (a.nshipqty * a.nprcinctx) As PersonalSales,  b.dinvoice, 
YEAR(dinvoice) AS InvYear, 
MONTH (dinvoice) AS InvMonth
From aritrs a
Join arinvc b on a.ccustno = b.ccustno 
Where b.dinvoice >= '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000'
and b.dinvoice <= '2015-12-31 00:00:00.000'
Group By a.ccustno, a.nshipqty , a.nprcinctx, b.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_RateOfSalesSA
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nordqty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.cSORefUId, dbo.aritrs.cSORef, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AS PPRItem, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS PPRDescrip, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine AS PPRProdline, dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode AS PPRRev, 
                      dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit AS PPRQtyLim, dbo.sosppr.nSales AS PPRSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS PPRPriceExcl, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount AS PPRDiscount, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cpageno AS PPRPageNo, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat AS PPRMajorCat, dbo.sosppr.cclass AS PPRClass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype AS PPRgftype, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cSpontype AS PPRSponType, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos AS PPRPagePos, dbo.sosppr.nversion AS PPRversion, dbo.sosppr.lfree AS PPRLfree, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lspecial AS PPRSpecial, dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS PPRFROM, dbo.sosppr.dto AS PPRTo, dbo.sosppr.cuid AS PPRcuid, dbo.sosppr.lportal AS PPRProtal, 
                      dbo.sosppr.csponcat, dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN (cspontype IN ('F', 'S')) THEN 'Standard' WHEN (cspontype IN ('ATM', 'BYB', 'EB', 'JO', 
                      'KIT', 'KYB', 'P', 'PO', 'RO', 'ELO')) THEN 'Promotion' WHEN (cspontype IN ('BB', 'D', 'LO', 'FLYER', 'O')) THEN 'Obsolete' WHEN (cspontype IN ('N')) 
                      THEN 'New' WHEN (cspontype IN ('SMS')) THEN 'SMS' WHEN (cspontype IN ('HG', 'MA')) THEN 'MKT Aid' WHEN (cspontype IN ('SA', 'AG', 'JG', 'OO', 'RG', 'SALES', 
                      'COM')) THEN 'Sales Aid' WHEN (cspontype IN ('EXP')) THEN 'Export' ELSE 'Other' END AS SPON, dbo.aritrs.nfprcinctx AS RSP, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MyYear, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MyMonth
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO ON dbo.aritrs.csppruid = dbo.sosppr.cuid
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '2016-03-01 00:00:00.000') AND (dbo.aritrs.cinvno <> 'M') AND (dbo.aritrs.cinvno <> 'J')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_RecoveryCost
AS
SELECT     a.cinvno, a.ccustno, b.citemno, SUM(b.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RecoveryCost
FROM         dbo.arinvc AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs AS b ON a.cinvno = b.cinvno
WHERE     (b.citemno LIKE '%ZZ/0COUR/09')
GROUP BY a.cinvno, a.ccustno, b.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Mo_RecoveryWH
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, SUM(a.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RSP, a.dinvoice, c.Provice, YEAR(a.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(a.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, a.nffrtamt, 
                      b.cclass, d .citemno
/*, h.cinvno, h.nsalesamt, h.nffinamt*/ FROM dbo.arinvc AS a /*INNER JOIN dbo.arinvch as h on a.ccustno = h.ccustno */ INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.ccustno = b.ccustno Left outer JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS c ON b.czip = c.PostalCode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs AS d ON a.cinvno = d .cinvno
WHERE   
--  (a.nsalesamt < '1750.00') AND
 (a.dinvoice > '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000') /*AND (b.cstatus = 'A') */ AND (a.nffrtamt <> '0')
GROUP BY a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, a.dinvoice, c.Provice, a.nffrtamt, b.cclass, d .citemno
/*,h.cinvno, h.nsalesamt, h.nffinamt*/ UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, SUM(a.nsalesamt * 1.14) AS RSP, a.dinvoice, c.Provice, YEAR(a.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(a.dinvoice) AS InvMonth, a.nffrtamt, 
                      b.cclass, d .citemno
/*, h.cinvno, h.nsalesamt, h.nffinamt*/ FROM dbo.arinvch AS a /*INNER JOIN dbo.arinvch as h on a.ccustno = h.ccustno */ INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.ccustno = b.ccustno Left outer JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes AS c ON b.czip = c.PostalCode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh AS d ON a.cinvno = d .cinvno
WHERE    
-- (a.nsalesamt < '1750.00') AND 
(a.dinvoice > '2015-01-01 00:00:00.000') /*AND (b.cstatus = 'A') */ AND (a.nffrtamt <> '0')
GROUP BY a.cinvno, a.ccustno, a.cwarehouse, a.dinvoice, c.Provice, a.nffrtamt, b.cclass, d .citemno

AS

HAVING COUNT(vm_mk_aritrs.ccompany) > 10*/

CREATE VIEW dbo.MoFastStart
AS
Select a.ccustno, a.ccompany, a.cphone1, a.cphone2, a.cclass, 
a.dcreate, b.dinvoice,  GETDATE()  AS [Today],  
a.csponsor, a.natdsamt, a.nytdsamt, 
SUM (b.nsalesamt) as PersonalSales
 From amanniquelive.dbo.arcust a 
Join arinvc b on a.ccustno = b.ccustno 
Where a.dcreate >= '2015-06-01 00:00:00.000'
--and a.ccustno like '603676%'
and b.cinvno not like 'J%' 
and b.cinvno not like 'M%' 
Group By
a.ccustno, a.ccompany, a.cphone1, a.cphone2, a.cclass, 
a.dcreate, a.csponsor, a.natdsamt, a.nytdsamt, 
b.nsalesamt, b.dinvoice
Union All 
Select a.ccustno, a.ccompany, a.cphone1, a.cphone2, a.cclass, 
a.dcreate, b.dinvoice,  GETDATE()  AS [Today],  
a.csponsor, a.natdsamt, a.nytdsamt, 
SUM (b.nsalesamt) as PersonalSales
 From amanniquelive.dbo.arcust a 
Join arinvch b on a.ccustno = b.ccustno 
Where a.dcreate >= '2015-06-01 00:00:00.000'
--and a.ccustno like '603676%'
and b.cinvno not like 'J%' 
and b.cinvno not like 'M%' 
Group By
a.ccustno, a.ccompany, a.cphone1, a.cphone2, a.cclass, 
a.dcreate, a.csponsor, a.natdsamt, a.nytdsamt, 
b.nsalesamt, b.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.MoInvOpenBal
AS
SELECT     cuid, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cwarehouse, cyear, nonhand0, nonhand1, nonhand2, nonhand3, nonhand4, nonhand5, nonhand6, nonhand7, nonhand8, 
                      nonhand9, nonhand10, nonhand11, nonhand12
FROM         dbo.icibal
WHERE     (cyear = '2016')

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Name, Account, CASE WHEN (account IN ('300100-2600                   ', '251100-2600                   ', '301800-2600                   ')) THEN (Budget) 
                      ELSE (Budget) END AS Budget, Date, Year, DATENAME(month, Date) AS Month, Description
FROM         dbo.CB_Exhibit1_Sales_Targets1
WHERE     (Name IN ('SAF120002 ', 'NAM12 6202')) AND (Year IN ('2011', '2012'))
ORDER BY Year, month, Account

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS2
AS
SELECT     '' AS name, SUM(Budget) AS Budget, Date, Year, Month
FROM         dbo.MTD_SMS1
GROUP BY Date, Year, Month, Name

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS3
AS
SELECT     Date, Sales_Daily, [Inv Count Daily], [Sales MTD], [Inv Count MTD], QTY_MTD, [Qty Daily], DISC_SALES, NONDISC_SALES, OST_SALES, TOTAL, DATENAME(year, 
                      Date) AS year, DATENAME(month, Date) AS Month, Expr1 AS RSP80
FROM         dbo.BA_MTD2

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS4
AS
SELECT     dbo.MTD_SMS3.Date, dbo.MTD_SMS3.Sales_Daily, dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Inv Count Daily], dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Sales MTD], dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Inv Count MTD], 
                      dbo.MTD_SMS3.QTY_MTD, dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Qty Daily], dbo.MTD_SMS3.DISC_SALES, dbo.MTD_SMS3.NONDISC_SALES, dbo.MTD_SMS3.OST_SALES, 
                      dbo.MTD_SMS3.TOTAL, dbo.MTD_SMS3.year, dbo.MTD_SMS3.Month, ROUND(dbo.MTD_SMS2.Budget, 1) AS Target, 
                      RTRIM(LTRIM(STR((dbo.MTD_SMS3.TOTAL / dbo.MTD_SMS2.Budget - 1) * 100))) + '%' AS [var], dbo.MTD_SMS3.RSP80
FROM         dbo.MTD_SMS3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.MTD_SMS2 ON dbo.MTD_SMS3.year = dbo.MTD_SMS2.Year AND dbo.MTD_SMS3.Month = dbo.MTD_SMS2.Month

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS5
AS
SELECT     Year, Month, SUM(FC_Amount) AS FC_Amount
FROM         dbo.CB_Cat_FC
GROUP BY Year, Month

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD_SMS6
AS
SELECT     dbo.MTD_SMS4.Date, SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.Sales_Daily) AS Sales_Daily, SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.[Inv Count Daily]) AS [Inv Count Daily], 
                      SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.[Sales MTD]) AS [Sales MTD], SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.[Inv Count MTD]) AS [Inv Count MTD], SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.QTY_MTD) AS QTY_MTD, 
                      SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.[Qty Daily]) AS [Qty Daily], SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.DISC_SALES) AS DISC_SALES, SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.NONDISC_SALES) AS NONDISC_SALES, 
                      SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.OST_SALES) AS OST_SALES, SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.RSP80) AS Total, dbo.MTD_SMS4.year, dbo.MTD_SMS4.Month, dbo.MTD_SMS4.Target, 
                      SUM(0) AS [var], MAX(dbo.MTD_SMS4.Target) - SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.RSP80) AS Target_var, dbo.MTD_SMS5.FC_Amount, 
                      dbo.MTD_SMS5.FC_Amount - SUM(dbo.MTD_SMS4.RSP80) AS FC_Var
FROM         dbo.MTD_SMS4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.MTD_SMS5 ON dbo.MTD_SMS4.year = dbo.MTD_SMS5.Year AND dbo.MTD_SMS4.Month = dbo.MTD_SMS5.Month
GROUP BY dbo.MTD_SMS4.Date, dbo.MTD_SMS4.year, dbo.MTD_SMS4.Month, dbo.MTD_SMS4.Target, dbo.MTD_SMS5.FC_Amount

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTD3
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS Sales_MTD, 0 AS Inv_Count, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS [Qty Mtd], dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.citemno NOT LIKE 'Z%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTDSMS_REC
AS
SELECT        Years, Months, Recruits, Recruit_Target, Type
FROM            Annique_Reports.dbo.AG_MLMSMSRecruits

CREATE VIEW dbo.MTDSMS3
AS
SELECT        Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Year, Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Month, Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Date, Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.NSV, 
                         Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Sales - Export], Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Sales - SA + NAM], Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.[Total Sales (Incl)], dbo.AG_OL.Outlook AS [Total Target], 
                         Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.To_Date, dbo.MTDSMS_REC.Recruits, dbo.MTDSMS_REC.Recruit_Target
FROM            Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.MTDSMS_REC ON Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Year = dbo.MTDSMS_REC.Years AND Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Month = dbo.MTDSMS_REC.Months LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.AG_OL ON Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Year = dbo.AG_OL.Years AND Annique_Reports.dbo.MTD_SMS3.Month = dbo.AG_OL.Months

--select * from nam_new_Invoice_Email
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[NAM_New_Invoice_Email]
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
             arcust.ccustno, arcust.ccompany, RTRIM(arcust.cemail) AS email, LTRIM(arinvc.cinvno) AS cinvno,
			 aritrs.csono, soship.cshipvia,soship.cWaybillno, 
             CASE WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'http://www.fastway.co.za/our-services/track-your-parcel ' + clabelno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'BERCO' THEN 'http://www.aramex.com/express/track-results-multiple.aspx?ShipmentNumber=' + cwaybillno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'SKYNET'
              THEN 'https://www.paxi.co.za/track/' + cwaybillno ELSE '' END AS tracking
FROM   amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
             amanniquenam.dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON arinvc.ccustno = arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
             amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs WITH (NOLOCK) ON arinvc.cinvno = aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
             amanniquenam.dbo.soship WITH (NOLOCK) ON aritrs.cshipno = soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
             amanniquenam.dbo.fw_consignment ON soship.cshipno =fw_consignment.cShipno
			 AND soship.cshipvia = 'FASTWAY' LEFT OUTER JOIN
             amanniquenam.dbo.fw_items ON fw_consignment.cConsignmentID = fw_items.cConsignmentID
WHERE (arinvc.dinvoice = LEFT(GETDATE(), 12)) AND (arinvc.ctype = '') 
GROUP BY arcust.ccustno,arcust.ccompany, arcust.cemail, LTRIM(arinvc.cinvno),aritrs.csono,
arinvc.cpono, soship.cWaybillno, soship.cshipvia, 
             CASE WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'http://www.fastway.co.za/our-services/track-your-parcel ' + clabelno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'BERCO' THEN 'http://www.aramex.com/express/track-results-multiple.aspx?ShipmentNumber=' + cwaybillno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'SKYNET'
              THEN 'https://www.paxi.co.za/track/' + cwaybillno ELSE '' END
HAVING (aritrs.csono <> '') AND (arcust.cemail <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Negative_Cost_1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT aritrs.citemno, aritrs.cdescript, aritrs.ncost, aritrs.nprice
FROM         dbo.aritrs
WHERE     (ncost > nprice) OR
                      (ncost <= 0) OR
                      (nprice <= 0)
union ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT aritrsh.citemno, aritrsh.cdescript, aritrsh.ncost, aritrsh.nprice
FROM         dbo.aritrsh
WHERE     (ncost > nprice) OR
                      (ncost <= 0) OR
                      (nprice <= 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Negative_Cost_2
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, SUM(ncost) AS Expr1, SUM(nprice) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.Negative_Cost_1
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.New_Kit
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, '' as component, 0 as Kit_Qty, 'KIT' as Kit
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE      (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/12/31')union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT 0 AS Expr1, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, 'NON KIT' as Kit
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE      (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/12/31')

union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, '' as component, 0 as Kit_Qty, 'KIT' as Kit
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE      (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/12/31')union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT 0 AS Expr1, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, '1.SA' AS Company, 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, 'NON KIT' as Kit
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE      (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.newl
AS
SELECT     crcptno as num, sum(npaidamt) as val
FROM         arcash
group by crcptno
union all
SELECT     crcptno as num, sum(npaidamt) as val
FROM         arcashh
group by crcptno
union all
SELECT     crfndno as num, sum(nbankamt) *-1 as val
FROM         arrfnd
group by crfndno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Open_Now
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.drequest BETWEEN '2011-03-01' AND GETDATE()) AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sostrs.nshipqty = '0')
ORDER BY dbo.sostrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Open_Pay
AS
SELECT     ccustno, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, csono
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (npaidamt IN ('192.0000', '204.0000')) AND (dpaid BETWEEN '2011-03-01' AND GETDATE()) AND (nappamt <> npaidamt)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Open_Reg
AS
SELECT     dbo.Open_Regis.ccustno, dbo.Open_Regis.csono, dbo.Open_Regis.citemno, dbo.Open_Regis.cdescript, dbo.Open_Regis.drequest, dbo.Open_Regis.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.Open_Regis.ntaxamt1, dbo.Open_Regis.Value, dbo.Open_Pay.ccustno AS Expr1, dbo.Open_Pay.dpaid, dbo.Open_Pay.npaidamt, dbo.Open_Pay.nappamt, 
                      dbo.Open_Pay.csono AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.Open_Regis LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Open_Pay ON dbo.Open_Regis.ccustno = dbo.Open_Pay.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Open]
AS
SELECT     ccustno, csono, citemno, cdescript, drequest, nsalesamt, ntaxamt1, nsalesamt + ntaxamt1 AS Value
FROM         dbo.sostrs
WHERE     (citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (nshipqty <> nordqty)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Open_SO_Enterby
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sosord.cbcompany, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 AS 'SO Total', 
                      dbo.sosord.centerby
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.nordqty > dbo.sostrs.nshipqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sosord.cbcompany, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt, dbo.sosord.ndiscamt, dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1, dbo.sosord.centerby
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sostrsh.csono, dbo.sostrsh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.cbcompany, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt - dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt + dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1 AS 'SO Total', 
                      dbo.sosordh.centerby
FROM         dbo.sostrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosordh ON dbo.sostrsh.csono = dbo.sosordh.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrsh.nordqty > dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sostrsh.csono, dbo.sostrsh.ccustno,dbo.sosordh.cbcompany, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt, dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt, dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1, dbo.sosordh.centerby

CREATE VIEW dbo.Open_SO_Ordered
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csono AS [SO Number], ccustno AS [Customer Number], dorder AS [Order Date], centerby AS [Enterd by], [SO Total]
FROM         dbo.Open_SO_Enterby
ORDER BY 'Order Date'

CREATE VIEW dbo.[order with details]
AS
SELECT dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.crevision, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.corderby, dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse, dbo.sostrs.nfsalesamt, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, 
                  dbo.sostrs.nshipqty
FROM     dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE  (dbo.sostrs.citemno = '3102119')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) 
                      AS date, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS Special_Price, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) > '2011/02/01') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form_SP
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) 
                      AS date, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS Special_Price, dbo.QOH.Available, dbo.QOH.Price, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.QOH.nbook
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QOH ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.QOH.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.socamp.dFrom) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.socamp.dFrom) 
                      + '/01' AS smalldatetime) > '2011/02/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.QOH.citemno, dbo.QOH.cdescript, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order3.Available IS NULL) 
                      THEN qoh.available ELSE dbo.Order3.Available END AS Qty_Available, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order3.Special_Price IS NULL) 
                      THEN qoh.Price ELSE dbo.Order3.Special_Price END AS Price, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order3.date IS NULL) THEN CAST('1900-01-01' AS smalldatetime) 
                      ELSE dbo.Order3.date END AS Date, dbo.QOH.Price AS Normal_Price, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order3.Special_Price IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0 ELSE dbo.Order3.Special_Price END AS Special_Price, dbo.QOH_Comp.QOH
FROM         dbo.QOH LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QOH_Comp ON dbo.QOH.citemno = dbo.QOH_Comp.ccompno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Order3 ON dbo.QOH.citemno = dbo.Order3.cItemNo
ORDER BY dbo.QOH_Comp.QOH

                      CASE WHEN (date IS NULL) THEN '1900-01-01' ELSE date END AS Date, Normal_Price, Special_Price
FROM         dbo.tOrder_Form1
UNION ALL

                      - 100 END AS Qty_Available, CAST('2013-01-01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, MAX(Normal_Price) AS Normal_Price, MAX(Normal_Price) AS Special_Price

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cdescript, MAX(Price) AS Price, CASE WHEN (MAX(QOH) IS NULL) THEN MAX(Qty_Available) - 100 ELSE MAX(Qty_Available) - MAX(QOH)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form2
AS
SELECT     dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.citemno, dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.cdescript, dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.QOH, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.Special_Price IS NULL) 
                      THEN dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.nprice ELSE dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.Special_Price END AS Price, dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.date, dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.nprice AS Normal_Price, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.Special_Price IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.Special_Price END AS Special_Price, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.nQtylimit IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE nqtylimit END AS nqtylimit
FROM         dbo.QOH_Kit_Min LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP ON dbo.QOH_Kit_Min.citemno = dbo.Order_Form_Kit_SP.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form3
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, Price, QOH AS Qty_Available, CASE WHEN (date IS NULL) THEN '1900-01-01' ELSE date END AS Date, Normal_Price, Special_Price
FROM         dbo.Order_Kit4
WHERE     QOH > 100
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, Price, Qty_Available, CASE WHEN (date IS NULL) THEN '1900-01-01' ELSE date END AS Date, Normal_Price, Special_Price
FROM         dbo.Order_Form1a
WHERE     Qty_Available > 100

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form5
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(LTRIM(citemno)) AS citemno, cdescript, MAX(Qty_Available) AS Qty_Available, MIN(Price) AS Price, Date, ts, MIN(Normal_Price) AS Normal_Price, 
                      MIN(Special_Price) AS Special_Price, Year, Month, Discountable
FROM         dbo.Order_Form5a
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript, Date, ts, Year, Month, Discountable

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Form5a
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(dbo.Order_Formm4.citemno) AS citemno, dbo.Order_Formm4.cdescript, dbo.Order_Formm4.Qty_Available, ROUND(dbo.Order_Formm4.Price * 1.14, 2) AS Price, 
                      dbo.Order_Formm4.Date, RTRIM(CAST(dbo.Order_Formm4.post4 AS char)) AS ts, ROUND(dbo.Order_Formm4.Normal_Price * 1.14, 2) AS Normal_Price, 
                      ROUND(dbo.Order_Formm4.Special_Price * 1.14, 2) AS Special_Price, dbo.Order_Formm4.Year, dbo.Order_Formm4.Month, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN 25 ELSE 0 END AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.Order_Formm4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.Order_Formm4.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.qoh2.citemno, dbo.qoh2.cdescript, 101 AS QTY_Available, dbo.qoh2.price AS Price, dbo.qoh2.date, RTRIM(CAST(dbo.qoh2.date AS char)) AS ts, 
                      dbo.qoh2.price AS Normal_Price, 0 AS Special_Price, datename(year, dbo.qoh2.dcreate) AS Year, datename(month, dbo.qoh2.dcreate) AS Month, 
                      0 AS Discountable
FROM         QOH2

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Formm4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cdescript, Qty_Available, Price, Date, CONVERT(char(12), Date, 111) AS post4, Normal_Price, Special_Price, DATENAME(year, Date) 
                      AS Year, DATENAME(month, Date) AS Month
FROM         dbo.Order_Form3
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Kit1
AS
SELECT     dbo.Order1.citemno, dbo.Order1.Ship_Qty, dbo.Order1.date
FROM         dbo.Order1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.Order1.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Kit2
AS
SELECT     dbo.Order_Form2.citemno, dbo.Order_Form2.cdescript, dbo.Order_Form2.QOH, dbo.Order_Form2.Price, dbo.Order_Form2.date, dbo.Order_Form2.Normal_Price, 
                      dbo.Order_Form2.Special_Price, CASE WHEN (dbo.Order_Kit1.Ship_Qty IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE dbo.Order_Kit1.Ship_Qty END AS Ship_Qty, 
                      dbo.Order_Form2.nQtylimit
FROM         dbo.Order_Form2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Order_Kit1 ON dbo.Order_Form2.citemno = dbo.Order_Kit1.citemno AND dbo.Order_Form2.date = dbo.Order_Kit1.date

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Kit3
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, QOH, Price, date, Normal_Price, Special_Price, nQtylimit, nbook + Ship_Qty AS Ship_Qty
FROM         dbo.Order_Kit2
WHERE     (Ship_Qty + nbook < nQtylimit * 1.1) OR
                      (nQtylimit IS NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Kit4
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cdescript, CASE WHEN ((nqtylimit - ship_Qty) < QOH) THEN (nqtylimit - ship_qty) ELSE QOH END AS QOH, Price, date, Normal_Price, 
                      Special_Price, Ship_Qty, nQtylimit
FROM         dbo.Order_Kit2
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_Test
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cdescript, MAX(Price) AS Price, CASE WHEN (MAX(QOH) IS NULL) THEN MAX(Qty_Available) - 100 ELSE MAX(Qty_Available) - MAX(QOH) 
                      - 100 END AS Qty_Available, CAST('1900-01-01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, MAX(Normal_Price) AS Normal_Price, MAX(Normal_Price) AS Special_Price
FROM         dbo.Order_Form1
WHERE     (date <> '1900-01-01')
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order1
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(Ship_Qty) AS Ship_Qty, date
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp2
WHERE     (date > '2011/02/28')
GROUP BY citemno, date

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order2
AS
SELECT     dbo.Order_Form_SP.cItemNo, dbo.Order_Form_SP.cDescript, dbo.Order_Form_SP.date, dbo.Order_Form_SP.Special_Price, dbo.Order_Form_SP.Available, 
                      dbo.Order_Form_SP.Price, dbo.Order_Form_SP.nQtylimit, dbo.Order_Form_SP.nbook, CASE WHEN (Order1.Ship_Qty IS NULL) 
                      THEN 0 ELSE ship_Qty END AS Ship_Qty
FROM         dbo.Order_Form_SP LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Order1 ON dbo.Order_Form_SP.cItemNo = dbo.Order1.citemno AND dbo.Order_Form_SP.date = dbo.Order1.date

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order3
AS
SELECT     cItemNo, cDescript, date, Special_Price, Available, Price, nQtylimit, nbook + Ship_Qty AS Ship_Qty
FROM         dbo.Order2
WHERE     (Ship_Qty + nbook < nQtylimit * 1.1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Original
AS
SELECT     dbo.glacct.cacctid, CASE WHEN (LEFT(gltfer.cdescript, 4) = 'RTRN') THEN rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) ELSE rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 7, 20)) 
                      END AS Item, dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltfer ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.gltfer.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.gltfer.dtrs > '2008/12/31') AND (dbo.glcatg.cdescript IN ('Cost of Sales                 ', 'Cost of Goods Sold                 ')) AND (dbo.gltfer.dtrs BETWEEN 
                      '2012/03/01' AND '2012/03/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.out_of_stock
AS
SELECT     cwarehouse, citemno, cdescript, cbin, nonhand
FROM         dbo.out_of_stock1
WHERE     (nonhand < '100')

CREATE VIEW dbo.out_of_stock1
AS
SELECT     dbo.icibin.cwarehouse, dbo.icibin.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icibin.cbin, SUM(dbo.icibin.nonhand) AS nonhand
FROM         dbo.icibin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icibin.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A')
GROUP BY dbo.icibin.cwarehouse, dbo.icibin.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icibin.cwarehouse, dbo.icibin.cbin, dbo.icibin.nonhand
HAVING      (dbo.icibin.citemno BETWEEN 'AA/00000/00' AND 'AG/99999/99')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Overseas PS]
AS
SELECT     ccustno, PSalesDisc, Expr1
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical
WHERE     (Expr1 > '20150228')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Payment_Enter_By
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcash.ccustno AS Customer_No, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Customer_Name, dbo.arcash.crcptno AS Receipt_No, dbo.arcash.centerby AS Entered_By, 
                      dbo.arcash.npaidamt AS Paid_Amount, dbo.arcash.dpaid AS Date_Paid
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arcash.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Payments_Reg
AS
SELECT     ccustno, npaidamt, nappamt
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (npaidamt IN ('192.0000', '204.0000')) AND (dpaid >= '2011-03-01')
union all
SELECT     ccustno, npaidamt, nappamt
FROM         dbo.arcashh
WHERE     (npaidamt IN ('192.0000', '204.0000')) AND (dpaid >= '2011-03-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.PB_AC1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT year, month, Weighted_Ave, [RSP 100], [Discount Promo], [RSP 80], [Discount 25], [Net Invoice Value], Total_Cost, ctype, Component_Code, 
                      Component_Desc, Promotion, vat, ROUND(nprice, 0) AS nprice, Component_Qty, component_Value
FROM         dbo.CB_New5
WHERE     (LEFT(Component_Code, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL')) OR
                      (LEFT(Component_Code, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.PB_FC1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS Comp_Code, icitem_1.cdescript, CASE WHEN (icitem_1.nprice <> 0) THEN icitem_1.nprice / dbo.CB_KitSum.KitVal ELSE 0 END AS Weight, 
                      dbo.dpibdg.nUnits * dbo.icikit.nqty AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, icitem_1.nprice, dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, icitem_1.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_KitSum ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.CB_KitSum.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS date, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno AS Comp_Code, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 1 AS weight, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Comp_Qty, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.icitem.nprice, 
                      dbo.icitem.nprice AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.PB_FC2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.PB_FC1.date, dbo.PB_FC1.ckititemno, dbo.PB_FC1.Comp_Code, dbo.PB_FC1.cdescript, dbo.PB_FC1.Weight, dbo.PB_FC1.Comp_Qty, 
                      dbo.PB_FC1.nDollars, CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN dbo.PB_FC1.nDollars * weight ELSE comp_qty * nprice * weight END AS RSP100, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN comp_qty * nprice * weight ELSE dbo.PB_FC1.nDollars * weight END AS RSP80, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.CB_New_Camp.cCampNO IS NULL) THEN 'Standard' ELSE 'Promotion' END AS Promotion, 
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost * dbo.PB_FC1.Weight AS Total_Cost, dbo.PB_FC1.nprice
FROM         dbo.PB_FC1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Cost ON dbo.PB_FC1.Comp_Code = dbo.CB_New_Cost.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_New_Camp ON dbo.PB_FC1.ckititemno = dbo.CB_New_Camp.cItemNo
ORDER BY dbo.CB_New_Cost.Cost

CREATE VIEW dbo.PB_FC3
AS
SELECT     dbo.PB_FC2.Comp_Code, dbo.PB_FC2.cdescript, dbo.PB_FC2.Weight, dbo.PB_FC2.Comp_Qty, dbo.PB_FC2.nDollars, dbo.PB_FC2.RSP100, 
                      dbo.PB_FC2.RSP100 - dbo.PB_FC2.RSP80 AS Disc_Promo, dbo.PB_FC2.RSP80, dbo.PB_FC2.Promotion, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) 
                      THEN (RSP80 - (RSP80 - RSP80 * 0.25)) ELSE 0 END AS Disc25, CASE WHEN (ldscntble = 1) THEN RSP80 - 0.25 * RSP80 ELSE RSP80 END AS RSP60, 
                      dbo.PB_FC2.Total_Cost, ROUND(dbo.PB_FC2.nprice, 0) AS nprice, DATENAME(Year, dbo.PB_FC2.date) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.PB_FC2.date) AS Month
FROM         dbo.PB_FC2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.PB_FC2.Comp_Code = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.PG_DepositOrders
AS
SELECT     dbo.PG_Paygate1.*, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cuid, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.ccustno, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.crcptno, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cdepno, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cpaycode, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cbankno, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cchkno, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cpayref, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.ccurrcode, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.ctogl, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.ctoglmc, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.dcreate, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.dpaid, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.dlastapp, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.lvoid, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.lprtrcpt, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.npaytype, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.npaidamt, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nappamt, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nfpaidamt, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nfappamt, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.ntotmcvar, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nmcround, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nxchgrate, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.nbpaidamt, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.centerby, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cvresncode, dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.cdepcode, 
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.SONO
FROM         dbo.PG_Paygate1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1 ON dbo.PG_Paygate1.csono = dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits1.SONO

CREATE VIEW dbo.PG_Paygate
AS
SELECT     dbo.PG_Paygate1.Batchno, dbo.PG_Paygate1.csono, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cCustName, dbo.PG_Paygate1.nAmount, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cType, 
                      dbo.PG_Paygate1.dProcessed, dbo.PG_Paygate1.nTRANSID, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cAuthCode, dbo.PG_Paygate1.nResultCode, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cResultDesc, 
                      dbo.PG_Paygate1.cSource, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cCurrency, dbo.PG_Paygate1.nOrigAmount, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cOrigCurr, dbo.PG_Paygate1.cComment, 
                      dbo.PG_Paygate2.ccustno
FROM         dbo.PG_Paygate1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.PG_Paygate2 ON dbo.PG_Paygate1.csono = dbo.PG_Paygate2.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.PG_Paygate1
AS
SELECT     Batchno, LTRIM(RTRIM(cSono)) AS csono, cCustName, nAmount, cType, dProcessed, nTRANSID, cAuthCode, nResultCode, cResultDesc, cSource, cCurrency, 
                      nOrigAmount, cOrigCurr, cComment
FROM         dbo.paygatetrx

CREATE VIEW dbo.PG_Paygate2
AS
SELECT     LTRIM(RTRIM(csono)) AS csono, ccustno
FROM         dbo.sosord

CREATE VIEW dbo.PG_PaygateDeposits
AS
SELECT     cuid, ccustno, crcptno, cdepno, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno, cpayref, ccurrcode, ctogl, ctoglmc, dcreate, dpaid, dlastapp, lvoid, lprtrcpt, npaytype, npaidamt, nappamt, 
                      nfpaidamt, nfappamt, ntotmcvar, nmcround, nxchgrate, nbpaidamt, csono, centerby, cvresncode, cdepcode, LTRIM(RTRIM(csono)) AS SONO
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (cbankno = 'FNB 650') AND (cpayref LIKE 'PAYG%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.PO_NoBudg
AS
SELECT     dbo.portrs.cpono, dbo.portrs.cvendno, dbo.portrs.citemno, dbo.portrs.cdescript, dbo.portrs.drequest, dbo.portrs.nrecamt, dbo.portrs.ndiscamt, 
                      dbo.portrs.ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.portrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Item_NoBdudg ON dbo.portrs.citemno = dbo.Item_NoBdudg.citemno
