CREATE VIEW dbo.Premier
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.drequest BETWEEN '2011-03-01' AND '2011-03-31') AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sosord.centerby <> 'Accountmate')
ORDER BY dbo.sostrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Printlist
AS
SELECT     csono, crevision, ccustno, centerby, cscompany, cbankno, dcreate, dorder, lhold, lvoid, lprtlist, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.sosord
WHERE     (dcreate >= '2011-04-28') AND (dorder >= '2011-04-28') AND (lprtlist = '1') AND (crevision <> ' ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Promo_Accounts
AS
SELECT     dbo.ARI.*
FROM         dbo.ARI
union all
select *
from ic

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nonhand) AS nonhand, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nbook) AS nbook, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook) AS Available, 
                      MAX(dbo.icitem.nprice) AS Price, dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.citemno BETWEEN 'AA/00000/00' AND 'AL/99999/99') AND (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook) > 100)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH_Comp
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT RTRIM(dbo.icikit.ccompno) AS ccompno, SUM(dbo.Order_Kit4.QOH) AS QOH, dbo.Order_Kit4.date
FROM         dbo.Order_Kit4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.Order_Kit4.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
GROUP BY dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.Order_Kit4.date
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.Order_Kit4.QOH) IS NOT NULL) AND (dbo.Order_Kit4.date IS NOT NULL) AND (dbo.Order_Kit4.date = CAST(DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) 
                      + '/' + DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) + '/01' AS smalldatetime))
ORDER BY ccompno

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH_Kit
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook AS Available, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.icitem.nprice AS Price, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400') AND (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH_Kit_Min
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, MIN(QOH) AS QOH, nprice
FROM         dbo.QOH_Kit_Nem
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript, nprice
HAVING      (MIN(QOH) > 100)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH_Kit_Nem
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, SUM(iciwhs_1.nonhand) - SUM(iciwhs_1.nbook) AS QOH, MAX(dbo.icitem.nprice) AS nprice, 
                      icitem_1.citemno AS comp, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nbook) AS nbook
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs AS iciwhs_1 ON icitem_1.citemno = iciwhs_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, icitem_1.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.QOH2
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 101 AS nonhand, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nbook) AS nbook, SUM(dbo.iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.iciwhs.nbook) AS Available, 
                      MAX(dbo.icitem.nprice) AS Price, dbo.icitem.dcreate, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.icitem.dcreate, 111) AS Date
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.laritem = 1) AND (dbo.icitem.citemno IN ('ZZ/COUR/11', 'ZZ/0COUR/09', 'ZZ/0POST/00', 'ZZ/0POST/02', 'ZZ/0POST/03')) AND 
                      (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.dcreate

CREATE VIEW RE_MLM_newrecruits
AS
(select DISTINCT a.ccustno from aritrs a with (nolock) 
join arinvc b WITH (NOLOCK) on a.cinvno=b.cinvno
where a.ndiscrate=50 and Month(b.dinvoice)=MOnth(getdate()) and year(b.dinvoice)=year(getdate())
)

/*d(bo.arinvc.cpono NOT LIKE 'W-%') AND (dbo.arinvc.cpono <> ' ') AND */
CREATE VIEW dbo.RE_New_Invoice_Email
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail) AS email, LTRIM(dbo.arinvc.cinvno) AS cinvno, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.soship.cshipvia, dbo.soship.cWaybillno, 
                         CASE WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'http://www.fastway.co.za/our-services/track-your-parcel ' + clabelno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'BERCO' THEN 'http://www.aramex.com/express/track-results-multiple.aspx?ShipmentNumber='
                          + cwaybillno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'SKYNET' THEN 'https://www.paxi.co.za/track/' + cwaybillno ELSE '' END AS tracking
FROM            dbo.arinvc WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.aritrs WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.soship WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.aritrs.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.fw_consignment ON dbo.soship.cshipno = dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno AND dbo.soship.cshipvia = 'FASTWAY' LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.fw_items ON dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID = dbo.fw_items.cConsignmentID
WHERE        (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice = LEFT(GETDATE(), 12)) AND (dbo.arinvc.ctype = '') AND (dbo.soship.cWaybillno <> ' ')
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cemail, LTRIM(dbo.arinvc.cinvno), dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.arinvc.cpono, dbo.soship.cWaybillno, dbo.soship.cshipvia, 
                         CASE WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'FASTWAY' THEN 'http://www.fastway.co.za/our-services/track-your-parcel ' + clabelno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'BERCO' THEN 'http://www.aramex.com/express/track-results-multiple.aspx?ShipmentNumber='
                          + cwaybillno WHEN soship.cShipVia = 'SKYNET' THEN 'https://www.paxi.co.za/track/' + cwaybillno ELSE '' END
HAVING        (dbo.aritrs.csono <> '') AND (dbo.arcust.cemail <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Reg_alert
AS
SELECT     dbo.regcan.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail) AS cemail, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS cphone2, dbo.arcust.lemail, dbo.arcust.lsms, 
                      dbo.arcust.cstatus

                      dbo.regcan ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.regcan.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Reg_Alert_SMS
AS
SELECT     dbo.regcan.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail) AS cemail, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS cphone2, dbo.arcust.lemail, dbo.arcust.lsms, 
                      dbo.arcust.cstatus
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.regcan ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.regcan.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cemail = ' ') AND (dbo.arcust.cphone2 <> ' ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Reg1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT CSONO, cell, CCUSTNO
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.reg1 AS reg1_1
WHERE     (LEN(cell) = 10)
ORDER BY cell

CREATE VIEW dbo.Reg5Months
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.Registration.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.cphone2, dbo.arcust.cemail, 
                      dbo.Registration.nsalesamt - dbo.Registration.ndiscamt + dbo.Registration.ntaxamt1 AS Bal, dbo.arcust.nsoboamt, dbo.arcust.nopencr, dbo.arcust.nbalance
FROM         dbo.Registration INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.Registration.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.Registration.ccustno NOT IN
                          (SELECT     ccustno
                            FROM          dbo.arinvc
                            WHERE      (dinvoice > '2011-04-01')))
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.nbalance

CREATE VIEW dbo.RegCredit
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CustomerCredit.ccustno, dbo.CustomerCredit.ccompany, dbo.Registration.csono, 
                      dbo.Registration.nsalesamt - dbo.Registration.ndiscamt + dbo.Registration.ntaxamt1 AS Bal, dbo.CustomerCredit.nsoboamt, dbo.CustomerCredit.nopencr, 
                      dbo.CustomerCredit.nbalance
FROM         dbo.Registration INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CustomerCredit ON dbo.Registration.ccustno = dbo.CustomerCredit.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.CustomerCredit.nbalance

CREATE VIEW dbo.RegCreditDate
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.RegCredit.ccustno, dbo.RegCredit.ccompany, dbo.RegCredit.csono, dbo.RegCredit.Bal, dbo.RegCredit.nsoboamt, dbo.RegCredit.nopencr, dbo.RegCredit.nbalance, 
                      MAX(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS LastTrade
FROM         dbo.RegCredit LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.RegCredit.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > GETDATE() - 180)
GROUP BY dbo.RegCredit.ccustno, dbo.RegCredit.csono, dbo.RegCredit.Bal, dbo.RegCredit.nsoboamt, dbo.RegCredit.nopencr, dbo.RegCredit.nbalance, dbo.RegCredit.ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.regi
AS
SELECT     ccustno
FROM         dbo.aritrs
WHERE     (citemno = 'AI/19009/02')

CREATE VIEW dbo.regi2
AS
SELECT     ccustno
FROM         dbo.sostrs
WHERE     (citemno = 'AI/19009/02')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Region_Sales
AS
SELECT     Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2010' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company <> '2.NAM') AND (ccustno <> 'NUM') and (dinvoice > '2010/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2011/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month
union all
SELECT     Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2009' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company <> '2.NAM') AND (ccustno <> 'NUM') and (dinvoice > '2009/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2010/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month
union all
SELECT     Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2008' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company <> '2.NAM') AND (ccustno <> 'NUM') and (dinvoice > '2008/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2009/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Namibia' AS Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2010' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company = '2.NAM')  AND (ccustno <> 'DAT') and (dinvoice > '2010/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2011/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Namibia' AS Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2009' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company = '2.NAM')  AND (ccustno <> 'DAT') and (dinvoice > '2009/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2010/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month
UNION ALL
SELECT     'Namibia' AS Region, year, month, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2008' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts
WHERE     (Company = '2.NAM')  AND (ccustno <> 'DAT') and  (dinvoice > '2008/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2009/04/01')
GROUP BY Region, year, month

CREATE VIEW dbo.Regions
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, ccity, cstate, 'SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.arcust
union all
select amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccity,amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cstate, 'NAM' as Company
from amanniquenam.dbo.arcust

CREATE VIEW dbo.Registration
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript, dbo.sostrs.nsalesamt, dbo.sostrs.ndiscamt, dbo.sostrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, 
                      dbo.sostrs.nshipqty
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sosord.dorder >= '2011-03-01') and nshipqty < nordqty
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sostrsh.ccustno, dbo.sostrsh.csono, dbo.sostrsh.citemno, dbo.sostrsh.cdescript, dbo.sostrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.sostrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.sostrsh.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.sostrsh.nordqty, dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty
FROM         dbo.sostrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosordh ON dbo.sostrsh.csono = dbo.sosordh.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrsh.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sosordh.dorder >= '2011-03-01') and nshipqty < nordqty

CREATE VIEW dbo.RegPotential
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.Registration.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.cphone2, dbo.arcust.cemail, 
                      dbo.Registration.nsalesamt - dbo.Registration.ndiscamt + dbo.Registration.ntaxamt1 AS Bal, dbo.arcust.nsoboamt, dbo.arcust.nopencr, dbo.arcust.nbalance
FROM         dbo.Registration INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.Registration.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.Registration.ccustno IN
                          (SELECT     ccustno
                            FROM          dbo.arinvc
                            WHERE      (dinvoice >= '2011-05-01')))
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.nbalance

CREATE VIEW dbo.Renique
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccampno, Date_From, Date_To, cItemNo, cDescript, nQtylimit
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1
WHERE     (DATENAME(year, Date_From) = '2011') AND (DATENAME(month, Date_From) = 'June')
ORDER BY ccampno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Revenue_Codes
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.arrevn.cdescript AS Expr1, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.iciwhs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.RMA_Num
AS
SELECT     dbo.racord.ccustno, LTRIM(dbo.racord.crmano) AS Expr2, RTRIM(dbo.arcust.cphone2) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.racord LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.racord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.RMA_Report
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript AS 'Item Desc', dbo.ractrs.crtrncode, dbo.rartcd.cdescript, CASE WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '1') 
                      THEN 'Restock and Credit' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '2') THEN 'Restock and Replace' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '3') 
                      THEN 'Restock and Substitute' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '4') THEN 'Discard and Credit' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '5') 
                      THEN 'Discard and Replace' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '6') THEN 'Discard and Substitute' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '7') 
                      THEN 'Repair and Reship' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '8') THEN 'Repair and Credit' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '9') 
                      THEN 'Repair and Replace' WHEN (dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype = '10') THEN 'Repair and Substitute' ELSE ' ' END AS Reason, dbo.aritrs.crmano, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty
FROM         dbo.ractrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rartcd ON dbo.ractrs.crtrncode = dbo.rartcd.crtrncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.ractrs.crmano = dbo.aritrs.crmano

CREATE VIEW dbo.S_1
AS
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arcapp
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno
HAVING      (ccustno = '527159')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_AR_JR
AS
SELECT     dbo.arjtrs.cjrnlno, dbo.arjtrs.ctaxcode, dbo.arjtrs.ntaxamt, dbo.arjtrs.namt, dbo.arjtrs.namtinctx, dbo.arjrnl.dtrs, DATENAME(year, dbo.arjrnl.dtrs) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arjrnl.dtrs) AS Month, dbo.glacct.cacctid
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arjrnl INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arjtrs ON dbo.arjrnl.cjrnlno = dbo.arjtrs.cjrnlno ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.arjtrs.ccontraacc
WHERE     (dbo.glagrp.cdescript IN ('Sales', 'Discount')) AND (dbo.arjrnl.dtrs > '2010-03-31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_GL
AS
SELECT     dbo.gltrsn.csource, DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) AS month, CASE WHEN (DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) IN ('2005', 
                      '2006', '2007', '2008', '2009')) OR
                      (DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) = ('2010') AND DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs) IN ('January', 'February', 'March', 'April')) THEN (SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) * - 1) 
                      ELSE SUM(dbo.gltrsn.ntrsamt) END AS [Total Value], dbo.glagrp.cdescript, dbo.gltrsn.cacctid
FROM         dbo.gltrsn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.gltrsn.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glagrp ON dbo.glacct.cgrpid = dbo.glagrp.cgrpid
WHERE     (dbo.gltrsn.dtrs > '2010-03-31')
GROUP BY dbo.gltrsn.csource, DATENAME(year, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs), DATENAME(month, dbo.gltrsn.dtrs), dbo.glagrp.cdescript, dbo.gltrsn.cacctid
HAVING      (dbo.gltrsn.csource = 'GL') AND (dbo.glagrp.cdescript IN ('Sales', 'Discount'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_IS
AS
SELECT     cyear, cacctid, cdescript, Segment1, ncpdamt0, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, December, January, February, March, Company, 
                      ccatgtype, Type, cfdescript, ccatgid
FROM         dbo.CB_Inc_St1
WHERE     (cacctid LIKE '30%') AND (cyear = '2010')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_Lines
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS month, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, aritrs.lstock, dbo.glacct.cacctid

                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.arrevn.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     dbo.glacct.cdescript LIKE 'Sales%' AND arinvc.dinvoice > '2010-03-31' AND aritrs.ccustno <> 'NUM'
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS month, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, aritrsh.lstock, dbo.glacct.cacctid

                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrsh.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.arrevn.crevnacc = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     dbo.glacct.cdescript LIKE 'Sales%' AND arinvch.dinvoice > '2010-03-31' AND aritrsh.ccustno <> 'NUM'

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_NAM_Com
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SA_NAM_EX
UNION ALL
SELECT     *

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_NAM_Cust
AS
SELECT     RTRIM(LTRIM(ccustno)) AS [Cust No], RTRIM(LTRIM(ccompany)) AS Name, RTRIM(LTRIM(caddr1)) AS [Address 1], RTRIM(LTRIM(caddr2)) AS [Address 2], 
                      RTRIM(LTRIM(ccity)) AS City, RTRIM(LTRIM(cstate)) AS Province, RTRIM(LTRIM(czip)) AS [Zip Code], RTRIM(LTRIM(ccountry)) AS Country, RTRIM(LTRIM(cphone2)) 
                      AS Cell, RTRIM(LTRIM(cemail)) AS Email, RTRIM(LTRIM(csponsor)) AS Sponsor, RTRIM(LTRIM(cclass)) AS Class, RTRIM(LTRIM(cstatus)) AS Status, lemail AS 'E mail', 
                      lpost AS Post, lsms AS SMS, dstarter AS [Create Date], RTRIM(LTRIM(cpaycode)) AS Paycode, '1.RSA' AS Con, Row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ccustno DESC) 
AS Number
FROM         dbo.arcust
WHERE     (ccurrcode <> 'NAM')
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.Nam_cust

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_NAM_EX
AS
SELECT     rtrim(dbo.arinvc.ccustno) AS 'Customer', ltrim(rtrim(dbo.arinvc.cinvno)) AS 'Invoice', rtrim(dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse) AS Warehouse, rtrim(dbo.aritrs.citemno) AS 'Item', 
                      rtrim(dbo.icitem.cdescript) AS Description, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nprice, rtrim(dbo.icitem.ctaxcode) AS Tax, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, 
                      aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, ((dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx - dbo.aritrs.nprice) * nshipqty) AS taxamt, CASE WHEN (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate = 100.00) THEN (0.0000) 
                      ELSE (dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) END AS TranValue, CASE WHEN (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate = 50.00) THEN ((dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) / 2) 
                      WHEN (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate = 100.00) THEN (0.000) ELSE (dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) END AS MLMValue, rtrim(dbo.arinvc.centerby) AS 'User', 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, rtrim(dbo.arcust.cclass) AS Class, dbo.arcust.dcreate
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     arinvc.dinvoice >= '2010-05-01' and csponsor <> ' '
UNION ALL
SELECT     rtrim(dbo.arinvch.ccustno) AS 'Customer', ltrim(rtrim(dbo.arinvch.cinvno)) AS 'Invoice', rtrim(dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse) AS Warehouse, rtrim(dbo.aritrsh.citemno) 
                      AS 'Item', rtrim(dbo.icitem.cdescript) AS Description, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, rtrim(dbo.icitem.ctaxcode) AS Tax, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, ((dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx - dbo.aritrsh.nprice) * nshipqty) AS taxamt, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate = 100.00) THEN (0.0000) ELSE (dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) END AS TranValue, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate = 50.00) THEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) / 2) WHEN (dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate = 100.00) THEN (0.0000) 
                      ELSE (dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) END AS MLMValue, rtrim(dbo.arinvch.centerby) AS 'User', dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, 
                      rtrim(dbo.arcust.cclass) AS Class, dbo.arcust.dcreate
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     arinvch.dinvoice >= '2010-05-01'  and csponsor <> ' '
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.NAM_EX

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_NAM_EX_his
AS
SELECT     rtrim(dbo.arinvc.ccustno) AS 'Customer', ltrim(rtrim(dbo.arinvc.cinvno)) AS 'Invoice', rtrim(dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse) AS Warehouse, rtrim(dbo.aritrs.citemno) AS 'Item', 
                      rtrim(dbo.icitem.cdescript) AS Description, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, ((dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) / 0.75) AS nprice, rtrim(dbo.icitem.ctaxcode) as Tax, 
                      0.0000 AS ndiscrate, 0.0000 AS ndiscamt, (dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) AS nslesamt, 0.0000 AS taxamt, (((dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) / 0.75) 
                      * 1.14) AS TranValue, ((((dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) / 0.75) * 1.14)) AS MLMValue, rtrim(dbo.arinvc.centerby) as 'User', dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.lmlm, 
                      dbo.icitem.ldscntble, rtrim(dbo.arcust.cclass) AS Class, dbo.arcust.dcreate
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     arinvc.dinvoice <= '2010-04-30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     rtrim(dbo.arinvch.ccustno) AS 'Customer', ltrim(rtrim(dbo.arinvch.cinvno)) AS 'Invoice', rtrim(dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse) AS Warehouse, rtrim(dbo.aritrsh.citemno) 
                      AS 'Item', rtrim(dbo.icitem.cdescript) AS Description, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, ((dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) / 0.75) AS nprice, 
                      rtrim(dbo.icitem.ctaxcode) as Tax, 0.0000 AS ndiscrate, 0.0000 AS ndiscamt, (dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) AS nslesamt, 0.0000 AS taxamt, 
                      (((dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) / 0.75) * 1.14) AS TranValue, ((((dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) / 0.75) * 1.14)) AS MLMValue, rtrim(dbo.arinvch.centerby) as 'User', 
                      dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, rtrim(dbo.arcust.cclass) AS Class, dbo.arcust.dcreate
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvch.ccustno ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     arinvch.dinvoice <= '2010-04-30'
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.nam_ex_his

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_NAM_Prod_Lines

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_Open
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.lquote, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.lprtlist, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt, dbo.sosord.ndiscamt, dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1, sosord.centerby
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.citemno <> 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sostrs.nshipqty < dbo.sostrs.nordqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.lquote, dbo.sosord.lhold, dbo.sosord.lprtlist, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt, dbo.sosord.ndiscamt, dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1, sosord.centerby
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sosordh.csono, dbo.sosordh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.lquote, dbo.sosordh.lhold, dbo.sosordh.lprtlist,dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt, dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt, dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1, sosordh.centerby
FROM         dbo.sosordh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrsh ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.sostrsh.csono
WHERE    (dbo.sostrsh.citemno <> 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty < dbo.sostrsh.nordqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sosordh.csono, dbo.sosordh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.lquote, dbo.sosordh.lhold, dbo.sosordh.lprtlist, dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt, dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt, dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1, sosordh.centerby

CREATE VIEW dbo.SA_Open_Pay
AS
SELECT     *, npaidamt - nappamt AS 'Open Amt', '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         arcash
WHERE     nappamt = '0'  AND lvoid <> '1' AND csono = ' '
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, npaidamt - nappamt AS 'Open Amt', '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         arcashh
WHERE     nappamt = '0' AND lvoid <> '1' AND csono = ' '

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Sales Order]
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 AS 'SO Total', 
                      dbo.sosord.centerby
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.aritrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.nordqty = dbo.sostrs.nshipqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt, dbo.sosord.ndiscamt, dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1, dbo.sosord.centerby
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sostrsh.csono, dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.sostrsh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt - dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt + dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1 AS 'SO Total', 
                      dbo.sosordh.centerby
FROM         dbo.sostrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosordh ON dbo.sostrsh.csono = dbo.sosordh.csono INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.aritrsh.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrsh.nordqty = dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty)
GROUP BY dbo.sostrsh.csono, dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.sostrsh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.nsalesamt, dbo.sosordh.ndiscamt, dbo.sosordh.ntaxamt1, dbo.sosordh.centerby

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Sales Targets]
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabud.cyear AS Year, dbo.glbugt.cbudid AS Name, dbo.glbugt.cacctid AS Account, dbo.glacct.cdescript AS Description, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS April, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5 AS August, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6 AS September, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS December, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS January, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS March, dbo.glacct.ccatgid, dbo.glacct.cgrpid
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glbugt.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cyear IN ('2011', '2012'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.sales_tragets

CREATE VIEW dbo.Sales_Bug
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabud.cyear, dbo.glabud.cbudid, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt3, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt4, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
ORDER BY dbo.glabud.cbudid

CREATE VIEW dbo.Sales_Dash_Test
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, ccompany, dcreate, npsalesOld, npsalesLat, npsalesGrw, npsalesPcn, ngsalesOld, ngsalesLat, ngsalesGrw, ngsalesPcn, npRecruit, 
                      ngRecruit, dgenerate, ngNettSales, ngTotIncome, ngTotUnits, ngTotIvoice, ngSalesNDisc
FROM         dbo.GenRebComp
WHERE     (dgenerate BETWEEN '2013/02/01' AND '2013/02/28')
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Sales_Tracking1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dinvoice, cwarehouse, SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) AS Amount, CASE WHEN (discountable = 'DISCOUNTABLE') THEN SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS Comm, CASE WHEN (discountable = 'NONDISCOUNTABLE') THEN SUM([RSP 80 Incl]) ELSE 0 END AS NonComm, COUNT(cinvno) AS Inv_Count, 
                      DATENAME(day, dinvoice) AS Days, 0 AS Joined, Company
FROM         dbo.CB_Market_Dash1
WHERE     (Expr1 = 'CONSULTANT') AND (LEFT(citemno, 2) IN ('AA', 'AB', 'AC', 'AD', 'AE', 'AF', 'AG', 'AH', 'AI', 'AL')) OR
                      (Expr1 = 'CONSULTANT') AND (LEFT(citemno, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))
GROUP BY dinvoice, cwarehouse, Discountable, Company
HAVING      (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2009-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.Sales_Tracking2
AS
SELECT     dinvoice, cwarehouse, SUM(Amount) AS Amount, SUM(Comm) AS Comm, SUM(NonComm) AS NonComm, SUM(Inv_Count) AS Inv_Count, Days, Joined, Company
FROM         dbo.Sales_Tracking1
GROUP BY dinvoice, cwarehouse, Days, Joined, Company
union all
SELECT     dcreate, '' AS cwarehouse, 0 AS Amount, 0 AS Comm, 0 AS NonComm, 0 AS Inv_Count, DATENAME(day, dcreate) AS Days, COUNT(ccustno) AS Joined, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.arcust
WHERE     (cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
GROUP BY dcreate, DATENAME(day, dcreate)
HAVING      (dcreate > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2009-12-31 00:00:00', 102))
union all
SELECT      amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dcreate, '' AS cwarehouse, 0 AS Amount, 0 AS Comm, 0 AS NonComm, 0 AS Inv_Count, DATENAME(day, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dcreate) AS Days, COUNT(ccustno) AS Joined,'2.NAM' as Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arcust
WHERE     (amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
GROUP BY amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dcreate, DATENAME(day, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dcreate)
HAVING      (amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dcreate > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2009-12-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.Sales_Tracking3
AS
SELECT     dbo.Dates.Date AS dinvoice, dbo.Sales_Tracking2.cwarehouse, SUM(dbo.Sales_Tracking2.Amount) AS Amount, SUM(dbo.Sales_Tracking2.Comm) AS Comm, 
                      SUM(dbo.Sales_Tracking2.NonComm) AS NonComm, SUM(dbo.Sales_Tracking2.Inv_Count) AS Inv_Count, CAST(DATENAME(day, dbo.Dates.Date) AS numeric(18, 0)) 
                      AS Days, SUM(dbo.Sales_Tracking2.Joined) AS Joined, dbo.Dates.Company, DATENAME(year, dbo.Dates.Date) AS Years, DATENAME(month, dbo.Dates.Date) 
                      AS Months
FROM         dbo.Sales_Tracking2 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Dates ON dbo.Sales_Tracking2.Company = dbo.Dates.Company AND dbo.Sales_Tracking2.dinvoice = dbo.Dates.Date
GROUP BY dbo.Dates.Date, dbo.Sales_Tracking2.cwarehouse, CAST(DATENAME(day, dbo.Dates.Date) AS numeric(18, 0)), dbo.Dates.Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.SalesCom
AS
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, [Inv Tot], [Inv Disc Tot]
FROM         dbo.SalesInvDisc
union all
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, [Inv Tot], [Inv Disc Tot]
FROM         dbo.SalesInvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.SalesComInv
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.SalesCom.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, SUM(dbo.SalesCom.[Inv Tot]) AS [Inv Tot], SUM(dbo.SalesCom.[Inv Disc Tot]) 
                      AS [Inv Disc Tot], dbo.arcust.cphone2
FROM         dbo.SalesCom INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SalesCom.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.SalesCom.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cphone2
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SalesInvDisc
AS
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, 0 as 'Inv Tot', sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS 'Inv Disc Tot'
FROM         dbo.aritrs
WHERE     lstock = '1'
GROUP BY ccustno, lstock
UNION ALL
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, 0 as 'Inv Tot', sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS 'Inv Disc Tot'
FROM         dbo.aritrsh
WHERE     lstock = '1'
GROUP BY ccustno, lstock

CREATE VIEW dbo.SalesInvoice
AS
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS 'Inv Tot', 0 AS 'Inv Disc Tot'
FROM         dbo.aritrs
GROUP BY ccustno, lstock
UNION ALL
SELECT     ccustno, lstock, sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS 'Inv Tot', 0 AS 'Inv Disc Tot'
FROM         dbo.aritrsh
GROUP BY ccustno, lstock

CREATE VIEW dbo.SalesLevel
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, [Inv Tot], [Inv Disc Tot], CASE WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 7000.0000) AND ([Inv Tot] < 13000.0000) THEN 'C27' WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 13000.0000) AND 
                      ([Inv Tot] < 18000.0000) THEN 'C28' WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 18000.0000) AND ([Inv Tot] < 25000.0000) THEN 'C30' WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 25000.0000) AND 
                      ([Inv Tot] < 37000.0000) THEN 'C32' WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 37000.0000) AND ([Inv Tot] < 60000.0000) THEN 'C35' WHEN ([Inv Tot] >= 60000.0000) 
                      THEN 'C40' ELSE 'C25' END AS 'Class', cphone2
FROM         dbo.SalesComInv

CREATE VIEW dbo.Section7
AS
SELECT     cinvno, cmajorcat, citemno, cdescript, Year, Month, dinvoice, Cost, nprice, Units, Total
FROM         dbo.Section7a

CREATE VIEW dbo.Section7a
AS
SELECT     cinvno, cmajorcat, citemno, cdescript, Year, Month, dinvoice, SUM(Cost) AS Cost, nprice, SUM(Units) AS Units, SUM(Total) AS Total
FROM         dbo.Section7b
GROUP BY cmajorcat, citemno, cdescript, Year, Month, nprice, cinvno, dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.Section7b
AS
SELECT    dbo.arinvc.cinvno, CASE WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN socamp.dfrom AND socamp.dto) THEN dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat ELSE ' ' END AS cmajorcat, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice,
                      dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Cost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Units, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS Total
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo
UNION ALL
SELECT    dbo.arinvch.cinvno, CASE WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice BETWEEN socamp.dfrom AND socamp.dto) THEN dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat ELSE ' ' END AS cmajorcat, 
                      dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice,
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Cost, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Units, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS Total
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.Ship_Test1
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.crevncode, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sostrs.drequest, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.sostrs.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.drequest BETWEEN dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From AND dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To) AND (dbo.sostrs.nordqty < dbo.sostrs.nshipqty)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Ship_Test2
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.crevncode, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sostrs.drequest, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.BA_Camp1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.BA_Camp1.cItemNo = dbo.sostrs.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.nordqty < dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AND (dbo.sostrs.drequest NOT BETWEEN dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_From AND dbo.BA_Camp1.Date_To)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Ship_

                      lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, 
                      nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nbuiltqty, nordqty, nshipqty, nadvqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, nweight, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, nseq, nstock,

CREATE VIEW dbo.[SL_stock adjustments]
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.SL_vw_Berco_freight_Report
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.DECLARED_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.DIMENSIONS, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.FINANCE_STATUS, dbo.be_waybill.FINANCE_STATUS_NAME, dbo.be_waybill.FREIGHT_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_DATE, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_NUMBER, dbo.be_waybill.POD_IMAGE_CODE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_QUANTITY_DELIVERED, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_BY, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_TIME, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE1, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE2, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE3, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_CONTACT, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_NAME, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_POSTALCODE, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_SUBURB, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_TELNO, dbo.be_waybill.SERVICE_TYPE, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_CHARGE_UNITS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_MASS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_PARCELS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VOLUME, dbo.be_waybill.VAT, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS_NAME, dbo.soship.csono, a.cinvno
FROM         dbo.be_waybill LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.soship.cWaybillno = dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, cshipno
                            FROM          dbo.aritrs) AS a ON a.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno
ORDER BY dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_NUMBER

CREATE VIEW dbo.[so comb]
AS

                         dbo.sosord.cbcompany, dbo.sosord.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.So_Change
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.SO_Open
AS

FROM         dbo.sostrs
WHERE     (nshipqty < nordqty) AND (citemno = 'AI/19009/02')
union all

FROM         dbo.sostrsh
WHERE     (nshipqty < nordqty) AND (citemno = 'AI/19009/02')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SO_Overship_Enterby
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.csono, dbo.sostrs.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sosord.centerby

                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono

union all

                      dbo.sosordh ON dbo.sostrsh.csono = dbo.sosordh.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrsh.nordqty < dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SOH
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, dbo.iciwhs.citemno AS Item, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Description, cstatus as Status, dcreate as 'Created', dbo.iciwhs.nonhand AS 'On Hand',
                      dbo.iciwhs.ntotcost AS Cost
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     nonhand <> '0.0000'
UNION ALL
SELECT     amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.citemno AS Item, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Description, 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.cstatus as Status, amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.dcreate as Created, amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.nonhand AS 'On Hand', amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.ntotcost AS Cost
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.icitem ON amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.citemno = amanniquenam.dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     amanniquenam.dbo.iciwhs.nonhand <> '0.0000'

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_arcapp]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt) AS npaidamt
FROM         arcapp
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno
UNION ALL
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt)
FROM         arcapph
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_arcapp2020
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.arcapp
WHERE     (crcptno <> '') AND (dpaid <= '2020-06-30 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY crcptno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_arcappINV]
AS
SELECT     cinvno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.arcapp
WHERE     (cinvno <> '') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') and lvoid = 0
GROUP BY cinvno
union all
SELECT     cinvno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.arcapph
WHERE     (cinvno <> '') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') and lvoid = 0
GROUP BY cinvno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_arcappINVSUM]
AS
SELECT [cinvno]
      ,sum([Expr1]) as Epr1
  FROM [dbo].[SR_arcappINV]
group by [cinvno]

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_arcappPmt]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt) AS npaidamt
FROM         SR_arcapp
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_arcash2020]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.arcash
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_ARJnls
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt, dbo.arjtrs.cjrnlno, dbo.arjtrs.ccustno AS Expr1, dbo.arjtrs.namt, dbo.arjtrs.ntaxamt, 
                      dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arjtrs ON dbo.arinvc.cuid = dbo.arjtrs.cinvcuid AND dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt <> dbo.arjtrs.namt AND dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1 <> dbo.arjtrs.ntaxamt
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt <> 0.00)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_AutoStmt
AS
SELECT     dbo.arstmt.*, dbo.arcust.cemail, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.caddr1, dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, 
                      dbo.arcust.cphone1
FROM         dbo.arstmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arstmt.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_bin
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.icibin
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_APInv
AS
select '1' as Month, '1'as Year, -1*sum(npaid - nusedamt) as Balance from apinvc
where month((dinvoice + 30)) <= month(GETDATE())
and year((dinvoice + 30)) <= year(GETDATE())
and ctype = 'D'
union all

select '1', '1', sum(nbalance) as Balance from apinvc
where (nbalance <> 0) and month((dinvoice + 30)) <= month(GETDATE())
and year((dinvoice + 30)) <= year(GETDATE())
and ctype <> 'D'


union all

select MONTH(dinvoice + 30) AS Month, YEAR(dinvoice + 30) AS Year, -1*sum(npaid - nusedamt) as Balance from apinvc
where month((dinvoice + 30)) > month(GETDATE())
and year((dinvoice + 30)) >= year(GETDATE())
and ctype = 'D'
GROUP BY MONTH(dinvoice + 30), YEAR(dinvoice + 30)

union all

SELECT     MONTH(dinvoice + 30) AS Month, YEAR(dinvoice + 30) AS Year, SUM(nbalance) AS Balance
FROM         dbo.apinvc
WHERE     (nbalance <> 0)
and month((dinvoice + 30)) > month(GETDATE())
and year((dinvoice + 30)) >= year(GETDATE())
and ctype <> 'D'
GROUP BY MONTH(dinvoice + 30), YEAR(dinvoice + 30)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ApInvSum
AS
SELECT     Month, Year, SUM(Balance) AS Balance
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_APInv
GROUP BY Month, Year

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ApInvSumMonth
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN month = 1 AND year = 1 THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Expr1, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 1, 
                      getdate())) THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month2, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month3, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 3, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 3, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month4, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month5, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month6, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month7, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month8, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month9, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month10, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month11, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) 
                      THEN Balance ELSE 0 END AS Month12
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ApInvSum

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ApInvSumMonthSum
AS
SELECT     'AP Invoices Due' AS Expr1, SUM(Expr1) AS Month1, SUM(Month2) AS Month2, SUM(Month3) AS Month3, SUM(Month4) AS Month4, SUM(Month5) AS Month5, 
                      SUM(Month6) AS Month6, SUM(Month7) AS Month7, SUM(Month8) AS Month8, SUM(Month9) AS Month9, SUM(Month10) AS Month10, SUM(Month11) AS Month11, 
                      SUM(Month12) AS Month12
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ApInvSumMonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgets
AS
SELECT     Year, Name, Account, Description, April AS April, May AS May, June AS June, July AS July, August AS August, September AS September, October AS October, 
                      November AS November, December AS December, January, February, March AS March, [Acc April], [Acc May], [Acc June], [Acc July], [Acc Aug], [Acc Sept], [Acc Oct], 
                      [Acc Nov], [Acc Dec], [Acc Jan], [Acc Feb], [Acc Mar], [Var Apr], [Var May], [Var June], [Var July], [Var Aug], [Var Sep], [Var Oct], [Var Nov], [Var Dec], [Var Jan], [Var Feb], 
                      [Var Mar], cdescript, [Total Budget], [Actual Total], [Variance Total], cgrpid
FROM         dbo.Budget_Final
WHERE     (Year = 2013) AND (Name IN ('OL2013'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Account, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.January, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.February, 
                      dbo.IS_Exhibit1.Exp_Type, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.March, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.April, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.May, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.June, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.July, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.August, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.September, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.October, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.November, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.December, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Year
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum INNER JOIN
                      dbo.IS_Exhibit1 ON dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Account = dbo.IS_Exhibit1.Account_Code
WHERE     (dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Year = '2013')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1Sum
AS
SELECT     Exp_Type, SUM(January * 1.14) AS January, SUM(February * 1.14) AS February, SUM(March * 1.14) AS March, SUM(April * 1.14) AS April, SUM(May * 1.14) AS May, 
                      SUM(June * 1.14) AS June, SUM(July * 1.14) AS July, SUM(August * 1.14) AS August, SUM(September * 1.14) AS September, SUM(October * 1.14) AS October, 
                      SUM(November * 1.14) AS November, SUM(December * 1.14) AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1
WHERE     (Exp_Type IN ('Administrative Expense', 'Interest Expense', 'Selling Expense'))
GROUP BY Exp_Type
UNION ALL
SELECT     Exp_Type, SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, 
                      SUM(June) AS June, SUM(July) AS July, SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, 
                      SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1
WHERE     (Exp_Type IN ('Salaries Expense', 'Tax Expense'))
GROUP BY Exp_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumSum
AS
SELECT     'Budget Expenses' AS Exp_Type, SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, SUM(June) 
                      AS June, SUM(July) AS July, SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) 
                      AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1Sum
union all
SELECT      'Budget Expenses' AS Exp_Type, SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, SUM(June) AS June, SUM(July) 
                      AS July, SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseRecoupments

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumSumInclRecoup
AS
SELECT     Exp_Type, SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, SUM(June) AS June, SUM(July) 
                      AS July, SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumSum
GROUP BY Exp_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumVat
AS
SELECT     SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, SUM(June) AS June, SUM(July) AS July, 
                      SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1Sum
WHERE     (Exp_Type IN ('Administrative Expense', 'Selling Expense'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum
AS
SELECT     Account, Year, SUM(April) AS April, SUM(May) AS May, SUM(June) AS June, SUM(July) AS July, SUM(August) AS August, SUM(September) AS September, SUM(October) 
                      AS October, SUM(November) AS November, SUM(December) AS December, SUM(January) AS January, SUM(February) AS February, SUM(March) AS March
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgets
GROUP BY Account, Year

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseRecoupments
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Account, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.January, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.February, 
                      'Recoupments' AS Exp_Type, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.March, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.April, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.May, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.June, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.July, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.August, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.September, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.October, dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.November, 
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.December
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum INNER JOIN
                      dbo.IS_Exhibit1 ON dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsSum.Account = dbo.IS_Exhibit1.Account_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_GRN
AS
SELECT     '1' AS Month, '1' AS Year, sum((a.naccramt - isnull(a.ninvamt, 0)))  AS nrevsamt
FROM         poaccq AS a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      portrs ON a.crcptno = portrs.crcptno AND a.clineitem = portrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      poctrs ON a.crcptno = poctrs.crcptno AND a.clineitem = poctrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      apvend ON a.cvendno = apvend.cvendno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      popord ON a.cpono = popord.cpono /* .MS705 .10010749 .08/22/2008 .begin. */ LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      poptrs ON a.cpono = poptrs.cpono AND a.clineitem = poptrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      glacct ON poptrs.crefacct = glacct.cacctid
WHERE    a.dtrs <  (GETDATE() - 30) 
/*group by month(a.dtrs + 30), YEAR(a.dtrs + 30)*/ UNION ALL
SELECT     month(a.dtrs + 30), YEAR(a.dtrs + 30), sum((a.naccramt - isnull(a.ninvamt, 0))) AS nrevsamt
FROM         poaccq AS a LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      portrs ON a.crcptno = portrs.crcptno AND a.clineitem = portrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      poctrs ON a.crcptno = poctrs.crcptno AND a.clineitem = poctrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      apvend ON a.cvendno = apvend.cvendno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      popord ON a.cpono = popord.cpono /* .MS705 .10010749 .08/22/2008 .begin. */ LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      poptrs ON a.cpono = poptrs.cpono AND a.clineitem = poptrs.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      glacct ON poptrs.crefacct = glacct.cacctid
WHERE    a.dtrs >  (GETDATE() - 30) 
GROUP BY month(a.dtrs + 30), YEAR(a.dtrs + 30)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_GRNMonth
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN month = 1 AND year = 1 THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Expr1, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 0, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 0, 
                      getdate())) THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month2, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month3, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month4, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month5, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month6, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month7, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month8, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month9, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month10, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month11, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) 
                      THEN nrevsamt ELSE 0 END AS Month12
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_GRN

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_GRNMonthSum
AS
SELECT     'GRNs Due' AS Expr1, SUM(Expr1 + Month2) AS Month1, SUM(Month3) AS Month2, SUM(Month4) AS Month3, SUM(Month5) AS Month4, SUM(Month6) AS Month5, 
                      SUM(Month7) AS Month6, SUM(Month8) AS Month7, SUM(Month9) AS Month8, SUM(Month10) AS Month9, SUM(Month11) AS Month10, SUM(Month12) AS Month11, 
                      0 AS Month12
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_GRNMonth

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_CF_FC_Monthly1_Disc]
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN month(getdate()) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr01, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 1, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr02, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 2, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr03, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 3, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 3, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr04, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 4, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr05, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 5, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr06, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 6, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr07, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 7, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr08, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 8, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr09, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 9, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr10, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 10, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr11, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 11, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr12
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     (cItemNo IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem
                            WHERE      (ldscntble = 1)))
GROUP BY dEndDate

                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr05, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 5, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr06, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 6, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr07, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 7, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr08, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 8, 
                      getdate())) = month(denddate) AND year(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr09, CASE WHEN month(dateadd(mm, 9,

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_PODiscountable
AS
SELECT     'Purchase Orders Discountable' AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po01 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost01, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po02 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) 
                      * 1.14 AS Cost02, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po03 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost03, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po04 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost04, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po05 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost05, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po06 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost06, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po07 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost07, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po08 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost08, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po09 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost09, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po10 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost10, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po11 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost11, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po12 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_PONonDiscountable
AS
SELECT     'Purchase Orders Non-Discountable' AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po01 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost01, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po02 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) 
                      * 1.14 AS Cost02, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po03 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost03, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po04 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost04, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po05 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost05, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po06 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost06, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po07 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost07, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po08 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost08, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po09 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost09, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po10 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost10, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po11 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost11, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.po12 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscount
AS
SELECT     'Discount (@ 44%)' AS Category, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr01) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales01, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr02) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales02, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr03) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales03, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr04) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales04, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr05) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales05, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr06) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales06, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr07) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales07, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr08) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales08, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr09) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales09, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr10) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales10, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr11) * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales11, - (1 * SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr12) 
                      * 0.44 * 1.14) AS Sales12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc ON dbo.dprqmt.fr12 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr12 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr11 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr11 AND
                       dbo.dprqmt.fr10 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr10 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr09 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr09 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr08 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr08 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr07 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr07 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr06 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr06 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr03 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr03 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr05 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr05 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr04 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr04 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr02 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr02 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr01 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr01

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscountable
AS

                      SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr02) * 1.14 AS Period02, SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr03) * 1.14 AS Period03, 
                      SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr04) * 1.14 AS Period04, SUM(dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr05) * 1.14 AS Period05,

                       dbo.dprqmt.fr10 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr10 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr09 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr09 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr08 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr08 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr07 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr07 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr06 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr06 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr03 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr03 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr05 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr05 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr04 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr04 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr02 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr02 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr01 = dbo.SR_CF_FC_Monthly1Sum_Disc.fr01

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPODiscountable

                      * 1.14 AS Cost02, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr34 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost03, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr35 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost04, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr36 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost05, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr37 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost06, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr38 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)
                       * 1.14 AS Cost07, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr39 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost08, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr40 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost09,

                      * 1.14 AS Cost02, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr34 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost03, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr35 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost04, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr36 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost05, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr37 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost06, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr38 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)
                       * 1.14 AS Cost07, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr39 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost08, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr40 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost09, 
                      SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr41 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost10, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr42 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost) * 1.14 AS Cost11, SUM(dbo.dprqmt.fr43 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)
                       * 1.14 AS Cost12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') OR
                      (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 0) AND (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'I') AND (dbo.icitem.ldrp = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FC_VatCalc
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      'VAT Liability' AS Exp_Type, 0 AS Period01, ((dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscountable.Period01 * 14 / 114 + dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesNonDiscountable.Sales01 * 14 / 114) 
                      + dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscount.Sales01 * 14 / 114 + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_FC_PODiscountable.Cost01 * 14 / 114)) 
                      + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_FC_PONonDiscountable.Cost01 * 14 / 114)) + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPODiscountable.Cost01 * 14 / 114)) 
                      + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPONonDiscountable.Cost01 * 14 / 114)) + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcctSum.Amt * 1.14 * 14 / 114)) 
                      + - (1 * (dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumSum.January * 14 / 114))) + dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseRecoupmentsSum.January * 14 / 114 AS Period02
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesNonDiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscount CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_PODiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_PONonDiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPODiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPONonDiscountable CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseRecoupmentsSum CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcctSum CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1SumSum

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_FINAL
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_OpeningBankBalance
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesNonDiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SalesDiscount
UNION ALL
SELECT     Expr1, - 1 * (Cost01),  - 1 * (Cost02)
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_PODiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     Expr1, - 1 * (Cost01),  - 1 * (Cost02)
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_PONonDiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     Expr1, - 1 * (Cost01),  - 1 * (Cost02)
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPODiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     Expr1, - 1 * (Cost01),  - 1 * (Cost02)
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_SPONonDiscountable
UNION ALL
SELECT     'FINANCIAL POS', - 1 * sum([Amt]) * 1.14,0
FROM         [amanniquelive].[dbo].[SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcct]
WHERE     [YEAR] <= YEAR(getdate())
UNION ALL
SELECT     Exp_Type, - 1 * (Jan),  - 1 * (Feb)
FROM         [amanniquelive].[dbo].[SR_CF_FC_ExpenseBudgetsExhibit1Sum]
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_FC_ExpenseRecoupmentsSum
union all
SELECT *
  FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].[SR_CF_FC_VatCalc]

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcct]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT crefacct, YEAR(drequest) AS Year, MONTH(drequest) AS Month, SUM((nordqty - nrecqty) * ncstinctx) AS Amt
FROM         dbo.poptrs
WHERE     (nordqty > nrecqty) AND (crefacct <> '130100-2600')
GROUP BY crefacct, YEAR(drequest), MONTH(drequest)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcctSum
AS
SELECT     SUM(Amt) AS Amt
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_OpenPOsFinAcct
WHERE     (Year <= YEAR(GETDATE()))

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_CF_OpenPOsInvAcctDisc]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.poptrs.crefacct, YEAR(dbo.poptrs.drequest) AS Year, MONTH(dbo.poptrs.drequest) AS Month, SUM((dbo.poptrs.nordqty - dbo.poptrs.nrecqty) 
                      * dbo.poptrs.ncstinctx) AS Amt, dbo.icitem.ldscntble
FROM         dbo.poptrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.poptrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.poptrs.nordqty > dbo.poptrs.nrecqty) AND (dbo.poptrs.crefacct = '130100-2600') AND (dbo.icitem.ldscntble = 1)
GROUP BY dbo.poptrs.crefacct, YEAR(dbo.poptrs.drequest), MONTH(dbo.poptrs.drequest), dbo.icitem.ldscntble

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_CF_OpenPOsInvAcctDiscMonth]
AS

                      CASE WHEN month = month(getdate()) AND Year = year(getdate()) THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month1, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) AND 
                      YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 1, getdate())) THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month2, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 2, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 2, 
                      getdate())) THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month3, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 3, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 3, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month4, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 4, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month5, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 5, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month6, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 6, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month7, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 7, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month8, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 8, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month9, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 9, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month10, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 10, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month11, CASE WHEN month = month(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) AND YEAR = year(dateadd(mm, 11, getdate())) 
                      THEN amt ELSE 0 END AS Month12
FROM         dbo.SR_CF_OpenPOsInvAcctDisc

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_DiscSales
AS
SELECT     isnull(sum((aritrs.nshipqty * aritrs.nprcinctx)), 0) AS nfsalesamt, max(arinvc.ccustno) AS ccustno
FROM         arinvc LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      aritrs ON arinvc.cinvno = aritrs.cinvno AND arinvc.ccustno = aritrs.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      icitem ON aritrs.citemno = icitem.citemno
WHERE     arinvc.lgenrebate = 0 AND lvoid = 0 AND aritrs.ndiscrate NOT BETWEEN 49 AND 90 AND aritrs.ndiscrate <> 0 AND icitem.lmlm = 1.000000 AND 
                      (dinvoice >= { d '2016-02-01' } AND dinvoice <= { d '2016-02-29' })
GROUP BY arinvc.ccustno
HAVING      isnull(sum((aritrs.nshipqty * aritrs.nprcinctx)), 0) <> 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     isnull(sum((aritrsh.nshipqty * aritrsh.nprcinctx)), 0) AS nfsalesamt, max(arinvch.ccustno) AS ccustno
FROM         arinvch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      aritrsh ON arinvch.cinvno = aritrsh.cinvno AND arinvch.ccustno = aritrsh.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      icitem ON aritrsh.citemno = icitem.citemno
WHERE     arinvch.lgenrebate = 0 AND lvoid = 0 AND aritrsh.ndiscrate NOT BETWEEN 49 AND 90 AND aritrsh.ndiscrate <> 0 AND icitem.lmlm = 1.000000 AND 
                      (dinvoice >= { d '2016-02-01' } AND dinvoice <= { d '2016-02-29' })
GROUP BY arinvch.ccustno
HAVING      isnull(sum((aritrsh.nshipqty * aritrsh.nprcinctx)), 0) <> 0

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_DiscSalesSponsor
AS
SELECT     SR_DiscSalesSponsorLive.csponsor, SUM(SR_DiscSalesSum.nfsalesamt) AS nfsalesamt
FROM         SR_DiscSalesSum INNER JOIN
                      SR_DiscSalesSponsorLive ON SR_DiscSalesSum.ccustno = SR_DiscSalesSponsorLive.ccustno
GROUP BY SR_DiscSalesSponsorLive.csponsor

SELECT     ccustno, nfsalesamt
FROM         SR_DiscSalesSum
