CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_DRPMovement
AS
SELECT     'OPENING STOCK' AS Mvt, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) AS Qty01, 0 AS Sales01, sum((dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost)) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) AS Qty02, 0 AS Sales02, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) 
                      + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) AS Qty03, 0 AS Sales03, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) 
                      - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) AS Qty04, 0 AS Sales04, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34])
                       - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) AS Qty05, 0 AS Sales05, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) 
                      - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) 
                      - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) AS Qty06, 0 AS Sales06, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34])
                       - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) 
                      - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) AS Qty07, 0 AS Sales07, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) 
                      - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so06] * nstdcost) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) 
                      - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) 
                      - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - SUM([so07]) AS Qty08, 0 AS Sales08, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) 
                      - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) 
                      - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) 
                      - SUM([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - SUM([so08]) AS Qty09, 0 AS Sales09, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) 
                      + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) 
                      + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) + sum([po07]) 
                      + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - SUM([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - SUM([so08]) + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - SUM([so09]) AS Qty10, 
                      0 AS Sales10, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34])
                       - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) 
                      - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - SUM([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - SUM([so08]) + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) 
                      - sum([fr09]) - SUM([so09]) + sum([po10]) + sum([fr41]) - sum([fr10]) - SUM([so10]) AS Qty11, 0 AS Sales11, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) + sum([po10] * nstdcost) + sum([fr41] * nstdcost) - sum([fr10] * nstdcost) - sum([so10] * nstdcost) 
                      AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - SUM([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - SUM([so02]) 
                      + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - SUM([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - SUM([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - SUM([so05]) 
                      + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - SUM([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - SUM([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - SUM([so08]) 
                      + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - SUM([so09]) + sum([po10]) + sum([fr41]) - sum([fr10]) - SUM([so10]) + sum([po11]) + sum([fr42]) - sum([fr11]) - SUM([so11]) 
                      AS Qty12, 0 AS Sales12, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) + sum([po10] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr41] * nstdcost) - sum([fr10] * nstdcost) - sum([so10] * nstdcost) + sum([po11] * nstdcost) + sum([fr42] * nstdcost) - sum([fr11] * nstdcost) - sum([so11] * nstdcost) 
                      AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
UNION ALL
SELECT     'PURCHASE ORDERS', sum([po01]) AS Qty01, 0 AS Sales01, sum((po01 * nstdcost)) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, sum([po02]) AS Qty02, 0 AS Sales02, sum((po02 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum([po03]) AS Qty03, 0 AS Sales03, sum((po03 * nstdcost)) AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum([po04]) AS Qty04, 0 AS Sales04, sum((po04 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, sum([po05]) AS Qty05, 0 AS Sales05, sum((po05 * nstdcost)) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum([po06]) AS Qty06, 0 AS Sales06, sum((po06 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, sum([po07]) AS Qty07, 0 AS Sales07, sum((po07 * nstdcost)) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, sum([po08]) AS Qty08, 0 AS Sales08, sum((po08 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum([po09]) AS Qty09, 0 AS Sales09, sum((po09 * nstdcost)) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum([po10]) AS Qty10, 0 AS Sales10, sum((po10 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, sum([po11]) AS Qty11, 0 AS Sales11, sum((po11 * nstdcost)) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum([po12]) AS Qty12, 0 AS Sales12, sum((po12 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
/*where dprqmt.citemno = 'AA/00020/02'*/ UNION ALL
SELECT     'SUGGESTED POS', sum([fr32]) AS Qty01, 0 AS Sales01, sum((fr32 * nstdcost)) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, sum([fr33]) AS Qty02, 0 AS Sales02, sum((fr33 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum([fr34]) AS Qty03, 0 AS Sales03, sum((fr34 * nstdcost)) AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum([fr35]) AS Qty04, 0 AS Sales04, sum((fr35 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, sum([fr36]) AS Qty05, 0 AS Sales05, sum((fr36 * nstdcost)) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum([fr37]) AS Qty06, 0 AS Sales06, sum((fr37 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, sum([fr38]) AS Qty07, 0 AS Sales07, sum((fr38 * nstdcost)) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, sum([fr39]) AS Qty08, 0 AS Sales08, sum((fr39 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum([fr40]) AS Qty09, 0 AS Sales09, sum((fr40 * nstdcost)) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum([fr41]) AS Qty10, 0 AS Sales10, sum((fr41 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, sum([fr42]) AS Qty11, 0 AS Sales11, sum((fr42 * nstdcost)) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum([fr43]) AS Qty12, 0 AS Sales12, sum((fr43 * nstdcost)) 
                      AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
/*where dprqmt.citemno = 'AA/00020/02'*/ UNION ALL
SELECT     'SALES ORDERS', sum(- 1 * [so01]) AS Qty01, sum((so01 * nprice)) AS Sales01, sum(- 1 * (so01 * nstdcost)) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, sum(- 1 * [so02]) AS Qty02, 
                      sum((so02 * nprice)) AS Sales02, sum(- 1 * (so02 * nstdcost)) AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum([so03]) AS Qty03, sum((so03 * nprice)) AS Sales03, sum(- 1 * (so03 * nstdcost))
                       AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum([so04]) AS Qty04, sum((so04 * nprice)) AS Sales04, sum(- 1 * (so04 * nstdcost)) AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, sum([so05]) AS Qty05, 
                      sum((so05 * nprice)) AS Sales05, sum(- 1 * (so05 * nstdcost)) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum([so06]) AS Qty06, sum((so06 * nprice)) AS Sales06, sum(- 1 * (so06 * nstdcost))
                       AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, sum([so07]) AS Qty07, sum((so07 * nprice)) AS Sales07, sum(- 1 * (so07 * nstdcost)) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, sum([so08]) AS Qty08, 
                      sum((so08 * nprice)) AS Sales08, sum(- 1 * (so08 * nstdcost)) AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum([so09]) AS Qty09, sum((so09 * nprice)) AS Sales09, sum(- 1 * (so09 * nstdcost))
                       AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum([so10]) AS Qty10, sum((so10 * nprice)) AS Sales10, sum(- 1 * (so10 * nstdcost)) AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, sum([so11]) AS Qty11, 
                      sum((so11 * nprice)) AS Sales11, sum(- 1 * (so11 * nstdcost)) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum([so12]) AS Qty12, sum((so12 * nprice)) AS Sales12, sum(- 1 * (so12 * nstdcost))
                       AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
/*where dprqmt.citemno = 'AA/00020/02'*/ UNION ALL
SELECT     'FORECASTS', sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr01) AS Qty01, sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr01) AS Sales01, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr01 * nstdcost)) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, 
                      sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr02) AS Qty02, sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr02) AS Sales02, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr02 * nstdcost)) AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr03) 
                      AS Qty03, sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr03) AS Sales03, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr03 * nstdcost)) AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr04) AS Qty04, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr04) AS Sales04, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr04 * nstdcost)) AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr05) AS Qty05, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr05) AS Sales05, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr05 * nstdcost)) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr06) AS Qty06, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr06) AS Sales06, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr06 * nstdcost)) AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr07) AS Qty07, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr07) AS Sales07, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr07 * nstdcost)) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr08) AS Qty08, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr08) AS Sales08, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr08 * nstdcost)) AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr09) AS Qty09, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr09) AS Sales09, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr09 * nstdcost)) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr10) AS Qty10, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr10) AS Sales10, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr10 * nstdcost)) AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr11) AS Qty11, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr11) AS Sales11, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr11 * nstdcost)) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum(- 1 * dprqmt.fr12) AS Qty12, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr12) AS Sales12, sum(- 1 * (dprqmt.fr12 * nstdcost)) AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum ON dbo.dprqmt.fr12 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr12 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr11 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr11 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr10 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr10 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr09 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr09 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr08 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr08 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr07 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr07 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr06 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr06 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr03 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr03 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr05 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr05 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr04 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr04 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr02 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr02 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr01 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr01
UNION ALL
SELECT     'CLOSING STOCK', sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) AS Qty01, 0 AS Sales01, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) AS Qty02, 0 AS Sales02, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) AS Cost02, 0 AS GP02, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) 
                      - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) AS Qty03, 0 AS Sales03, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) 
                      AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) 
                      + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) AS Qty04, 0 AS Sales04, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) 
                      + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) 
                      + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) AS Qty05, 0 AS Sales05, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) 
                      AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) 
                      + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) 
                      + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) AS Qty06, 0 AS Sales06, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) 
                      - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) 
                      - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) 
                      - sum([so07]) AS Qty07, 0 AS Sales07, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) 
                      - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) 
                      - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) 
                      - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - sum([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - sum([so08]) AS Qty08, 0 AS Sales08, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) 
                      AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) 
                      + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) 
                      + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - sum([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) - sum([fr08]) - sum([so08]) 
                      + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - sum([so09]) AS Qty09, 0 AS Sales09, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so09] * nstdcost) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) 
                      - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) 
                      - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - sum([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) 
                      - sum([fr08]) - sum([so08]) + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - sum([so09]) + sum([po10]) + sum([fr41]) - sum([fr10]) - sum([so10]) AS Qty10, 0 AS Sales10, 
                      sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po09] * nstdcost) + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) + sum([po10] * nstdcost) + sum([fr41] * nstdcost) - sum([fr10] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so10] * nstdcost) AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) 
                      - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) 
                      - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - sum([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) 
                      - sum([fr08]) - sum([so08]) + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - sum([so09]) + sum([po10]) + sum([fr41]) - sum([fr10]) - sum([so10]) + sum([po11]) + sum([fr42]) 
                      - sum([fr11]) - sum([so11]) AS Qty11, 0 AS Sales11, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) 
                      - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost) - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost) - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po10] * nstdcost) + sum([fr41] * nstdcost) - sum([fr10] * nstdcost) - sum([so10] * nstdcost) + sum([po11] * nstdcost) + sum([fr42] * nstdcost) - sum([fr11] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so11] * nstdcost) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1) + sum([po01]) + sum([fr32]) - sum([fr01]) - sum([so01]) + sum([po02]) + sum([fr33]) 
                      - sum([fr02]) - sum([so02]) + sum([po03]) + sum([fr34]) - sum([fr03]) - sum([so03]) + sum([po04]) + sum([fr35]) - sum([fr04]) - sum([so04]) + sum([po05]) + sum([fr36]) 
                      - sum([fr05]) - sum([so05]) + sum([po06]) + sum([fr37]) - sum([fr06]) - sum([so06]) + sum([po07]) + sum([fr38]) - sum([fr07]) - sum([so07]) + sum([po08]) + sum([fr39]) 
                      - sum([fr08]) - sum([so08]) + sum([po09]) + sum([fr40]) - sum([fr09]) - sum([so09]) + sum([po10]) + sum([fr41]) - sum([fr10]) - sum([so10]) + sum([po11]) + sum([fr42]) 
                      - sum([fr11]) - sum([so11]) + sum([po12]) + sum([fr43]) - sum([fr12]) - sum([so12]) AS Qty12, 0 AS Sales12, sum(dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.Expr1 * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po01] * nstdcost) + sum([fr32] * nstdcost) - sum([fr01] * nstdcost) - sum([so01] * nstdcost) + sum([po02] * nstdcost) + sum([fr33] * nstdcost) - sum([fr02] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so02] * nstdcost) + sum([po03] * nstdcost) + sum([fr34] * nstdcost) - sum([fr03] * nstdcost) - sum([so03] * nstdcost) + sum([po04] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr35] * nstdcost) - sum([fr04] * nstdcost) - sum([so04] * nstdcost) + sum([po05] * nstdcost) + sum([fr36] * nstdcost) - sum([fr05] * nstdcost) - sum([so05] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po06] * nstdcost) + sum([fr37] * nstdcost) - sum([fr06] * nstdcost) - sum([so06] * nstdcost) + sum([po07] * nstdcost) + sum([fr38] * nstdcost) - sum([fr07] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so07] * nstdcost) + sum([po08] * nstdcost) + sum([fr39] * nstdcost) - sum([fr08] * nstdcost) - sum([so08] * nstdcost) + sum([po09] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([fr40] * nstdcost) - sum([fr09] * nstdcost) - sum([so09] * nstdcost) + sum([po10] * nstdcost) + sum([fr41] * nstdcost) - sum([fr10] * nstdcost) - sum([so10] * nstdcost) 
                      + sum([po11] * nstdcost) + sum([fr42] * nstdcost) - sum([fr11] * nstdcost) - sum([so11] * nstdcost) + sum([po12] * nstdcost) + sum([fr43] * nstdcost) - sum([fr12] * nstdcost)
                       - sum([so12] * nstdcost) AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_FCDetail
AS
SELECT     dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo, 'FORECASTS' AS Expr1, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr01) AS Qty01, dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr01 AS Sales01, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr01 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost))
                       AS Cost01, 0 AS GP01, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr02) AS Qty02, dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr02 AS Sales02, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr02 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost02, 
                      0 AS GP02, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr03) AS Qty03, dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr03 AS Sales03, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr03 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost03, 0 AS GP03, 
                      - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr04) AS Qty04, dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr04 AS Sales04, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr04 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost04, 0 AS GP04, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr05) 
                      AS Qty05, dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr05 AS Sales05, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr05 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost05, 0 AS GP05, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr06) AS Qty06, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr06 AS Sales06, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr06 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost06, 0 AS GP06, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr07) AS Qty07, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr07 AS Sales07, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr07 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost07, 0 AS GP07, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr08) AS Qty08, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr08 AS Sales08, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr08 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost08, 0 AS GP08, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr09) AS Qty09, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr09 AS Sales09, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr09 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost09, 0 AS GP09, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr10) AS Qty10, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr10 AS Sales10, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr10 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost10, 0 AS GP10, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr11) AS Qty11, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr11 AS Sales11, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr11 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost11, 0 AS GP11, - (1 * dbo.dprqmt.fr12) AS Qty12, 
                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr12 AS Sales12, - (1 * (dbo.dprqmt.fr12 * dbo.icitem.nstdcost)) AS Cost12, 0 AS GP12
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN

                      dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum ON dbo.dprqmt.fr12 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr12 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr11 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr11 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr10 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr10 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr09 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr09 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr08 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr08 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr07 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr07 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr06 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr06 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr03 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr03 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr05 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr05 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr04 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr04 AND dbo.dprqmt.fr02 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr02 AND 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr01 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr01

AS

                      dbo.dprqmt.fr37, dbo.dprqmt.fr38, dbo.dprqmt.fr39, dbo.dprqmt.fr40, dbo.dprqmt.fr41, dbo.dprqmt.fr42, dbo.dprqmt.fr43
FROM         dbo.miboml INNER JOIN

SELECT     '4' AS No, 'SALES ORDERS' AS Mvt, dbo.miboml.citemno, dbo.miboml.ccompno, dbo.dprqmt.so01, dbo.dprqmt.so02, dbo.dprqmt.so03, dbo.dprqmt.so04,

UNION ALL
SELECT     '5' AS No, 'FORECASTS' AS Mvt, dbo.miboml.citemno, dbo.miboml.ccompno, dbo.dprqmt.fr01, dbo.dprqmt.fr02, dbo.dprqmt.fr03, dbo.dprqmt.fr04, dbo.dprqmt.fr05, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.fr06, dbo.dprqmt.fr07, dbo.dprqmt.fr08, dbo.dprqmt.fr09, dbo.dprqmt.fr10, dbo.dprqmt.fr11, dbo.dprqmt.fr12
FROM         dbo.miboml INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dprqmt ON dbo.miboml.ccompno = dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo
UNION ALL
SELECT     '6' AS No, 'CLOSING STOCK' AS Mvt, dbo.miboml.citemno, dbo.miboml.ccompno, dbo.dprqmt.in01, dbo.dprqmt.in02, dbo.dprqmt.in03, dbo.dprqmt.in04, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.in05, dbo.dprqmt.in06, dbo.dprqmt.in07, dbo.dprqmt.in08, dbo.dprqmt.in09, dbo.dprqmt.in10, dbo.dprqmt.in11, dbo.dprqmt.in12
FROM         dbo.miboml INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dprqmt ON dbo.miboml.ccompno = dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo
UNION ALL
SELECT     '7' AS No, 'SAFETY STOCK' AS Mvt, dbo.miboml.citemno, dbo.miboml.ccompno, dbo.dprqmt.ss01, dbo.dprqmt.ss02, dbo.dprqmt.ss03, dbo.dprqmt.ss04, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.ss05, dbo.dprqmt.ss06, dbo.dprqmt.ss07, dbo.dprqmt.ss08, dbo.dprqmt.ss09, dbo.dprqmt.ss10, dbo.dprqmt.ss11, dbo.dprqmt.ss12
FROM         dbo.miboml INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dprqmt ON dbo.miboml.ccompno = dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo
UNION ALL
SELECT     '8' AS No, 'EXCESS(SHORTAGE)' AS Mvt, dbo.miboml.citemno, dbo.miboml.ccompno, dbo.dprqmt.in01 - dbo.dprqmt.ss01, dbo.dprqmt.in02 - dbo.dprqmt.ss02, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.in03 - dbo.dprqmt.ss03, dbo.dprqmt.in04 - dbo.dprqmt.ss04, dbo.dprqmt.in05 - dbo.dprqmt.ss05, dbo.dprqmt.in06 - dbo.dprqmt.ss06, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.in07 - dbo.dprqmt.ss07, dbo.dprqmt.in08 - dbo.dprqmt.ss08, dbo.dprqmt.in09 - dbo.dprqmt.ss09, dbo.dprqmt.in10 - dbo.dprqmt.ss10, 
                      dbo.dprqmt.in11 - dbo.dprqmt.ss11, dbo.dprqmt.in12 - dbo.dprqmt.ss12
FROM         dbo.miboml INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dprqmt ON dbo.miboml.ccompno = dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_ManItemsMvtOrderBy
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_Monthly
AS
SELECT     'fr01' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate()) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr02' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 30) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr03' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 60) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr04' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 90) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr05' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 120) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr06' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 150) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr07' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 180) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr08' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 210) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr09' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 240) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr10' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 270) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr11' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 270) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     'fr12' AS Period, SUM(ndollars) AS Amount
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
WHERE     month(getdate() + 300) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) + 1 = year(denddate) + 1

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN month(getdate()) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr01, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 30) 
                      = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr02, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 60) = month(denddate) AND 
                      year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr03, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 90) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) 
                      THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr04, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 120) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS fr05, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 150) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate()) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr06, 
                      CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 180) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate() + 1) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr07, CASE WHEN month(getdate()
                       + 210) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate() + 1) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr08, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 240) = month(denddate) 
                      AND year(getdate() + 1) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr09, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 270) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate() + 1) 
                      = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr10, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 300) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate() + 1) = year(denddate) 
                      THEN SUM(ndollars) ELSE 0 END AS fr11, CASE WHEN month(getdate() + 330) = month(denddate) AND year(getdate() + 1) = year(denddate) THEN SUM(ndollars) 
                      ELSE 0 END AS fr12
FROM         dbo.dpibdg
GROUP BY dEndDate

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum
AS
SELECT     SUM(fr01) AS fr01, SUM(fr02) AS fr02, SUM(fr03) AS fr03, SUM(fr04) AS fr04, SUM(fr05) AS fr05, SUM(fr06) AS fr06, SUM(fr07) AS fr07, SUM(fr08) AS fr08, SUM(fr09) 
                      AS fr09, SUM(fr10) AS fr10, SUM(fr11) AS fr11, SUM(fr12) AS fr12
FROM         dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_Test
AS

FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN

                      dbo.dprqmt.fr03 = dbo.SR_FC_Monthly1Sum.fr03

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_FC_VendorPOs
AS
SELECT     'PURCHASE ORDER' AS Mvt, apvend.cVendNo, apvend.ccompany, dprqmt.cItemNo, icitem.cdescript, po01 AS Qty01, po02 AS Qty02, po03 AS Qty03, po04 AS Qty04, 
                      po05 AS Qty05, po06 AS Qty06, po07 AS Qty07, po08 AS Qty08, po09 AS Qty09, po10 AS Qty10, po11 AS Qty11, po12 AS Qty12
FROM         dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      icitem ON dprqmt.cItemNo = icitem.citemno LEFT JOIN
                      apvend ON icitem.cVendNo = apvend.cVendNo
WHERE     apvend.cvendno IS NOT NULL and icitem.cstatus = 'A' or (icitem.cstatus = 'I' and icitem.ldrp = 1)
UNION ALL
SELECT     'SUGGESTED POS' AS Mvt, apvend.cVendNo, apvend.ccompany, dprqmt.cItemNo, icitem.cdescript, fr32 AS Qty01, fr33 AS Qty02, fr34 AS Qty03, fr35 AS Qty04, 
                      fr36 AS Qty05, fr37 AS Qty06, fr38 AS Qty07, fr39 AS Qty08, fr40 AS Qty09, fr41 AS Qty10, fr42 AS Qty11, fr43 AS Qty12
FROM         dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      icitem ON dprqmt.cItemNo = icitem.citemno LEFT JOIN
                      apvend ON icitem.cVendNo = apvend.cVendNo
WHERE     apvend.cvendno IS NOT NULL and icitem.cstatus = 'A' or (icitem.cstatus = 'I' and icitem.ldrp = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_GrSales
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate BETWEEN 49 AND 90 THEN ((dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx) * (dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate / 100)) 
                      ELSE dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx END), 2) AS nPSalesAmt
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE       dbo.arinvch.dinvoice between '2013-12-01 00:00:00.000' 
and '2013-12-31 00:00:00.000'  and (dbo.aritrsh.citemno <> 'MLM') AND (dbo.aritrsh.citemno IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1
                            WHERE      (lmlm = 1)))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.ccustno
union all
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.ccustno, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate BETWEEN 49 AND 90 THEN ((dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx) * (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate / 100)) 
                      ELSE dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx END), 2) AS nPSalesAmt
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE       dbo.arinvc.dinvoice between '2013-12-01 00:00:00.000' 
and '2013-12-31 00:00:00.000'  and (dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1
                            WHERE      (lmlm = 1)))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_GrSalesSum
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(nPSalesAmt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.SR_GrSales
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_IC_Balance
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 0 AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.glabal
WHERE     (cacctid BETWEEN '140200-2600        ' AND '143200-2600        ') AND (cyear = '2010')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_IC_QtyWhs
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_IC_Sumicicst
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS nonhand
FROM         dbo.icicst
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_icicst
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS nonhand, SUM(nonhand * ncost) AS ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icicst
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_iciwhs
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS Expr1, SUM(ntotcost) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
WHERE     (nonhand <> 0)
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_iciwhs_icicst
AS
SELECT     dbo.SR_icicst.citemno AS Expr1, dbo.SR_icicst.nonhand, dbo.SR_icicst.ntotcost, dbo.SR_iciwhs.citemno, dbo.SR_iciwhs.Expr1 AS Expr2, 
                      dbo.SR_iciwhs.Expr2 AS Expr3
FROM         dbo.SR_icicst INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_iciwhs ON dbo.SR_icicst.citemno = dbo.SR_iciwhs.citemno AND dbo.SR_icicst.nonhand = dbo.SR_iciwhs.Expr1 AND 
                      dbo.SR_icicst.ntotcost = dbo.SR_iciwhs.Expr2

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_Inv_Compare
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_Inv_Lines.cinvno, dbo.SR_Inv_Lines.ccustno, dbo.SR_Inv_Lines.SalesAmt, dbo.SR_Inv_Header.nSalesAmt, 
                      dbo.SR_Inv_Header.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.SR_Inv_Lines INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_Inv_Header ON dbo.SR_Inv_Lines.cinvno = dbo.SR_Inv_Header.cinvno AND dbo.SR_Inv_Lines.SalesAmt <> dbo.SR_Inv_Header.nSalesAmt
ORDER BY dbo.SR_Inv_Header.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[SR_Inv_Header]
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ccustno, dinvoice, nsalesamt - ndiscamt
+ (ntaxamt1 - nfrttax1)
--- nadjamt 
--+ ntaxamt1
AS nSalesAmt
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2010-05-01 00:00:00.000') --AND (nfrtamt = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_Inv_Lines
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ccustno, SUM(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS SalesAmt
FROM         dbo.aritrs
GROUP BY cinvno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_InvCostCompare
AS
SELECT     dbo.SR_InvKitCost.clineitem, dbo.SR_InvKitCost.ncost, dbo.SR_InvLineCost.clineitem AS Expr1, dbo.SR_InvLineCost.Cost
FROM         dbo.SR_InvKitCost INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_InvLineCost ON dbo.SR_InvKitCost.clineitem = dbo.SR_InvLineCost.clineitem AND dbo.SR_InvKitCost.ncost <> dbo.SR_InvLineCost.Cost

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_InvKitCost
AS
SELECT     clineitem, SUM(nqty * ncost) AS ncost
FROM         dbo.arsktr
GROUP BY clineitem

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_InvLineCost
AS
SELECT     clineitem, SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS Cost
FROM         dbo.aritrs
GROUP BY clineitem

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_KitItemPrices
AS
SELECT DISTINCT citemno, cdescript,  Datename(month, dinvoice) AS Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) AS Year, dinvoice, nprice
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
WHERE     dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000' AND lstock = 1 AND citemno BETWEEN '1020000' AND '3220004'
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT citemno, cdescript, Datename(month, dinvoice) AS Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) AS Year, dinvoice, nprice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000' AND lstock = 1 AND citemno BETWEEN '1020000' AND '3220004'

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_KitQty
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT 'INVCKIT' AS trstype, dbo.arsktr.citemno, dbo.arsktr.cwarehouse, dbo.arsktr.cbin, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.arsktr.nqty AS qty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.clineitem
FROM         dbo.arsktr INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arsktr.clineitem = dbo.aritrs.clineitem AND dbo.arsktr.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-12-12 00:00:00.000' AND '2011-02-27 00:00:00.000')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_KitQtyH
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT 'INVCKIT' AS trstype, dbo.arsktrh.citemno, dbo.arsktrh.cwarehouse, dbo.arsktrh.cbin, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.arsktrh.nqty AS qty, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.clineitem
FROM         dbo.arsktrh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arsktrh.clineitem = dbo.aritrsh.clineitem AND dbo.arsktrh.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.arsktrh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-12-12 00:00:00.000' AND '2011-02-27 00:00:00.000')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_KitQtySum
AS
SELECT     trstype, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, SUM(qty) AS qty
FROM         dbo.SR_KitQty
GROUP BY trstype, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                  rbtmlm.ccustno, RTRIM(rbtmlm.csponsor) AS csponsor, rbtmlm.csponsor0, rbtmlm.cstatus1, rbtmlm.cLevel, rbtmlm.cstatus, rbtmlm.ltl, rbtmlm.nSalesamt, rbtmlm.ngsalesdisc, rbtmlm.nsalesdisc, rbtmlm.ngsalesamt, 
                  rbtmlm.nrebate, dbo.fn_starter(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) ngrebateamt, rbtmlm.ccompany, rbtmlm.cphone1, rbtmlm.cphone2, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL 
                  THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust_1.caddr1, 
                  arcust_1.caddr2, LEFT(arcust_1.ccity,20) ccity, arcust_1.cstate, arcust_1.czip, arcust_1.ccountry, rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtl.nrebateamt, arcust_1.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, arcust_1.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust_1.lemail, 
                  CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, SR_MLM_Level1.Expr1 AS Rebate, SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1, SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor AS Sponsor1, arcust.dstarter AS dcreate, 
                  dbo.fn_starter(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) lnew
FROM     arcust INNER JOIN
                  rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                  rbtmlm ON rebatedtl.ccustno = rbtmlm.csponsor INNER JOIN
                  arcust AS arcust_1 ON rbtmlm.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno ON arcust.ccustno = rbtmlm.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  SR_MLM_Level1 ON rbtmlm.csponsor = SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor AND rbtmlm.ccustno = SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  VW_MLM_PSales ON rbtmlm.csponsor = VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno
WHERE  (rebatedtl.ccustno = rebatedtl.csponsor)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                  rebatedtl.ccustno, rebatedtl.csponsor, rebatedtl.csponsor0, rebatedtl.cstatus1, rebatedtl.cLevel, rebatedtl.cstatus, rebatedtl.lTL, 0 AS nsalesamt, rebatedtl.ngSalesDisc, 0 AS nSalesDisc, rebatedtl.nGSalesAmt, 
                  rebatedtl.nrebate, dbo.fn_starter(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) ngrebateamt, arcust.ccompany, arcust.cphone1, arcust.cphone2, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL 
                  THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, 
                  LEFT(arcust.ccity,20) ccity, arcust.cstate, arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtl.nrebateamt, arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 
                  111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, 0 AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, '' AS Expr3, arcust.dstarter AS dcreate, dbo.fn_starter(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) lnew
FROM     arcust INNER JOIN
                  rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                  VW_MLM_PSales ON rebatedtl.ccustno = VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno ON arcust.ccustno = rebatedtl.ccustno
WHERE  (rebatedtl.csponsor NOT IN
                      (SELECT csponsor
                       FROM      rbtmlm)) AND (rebatedtl.ccustno = rebatedtl.csponsor) AND (rebatedtl.ccustno BETWEEN '100000' AND '699999')
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno, RTRIM(amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor) AS Expr1, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor0, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus1, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.cLevel, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ltl, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.nSalesamt, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesdisc, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.nsalesdisc, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesamt, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.nrebate, dbo.fn_starternam(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) ngrebateamt, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.cphone1, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.cphone2, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL 
                  THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust_1.caddr1, arcust_1.caddr2, arcust_1.ccity, arcust_1.cstate, arcust_1.czip, arcust_1.ccountry, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.nrebateamt, arcust_1.cemail, 'Nam' AS Co, arcust_1.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust_1.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) 
                  AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.Expr1 AS Rebate, amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1, amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor AS Sponsor1, 
                  arcust.dstarter AS dcreate, dbo.fn_starternam(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) lnew
FROM     amanniquenam.dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm ON amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor INNER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno ON amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1 ON amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor AND 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales ON amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno
WHERE  (rebatedtl.ccustno = rebatedtl.csponsor)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor0, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus1, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.cLevel, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.lTL, 0 AS nsalesamt, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ngSalesDisc, 0 AS nSalesDisc, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.nGSalesAmt, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.nrebate, dbo.fn_starternam(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) ngrebateamt, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cphone1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cphone2, 
                  CASE WHEN amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt, CASE WHEN amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL 
                  THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.caddr1, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.caddr2, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccity, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cstate, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.czip, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccountry, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.nrebateamt, 
                  amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cemail, 'Nam' AS Co, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, 
                  0 AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, '' AS Expr3, amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.dstarter AS dcreate, dbo.fn_starternam(arcust.ccustno, getdate()) lnew
FROM     amanniquenam.dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                  amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales ON amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno ON amanniquenam.dbo.arcust.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno
WHERE  (amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor NOT IN
                      (SELECT csponsor
                       FROM      amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm)) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor) AND (amanniquenam.dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno BETWEEN '100000' AND '699999')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSales
AS
SELECT     csponsor, SUM(nSalesamt) - SUM(nPSalesAmt) AS Sales
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM
WHERE     (Co = 'SA') AND (custstatus = 'A') AND (lemail = 1) AND (cemail <> '')
GROUP BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSales0
AS
SELECT     csponsor, Sales
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSales
WHERE     (Sales = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLMCheckSalesNam
AS
SELECT     csponsor, SUM(nSalesamt) - SUM(nPSalesAmt) AS Sales
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM
WHERE     (Co = 'Nam') AND (custstatus = 'A') AND (lemail = 1) AND (cemail <> '')
GROUP BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSalesNam0
AS
SELECT     csponsor, Sales
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_CheckSalesNam
WHERE     (Sales = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_GrpSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor, SUM(dbo.SR_DiscSalesSum.nfsalesamt) AS Amt, dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno
FROM         dbo.rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_DiscSalesSum ON dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = dbo.SR_DiscSalesSum.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor, dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_Historical
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno, RTRIM(rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor) AS csponsor, rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor0, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus1, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cLevel, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ltl, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nSalesamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesdisc, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nsalesdisc, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nrebate, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngrebateamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccompany, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone1, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone2, arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, arcust.ccity, arcust.cstate, arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), 
                      GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AS Expr2, 
                      SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1, SR_MLM_Level1_History.Expr1 AS Expr3, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.GRsales, arcust_1.dcreate
FROM         SR_MLM_Personal_Historical INNER JOIN
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY INNER JOIN
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY ON rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      arcust ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = arcust.ccustno ON SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.csponsor = rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND 
                      SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      arcust AS arcust_1 ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = arcust_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.csponsor AND 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.cLevel1 AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.date LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Level1_History ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = SR_MLM_Level1_History.date AND rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1
WHERE     (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor0, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus1, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cLevel, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus, rebatedtlMONTHLY.lTL, 0 AS nsalesamt, rebatedtlMONTHLY.ngSalesDisc, 0 AS nSalesDisc, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nGSalesAmt, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebate, 0 AS nGrebateamt, arcust.ccompany, arcust.cphone1, arcust.cphone2, arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, 
                      arcust.ccity, arcust.cstate, arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, 
                      arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, '' AS Expr4, 0 AS Expr3, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, 0 AS Expr5, arcust.dcreate
FROM         arcust INNER JOIN
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY ON arcust.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Personal_Historical ON arcust.ccustno = SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.ccustno AND SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112)
WHERE     ((rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111)) NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), dmonth, 111) AS Expr1
                            FROM          rbtmlmMONTHLY)) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno BETWEEN '100000' AND 
                      '699999')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csponsor, cLevel1, SUM(nGrebateamt) AS Expr1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dmonth, 112) AS date, SUM(nGSalesAmt) AS GRsales, cLevel
FROM         dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY
WHERE     (cLevel1 <> '') AND (cLevel = 'Level 1')
GROUP BY csponsor, cLevel1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dmonth, 112), nGSalesAmt, cLevel
ORDER BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_Test
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno, RTRIM(dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor) AS csponsor, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor0, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus1, 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cLevel, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ltl, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.nSalesamt, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesdisc,

                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, dbo.arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) 
                      AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AS Expr2,

                      = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno ON dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.csponsor = dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales ON dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.cLevel1 AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112)

                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.date AND dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1
WHERE     (dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor0, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus1, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cLevel, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus, rebatedtlMONTHLY.lTL, 0 AS nsalesamt, rebatedtlMONTHLY.ngSalesDisc, 0 AS nSalesDisc, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nGSalesAmt,
