                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, dbo.arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) 
                      AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, '', 0 AS Expr3, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, 0
FROM         arcust INNER JOIN
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY ON arcust.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Personal_Historical ON arcust.ccustno = SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.ccustno AND dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112)
WHERE     ((rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111)) NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), dmonth, 111) AS Expr1
                            FROM          rbtmlmMONTHLY)) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt <> 0) AND 
                      (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno BETWEEN '100000' AND '599999')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SR_MLM_Level1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csponsor, cLevel1, SUM(nGrebateamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.rebatedtl
WHERE     (cLevel1 <> '')
GROUP BY csponsor, cLevel1
ORDER BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT csponsor, cLevel1, SUM(nGrebateamt) AS Expr1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dmonth, 112) AS date
FROM         dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY
WHERE     (cLevel1 <> '')
GROUP BY csponsor, cLevel1, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dmonth, 112)
ORDER BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, csponsor, nsalesamt AS PSales, nSalesDisc AS PSalesDisc, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dmonth, 112) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY
WHERE     (csponsor = ccustno)
ORDER BY csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLM_RebateLevel1
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno, RTRIM(dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor) AS csponsor, dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor0, dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus1, dbo.rbtmlm.cLevel, dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus, dbo.rbtmlm.ltl, 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.nSalesamt, dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesdisc, dbo.rbtmlm.nsalesdisc, dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesamt, dbo.rbtmlm.nrebate, dbo.rbtmlm.ngrebateamt, 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.ccompany, dbo.rbtmlm.cphone1, dbo.rbtmlm.cphone2, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt,
                       CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, dbo.arcust.caddr1, 
                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, dbo.rebatedtl.nrebateamt, 
                      dbo.arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.Expr1, dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1, dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor AS Rebate
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Level1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rbtmlm ON dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno ON dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.csponsor = dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Level1.cLevel1 = dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_MLM_PSales ON dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor) AND (dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = '200002')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_MLMTest
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.ccustno, RTRIM(dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor) AS csponsor, dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor0, dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus1, dbo.rbtmlm.cLevel, dbo.rbtmlm.cstatus, dbo.rbtmlm.ltl, 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.nSalesamt, dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesdisc, dbo.rbtmlm.nsalesdisc, dbo.rbtmlm.ngsalesamt, dbo.rbtmlm.nrebate, dbo.rbtmlm.ngrebateamt, 
                      dbo.rbtmlm.ccompany, dbo.rbtmlm.cphone1, dbo.rbtmlm.cphone2, CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesAmt IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesAmt END AS nPSalesAmt,
                       CASE WHEN VW_MLM_PSales.nPSalesDisc IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE nPSalesDisc END AS nPSalesDisc, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, dbo.arcust.caddr1, 
                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.rebatedtl.cstatus AS Status, dbo.rebatedtl.nrebateamt, 
                      dbo.arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, 
                      dbo.rebatedtl.lTL AS Expr1, dbo.rebatedtl.cLevel AS Expr2, dbo.rebatedtl.cLevel1
FROM         dbo.VW_MLM_PSales RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.rebatedtl INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rbtmlm ON dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno ON dbo.VW_MLM_PSales.ccustno = dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor
WHERE     (dbo.rebatedtl.ccustno = dbo.rebatedtl.csponsor) AND (dbo.rbtmlm.csponsor = '200002')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_RMA_Invoice
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.arcust.ctaxfld1, dbo.arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.dorder, dbo.arinvc.cbaddr1,
                       dbo.arinvc.cbaddr2, dbo.arinvc.cbcity, dbo.arinvc.cbstate, dbo.arinvc.cbzip, dbo.arinvc.cbcountry, dbo.arinvc.cbphone, dbo.arinvc.cbcontact, dbo.arinvc.cscompany, 
                      dbo.arinvc.csaddr1, dbo.arinvc.csaddr2, dbo.arinvc.cscity, dbo.arinvc.csstate, dbo.arinvc.cszip, dbo.arinvc.cscountry, dbo.arinvc.csphone, dbo.arinvc.cscontact, 
                      dbo.arinvc.cpono, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.cmeasure, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS TaxAmt, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS SalesAmt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS DiscAmt, dbo.aritrs.cshipno, dbo.arcust.cemail, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.arinvc.crmano, dbo.ractrs.cinvno AS OrigInv, dbo.rartcd.nrtrntype, dbo.ractrs.cuid
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ractrs ON dbo.aritrs.crmano = dbo.ractrs.crmano AND dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.ractrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rartcd ON dbo.ractrs.crtrncode = dbo.rartcd.crtrncode
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.crmano <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SalesView
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Expr1, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Expr2, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.arikit.citemno AS Expr3, dbo.arikit.nqty, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arikit ON dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arikit.clineitem
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2009-07-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2011-08-01 00:00:00.000')

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SalesViewKits
AS
SELECT     dbo.arikit.citemno AS ItemNo, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MONTH, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS YEAR, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.arikit.nqty) AS SalesQty
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arikit ON dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arikit.clineitem
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2009-07-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2011-07-31 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY dbo.arikit.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SalesViewKitsOnly
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MONTH, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS YEAR, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.lstock = 1) AND (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2009-07-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2011-07-31 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), dbo.aritrs.nshipqty

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SO_Compare
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_SO_Header.csono, dbo.SR_SO_Header.ccustno, dbo.SR_SO_Header.dorder, dbo.SR_SO_Header.SalesAmt, 
                      dbo.SR_SO_Lines.SalesAmt AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.SR_SO_Header INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_SO_Lines ON dbo.SR_SO_Header.csono = dbo.SR_SO_Lines.csono AND dbo.SR_SO_Header.SalesAmt <> dbo.SR_SO_Lines.SalesAmt
ORDER BY dbo.SR_SO_Header.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SO_Header
AS
SELECT     csono, ccustno, dorder, nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1 AS SalesAmt
FROM         dbo.sosord

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SO_Lines
AS
SELECT     csono, ccustno, drequest, SUM(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS SalesAmt
FROM         dbo.sostrs
GROUP BY csono, ccustno, drequest

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_SPOQtys
AS
SELECT     dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo, dbo.dprqmt.fr32 AS SPOQty, dbo.icitem.nstdcost
FROM         dbo.dprqmt INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dprqmt.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_StandardItemPriceListAdV
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices.Month, dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices.Year, dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices.nprice, 
                      dbo.ad1.ad
FROM         dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ad1 ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ad1.Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_StandardItemPrices
AS
select distinct citemno, cdescript,  Datename(month, dinvoice) as Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) as Year,  nprice 
FROM         
dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
where dinvoice between '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' and '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000'
and lstock = 1
and citemno between 'AA/00020/02' and 'AS/50001/09'


union all

select distinct citemno, cdescript, Datename(month, dinvoice) as Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) as Year,  nprice
FROM         
dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
where dinvoice between '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' and '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000'
and lstock = 1
and citemno between 'AA/00020/02' and 'AS/50001/09'

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_stocktake
AS
SELECT     dbo.SR_bin.citemno, dbo.SR_bin.cwarehouse, dbo.SR_bin.Expr1
FROM         dbo.SR_bin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_whs ON dbo.SR_bin.citemno = dbo.SR_whs.citemno AND dbo.SR_bin.cwarehouse = dbo.SR_whs.cwarehouse AND dbo.SR_bin.Expr1 <> dbo.SR_whs.Expr1

CREATE VIEW dbo.sr_view
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.June10Fcst.citemno, dbo.June10Fcst.nunits, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate, dbo.dpibdg.nDollars, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.June10Fcst INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dpibdg ON dbo.June10Fcst.citemno = dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate = '2010-06-30 00:00:00.000')
ORDER BY dbo.June10Fcst.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.SR_whs
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.st_arinvc
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.lkititem, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, CASE WHEN dbo.icikit.nqty IS NULL THEN dbo.aritrs.nshipqty ELSE dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty END AS QTY, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cshipno, CASE WHEN ccompno IS NULL THEN citemno ELSE ccompno END AS item
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-05-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.st_compare
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.ictrsn.ctrsno, dbo.st_arinvc.cshipno, dbo.ictrsn.nqty, dbo.st_arinvc.QTY, dbo.st_arinvc.item
FROM         dbo.ictrsn RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.st_arinvc ON dbo.ictrsn.ctrsno = dbo.st_arinvc.cshipno AND dbo.ictrsn.citemno = dbo.st_arinvc.item
WHERE     (dbo.ictrsn.ctrsno IS NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.st_ictrsn
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ctrstype AS Expr1, citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nqty) AS Qty, COUNT(cuid) AS Expr2, cbin
FROM         dbo.ictrsn
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, ctrstype
HAVING      (ctrstype NOT IN ('INVC', 'SHIP'))
ORDER BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cust_Pur
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno, SUM(dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt) AS 'Total Bought'
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'STAFF') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.arcust.ccurrcode = 'ZAR') AND (DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) = DATENAME(month, 
                      GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) = DATENAME(year, GETDATE()))
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.STD_Rep
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nonhand * dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.t1
AS
SELECT     SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item = dbo.icitem.citemno
union all
SELECT     SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2
where item not in (select citemno from icitem)

CREATE VIEW dbo.t9
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Bud3.cyear, dbo.CB_Bud3.Month, dbo.CB_Bud3.date, '' AS MainGroup, 'General Ledger' AS Sub, dbo.CB_Bud3.cacctid, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcll, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcl, dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, 
                      CASE WHEN (LEFT(cb_bud3.cacctid, 6) = '480000') THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (ccatgtype = 'Income') THEN 'Sales' WHEN (glacct.cdescript = 'Discount Allowed')
                       THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN ((ccatgtype = 'Cost of Sales') AND (LEFT(cb_bud3.cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))) 
                      THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (ccatgtype = 'Other Income') THEN 'Other Income' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Main_Group, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype
FROM         dbo.CB_Bud3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.CB_Bud3.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Bud3.Company IN ('1.SA', '2.Export')) AND (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype) NOT IN ('Asset 1', 'Asset 2', 'Asset 3', 'Liability 1', 'Liability 2', 'Liability 3'))
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_Bud3.cyear, dbo.CB_Bud3.Month, dbo.CB_Bud3.date, '' AS MainGroup, 'General Ledger' AS Sub, dbo.CB_Bud3.cacctid, 
                      dbo.glacct.cdescript, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcll, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcl, dbo.CB_Bud3.Budget AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, 
                      CASE WHEN (LEFT(cb_bud3.cacctid, 6) = '480000') THEN 'Consultant Rebates' WHEN (ccatgtype = 'Income') THEN 'Sales' WHEN (glacct.cdescript = 'Discount Allowed')
                       THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN ((ccatgtype = 'Cost of Sales') AND (LEFT(cb_bud3.cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))) 
                      THEN 'Cost of Sales' WHEN (ccatgtype = 'Other Income') THEN 'Other Income' ELSE 'Expense' END AS Main_Group, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype
FROM         dbo.CB_Bud3 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.CB_Bud3.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.CB_Bud3.Company IN ('3.NAM')) AND (RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype) NOT IN ('Asset 1', 'Asset 2', 'Asset 3', 'Liability 1', 'Liability 2', 'Liability 3'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.test
AS
SELECT     cacctid, cdescript, SUM(debit) AS debit, SUM(credit) AS credit, DATENAME(year, dtrs) AS year, DATENAME(month, dtrs) AS month
FROM         dbo.test1
WHERE     (RTRIM(cacctid) = '211500-2600')
GROUP BY cacctid, cdescript, DATENAME(year, dtrs), DATENAME(month, dtrs)

CREATE VIEW dbo.test1
AS
SELECT     cacctid, cdescript, dtrs, CASE WHEN (ntrsamt > 0) THEN ntrsamt ELSE 0 END AS debit, CASE WHEN (ntrsamt < 0) THEN ntrsamt ELSE 0 END AS credit
FROM         dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (dtrs > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dtrs < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-06-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.test11
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS April, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS August, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS September, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS December, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS January, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt12 AS March, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype, 
                      dbo.glcatg.cdescript AS Type, dbo.glcatg.cfdescript, dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
FROM         dbo.glabal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabal.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1', 'L2')) AND cyear < '2012' AND cyear <> '2010'
UNION ALL

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabalh.cyear, dbo.glabalh.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabalh.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt0, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt1 AS April, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt2 AS May, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt3 AS June, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt4 AS July, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt5 AS August, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt6 AS September, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt7 AS October, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt8 AS November, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt9 AS December, 
                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt10 AS January, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt11 AS February, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt12 AS March, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype, 
                      dbo.glcatg.cdescript AS Type, dbo.glcatg.cfdescript, dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
FROM         dbo.glabalh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.glabalh.cacctid = dbo.glacct.cacctid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid
WHERE     (dbo.glcatg.ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1', 'L2')) AND cyear < '2012'

UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.glabal.cyear, dbo.glabal.cacctid, dbo.glacct.cdescript, LEFT(dbo.glabal.cacctid, 6) AS Segment1, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt0, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt2 AS April, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt3 AS May, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt4 AS June, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt5 AS July, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt6 AS August, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt7 AS September, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt8 AS October, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt9 AS November, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS December, 
                      dbo.glabal.ncpdamt11 AS January, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt1 AS March, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype,

                      dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt11 AS January, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt12 AS February, dbo.glabalh.ncpdamt1 AS March, '1.SA' AS Company, dbo.glcatg.ccatgtype,

CREATE VIEW dbo.test1456
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.test96
AS
SELECT      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code AS crevenacct,
 SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Non Discountable' AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader ON LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ctrsno)) = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.invoice AND 
                      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.Company INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno AND dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company
WHERE     LEFT(gl_code, 6) NOT IN ('490000', '480000', '460000')
GROUP BY  dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code
UNION ALL
SELECT      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code AS crevenacct,
 SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Other' AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item NOT IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1)) AND LEFT(gl_code, 6) NOT IN ('490000', '480000', '460000') AND dbo.AG_REP_AR2.company = '1.SA'
GROUP BY  dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.test97
AS
SELECT      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code AS crevenacct,
 SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Non Discountable' AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader ON LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ctrsno)) = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.invoice AND 
                      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.Company INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno AND dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company
WHERE     LEFT(gl_code, 6) NOT IN ('490000', '480000', '460000')
GROUP BY  dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code
UNION ALL
SELECT      dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code AS crevenacct,
 SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR2.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Other' AS Discountable
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code = dbo.glacct.cacctid
WHERE     (dbo.AG_REP_AR2.Item NOT IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1)) AND LEFT(gl_code, 6) NOT IN ('490000', '480000', '460000') AND dbo.AG_REP_AR2.company = '1.SA'
GROUP BY  dbo.AG_REP_AR2.GL_Code
union all
SELECT      LTRIM(RTRIM(gltrsn.cacctid)) AS Gl_Code, 
                      SUM(gltrsn.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Other' AS Rec_Group
FROM         gltrsn INNER JOIN
                      glacct ON gltrsn.cacctid = glacct.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      glcatg ON glacct.ccatgid = glcatg.ccatgid

                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          icitem)) AND (LEFT(gltrsn.cacctid, 6) NOT IN ('480000', '490000'))
GROUP BY 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(gltrsn.cacctid))

CREATE VIEW dbo.test98
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT DATENAME(year, dbo.gltfer.dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.gltfer.dtrs) AS Month, dbo.arcust.cclass, CASE WHEN (LEFT(gltfer.cdescript, 4) 
                      = 'RTRN') THEN rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) ELSE rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 7, 20)) END AS Item, RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.gltfer.cacctid)) AS GL_Code, 
                      LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.glcatg.cdescript)) AS Main_Group, dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, dbo.gltfer.cdescript, dbo.gltfer.cobjno, dbo.gltfer.creference, 
                      dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltfer ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.gltfer.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.gltfer.dtrs > '2008/12/31') AND (dbo.glcatg.cdescript IN ('Cost of Sales                 ', 'Cost of Goods Sold                 ')) AND (dbo.gltfer.dtrs BETWEEN 
                      '2012/02/01' AND '2012/02/29')

CREATE VIEW dbo.testb
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN (LEFT(gltfer.cdescript, 4) = 'RTRN') THEN rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) ELSE rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) END AS Item, 
                      SUM(dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt) AS Expr1, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.gltfer.ctrsno)) AS Invoice
FROM         dbo.glacct INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltfer ON dbo.glacct.cacctid = dbo.gltfer.cacctid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glcatg ON dbo.glacct.ccatgid = dbo.glcatg.ccatgid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno ON dbo.gltfer.ctrsno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.gltfer.dtrs BETWEEN '2011/10/01' AND '2011/10/31') AND (dbo.gltfer.cacctid = '300100-0000')
GROUP BY dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, CASE WHEN (LEFT(gltfer.cdescript, 4) = 'RTRN') THEN rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) 
                      ELSE rtrim(substring(gltfer.cdescript, 13, 20)) END

CREATE VIEW dbo.teszst
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS [Sponsor Code], dbo.arcust.ccompany AS [Sponsor Name], arcust_2.ccustno AS Code, arcust_2.ccompany AS Name, 
                      arcust_2.dcreate AS [Date Join], DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Years, DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) AS Months, 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Expr1 AS AmountL2, 'Level2' AS Heading, AG_Levels_Sales1_1.Expr1, arcust_1.ccustno
FROM         dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 AS AG_Levels_Sales1_1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor ON AG_Levels_Sales1_1.ccustno = arcust_1.ccustno AND 
                      AG_Levels_Sales1_1.Years = DATENAME(year, arcust_1.dcreate) AND AG_Levels_Sales1_1.Months = DATENAME(month, arcust_1.dcreate) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.ccustno = arcust_2.ccustno AND dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Years = DATENAME(year, arcust_2.dcreate) AND 
                      dbo.AG_Levels_Sales1.Months = DATENAME(month, arcust_2.dcreate) ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_2.dcreate BETWEEN '2011/02/01' AND '2012/12/31')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top_Item_Sales1
AS

FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts4
WHERE     (ccustno <> 'NUM') AND (dinvoice > '2010/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2011/04/01')
GROUP BY year, Component_Code, Component_Desc
UNION ALL
SELECT     year, Component_Code AS citemno, Component_Desc AS Description, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2009' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts4
WHERE     (ccustno <> 'NUM') AND (dinvoice > '2009/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2010/04/01')
GROUP BY year, Component_Code, Component_Desc
UNION ALL
SELECT     year, Component_Code AS citemno, Component_Desc AS Description, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2008' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discounts4
WHERE     (ccustno <> 'NUM') AND  (dinvoice > '2008/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2009/04/01')
GROUP BY year, Component_Code, Component_Desc

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top20_ItemSales
AS

FROM         dbo.Top20_ItemSales2

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top20_ItemSales2
AS
SELECT     year, citemno, Description, NIV, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year
ORDER BY niv DESC) AS RANK
FROM         dbo.Top_Item_Sales1

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top20_Region_Sales1
AS
SELECT     year, Region, SUM(NIV) AS NIV
FROM         dbo.Region_Sales
GROUP BY year, Region

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top20_Region_Sales2
AS
SELECT     year, Region, NIV, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY year
ORDER BY niv DESC) AS RANK

CREATE VIEW dbo.TOP20_TL1
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2010' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2010/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2011/04/01') AND ccustno <> 'NUM'
GROUP BY ccustno, ccompany
UNION ALL
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2009' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2009/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2010/04/01') AND ccustno <> 'NUM'
GROUP BY ccustno, ccompany
UNION ALL
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, SUM([Net Invoice Value]) AS NIV, '2008' AS Years
FROM         dbo.CB_Discount_Item
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2008/03/31') AND (dinvoice < '2009/04/01') AND ccustno <> 'NUM'
GROUP BY ccustno, ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.Top20TL2
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, (NIV) AS NIV, Years, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY years

FROM         dbo.TOP20_TL1

CREATE VIEW dbo.Tot_con

FROM         dbo.SA_NAM_Cust
WHERE     (Status = 'A') AND (Class = 'CONSULTANT')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Tot_Sale
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month,                       CASE WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2005/03/31' AND arinvc.dinvoice < '2006/04/01') THEN '2005' WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2006/03/31' AND 
                      arinvc.dinvoice < '2007/04/01') THEN '2006' WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND arinvc.dinvoice < '2008/04/01') 
                      THEN '2007' WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/03/31' AND arinvc.dinvoice < '2009/04/01') THEN '2008' WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2009/03/31' AND 
                      arinvc.dinvoice < '2010/04/01') THEN '2009' WHEN (arinvc.dinvoice > '2010/03/31' AND arinvc.dinvoice < '2011/04/01') THEN '2010' END AS Financial_Year, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Yaer, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month,                       CASE WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2005/03/31' AND arinvch.dinvoice < '2006/04/01') THEN '2005' WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2006/03/31' AND 
                      arinvch.dinvoice < '2007/04/01') THEN '2006' WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND arinvch.dinvoice < '2008/04/01') 
                      THEN '2007' WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/03/31' AND arinvch.dinvoice < '2009/04/01') THEN '2008' WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2009/03/31' AND 
                      arinvch.dinvoice < '2010/04/01') THEN '2009' WHEN (arinvch.dinvoice > '2010/03/31' AND arinvch.dinvoice < '2011/04/01') THEN '2010' END AS Financial_Year,dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) 
                      AS Month,                      CASE WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2005/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2006/04/01') THEN '2005' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2006/03/31' AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2007/04/01') THEN '2006' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2008/04/01') 
                      THEN '2007' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2008/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2009/04/01') THEN '2008' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2009/03/31' AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2010/04/01') THEN '2009' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '2010/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < '2011/04/01') THEN '2010' END AS Financial_Year, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, '2.NAM' AS Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, DATENAME(year, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Yaer, DATENAME(month, amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) 
                      AS Month,                       CASE WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2005/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2006/04/01') THEN '2005' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2006/03/31' AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2007/04/01') THEN '2006' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2007/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2008/04/01') 
                      THEN '2007' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2008/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2009/04/01') THEN '2008' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2009/03/31' AND 
                      amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2010/04/01') THEN '2009' WHEN (amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '2010/03/31' AND amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice < '2011/04/01') THEN '2010' END AS Financial_Year,amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, '2.NAM' AS Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh ON amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.trans
AS
select citemno, ctrsno, SUM(nqty) as qty from ictrsn where ctrstype = 'ITRF' group by citemno, ctrsno
union all
select citemno, ctrsno, SUM(nqty) as qty from ictrsnh where ctrstype = 'ITRF' group by citemno, ctrsno

CREATE VIEW dbo.transfer
AS
select citemno1, ctrfno, SUM(ntrfqty1) as trf from icitrf group by citemno1, ctrfno
union all
select citemno1, ctrfno, SUM(ntrfqty1) as trf from icitrfh group by citemno1, ctrfno

CREATE VIEW dbo.TT1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_S1.citemno, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([units]) / counts ELSE SUM([units]) END AS Units, 
                      CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 100]) / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 100]) END AS [RSP 100], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) 
                      THEN SUM([discount promo]) / counts ELSE SUM([Discount Promo]) END AS [Discount Promo], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 80]) 
                      / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 80]) END AS [RSP 80], CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([discount 25]) / counts ELSE SUM([discount 25]) END AS [Discount 25], 
                      CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([Net Invoice Value]) / counts ELSE SUM([Net Invoice Value]) END AS [Net Invoice Value], dbo.AG_S1.year, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.month, dbo.AG_S1.Company, dbo.AG_S1.date, dbo.AG_S1.cdescript, dbo.AG_S1.crevnacc, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([Total_Cost]) 
                      / counts ELSE SUM([Total_Cost]) END AS [Total Cost], dbo.AG_S1.Export_Cust, dbo.AG_S1.Promotion, 0 AS nqtylimit, dbo.AG_Item.nprice, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_S1.ccustno, dbo.AG_S1.ccompany, dbo.AG_S1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_S1.dinvoice, dbo.AG_S1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_S1.spon, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Item.nstdcost, dbo.AG_S1.cclass, dbo.AG_S1.Cust_Class, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nDiscount, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpageno, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cclass AS Expr1, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cgfttype, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpagepos, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nversion, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lfree, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lspecial, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lportal, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.csponcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lInactive, CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([VAT]) / counts ELSE SUM([VAT]) END AS VAT, 
                      CASE WHEN (counts IS NOT NULL) THEN SUM([rsp 80 Excl]) / counts ELSE SUM([rsp 80 Excl]) END AS [RSP 80 Excl], dbo.AG_Item.lmlm, dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble, 
                      CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) 
                      < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END AS S1
FROM         dbo.AG_S1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2 ON dbo.AG_S1.month = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.month AND dbo.AG_S1.year = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.year AND 
                      dbo.AG_S1.citemno = dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Item ON dbo.AG_S1.citemno = dbo.AG_Item.citemno AND dbo.AG_S1.Company = dbo.AG_Item.Company
WHERE     (dbo.AG_S1.dinvoice BETWEEN '2013/06/01' AND '2013/06/30')
GROUP BY dbo.AG_S1.citemno, dbo.AG_S1.year, dbo.AG_S1.month, dbo.AG_S1.Company, dbo.AG_S1.date, dbo.AG_S1.cdescript, dbo.AG_S1.crevnacc, dbo.AG_S1.Export_Cust, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.Promotion, dbo.AG_Item.nprice, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nPriceExl, dbo.AG_S1.ccustno, dbo.AG_S1.ccompany, dbo.AG_S1.cslpnno, dbo.AG_S1.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.AG_S1.Warehouse, dbo.AG_S1.spon, dbo.AG_S1.cinvno, dbo.AG_Item.nstdcost, dbo.AG_S1.cclass, dbo.AG_S1.Cust_Class, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nDiscount, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpageno, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cmajorcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cclass, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cgfttype, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cSpontype, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.cpagepos, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.nversion, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lfree, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lspecial, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lportal, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.csponcat, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.lInactive, dbo.AG_Item.lmlm, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dfrom2, dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.dto2, dbo.AG_Item.ldscntble, 
                      dbo.CB_NEW_CAMP2.Counts, CASE WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) > 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'FULL' WHEN (dfrom2 IS NULL) 
                      THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN (datediff(day, dfrom2, dto2) < 20 AND dfrom2 IS NOT NULL) THEN 'NOT FULL' END

CREATE VIEW dbo.Unapp
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, cdepno, cpaycode, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, npaidamt - nappamt AS Expr1, csono, centerby
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (cpaycode NOT LIKE 'POS%') AND (csono = ' ') AND (npaidamt <> nappamt) and cdepno <> 'VOID' and dpaid < '2011-08-01'
union all
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, cdepno, cpaycode, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, npaidamt - nappamt AS Expr1, csono, centerby
FROM         dbo.arcashh
WHERE     (cpaycode NOT LIKE 'POS%') AND (csono = ' ') AND (npaidamt <> nappamt) and cdepno <> 'VOID' and dpaid < '2011-08-01'
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Unapp_SO
AS
SELECT     ccustno, dpaid, npaidamt, nappamt, csono, SO_Cust, SO_Num, dorder, nsalesamt, ntaxamt1, ndiscamt, [SO Amt#]
FROM         dbo.Unapplied_SO
WHERE     (dorder = GETDATE())

CREATE VIEW dbo.Unapplied_SO
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.dpaid, dbo.arcash.npaidamt, dbo.arcash.nappamt, dbo.arcash.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno AS SO_Cust, 
                      dbo.sosord.csono AS SO_Num, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.nsalesamt, dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1, dbo.sosord.ndiscamt, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt AS 'SO Amt#'
FROM         dbo.arcash INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.arcash.ccustno = dbo.sosord.ccustno AND dbo.arcash.npaidamt = dbo.sosord.nsalesamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.lprtlist = '1') AND (dbo.arcash.csono = ' ')
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.Unposted_Journals
AS
SELECT     cuid, cjeid, cacctid, cdescript
FROM         dbo.glunje
WHERE     (dtrs = GETDATE())

CREATE VIEW dbo.Vend_PO
AS
SELECT     cpono, cvendno, citemno, cdescript, cwarehouse, dreceive, datename(year, dreceive) as Year, datename(month, dreceive) as Month, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, nrecamt, nrecqty, nboqty
FROM         dbo.portrs
union all
SELECT     cpono, cvendno, citemno, cdescript, cwarehouse, dreceive, datename(year, dreceive) as Year, datename(month, dreceive) as Month, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, nrecamt, nrecqty, nboqty
FROM         dbo.portrsh

CREATE VIEW dbo.Vend_TOT
AS
SELECT     cpono AS PO, cvendno AS Vendor, citemno AS Item, cdescript AS Description, cwarehouse AS Warehouse, dreceive AS RecDate, Year, Month, SUM(nrecqty) 
                      AS RecQTY, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Discount, SUM(ntaxamt1) AS Tax, SUM(nrecamt) AS Value, SUM(nrecamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS [Tot Value]
FROM         dbo.Vend_PO
GROUP BY cpono, cvendno, citemno, cdescript, cwarehouse, dreceive, Year, Month

CREATE VIEW dbo.View_1
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.CustNo, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.CustName, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.ShipVia AS [Ship via], 
                      dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.Weight AS [GW weight], dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.WaybillNo AS [FW_Waybill no], dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.cColour AS FW, 
                      dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.SaleValue AS [Sales value], dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS [Invoice date], dbo.arinvc.csstate, dbo.arinvc.cszip, dbo.arinvc.cscountry, 
                      dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.InvNo
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-07-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.View_2
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.crevision, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.nordqty
FROM        dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.dcreate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2019-10-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AE/08384/19         ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.View_DRP_Total
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT No, Attr, cVendNo, citemno, cWarehouse, cDescript, cClass, cProdLine, cType, cPeriod, dFirstPeriod, nLeadTime, nSafetyTime, nreordqty, 
                      nreordpt, nprice, nCost, nstdcost, Qty00, Sales00, Cost00, GP00, Qty01, Sales01, Cost01, GP01, Qty02, Sales02, Cost02, GP02, Qty03, Sales03, Cost03, GP03, Qty04, 
                      Sales04, Cost04, GP04, Qty05, Sales05, Cost05, GP05, Qty06, Sales06, Cost06, GP06, Qty07, Sales07, Cost07, GP07, Qty08, Sales08, Cost08, GP08, Qty09, Sales09, 
                      Cost09, GP09, Qty10, Sales10, Cost10, GP10, Qty11, Sales11, Cost11, GP11, Qty12, Sales12, Cost12, GP12, Qty13, Sales13, Cost13, GP13, Qty14, Sales14, Cost14, 
                      GP14, tcPeriod
FROM         dbo.View_DRP
ORDER BY citemno, No

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_12MonthSales
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS MonthSales, COUNT(DISTINCT Invoicemonth) AS MonthFreq, COUNT(DISTINCT cinvno) AS MonthOrders
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (DATEDIFF(month, Invoicemonth, Currentmonth) <= 12) AND (crevnacc LIKE '300%') AND (CustomerClass = 'consultant') AND (Invoicemonth < CAST(Currentmonth AS date))
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_13to24MonthSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS MonthSales, COUNT(DISTINCT Invoicemonth) AS MonthFreq, COUNT(DISTINCT cinvno) AS MonthOrders
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (DATEDIFF(month, Invoicemonth, Currentmonth) > 12) AND (DATEDIFF(month, Invoicemonth, Currentmonth) <= 24) AND (crevnacc LIKE '300%') AND (CustomerClass = 'consultant') AND (Invoicemonth < CAST(Currentmonth AS date))
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_2020_90Days
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS Value, dinvoice, dstarter, MAX(DATEDIFF(d, dstarter, dinvoice)) AS Days
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'm%')) AND (DATEDIFF(d, dstarter, dinvoice) <= 90) AND (dstarter >= '2020-01-01')
GROUP BY ccustno, dinvoice, dstarter
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_allNewCampKits
AS
SELECT     dbo.Campaign.cMonthName, dbo.Campaign.iMonth, dbo.Campaign.iYear, dbo.Campaign.dFrom, dbo.Campaign.dTo, dbo.CampDetail.cItemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.CampDetail.nQtyLimit, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice, dbo.CampDetail.nRsp, dbo.icitem.ctype, 
                  dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.nprice AS icPrice, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS icCost, dbo.icikit.ccompno, icitem_1.cdescript AS CompDescrip, icitem_1.nstdcost AS CompCost, icitem_1.nprice AS CompPrice, icitem_1.nprcinctx AS CompPRSP, dbo.icitem.lkititem, 
                  dbo.icikit.nqty AS KitQty, dbo.icikit.ncost AS KitCost
FROM        dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                  dbo.CampDetail ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CampDetail.cItemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.Campaign ON dbo.CampDetail.CampaignID = dbo.Campaign.ID
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_April_Point
AS
SELECT     ccustno, Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS CustValue
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (ldscntble = 1) AND (Invoicemonth >= '2017/04/01') AND (crevnacc LIKE '300%')
GROUP BY ccustno, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_April_Progress
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.csponsor AS Sponosr, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.ccustno AS Customer, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.Invoicemonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.ltl, dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.CustValue AS SponCustVal, 
                      dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.InvValue AS SponInvVal, dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.NewRecs AS SponRecruits, vm_April_TotPonts_1.CustValue, vm_April_TotPonts_1.InvValue, 
                      vm_April_TotPonts_1.NewRecs, vm_April_TotPonts_1.Invoicemonth AS Expr1, dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.Invoicemonth AS Expr2, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.company
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_April_TotPonts AS vm_April_TotPonts_1 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.ccustno = vm_April_TotPonts_1.ccustno AND 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.Invoicemonth = vm_April_TotPonts_1.Invoicemonth LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_April_TotPonts ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.csponsor = dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.ccustno AND 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.Invoicemonth = dbo.vm_April_TotPonts.Invoicemonth
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.Invoicemonth = CONVERT(DATETIME, '2017-04-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND 
                      (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_DailyStructure.company = N'SA')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_April_TotPonts
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_April_Point.ccustno, dbo.vm_April_Point.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_April_Point.CustValue, dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.csponsor, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.Invoicemonth AS Expr1, dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.InvValue, dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.NewRecs
FROM         dbo.vm_April_Point LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits ON dbo.vm_April_Point.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.vm_April_Point.Invoicemonth = dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits.Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_AR_custBirthPart
AS
SELECT        ccustno, ccompany, cIdNo, cGender, cRace, dBBDate, IIF(LEFT(cIdno, 1) = '_', SUBSTRING(cIdno, 2, 6), SUBSTRING(cIDno, 1, 6)) AS BirthPart, IIF(LEFT(cIdno, 1) = '_', SUBSTRING(cIdno, 2, 2), SUBSTRING(cIDno, 
                         1, 2)) AS Birthyear, cstatus
FROM            dbo.arcust
WHERE        cclass = 'Consultant' and    (sUBSTRING(cIDno, 
                         1, 2)<> '') AND (sUBSTRING(cIDno, 
                         1, 2) < 'A')  and (sUBSTRING(cIDno, 
                         1, 2)  <> '°0')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_arcust_and_Upline
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS CustName, dbo.arcust.cphone2 AS CustPhone, dbo.arcust.dstarter AS CustStart, arcust_1.ccustno AS Sponsor, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponsorName, 
                         arcust_1.cphone2 AS SponsorPhone, arcust_1.cemail AS SponsoreMail, arcust_1.dstarter AS SponsorStar, dbo.arcust.cemail AS CusteMail, dbo.arcust.cstatus
FROM            dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ARCustBirhAge
AS
SELECT        Sponsor, cIdNo, NewBirhYear, YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear AS CustAge, CASE WHEN YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear < 35 THEN ' 1.  Less 35 Years' WHEN YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear >= 35 AND 
                         YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear < 45 THEN ' 2. 35 - 44 Years' WHEN YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear >= 45 AND YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear < 55 THEN ' 3. 45 - 54 Years' WHEN YEAR(GETDATE()) 
                         - NewBirhYear >= 55 AND YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear < 65 THEN ' 4. 55 - 64 Years' WHEN YEAR(GETDATE()) - NewBirhYear >= 55 THEN '5.  65+ Years' ELSE 'Unkown' END AS AgeGroup, Birthday
FROM            dbo.vm_ARcustBirhday2

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ARcustBirhday2
AS
SELECT        ccustno AS Sponsor, cIdNo, CASE WHEN Birthyear < 20 THEN 2000 + Birthyear WHEN Birthyear >= 20 THEN 1900 + Birthyear ELSE 1 END AS NewBirhYear, cGender, dBBDate, Birthday, cRace, Birthyear
FROM            dbo.vm_ARcustBirthday
WHERE        (Birthyear <> '') AND (Birthyear < 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ARcustBirthday
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, ccompany, cIdNo, cGender, cRace, dBBDate, SUBSTRING(BirthPart, 1, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(BirthPart, 3, 2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(BirthPart, 5, 2) AS Birthday, cstatus, BirthPart, 
                         Birthyear
FROM            dbo.vm_AR_custBirthPart
WHERE        (BirthPart <> '') AND (BirthPart < 'A')

SELECT     compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.ID, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.RRPointsID, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.cCustno, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.nPoints, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.lmultiple, 
                  compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.Description, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.cinvno, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.iYear, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.iMonth, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.ccampno, 
                  compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.clineuid, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.nShipQty AS PP_ship, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.nSalesamtInc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ctype AS cclass, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cprodline, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ctype1, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ctype2, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ctype3, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.cSppruid, compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.nPoints * 0.033334 AS PointValue
FROM        compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON compplanLive.dbo.vm_RRpointsdetail.clineuid = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cuid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_CampdetialItemLevelSpon
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.nprice <> 0 THEN ROUND(dbo.CampDetail.nPrice * (icitem_1.nprice / dbo.icitem.nprice), 2) 
                  ELSE dbo.icitem.nprice END AS nPrice, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, dbo.icikit.ckititemno AS DocNumber, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType, 
                  dbo.CampDetail.dFrom, dbo.CampDetail.dTo
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
union all
SELECT     dbo.CampDetail.cItemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice AS nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, 
                  dbo.CampDetail.cItemno AS DocNumber, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom, dbo.CampDetail.dTo
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_CampQtyChanges
AS
SELECT        dbo.changescam.cUid, dbo.changescam.cCampno, dbo.changescam.cUid_Camp, dbo.changescam.cTable, dbo.changescam.nVersion, dbo.changescam.citemno, dbo.changescam.cfieldname, 
                         dbo.changescam.coldvalue, dbo.changescam.cnewvalue, dbo.changescam.InsUpdDate, dbo.changescam.cuser, dbo.changescam.cAction, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.socamp.nTarget, 
                         dbo.socamp.nMinSales, dbo.socamp.lactive, dbo.socamp.ldrp
FROM            dbo.changescam INNER JOIN
                         dbo.socamp ON dbo.changescam.cCampno = dbo.socamp.cCampNo
WHERE        (dbo.changescam.cfieldname = 'NQTYLIMIT') AND (dbo.socamp.dFrom >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2020-01-01 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                         (dbo.changescam.cfieldname = 'NFRCSQTY')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ConsultantGroups
AS
SELECT        dbo.TradeGroupCust.cCustno, dbo.TradeGroupCust.TradeGroupID, dbo.TradeGroupCust.iYear, dbo.TradeGroupCust.iMonth, dbo.TradeGroupCust.Trades, dbo.TradeGroupCust.Recruits, dbo.TradeGroupCust.New, 
                         dbo.TradeGroupCust.dStarter, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.TradeGroupCust.LastTraded) - 1), dbo.TradeGroupCust.LastTraded) AS datetime) AS LastTraded, 
                         DATEFROMPARTS(dbo.TradeGroupCust.iYear, dbo.TradeGroupCust.iMonth, '01') AS Invoicemonth, dbo.TradeGroup.GroupName, dbo.TradeGroup.Description
FROM            dbo.TradeGroupCust INNER JOIN
                         dbo.TradeGroup ON dbo.TradeGroupCust.TradeGroupID = dbo.TradeGroup.ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_cp_CustandUpline
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcust.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS CustNAme, dbo.arcust.cphone2 AS CustPhone, dbo.arcust.dstarter AS CustStart, arcust_1.ccustno AS SponNo, 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName, arcust_1.cphone2 AS SponPhone, arcust_1.cemail AS Sponemail, arcust_1.dstarter AS SponStart, 
                      dbo.arcust.cemail AS Custemail
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_CustomerOnHold
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cstatus, dbo.arcust.lhold, dbo.changes.cfieldname, dbo.changes.codlvalue, dbo.changes.cnewvalue, dbo.changes.InsUpdDate, dbo.changes.cuser, 
                         dbo.arcust.nbalance
FROM            dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                         dbo.changes ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.changes.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.changes.cfieldname = 'lhold') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.arcust.lhold = 1) AND (dbo.changes.cnewvalue = '1')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_DuplicateSellPrice
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icuprc.citemno, dbo.icuprc.cdescript, dbo.icuprc.cusername, dbo.icuprc.dlastupd, dbo.icuprc.dspstart, dbo.icuprc.dspend, dbo.icuprc.nprice, dbo.icuprc.nprcinctx, dbo.icuprc.nstdcost, dbo.icuprc.ctype, dbo.icuprc.cuid, dbo.icuprc.lupdated, 
                  dbo.icitem.cdescript AS ItemDesrip
FROM        dbo.icuprc INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.icuprc.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icuprc.dspstart > '2023-06-30') AND (dbo.icuprc.ctype = 'S') AND (dbo.icuprc.dspstart < '2024-07-01') AND (dbo.icuprc.nprice <> 0) AND (dbo.icuprc.citemno IN
                      (SELECT     citemno
                       FROM        dbo.icuprc AS icuprc_1
                       WHERE     (ctype = 'S') AND (dspstart > '2023-06-30') AND (dspstart < '2024-07-01') AND (nprice <> 0)
                       GROUP BY citemno, dspstart
                       HAVING     (COUNT(*) > 1)))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_FSRedeem
AS
SELECT     SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS GWPValue, crevnacc, Invoicemonth
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= '2021/07/01') AND (crevncode = 'MLM-000')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, crevnacc

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_GWPValue
AS
SELECT     SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS GWPValue, crevnacc, Invoicemonth
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= '2022/07/01') AND (crevncode = 'SAL-004')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, crevnacc

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_iciwhsmonth_all
AS
SELECT        cuid, citemno, cperiod, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cwarehouse, csernum, cinvtacc, cintracc, crevncode, dlastrecv, dlastrepd, nsafestock, nreordpt, nreordqty, nonhand, nonorder, ninprocess, nallocate, nbook, 
                         nintransit, ncost, nlrecvcost, ntotcost, nlrepdcost, nrmaonhand, nrmacost, nreprcost, dmonth, dyear, csponcat, CASE WHEN dmonth = 'January' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /01/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'February' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /02/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'March' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /03/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'April' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /04/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'May' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /05/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'June' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /06/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'July' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /07/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'August' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /08/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'September' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /09/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'October' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /10/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'November' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /11/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'December' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /12/01' AS Date) END AS Invoicemonth
FROM            dbo.iciwhs_monthly
WHERE        (dyear >= 2019)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_iciwhsMonthly
AS
SELECT        cuid, citemno, cperiod, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cwarehouse, csernum, cinvtacc, cintracc, crevncode, dlastrecv, dlastrepd, nsafestock, nreordpt, nreordqty, nonhand, nonorder, ninprocess, nallocate, nbook, 
                         nintransit, ncost, nlrecvcost, ntotcost, nlrepdcost, nrmaonhand, nrmacost, nreprcost, dmonth, dyear, csponcat, CASE WHEN dmonth = 'January' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /01/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'February' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /02/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'March' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /03/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'April' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /04/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'May' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /05/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'June' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /06/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'July' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /07/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'August' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /08/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'September' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /09/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'October' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /10/01' AS Date) 
                         WHEN dmonth = 'November' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /11/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'December' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /12/01' AS Date) END AS Invoicemonth
FROM            dbo.iciwhs_monthly
WHERE        (dyear >= 2019) AND (cwarehouse = '4400 ')

                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cclass, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nversion, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dto, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cuid, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.lportal, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.lInactive, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty,

                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr.lfree, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cpageno, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cgfttype, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cSpontype, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cpagepos, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cProdLine, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cRevnCode, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nQtylimit,

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_KS_PersonalSales
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor AS Sponsor, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno AS Customer, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cLevel AS [Level], Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth AS Structuremonth, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ltl, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS SponsorName1, dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.ccompany AS CustomerName, 
                      dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.SalesValue, dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.UplineName
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.ccustno AND 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth = dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines.Invoicemonth INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.company = 'SA')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_KS_PersonSalesLines
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccompany, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty) 
                      AS SalesValue, arcust_1.ccompany AS UplineName
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lmlm = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ldscntble = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth >= '2014/12/01')
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccompany, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, arcust_1.ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_m_fw_lablesVSinvoices
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID, dbo.fw_items.cLabelno, dbo.fw_items.cColour, dbo.soship.dship, dbo.soship.cscity, dbo.soship.cszip, 
                      dbo.soship.cbcompany,
                          (SELECT     MAX(cinvno) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.aritrs
                            WHERE      (cshipno = dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno)) AS cInvno, dbo.fw_consignment.cManifestid
FROM         dbo.fw_items LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.fw_consignment ON dbo.fw_items.cConsignmentID = dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno = dbo.soship.cshipno
union all

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID, dbo.fw_items.cLabelno, dbo.fw_items.cColour, dbo.soshiph.dship, dbo.soshiph.cscity, dbo.soshiph.cszip, 
                      dbo.soshiph.cbcompany,
                          (SELECT     MAX(cinvno) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.aritrsh
                            WHERE      (cshipno = dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno)) AS cInvno, dbo.fw_consignment.cManifestid
FROM         dbo.fw_items LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.fw_consignment ON dbo.fw_items.cConsignmentID = dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soshiph ON dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno = dbo.soshiph.cshipno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Active2
AS
SELECT     ccustno, InvoiceMonth, SUM(nsalesamt) AS InvValue, Month3Start
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_active3
GROUP BY ccustno, InvoiceMonth, Month3Start

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_active3
AS
SELECT     ccustno, dinvoice, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dinvoice) - 1), dinvoice) AS InvoiceMonth, DATEADD(day, - 60, dinvoice) 
                      AS Month3, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, DATEADD(day, - 60, dinvoice)) - 1), DATEADD(day, - 60, dinvoice)) AS Month3Start, cinvno
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices
WHERE     (cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (dinvoice >= '2013/01/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_active4
AS
SELECT     ccustno, CASE WHEN year(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE())) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, 
                      GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE())) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS MCurrent, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 1, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, 
                      GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 1, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) 
                      = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month1, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 2, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) 
                      = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 2, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) 
                      THEN InvValue END AS Month_2, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 3, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND 
                      month(DATEADD(month, - 3, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_3, 
                      CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 4, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 4, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_4, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 5, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 5, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) 
                      - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_5, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 6, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), 
                      GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 6, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) 
                      THEN InvValue END AS Month_6, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 7, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND 
                      month(DATEADD(month, - 7, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_7, 
                      CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 8, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 8, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_8, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 9, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 9, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) 
                      - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_9, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 10, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), 
                      GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 10, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) 
                      THEN InvValue END AS Month_10, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 11, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND 
                      month(DATEADD(month, - 11, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_11, 
                      CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 12, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 12, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_12, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 13, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 13, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) 
                      - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_13, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 14, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) 
                      - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 14, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) 
                      THEN InvValue END AS Month_14, CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 15, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND 
                      month(DATEADD(month, - 15, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_15, 
                      CASE WHEN YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 16, DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = year(InvoiceMonth) AND month(DATEADD(month, - 16, 
                      DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()))) = month(InvoiceMonth) THEN InvValue END AS Month_16, InvoiceMonth, GETDATE() AS Updatedate, 
                      'Type' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_Active2

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_ActiveCheck
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, MAX(dbo.arcust.cstatus) AS Expr1, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty) 
                      AS Expr2, dbo.arcust.dstarter
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno
WHERE     (NOT (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno LIKE 'm%')) AND (NOT (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno LIKE 'j%')) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth >= '2015/11/01') AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth < '2016/11/01')
GROUP BY dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.dstarter

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_AllItemTypeSales
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno AS InvNo, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno AS ItemNo, dbo.arcust.cclass AS CustomerClass, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.icitem.ctype, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'BODYCARE' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Bodycare', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'COSMETICS' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Cosmetics', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'FINE FRAGR' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Fine Fragr', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'HISTORIC' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Historic', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'LIFESTYLE' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Lifestyle', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'MARKETING' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Marketing', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'PREMIUM' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'Premium', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'SALES AID' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'SalesAid', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.ctype = 'SKINCARE' THEN (DBO.VM_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) END AS 'SKincare'
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno NOT LIKE 'j%') AND (dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno NOT LIKE 'm%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_AllItemTypeSales1
AS
SELECT     InvNo, CustNo, SUM(nsalesamt) AS SalesAmnt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS DiscAmt, SUM(nshipqty) AS ShipQty, SUM(Bodycare) AS Bodycare, SUM(Cosmetics) AS Cosmetics, 
                      SUM([Fine Fragr]) AS FineFragr, SUM(Historic) AS Historic, SUM(Lifestyle) AS Lifestyle, SUM(Marketing) AS Marketing, SUM(Premium) AS Premium, SUM(SalesAid) 
                      AS SalesAid, SUM(SKincare) AS Skincare
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_AllItemTypeSales
GROUP BY InvNo, CustNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_allmainfinv
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ccustno, SUM(DiscountPromo) AS DiscountPromo, SUM(RSP) AS RSP, SUM(Discount25) AS Discount25, SUM(NetInvoiceValue) AS Nettinv, SUM(VAT) AS Vat, 
                      SUM([RSP EXCL]) AS RSPEXCL, SUM(TotalCost) AS TotalCost
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF
GROUP BY cinvno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_AllpprsalesperItem
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt) AS nsaleamt, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) AS ndisamt, 
                      SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty) AS nshipqty, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ncost * dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty) AS TotalCost, 
                      SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nprice * dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty) AS TotalRSP, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.csppruid, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.csppruid, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice
ORDER BY dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_APAgeing
AS
SELECT     cvendno, cinvno, cref, cdescript, dinvoice, ninvamt AS Amount, nbalance AS Balance, Invoicemonth, 'Invoices' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_AllAPInv


Union all
SELECT     cvendno, cinvno, cchgtrsno AS cref, ' ' AS cdescript, dpaid AS dinvoice, nfapplyamt
 AS Amount, 0 AS Balance, Invoicemonth, 'Payment' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_APPayments

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_APPayments
AS
SELECT     cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cinvtype, cbankno, cchkno, ccardvend, cchgtrsno, cbankname, cbankacct, cbnkroute, ctogl, dpaid, nchkamt, neamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, ncbkamt, 
                      ntaxwhamt, napplyamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nfcbkamt, nftaxwhamt, nfapplyamt, ninvcxrate, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dpaid) - 1), dpaid) 
                      AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth
FROM         dbo.apcapp

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_April_L1Recruits
AS
SELECT        csponsor, Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS InvValue, COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS NewRecs
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (ldscntble = 1) AND (dstarter >= '2017/04/01') AND (dstarter <= '2017/04/20')
GROUP BY csponsor, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_arcust_prov
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Provice, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.dstarter, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.arcust.dstarter) 
                      - 1), dbo.arcust.dstarter) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.arcust.czip
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.PostalCode = dbo.arcust.czip
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'Consultant') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_arcust_Status_Priov
AS
SELECT     dbo.changes.ccustno, dbo.changes.InsUpdDate, dbo.changes.cfieldname, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.changes.InsUpdDate) - 1), 
                      dbo.changes.InsUpdDate) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.changes.codlvalue, dbo.changes.cnewvalue, dbo.vm_mk_arcust_prov.Provice
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_arcust_prov INNER JOIN
                      dbo.changes ON dbo.vm_mk_arcust_prov.ccustno = dbo.changes.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.changes.cfieldname = 'cstatus')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_ARDates
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, MAX(dbo.sosord.dcreate) AS SOSCreated, MAX(dbo.soship.dship) AS ShipDate, MAX(dbo.soship.dorder) AS ShipCreate, MAX(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) 
                      AS InvDate, MAX(dbo.arcash.dpaid) AS PayDate
FROM         dbo.arcash INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.soship.csono ON dbo.arcash.csono = dbo.sosord.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.aritrs.csono
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, MAX(dbo.sosordh.dcreate) AS SOSCreated, MAX(dbo.soshiph.dship) AS ShipDate, MAX(dbo.soshiph.dorder) AS ShipCreate, MAX(dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) 
                      AS InvDate, MAX(dbo.arcashh.dpaid) AS PayDate
FROM         dbo.arcashh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosordh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.soshiph ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.soshiph.csono ON dbo.arcashh.csono = dbo.sosordh.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.aritrsh.csono
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
