CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Affiliate
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cslpnno AS ccustno, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty) AS OnlineValue
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cslpnno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cslpnno <> '') AND (DATEDIFF(d, dbo.arcust.dstarter, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) <= 90)
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cslpnno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Dashboard
AS
SELECT        cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, csono, cshipno, clineitem, crmano, crtncode, csolineitm, cshlineitm, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cdescript, cmeasure, ccommiss, cstatus, crevncode, cbin, ctaxcode, 
                         lkititem, lupsell, lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, 
                         nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, nweight, nseq, ccmpprodln, cvernum, nbprice, nextnddprc, lfree, cgfttype, cSORefUId, cSORef, nshipcost, ldisc, lmlm, 
                         ldscntble, dinvoice, crevnacc, Invoicemonth, ccompany, centerby, cclass, cprodline, ctype, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, lautoreb, csponsor, cpcustno, dcreate, TotalInv, TotalDisc, CustomerZip, TotalTax, Currentmonth, 
                         PostalDel, cscity, cphone1, cphone2, cemail, csppruid, ccampuid, CustRace, nQv, nsp, Recovery, dstarter, CASE WHEN crevnacc LIKE '300%' THEN nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS Sales, 
                         CASE WHEN NOT (crevnacc LIKE '300%') AND citemno <> 'AI/19005/13' THEN nsalesamt ELSE 0 END AS BelowLine, CASE WHEN citemno <> 'AI/19005/13' THEN nprcinctx * nshipqty ELSE 0 END AS RSP, 
                         nQv * nshipqty AS QV, nsp * nshipqty AS SP, CASE WHEN crevnacc LIKE '300%' THEN ntaxamt1 ELSE 0 END AS SalesVat, CASE WHEN crevnacc LIKE '64%' THEN ntaxamt1 ELSE 0 END AS BelowVat, cslpnno, 
                         Startermonth, CASE WHEN ccustno = 'ASHOP2' THEN 'CLIENT (Affiliates)' ELSE CustomerClass END AS CustomerClass
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'm%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'j%')) AND (Invoicemonth >= '2016/05/01') AND (citemno <> 'MLM') AND (citemno <> 'Rebate') AND (citemno <> 'AI/19005/13') AND (NOT (crevnacc LIKE '%305%')) 
                         AND (nsalesamt <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_InComplevel
AS
SELECT        dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.icikit.ncost, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icitem.nprice, CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice <> 0 THEN (dbo.icitem.nprice / dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice) 
                         * dbo.icikit.nqty ELSE 0 END AS KitPriceShare, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS compDescrip, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ncost AS trs_cost, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem AS icitem_2 INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON icitem_2.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.ckititemno ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno = icitem_2.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2020-07-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_newRecruits
AS
SELECT     ccustno, dstarter, csponsor, Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS InvValue
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (ldscntble = 1) AND (dstarter >= '2017/01/01')
GROUP BY ccustno, dstarter, csponsor, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_aritrsInCompSOPPR
AS
SELECT        dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.icikit.ncost, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icitem.nprice, CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice <> 0 THEN (dbo.icitem.nprice / dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice) 
                         * dbo.icikit.nqty ELSE 0 END AS KitPriceShare, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS compDescrip, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ncost AS trs_cost, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.TotKitPrice, dbo.sosppr.csponcat, dbo.sosppr.nPromo, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos, dbo.sosppr.cpageno, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.sosppr ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid = dbo.sosppr.cuid LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem AS icitem_2 INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = dbo.icitem.citemno ON icitem_2.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice.ckititemno ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno = icitem_2.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2020-07-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_ArtrisperCust
AS
SELECT     ccustno, Invoicemonth, SUM(TotalInv + TotalDisc + TotalTax) AS CustRSP, SUM(nsalesamt) AS nSales, SUM(ndiscamt) AS nDiscamnt, SUM(ntaxamt1) 
                      AS nTaxamnt
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2014/01/01') AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'm%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'j%')) AND (CustomerClass = 'Consultant')
GROUP BY ccustno, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_auditstock
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_stock2.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_stock2.nonhand, dbo.vm_mk_stock2.dcurrent, dbo.vm_mk_stock2.stockdate, dbo.vm_mk_stock2.cwarehouse, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_stock2.MyDate, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.ctrstype, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.cmodule, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.citemno AS Expr1, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.cwarehouse AS Expr2, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.dtrs, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.Quantity, dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.Cost, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.TotalCost
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_stock2 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_StockMove ON dbo.vm_mk_stock2.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.citemno AND 
                      dbo.vm_mk_stock2.cwarehouse = dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.cwarehouse AND dbo.vm_mk_stock2.MyDate = dbo.vm_mk_StockMove.dtrs

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_be_productcost
AS
SELECT     cinvno, SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS ProductCost
FROM         dbo.aritrs
GROUP BY cinvno

union all
SELECT     cinvno, SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS ProductCost
FROM         dbo.aritrsh
GROUP BY cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_be_waybill
AS
SELECT     WAYBILL_NUMBER, SUM(TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL) AS Total_val_excl, MAX(WAYBILL_DATE) AS WaybillDate
FROM         dbo.be_waybill
GROUP BY WAYBILL_NUMBER, WAYBILL_DATE

AS

                      dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nfsalesamt, dbo.icitem.cclass, 
                      dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.icitem.citemno AS icitemcode, CASE WHEN dbo.icikit.ccompno IS NULL THEN dbo.icitem.citemno ELSE dbo.icikit.ccompno END AS MYCOMPNO, 
                      dbo.icikit.ccompno
FROM         dbo.icikit RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cclass LIKE 'BEAUTE%') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '2013/03/01')
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Mk_BeauteSales
AS

                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.KitQty, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.BeauteCode, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.FromDate, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.TODate, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno AS Mainitem, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ncost, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice, CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice >= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.FromDate AND 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice <= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.TODate THEN Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.BeauteCode END AS CodeBeaute, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice >= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.FromDate AND 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice <= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.TODate THEN dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty END AS BeauteQty, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice >= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.FromDate AND 
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice <= Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.TODate THEN dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt END AS BeauteSales, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.FinYear
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON RTRIM(LTRIM(Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_BeauteMaster.KitCode)) = RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Bercodata
AS
SELECT     dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER, dbo.vm_mk_bercodata1.cinvno, MIN(dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE) AS WAYBILL_DATE, 
                      SUM(dbo.be_waybill.DECLARED_VALUE) AS DECLARED_VALUE, SUM(dbo.be_waybill.FREIGHT_VALUE) AS FREIGHT_VALUE, MAX(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_MASS) 
                      AS TOTAL_MASS, MAX(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_PARCELS) AS TOTAL_PARCELS, SUM(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES) AS TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, 
                      SUM(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE) AS TOTAL_VALUE, SUM(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL) AS TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, MAX(dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VOLUME) 
                      AS TOTAL_VOLUME, MAX(dbo.be_waybill.VAT) AS VAT, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_bercodata1 LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.be_waybill ON dbo.vm_mk_bercodata1.mywaybill = dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER
GROUP BY dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER, dbo.vm_mk_bercodata1.cinvno, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_bercodata1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.soship.csono, a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.nfdiscamt + dbo.arinvc.nffrtamt + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt1 + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt2 + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt3 + dbo.arinvc.nfadjamt AS our_invoice_amount,
                       dbo.arinvc.cinvno AS [our inv no], dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt, dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid, dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1, dbo.soship.nfrtamt AS recover, 
                      dbo.soship.cWaybillno , 'ANQ'+ ltrim(a.[cinvno]) as mywaybill

FROM         dbo.soship LEFT OUTER JOIN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, cshipno
                            FROM          dbo.aritrs) AS a ON a.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON a.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.soshiph.csono, a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.arinvch.nfsalesamt - dbo.arinvch.nfdiscamt + dbo.arinvch.nffrtamt + dbo.arinvch.nftaxamt1 + dbo.arinvch.nftaxamt2 + dbo.arinvch.nftaxamt3 + dbo.arinvch.nfadjamt
                       AS our_invoice_amount, dbo.arinvch.cinvno AS [our inv no], dbo.arinvch.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvch.nfrtamt, dbo.arinvch.ntotpaid, dbo.arinvch.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.soshiph.nfrtamt AS recover, dbo.soshiph.cWaybillno,'ANQ'+ ltrim(a.[cinvno]) as mywaybill

FROM         dbo.soshiph LEFT OUTER JOIN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, cshipno
                            FROM          dbo.aritrsh) AS a ON a.cshipno = dbo.soshiph.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON a.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_BP_RegSales
AS
SELECT     Invoicemonth, dinvoice, crevnacc, ldscntble, lmlm, ccustno, PostalCode, Provice, SUM(nsalesamt) AS SalesAmnt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Discount, SUM(nshipqty) 
                      AS Quantity, SUM(ncost * nshipqty) AS cost, CustomerClass, ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2015/07/01')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, dinvoice, crevnacc, ldscntble, lmlm, ccustno, PostalCode, Provice, CustomerClass, ndiscrate

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_BP_Sales_Region
AS
SELECT        OL AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Province, Type AS CustomerClass, 'Outlook' AS Type
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_SalesOl_Prov
UNION ALL
SELECT        aop AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Province, Type AS CustomerClass, 'AOP' AS Type
FROM            vm_mk_SaleAOP_Prov
UNION ALL
SELECT        [Salesamount], [Invoicemonth], [Provice], [CustomerClass], [Type]
FROM            [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_BP_Sales_Region1]
UNION ALL
SELECT        [Salesamount] AS [Salesamount], [Invoicemonth], [Provice], [CustomerClass], [Type]
FROM            [amanniquenam].[dbo].[vm_mk_BP_Sales_Region1]
UNION ALL
SELECT        [salesamount], [Invoicemonth], [Provice], [CustomerClass], [Type]
FROM            [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_SalesBudNam]
UNION ALL
SELECT        [salesamount], [Invoicemonth], [Provice], [CustomerClass], [Type]
FROM            [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_Sales_budgetExports]
UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, 'Consultant' AS Customerclass, 'AR- Cust' AS Type
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_arcust_prov
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, Provice
UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, 'Consultant' AS customerclass, 'A-I Cust' AS Type
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_arcust_Status_Priov
WHERE        (cnewvalue = 'I') AND (codlvalue = 'A')

UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, 'Consultant' AS customerclass, 'I - A  Cust' AS Type
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_arcust_Status_Priov
WHERE        (cnewvalue = 'A') AND (codlvalue = 'I')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, Provice, codlvalue
UNION ALL
SELECT        [Salesamount], [Invoicemonth], [Province], [CustomerClass], [Type]
FROM            [Annique_Reports].[dbo].[vm_mk_RecTaget_Prov]
UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS salesamount, Invoicemonth, 'Namibia' AS Provice, 'Consultant' AS Customerclass, 'AR- Cust' AS Type
FROM            [amanniquenam].[dbo].[vm_mk_arcust_prov]
GROUP BY Invoicemonth
UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, 'Consultant' AS customerclass, 'A-I Cust' AS Type
FROM            [amanniquenam].[dbo].[vm_mk_arcust_stauts_priov]
WHERE        (cnewvalue = 'I') AND (codlvalue = 'A')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, Provice, codlvalue
UNION ALL
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, 'Consultant' AS customerclass, 'I - A  Cust' AS Type
FROM            [amanniquenam].[dbo].[vm_mk_arcust_stauts_priov]
WHERE        (cnewvalue = 'A') AND (codlvalue = 'I')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, Provice, codlvalue

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_BP_Sales_Region1
AS
SELECT     SUM(nsalesamt) AS Salesamount, Invoicemonth, Provice, CustomerClass, 'Sales' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov
WHERE     (crevnacc LIKE '300%') AND (dinvoice >= '2013/01/01') AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'j%'))

Union All

FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Prov
WHERE     (crevnacc LIKE '300%') AND (dinvoice >= '2013/01/01') AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'j%'))
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, Provice, CustomerClass

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_campaign
AS
SELECT     dbo.socamp.cCampNo, dbo.socamp.cDescript, dbo.socamp.dCreate, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.socamp.lStatus, dbo.socamp.lSpecialPr, dbo.socamp.nTarget, dbo.socamp.nMinSales, dbo.socamp.nversion, dbo.socamp.ccomment, dbo.socamp.lactive, 
                  dbo.socamp.ldrp, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO AS PPRCampno, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS PPRSecript, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine, dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, 
                  dbo.sosppr.cpageno, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos, dbo.sosppr.nversion AS PPRver, dbo.sosppr.lfree, dbo.sosppr.lspecial, dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS PPRFrom, dbo.sosppr.dto AS PPRTo, 
                  dbo.sosppr.lportal, dbo.sosppr.csponcat, dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, dbo.socamp.dFrom AS Campmonth, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.socamp.dFrom) - 1), dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth, 
                  dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.sosppr.cuid
FROM        dbo.arrevn INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sosppr ON dbo.arrevn.crevncode = dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode INNER JOIN
                  dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.sosppr.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CampaignKits
AS
SELECT     dbo.socamp.cCampNo, dbo.socamp.cDescript, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS Expr1, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, 
                  dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.cdescript AS Expr2, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.socamp.ldrp, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS KitCost, icitem_1.nstdcost AS CompCost, icitem_1.nprice AS CompPrice, 'SA' AS Company, 
                  dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype, dbo.socamp.nVatRate, dbo.sosppr.lportal
FROM        dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                  dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.socamp.ldrp = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CampaignNew
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cuid, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cshipno, dbo.aritrs.clineitem, dbo.aritrs.crmano, 
                      dbo.aritrs.crtncode, dbo.aritrs.csolineitm, dbo.aritrs.cshlineitm, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode1, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode2, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cmeasure, dbo.aritrs.ccommiss, dbo.aritrs.cstatus, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, dbo.aritrs.lkititem, dbo.aritrs.lupsell, 
                      dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.aritrs.lmodikit, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable1, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable2, dbo.aritrs.lowrmk, dbo.aritrs.lptrmk, dbo.aritrs.nqtydec, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxver, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt2, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nfsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.nfdiscamt, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nitmcnvqty, dbo.aritrs.ntrscnvqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nfprice, dbo.aritrs.nfprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nweight, dbo.aritrs.nseq, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.aritrs.cvernum, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nbprice, dbo.aritrs.nextnddprc, dbo.aritrs.lfree, dbo.aritrs.cgfttype, dbo.aritrs.cSORefUId, dbo.aritrs.cSORef, dbo.aritrs.cusername, dbo.aritrs.nshipcost, 
                      dbo.aritrs.csppruid, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AS PPRItem, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS PPRDescrip, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine AS PPRProdline, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode AS PPRRev, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit AS PPRQtyLim, dbo.sosppr.nSales AS PPRSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS PPRPriceExcl, 
                      dbo.sosppr.nDiscount AS PPRDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cpageno AS PPRPageNo, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat AS PPRMajorCat, dbo.sosppr.cclass AS PPRClass, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cgfttype AS PPRgftype, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype AS PPRSponType, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos AS PPRPagePos, dbo.sosppr.nversion AS PPRversion, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lfree AS PPRLfree, dbo.sosppr.lspecial AS PPRSpecial, dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS PPRFROM, dbo.sosppr.dto AS PPRTo, dbo.sosppr.cuid AS PPRcuid, 
                      dbo.sosppr.lportal AS PPRProtal, dbo.sosppr.csponcat, dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN (cspontype IN ('F', 'S')) 
                      THEN 'Standard' WHEN (cspontype IN ('ATM', 'BYB', 'EB', 'JO', 'KIT', 'KYB', 'P', 'PO', 'RO', 'ELO')) THEN 'Promotion' WHEN (cspontype IN ('BB', 'D', 'LO', 'FLYER', 
                      'O')) THEN 'Obsolete' WHEN (cspontype IN ('N')) THEN 'New' WHEN (cspontype IN ('SMS')) THEN 'SMS' WHEN (cspontype IN ('HG', 'MA')) 
                      THEN 'MKT Aid' WHEN (cspontype IN ('SA', 'AG', 'JG', 'OO', 'RG', 'SALES', 'COM')) THEN 'Sales Aid' WHEN (cspontype IN ('EXP')) 
                      THEN 'Export' ELSE 'Other' END AS SPON, dbo.aritrs.nfprcinctx AS 'RSP', dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MyYear, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS MyMonth
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO ON dbo.aritrs.csppruid = dbo.sosppr.cuid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail
AS
SELECT     dbo.CampDetail.*, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.Campaign.cCampno
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.Campaign ON dbo.CampDetail.CampaignID = dbo.Campaign.ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2
AS
SELECT     dbo.Campaign.iYear AS InvYear, { fn MONTHNAME(dbo.Campaign.dFrom) } AS InvMonth, dbo.CampDetail.cItemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype AS cclass, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat AS MySpon, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType AS icisponcat, ' ' AS crevnacc, 
                  dbo.CampDetail.nRsp AS nPcinctx, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS nCost, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS ShipQty, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice * 1.2 AS discounts, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast * dbo.CampDetail.nRsp AS SalesMnt, 'Forecast' AS ctype, 
                  dbo.icitem.nprcinctx AS NormalPrc, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom AS dInvoice, dbo.CampDetail.cPageNo, '' AS cpagepos, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat AS PPRSponType, 'Forecast' AS CustomerClass, dbo.Campaign.cCampno, CAST(dbo.CampDetail.cOffer AS Int) 
                  AS nPromo
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.Campaign ON dbo.CampDetail.CampaignID = dbo.Campaign.ID
WHERE     (dbo.Campaign.dFrom >= '2022/08/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Campdetail2b
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.InvYear, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.InvMonth, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cclass, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.MySpon, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.icisponcat, 
                  dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.nPcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.nPrice, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.nCost, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.ShipQty, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.discounts, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.SalesMnt, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.ctype, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.NormalPrc, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.dInvoice, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cpageno, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cpagepos, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.PPRSponType, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.CustomerClass, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cCampNO, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.nPromo

                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2 ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail2.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_campdetalItemlevelSpon
AS
SELECT        dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, 
                         CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.nprice <> 0 THEN ROUND(dbo.CampDetail.nPrice * (icitem_1.nprice / dbo.icitem.nprice), 2) ELSE dbo.icitem.nprice END AS nPrice, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, 
                         dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, dbo.icikit.ckititemno AS DocNumber, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom, 
                         dbo.CampDetail.dTo
FROM            dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
union all
SELECT        dbo.CampDetail.cItemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice AS nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) 
                         - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, dbo.CampDetail.cItemno AS DocNumber, dbo.CampDetail.cSponCat, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom, dbo.CampDetail.dTo
FROM            dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CampDetialItemLevel
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.nprice <> 0 THEN ROUND(dbo.CampDetail.nPrice * (icitem_1.nprice / dbo.icitem.nprice), 2) 
                  ELSE dbo.icitem.nprice END AS nPrice,  CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) 
                  AS SellDate,

dbo.icikit.ckititemno AS DocNumber
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)


UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.CampDetail.cItemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS Quantity, 'Forecast' AS cType, dbo.CampDetail.nPrice AS nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) - 1), dbo.CampDetail.dFrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, 
                  dbo.CampDetail.cItemno AS DocNumber
FROM        dbo.CampDetail INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.CampDetail.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Campmortem_Qlik
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno AS cItemno, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cdescript AS cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.crevncode AS trs_revcoe, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt AS trs_nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt AS trs_ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS trs_taxamt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty AS trs_shipqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ncost AS trs_cost, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nfprice AS trs_fprice,

FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Dashboard
WHERE        (ccustno = 'AShop2')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, CustomerClass

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CompDash_New12Montly
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT SUM(nsalesamt) AS Value, CustomerClass, Invoicemonth
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_CompDash_NewCons12
GROUP BY CustomerClass, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_CompDash_NewCons12
AS

                         lkititem, lupsell, lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, 
                         nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, nweight, nseq, ccmpprodln, cvernum, nbprice, nextnddprc, lfree, cgfttype, cSORefUId, cSORef, nshipcost, ldisc, lmlm, 
                         ldscntble, dinvoice, crevnacc, Invoicemonth, ccompany, centerby, cclass, cprodline, ctype, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, lautoreb, CustomerClass, csponsor, cpcustno, dcreate, TotalInv, TotalDisc, CustomerZip, 
                         TotalTax, Currentmonth, PostalDel, cscity, cphone1, cphone2, cemail, csppruid, ccampuid, CustRace, nQv, nsp, Recovery, dstarter, Sales, BelowLine, RSP, QV, SP, SalesVat, BelowVat, cslpnno, Startermonth, 
                         DATEADD(m, 11, Startermonth) AS Started12Months
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Dashboard
WHERE        (Invoicemonth >= Startermonth) AND (Invoicemonth <= DATEADD(m, 11, Startermonth)) AND (crevnacc LIKE '%300100%') AND (CustomerClass = 'CONSULTANT')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_compnay_Dash2
AS
SELECT        Invoicemonth, CustomerClass, SUM(RSP) AS nRSP, COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS Traders, COUNT(DISTINCT cinvno) AS Invoices, SUM(Sales) AS [300sales], SUM(BelowLine) AS BelowLine, SUM(QV) AS QV, 
                         SUM(SP) AS SP, SUM(SalesVat) AS SalesVAt, SUM(BelowVat) AS BelowVAt, SUM(nshipqty) AS TotlUnits, SUM(ndiscamt) AS OffInv, COUNT(DISTINCT dinvoice) AS Tradedays, COUNT(DISTINCT cslpnno) 
                         AS AffSponsor
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Dashboard
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, CustomerClass

                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lmodikit, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ltaxable1, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ltaxable2, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lowrmk, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lptrmk, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nqtydec, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxver, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt2, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nfsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nfdiscamt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nordqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nitmcnvqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntrscnvqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ncost, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nprcinctx, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nfprice, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nfprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nweight, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nseq, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ccmpprodln, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cvernum, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nbprice, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nextnddprc, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lfree, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cgfttype, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cSORefUId, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cSORef, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipcost, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.csppruid, dbo.icitem.ldisc, dbo.icitem.lmlm, 
                      dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, CAST(dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice AS datetime) AS MyinvDate, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 
                      CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth, 
                      dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.centerby, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.lautoreb, dbo.arcust.cclass AS CustomerClass, dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.cpcustno, 
                      CAST(dbo.arcust.dcreate AS datetime) AS JoinDate, dbo.arcust.dcreate, DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) AS InvDayJoin, 
                      CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 30 THEN '30 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 30 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 60 THEN '60 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 60 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 90 THEN '90 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 90 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 120 THEN '90 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 120 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 150 THEN '120 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 150 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 180 THEN '150 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 180 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 210 THEN '180 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 210 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 240 THEN '210 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 240 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 270 THEN '240 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 270 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 300 THEN '270 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 300 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 330 THEN '300 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 330 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 360 THEN '330 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 360 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 390 THEN '360Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 390 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 420 THEN '390 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 420 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 450 THEN '420 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 450 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 480 THEN '450 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 480 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 510 THEN '480 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 510 AND DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 540 THEN '510 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 <= 540 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 < 570 THEN '540 Days' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) * - 1 <= 570 AND DATEDIFF(day, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.arcust.dcreate) 
                      * - 1 < 600 THEN '570 Days' ELSE '600 + Days' END AS InvDayBands, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 500 THEN '500 ' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 1000 THEN '500  -  999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 1000 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 1500 THEN '1 000  -  1 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 1500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 2000 THEN '1 500  - 1 999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 2000 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 2499 THEN '2 000  - 2 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 2500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 3000 THEN '2 500  -  2 999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 3000 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 3499 THEN '3 000  -  3 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 3500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 4000 THEN '3 500  -  3999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 4000 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 4499 THEN '4 000  -  4 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 4500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 5000 THEN '4 500  - 4 999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 5000 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 5499 THEN ' 5 000  -  5 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 5500 AND
                       (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 5999 THEN '5  500  -  5 999' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 6000 AND
                       (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 5499 THEN '6 000  -  6 499' WHEN (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) >= 6500 AND 
                      (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt - dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscamt + dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxable1) 
                      < 6999 THEN '6 500  -  6 799' ELSE ' >7 000' END AS InvBand, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ndiscrate AS headdiscount, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.nsalesamt AS TotalSales, dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ntaxamt1 AS TotalTAx
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_allallinvoices.dinvoice >= '2010/01/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_cred_reaonBackup
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN mremark LIKE '%sold out%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Geen voorraad%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%GEEN VOORRAAD%'
                       THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%out of stock%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%OUT OF STOCK%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%een vorraad%'
                       THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%uit vorraad%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%NIE BESKIKBAAR%' THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Soldout%'
                       THEN 'Out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Damage%' THEN 'Damage' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Damage%' THEN 'Damage' WHEN mremark LIKE '%damage%' THEN 'Damage'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%DAMAGE%' THEN 'Damage' WHEN mremark LIKE '%broken%' THEN 'Damage' WHEN mremark LIKE '%leaked%' THEN 'Damage' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%Quality%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE '%leak%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE 'Qulaity%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%Quality%' THEN 'Product Quality ' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Quality%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE '%cracked%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%not charging%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE '%t charge%' THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Export%' THEN 'Export Credit' WHEN
                       mremark LIKE '%Namibia%' THEN 'Export Credit' WHEN mremark LIKE '%RTS%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE '%not  collected%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%returned to sender%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Wrong Delivery%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE
                       '%Parcel Lost%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE '%No Delivery%' THEN 'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE '%returned by berco%' THEN
                       'Incorrect Delivery/RTS' WHEN mremark LIKE '%reg gell%' THEN 'Registration' WHEN mremark LIKE '%rege%' THEN 'Registration ' WHEN mremark LIKE '%registrat%'
                       THEN 'Registration' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Reg geld%' THEN 'Registration Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%registrasie%' THEN 'Registration Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Registrasie%'
                       THEN 'Registration Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%admin fee%' THEN 'Admin Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Admin fee%' THEN 'Admin Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%for free%'
                       THEN 'Free Product' WHEN mremark LIKE '%gratisl%' THEN 'Free Product ' WHEN mremark LIKE '%gratisl%' THEN 'Free Product ' WHEN mremark LIKE '%discon%' THEN
                       'Discontinued' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Sample%' THEN 'Samples' WHEN mremark LIKE '%regstel%' THEN 'Corrections' WHEN mremark LIKE '%regs%' THEN 'Corrections'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%reg s%' THEN 'Corrections' WHEN mremark LIKE '%corretion%' THEN 'Corrections' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Incorrectly Typed%' THEN 'Incorectly Typed'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%incorrectly typed%' THEN 'Incorectly Typed' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Overcharg%' THEN 'Corrections' WHEN mremark LIKE '%type error%' THEN
                       'Incorectly Typed' WHEN mremark LIKE '%lSystem error%' THEN 'System Error' WHEN mremark LIKE '%wrong code%' THEN 'Incorrect Order Info' WHEN mremark LIKE
                       '%verkeerde%' THEN 'Incorrect Order Info' WHEN mremark LIKE '%member num%' THEN 'Incorrect Order Info' WHEN mremark LIKE '%verkeerde%' THEN 'Incorrect Order Info'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%Uitgelaat%' THEN 'Left out on Order' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Payment%' THEN 'Payment Method/Payment' WHEN mremark LIKE '%short on order%'
                       THEN 'Payment Method/Payment' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Duplicte%' THEN 'Duplicate Order' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Duplicate Order%' THEN 'Duplicate Order' WHEN
                       mremark LIKE '%SAMPLE%' THEN 'Samples' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Short Packed%' THEN 'Short Packed' WHEN mremark LIKE '%FREE BEAUTE%' THEN 'Free Beates'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%Replacement%' THEN 'Replacement' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Customs%' THEN 'Reinvoiced for Customs' WHEN mremark LIKE '%HOSTESS GIFT%'
                       THEN 'Hostess Gift' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Cancelled%' THEN 'Order Cancelled' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Cancel%' THEN 'Order Cancelled' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Postal Fee%'
                       THEN 'Postal Fees' WHEN mremark LIKE '%lnot delivered%' THEN 'Not Delivered' WHEN mremark LIKE '%not collected%' THEN 'Not Collected' WHEN mremark LIKE '%not working%'
                       THEN 'Product Quality' WHEN mremark LIKE '%System error%' THEN 'Corrections' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Credi tExport%' THEN 'Credit Exports
' WHEN mremark LIKE
                       '%oversupply%' THEN 'Over Supply' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Jubilee%' THEN 'Jubilee Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Allergic%' THEN 'Allergic' ELSE 'Different Reason'
                       END AS Newremark, cuid, cinvno, mremark
FROM         dbo.arirmk

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_cred_reason
AS
SELECT     CASE WHEN mremark LIKE '%Incorrectly Typed%' THEN 'Incorrectly Typed' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Incorrectly Ordered%' THEN 'Incorrectly Ordered' WHEN mremark LIKE
                       '%Cancelled Order%' THEN 'Cancelled Order' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Duplicate Order%' THEN 'Duplicate Order' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Incorrectly Packed%' THEN 'Incorrectly Packed'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%Courier Damages%' THEN 'Courier Damages' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Packaging Damage%' THEN 'Packaging Damage' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Damages%'
                       THEN 'Damages' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Quality Error%' THEN 'Quality Error' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Short Packed%' THEN 'Short Packed' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Product out of Stock%'
                       THEN 'Product out of Stock' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Sender% ' THEN ' Returned to Sender' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Parcel return%' THEN 'Returned to Sender' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%Pump not Working%' THEN 'Pump not Working' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Pump No Working%' THEN 'Pump not Working' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Leaking Product%'
                       THEN 'Leaking Product' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Allergic Reaction%' THEN 'Allergic Reaction' WHEN mremark LIKE '%System Error%' THEN 'System Error' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%Postal Fee%' THEN 'Postal Fee' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Courier Cost%' THEN 'Courier Cost' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Admin Fee%' THEN ' Admin Fee' WHEN mremark
                       LIKE '%Stock Return' THEN 'Stock Return' WHEN mremark LIKE '%30 Day Exchange%' THEN '30 Day Exchange' WHEN mremark LIKE '%30 day exchange%' THEN '30 Day Exchange'
                       WHEN mremark LIKE '%30 Day Exchange%' THEN '30 Day Exchange' WHEN mremark LIKE '%30 %' THEN '30 Day Exchange' WHEN mremark LIKE '%\Wrong member number%'
                       THEN 'Wrong member number' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Wrong Consultant Number%' THEN 'Wrong member number' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Wrong Member Number%'
                       THEN 'Wrong member number' WHEN mremark LIKE '%parcel lost%' THEN 'Parcel lost' WHEN mremark LIKE '%Incorrect Delivery%' THEN 'Incorrect delivery' ELSE 'Other'
                       END AS Newremark, cuid, cinvno, mremark
FROM         dbo.arirmk

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_creditrep
AS
SELECT      YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, SUM(nsalesamt) AS ASsalesamnt, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS fsalesamnt, COUNT(cinvno) 
                      AS Noinv
FROM         dbo.arinvch
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice)

union

SELECT      YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, SUM(nsalesamt) AS ASsalesamnt, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS fsalesamnt, COUNT(cinvno) 
                      AS Noinv
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice)
union

SELECT      YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, SUM(nsalesamt) AS ASsalesamnt, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS fsalesamnt, COUNT(cinvno) 
                      AS Noinv
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice)

union
SELECT      YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, SUM(nsalesamt) AS ASsalesamnt, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS fsalesamnt, COUNT(cinvno) 
                      AS Noinv
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_creditrep2
AS
SELECT     YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Repyear, MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Repmonth, COUNT(dbo.aritrs.cshipno) AS NOLine, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS shipqty, 
                      'aritrs' AS FILES
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)
UNION
SELECT     YEAR(dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Repyear, MONTH(dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Repmonth, COUNT(dbo.aritrsh.cshipno) AS NOLine, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS shipqty, 
                      'aritrsh' AS FILES
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (dbo.arinvch.nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR(dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), MONTH(dbo.arinvch.dinvoice)




union


SELECT     YEAR( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Repyear, MONTH( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Repmonth, COUNT( amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cshipno) AS NOLine, SUM( amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS shipqty, 
                      'aritrsnam' AS FILES
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                       amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc ON  amanniquenam.dbo.aritrs.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     ( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND ( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), MONTH( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)
UNION

SELECT     YEAR( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Repyear, MONTH( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Repmonth, COUNT( amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cshipno) AS NOLine, SUM( amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS shipqty, 
                      'aritrshnam' AS FILES
FROM          amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                       amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch ON  amanniquenam.dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     ( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND ( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.nfsalesamt >= 0)
GROUP BY YEAR( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), MONTH( amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch.dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_credrep_3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT YEAR(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.dinvoice) AS Repyear, MONTH(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.dinvoice) AS repmonth, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.warehouse AS cWarehouse, COUNT(DISTINCT Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.cinvno) AS Expr1, 
                      SUM(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.NetInvoiceValue) AS Expr2, SUM(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.units) AS Units, 
                      SUM(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.RSP) AS RSP
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_cred_reason ON Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_cred_reason.cinvno
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.units < 0) AND (Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND 
                      (Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.warehouse <> '4400') AND (Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.warehouse <> '4200') AND 
                      (Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.warehouse <> '9507')
GROUP BY YEAR(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.dinvoice), MONTH(Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.dinvoice), Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.warehouse, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF.RSP
ORDER BY Repyear, repmonth, cWarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_credrep3_original
AS

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, COUNT(cinvno) AS Expr1, cwarehouse, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arinvch
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nsalesamt < 0) AND (cwarehouse <> '4400')
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice), cwarehouse
UNION
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, COUNT(cinvno) AS Expr1, cwarehouse, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nsalesamt < 0) AND (cwarehouse <> '4400')
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice), cwarehouse
UNION
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, COUNT(cinvno) AS Expr1, cwarehouse, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Expr2
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvch
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nsalesamt < 0) AND (cwarehouse <> '4400')
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice), cwarehouse
UNION
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT YEAR(dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dinvoice) AS repmonth, COUNT(cinvno) AS Expr1, cwarehouse, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Expr2
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2012-03-01') AND (nsalesamt < 0) AND (cwarehouse <> '4400')
GROUP BY YEAR(dinvoice), MONTH(dinvoice), cwarehouse
ORDER BY repyear, repmonth, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Dash_1_5
AS
SELECT     YEAR(dinvoice) AS TransYear, CASE WHEN month(dinvoice) = 1 THEN 'January' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 2 THEN 'February' WHEN month(dinvoice) 
                      = 3 THEN 'March' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 4 THEN 'April' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 5 THEN 'May' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 6 THEN 'June' WHEN month(dinvoice) 
                      = 7 THEN 'July' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 8 THEN 'August' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 9 THEN 'September' WHEN month(dinvoice) 
                      = 10 THEN 'October' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 11 THEN 'November' WHEN month(dinvoice) = 12 THEN 'December' END AS TransMonth, crevnacc, crtrnacc, cuid, 
                      cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, csono, cshipno, clineitem, crmano, crtncode, csolineitm, cshlineitm, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cdescript, cmeasure, ccommiss, 
                      cstatus, crevncode, cbin, ctaxcode, lkititem, lupsell, lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, 
                      ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, 
                      nweight, nseq, ccmpprodln, cvernum, nbprice, nextnddprc, lfree, cgfttype, cSORefUId, cSORef, cusername, nshipcost, csppruid, invcustno, cscompany, dinvoice, 
                      cclass, ldisc, lmlm, ldscntble
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_dash1_1

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_dash_levels
AS

                      COUNT(DISTINCT L3) AS L3, COUNT(DISTINCT L4) AS L4, COUNT(DISTINCT L5) AS L5, COUNT(DISTINCT L6) AS L6, COUNT(DISTINCT L7) AS L7, COUNT(DISTINCT L8) 
                      AS L8, COUNT(DISTINCT L9) AS L9, COUNT(DISTINCT L10) AS L10, COUNT(DISTINCT L11) AS L11, COUNT(DISTINCT L12) AS L12, COUNT(DISTINCT L13) AS L13, 
                      COUNT(DISTINCT L17) AS L14, COUNT(DISTINCT L15) AS L15, COUNT(DISTINCT L16) AS L16, COUNT(DISTINCT L7) AS L17, COUNT(DISTINCT L8) AS L18, 
                      COUNT(DISTINCT L9) AS L19, COUNT(DISTINCT L20) AS L20

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_dash1_3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT Transdate, cclass, crevnacc, lmlm, ldscntble, ndiscrate, SUM(nsalesamt) AS SalesAmt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Discount, SUM(ntaxamt1) AS Vat, 
                      SUM(nshipqty) AS Units, COUNT(DISTINCT cinvno) AS InvCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS CustCount, 'SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_dash1_2
WHERE     (dinvoice > '2012/01/01') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'j%')
GROUP BY Transdate, cclass, crevnacc, lmlm, ldscntble, ndiscrate, ndiscrate
ORDER BY Transdate, cclass, crevnacc, lmlm, ldscntble, ndiscrate

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_dash1_4
AS
SELECT     CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dcreate) - 1), dcreate) AS datetime) AS JoinMonth, COUNT(ccustno) AS CustCount, '[New Recruit' AS Description
FROM         dbo.arcust
GROUP BY CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dcreate) - 1), dcreate) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_dash1_5
AS
SELECT     CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dinvoice) - 1), dinvoice) AS datetime) AS JoinMonth, COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS CustCount, 'FirstOrder' AS Description
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices
WHERE     (ndiscrate = 50) OR
                      (ndiscrate = 60)
GROUP BY CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dinvoice) - 1), dinvoice) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Dash2_GroupSales
AS
SELECT     CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) AS datetime) AS dTransdate, dbo.arcust.csponsor, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype AS Type, COUNT(DISTINCT dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.cinvno) AS NoOfInv, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscrate) AS DiscountPerc, 
                      SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt) AS DiscAmount, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS TaxAmnt, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty) AS NoUnits, 
                      AVG(dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.ntotpaid) AS AvgInvValue
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs ON dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
GROUP BY CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) AS datetime), dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.icitem.ctype

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_DashFast
AS
SELECT        cdescript, Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * ncost) AS FastCost
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (Invoicemonth >= '2016/11/01') AND (citemno = '3220183' OR
                         citemno = '3220184' OR
                         citemno = '3220185' OR
                         citemno = '3220276')
GROUP BY cdescript, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_deliveriesregion1

FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2013-10-01 00:00:00.000') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (ccustno <> 'SALES')
UNION ALL

SELECT  ccustno, cszip,cshipvia
FROM         dbo.arinvcH
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2013-10-01 00:00:00.000') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (ccustno <> 'SALES')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_deliveryandvalue
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cszip, dbo.arinvc.cshipvia, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt, Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Town, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Provice, Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Region, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.arcust.ccompany
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN

                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes ON dbo.arinvc.cszip = Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.PostalCode

union all

                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Provice, Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.Region, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.arcust.ccompany
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvch.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes ON dbo.arinvch.cszip = Annique_Reports.dbo.PostalCodes.PostalCode
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice >= '2013-10-01') AND (dbo.arinvch.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (dbo.arinvch.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (dbo.arinvch.ccustno <> 'SALES')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Diary2020
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.ccustno AS Expr1, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sostrs.drequest, dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.dstarter, dbo.arcust.csponsor
