CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Exp_trsn
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype, dbo.ictrsn.cmodule, dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.ictrsn.ckitno, dbo.ictrsn.nqty, dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.Itemno, dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.Units, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.ÍtemDescript, dbo.ictrsn.ctrsno, dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.cshipno, dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.citemno AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.ictrsn FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_Explode1 ON dbo.ictrsn.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.Itemno AND dbo.ictrsn.ctrsno = dbo.vm_mk_Explode1.cshipno
WHERE     (dbo.ictrsn.cmodule = 'SO')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Explode1
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosptr.cshipno, dbo.sosptr.csono, dbo.sosptr.citemno, dbo.sosptr.cdescript, dbo.sosptr.cinvno, dbo.sosptr.ccustno, dbo.sosptr.crevncode, dbo.sosptr.ctaxcode, 
                      dbo.sosptr.dship, dbo.sosptr.lkititem, dbo.sosptr.lstock, dbo.sosptr.ndiscrate, dbo.sosptr.ntaxver, dbo.sosptr.nsalesamt, dbo.sosptr.ndiscamt, dbo.sosptr.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.sosptr.ntaxamt2, dbo.sosptr.ntaxamt3, dbo.sosptr.nshipqty, dbo.sosptr.ncancelqty, dbo.sosptr.ncost, dbo.sosptr.nprice, dbo.sosptr.nprcinctx, dbo.sosptr.nweight, 
                      dbo.sosptr.nbprice, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.sosptr.lkititem = 1 THEN dbo.icikit.ccompno ELSE dbo.sosptr.citemno END AS 'Itemno', 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.sosptr.lkititem = 1 THEN ((((dbo.icitem.nstdcost * dbo.icikit.nqty) / icitem_1.nstdcost) * dbo.sosptr.nsalesamt)) 
                      ELSE dbo.sosptr.nsalesamt END AS SalesAmnt, CASE WHEN dbo.sosptr.lkititem = 1 THEN ((dbo.sosptr.nshipqty * dbo.icikit.nqty)) 
                      ELSE dbo.sosptr.nshipqty END AS Units, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS CompCost, icitem_1.nstdcost AS KitCost, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.sosptr.lkititem = 1 THEN dbo.icikit.cdescript ELSE dbo.sosptr.cdescript END AS ÍtemDescript, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc
FROM         dbo.arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosptr ON dbo.arrevn.crevncode = dbo.sosptr.crevncode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = icitem_1.citemno ON dbo.sosptr.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Explode2
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1 THEN dbo.icikit.ccompno ELSE dbo.aritrs.citemno END AS Itemno, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1 THEN ((((dbo.icitem.nstdcost * dbo.icikit.nqty) / icitem_1.nstdcost) * dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt)) 
                      ELSE dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt END AS SalesAmnt, CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1 THEN ((dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.icikit.nqty)) ELSE dbo.aritrs.nshipqty END AS Units, 
                      dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS CompCost, icitem_1.nstdcost AS KitCost, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1 THEN dbo.icikit.cdescript ELSE dbo.aritrs.cdescript END AS ItemDescript, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cshipno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.crevncode
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = icitem_1.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arrevn.crevncode = dbo.aritrs.crevncode ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Faststart
AS
SELECT        ccustno, dinvoice, Invoicemonth, dstarter, CASE WHEN (citemno = '3220184') THEN '70 Days' WHEN (citemno = '3220183') THEN '40 Days' WHEN (citemno = '3220185') THEN '90 Days' END AS Fasstart, 
                         csponsor, cinvno, citemno
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (citemno = '3220184') OR
                         (citemno = '3220183') OR
                         (citemno = '3220185')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_fastway
AS
SELECT DISTINCT cColour, dship, cscity, cszip, cbcompany, cInvno, cManifestid, cLabelno
FROM        dbo.[vw_SL_Fastway labels vs invoice ]

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_fastway_data
AS
SELECT        dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.InvNo, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.SoNo, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.CustNo, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.CustName, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.Date, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.ShipVia, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.FreightAmt, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.Weight, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.Parcel, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.Status, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.CourierInv, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.WaybillNo, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.ShipCost, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.ShipStatus, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.SaleValue, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.cLabelno, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.cColour, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.cConsignmentID, dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.cManifestid
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_uniquefast INNER JOIN
                         dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data ON dbo.vm_mk_uniquefast.InvNo = dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.InvNo
WHERE        (dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data.InvNo LIKE '%1306529')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FastwayInvoices
AS
SELECT     cInvno AS FW_Invno, cColour AS FW_Colour, MIN(cLabelno) AS FW_Startlabel, MAX(cLabelno) AS FW_EndLabel, SUM(LABELCOST) AS FW_Labelcost, COUNT(cInvno) AS FW_Invcount, MAX(dship) AS FWShipDate, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dship) - 1), 
                  dship) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_allfastway
GROUP BY cInvno, cColour, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dship) - 1), dship) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_firstDate_Item
AS
SELECT     citemno, MIN(dinvoice) AS Firstdate
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (ccustno <> 'NUM')
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FirstOrder
AS
SELECT        ccustno, MIN(cinvno) AS cInvno, MAX(dstarter) AS dStarter
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (dstarter > '2019-01-01') AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'M%'))
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_firstOrder_Value
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.*
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_FirstOrder INNER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.vm_mk_FirstOrder.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno AND dbo.vm_mk_FirstOrder.cInvno = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_forecast
AS
SELECT     ItemNo, SUM(units) AS Units, MAX(RSP) AS RSP, SUM(TotalCost) AS TotalCost, MAX(stdcost) AS stCost
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.SalesMainF
WHERE     (Type = 'Forecast') AND (Date >= GETDATE()) AND (Date <= '2014/12/31')
GROUP BY ItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_ForecastsCompLevel
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty AS Quantity, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, 
                      CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo AS DocNumber
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_soppr INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0) AND dbo.vm_mk_soppr.ldrp = 1 AND (CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) 
                      - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) + 4000 >= CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, 
                      - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, '' AS DocNumber
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_soppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0) AND dbo.vm_mk_soppr.ldrp = 1 AND (CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) 
                      - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) + 4000 >= CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime))
union all
SELECT     citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nqty, 'Actual Sales' AS ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dtrs) - 1), dtrs) AS datetime) AS Selldate, 
                      '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_Allictrsn
WHERE     (cmodule = 'so') AND dtrs >= '2013/01/01'

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FreeitemInvoiced
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.crevncode, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lkititem, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ncost, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nweight, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.lfree, dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.ckititemno, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.nqty, dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.ccompno, dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.Freeitem, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.ncost AS FreeCost, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.nsalesamt AS InvAmnt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.ndiscamt AS InvDisc, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.ntaxamt1 AS InvTax, dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.KitDescrip, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.Component, dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.CompCost, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) - 1), 
                      dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.dinvoice) AS datetime) AS InvoiceMonth
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.cinvno = dbo.vm_mk_allinvoices.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems ON dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FreeKititems
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icikit.nqty, dbo.icikit.ncost, dbo.icikit.lfree, dbo.socmpf.cItemNo, dbo.socmpf.cCampNO, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.socmpf.cItemNo IS NULL THEN dbo.icikit.lfree ELSE 1 END AS 'Freeitem', dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Component, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS CompCost, 
                      icitem_1.cdescript AS KitDescrip
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ccompno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = icitem_1.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.socmpf ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.socmpf.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(Gift1Order) AS Gift1Order, SUM(Gift1Ship) AS Gift1ship, SUM(Gift2Order) AS Gift2Order, SUM(Gift2Ship) AS Gift2Ship, SUM(Gift3Order) AS Gift3Order, 
                      SUM(Gift3Ship) AS Gift3ship
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Gifts
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_Gifts
AS
SELECT        ccustno, citemno, nordqty, nshipqty, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220183%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift1Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220183%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift1Ship, 
                         CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220184%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift2Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220184%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift2Ship, 
                         CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220276%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift3Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220276%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift3Ship
FROM            dbo.sostrs
WHERE        (citemno LIKE '%3220183%') OR
                         (citemno LIKE '%3220184%') OR
                         (citemno LIKE '%3220276%')
UNION ALL
SELECT        ccustno, citemno, nordqty, nshipqty, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220183%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift1Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220183%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift1Ship, 
                         CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220184%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift2Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220184%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift2Ship, 
                         CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220276%' THEN nordqty END AS Gift3Order, CASE WHEN citemno LIKE '%3220276%' THEN nshipqty END AS Gift3Ship
FROM            dbo.sostrsh
WHERE        (citemno LIKE '%3220183%') OR
                         (citemno LIKE '%3220184%') OR
                         (citemno LIKE '%3220186%')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Recruit, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Name, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.JoinDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Sponsor, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.SPonsorName, MIN(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) 
                         AS KitDate, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx) AS KitValue, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.cRace, SUM(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsp) AS KitSP
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Recruit = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice = dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.JoinDate)
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Recruit, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Name, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.JoinDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.Sponsor, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.SPonsorName, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits.cRace

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_Recruits
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Recruit, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.arcust.dstarter AS JoinDate, arcust_1.ccustno AS Sponsor, arcust_1.ccompany AS SPonsorName, dbo.arcust.cRace
FROM            dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.arcust.dstarter <> ' ') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_Sponpay
AS
SELECT     ccustno AS Sponsor, SUM(nbankamt) AS Payment
FROM         dbo.arrfnd
WHERE     (cpaycode = 'FST') AND (lvoid = 0)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_Track_Online
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Recruit, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Name, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.JoinDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Sponsor, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.SPonsorName, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.KitDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.KitValue, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.cdescript, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ndiscrate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.nshipqty, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ldscntble, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.cRace, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift1Order, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift1ship, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift2Order, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift2Ship, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift3Order, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Gift3ship, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Payment, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.nQv, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.nsp, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.KitSP, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.ldisc, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Affiliate.OnlineValue AS OnlineSales
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Affiliate ON dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking.Recruit = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs_Affiliate.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FS_Tracking
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Recruit, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Name, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.JoinDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Sponsor, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.SPonsorName, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.KitDate, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.KitValue, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ldscntble, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.cRace, dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift1Order, dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift1ship, dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift2Order, 
                         dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift2Ship, dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift3Order, dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.Gift3ship, dbo.vm_mk_FS_Sponpay.Payment, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nQv, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsp, 
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.KitSP, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ldisc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_FS_Sponpay ON dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Sponsor = dbo.vm_mk_FS_Sponpay.Sponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking ON dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Recruit = dbo.vm_MK_FS_Gift_Tracking.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.Recruit = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_FS_RecKitDate.JoinDate >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2017-07-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (NOT (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc LIKE '48%'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_FutCRF
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_sopprcomplevel]
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, nordqty - nrecqty AS Quantity, 'PO' AS Ctype, ncost AS price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, drequest) - 1), drequest) AS datetime) 
                      AS Selldate, cpono AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.poptrs
WHERE     (nrecqty < nordqty) AND (NOT (citemno LIKE 'MISC.ITEM           '))
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nonhand, 'OnHand' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) 
                      AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '4400' OR
                      cwarehouse = '9508') AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nonhand, 'OnHand' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) 
                      AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM         [amanniquenam].[dbo].[iciwhs]
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '6200') AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nreordpt, 'Safety' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) 
                      AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM         [amanniquelive].[dbo].[iciwhs]
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '4000') AND (nreordpt <> 0)


UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, '' AS cdscript, nonhand AS Quantity, 'Actual SOH' AS ctype, 0 AS nPriceexcl, CASE WHEN dmonth = 'January' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /01/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'February' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /02/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'March' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /03/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'April' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /04/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'May' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /05/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'June' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /06/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'July' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /07/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'August' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /08/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'September' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /09/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'October' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /10/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'November' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /11/01' AS Date) 
                      WHEN dmonth = 'December' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /12/01' AS Date) END AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_monthly
WHERE     (dyear >= 2013) AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr32 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, dFirstPeriod AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr32 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr33 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 1, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr33 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr34 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 2, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr34 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr35 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 3, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr35 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr36 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 4, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr36 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr37 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 5, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr37 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr38 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 6, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr38 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr39 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 7, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr39 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr40 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 8, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr40 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr41 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 9, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr41 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr42 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 10, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr42 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr43 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 11, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr43 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'Suggested' AS cdescript, fr44 AS Quantity, 'Suggested' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 12, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr44 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'DRP' AS cdescript, fr01 AS Quantity, 'DRP' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, dFirstPeriod AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr01 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'DRP' AS cdescript, fr02 AS Quantity, 'DRP' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 1, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr02 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'DRP' AS cdescript, fr03 AS Quantity, 'DRP' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 2, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr03 <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     cItemNo, 'DRP' AS cdescript, fr04 AS Quantity, 'DRP' AS cType, nCost AS nPriceExl, DATEADD(month, 3, dFirstPeriod) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM         dbo.dprqmt
WHERE     (fr04 <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Futurestock
AS
SELECT *
  FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_CampDetialItemLevel]

UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, nordqty - nrecqty AS Quantity, 'PO' AS Ctype, ncost AS price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, drequest) - 1), drequest) AS datetime) AS Selldate, cpono AS Docnumber
FROM        dbo.poptrs
WHERE     (nrecqty < nordqty) AND (NOT (citemno LIKE 'MISC.ITEM           '))
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nonhand, 'OnHand' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM        dbo.iciwhs
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '4400' OR
                  cwarehouse = '9508') AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nonhand, 'OnHand' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM        [amanniquenam].[dbo].[iciwhs]
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '6200') AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nreordpt, 'Safety' AS Ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime) AS SellDate, cwarehouse AS Docnumber
FROM        [amanniquelive].[dbo].[iciwhs]
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '4000') AND (nreordpt <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, ' ' AS cDescript, nqty, 'Actual Sales' AS ctype, ncost AS Price, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dtrs) - 1), dtrs) AS datetime) AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_Allictrsn
WHERE     (cmodule = 'so') AND dtrs >= '2014/01/01'
UNION ALL
SELECT     citemno, '' AS cdscript, nonhand AS Quantity, 'Actual SOH' AS ctype, 0 AS nPriceexcl, CASE WHEN dmonth = 'January' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /01/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'February' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /02/01' AS Date) 
                  WHEN dmonth = 'March' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /03/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'April' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /04/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'May' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /05/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'June' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /06/01' AS Date) 
                  WHEN dmonth = 'July' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /07/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'August' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /08/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'September' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /09/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'October' THEN CAST(str(dyear) 
                  + ' /10/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'November' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /11/01' AS Date) WHEN dmonth = 'December' THEN CAST(str(dyear) + ' /12/01' AS Date) END AS Selldate, '' AS Docnumber
FROM        dbo.iciwhs_monthly
WHERE     (dyear >= 2013) AND (nonhand <> 0)
UNION ALL

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Mk_FuturestockKitnames
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_Futurestock.*, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS KitName
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_Futurestock LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_Futurestock.DocNumber = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3
AS
SELECT     cProduct, UPPER(cColour) AS cColour, nAvailable, dDate, CAST(CAST(DATEPART(year, dDate) AS varchar) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(month, dDate) AS varchar) 
                      + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(day, dDate) AS varchar) AS datetime) AS dMydate
FROM         dbo.fw_labels

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_fwLAbelControl
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.cProduct, dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.cColour, dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.nAvailable, dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.dDate, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.dMydate, dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused.dship, dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused.cColour AS Expr1, dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused.LabelsUsed
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3 ON dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused.dship = dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.dMydate AND 
                      dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused.cColour = dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.cColour
ORDER BY dbo.vm_mk_fw_label3.dMydate DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_fwlabelsused
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dship, cColour, COUNT(cColour) AS LabelsUsed
FROM         dbo.[vw_SL_Fastway labels vs invoice]
GROUP BY dship, cColour
ORDER BY dship

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Gl_Balances
AS
SELECT     cacctid, SUM(Month1) AS Month1, SUM(Month2) AS ASMonth2, SUM(Month3) AS ASMonth3, SUM(Month4) AS ASMonth4, SUM(Month5) AS ASMonth5, SUM(Month6) 
                      AS Month6, SUM(Month7) AS ASMonth7, SUM(Month8) AS Month8, SUM(Month9) AS Month9, SUM(Month10) AS Month10, SUM(Month11) AS Month11, SUM(Month12) 
                      AS ASMonth12, InvYear, Types AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_GlJournals
GROUP BY cacctid, InvYear, Types

WHERE      (dbo.glabal.cyear > '2015')
union ALL 
SELECT      'Actual' AS cType, dbo.glabal.cacctid,dbo .glabal.cyear, CAST(dbo.glabal.cyear + '/04/01' AS DATEtime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glabal.ncpdamt10 AS Amount

WHERE      (dbo.glabal.cyear > '2015')

union ALL

WHERE      (dbo.glabal.cyear > '2015')


union ALL

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_GLBudMaster

                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt5, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt6, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt7, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt8, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt13, dbo.glabud.cbudid AS 'Description'

                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_GlJournals
AS
SELECT     cacctid, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 3 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month1, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 4 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month2, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) 
                      = 5 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month3, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 6 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month4, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 7 THEN abs(ntrsamt) 
                      END AS Month5, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 8 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month6, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 9 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month7, 
                      CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 10 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month8, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 11 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month9, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) 
                      = 12 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month10, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 1 THEN abs(ntrsamt) END AS Month11, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) = 2 THEN abs(ntrsamt) 
                      END AS Month12, CASE WHEN month(dtrs) >= 3 THEN year(dtrs) WHEN month(dtrs) < 3 THEN year(dtrs) - 1 END AS InvYear, 'Non Invoice' AS Types
FROM         dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (ctrstype <> 'invc')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_GwpRule
AS

                      dbo.soofrule.cFromList, dbo.soofrule.cGetList, dbo.soofrule.cMaxQty, dbo.soofrule.cMinQty, dbo.soofrule.cMaxPerc, dbo.soofrule.cMaxValue, dbo.soofrule.cMinPerc, 
                      dbo.soofrule.nValue, dbo.soofrule.nQuantity, dbo.soofrule.nPerc, dbo.soofrule.nOption, dbo.soofrule.nMaxPromo, dbo.soofrule.cOfferItem, 
                      dbo.sooflist.cCampno AS Expr2, dbo.sooflist.nListNo, dbo.sooflist.cListType, dbo.sooflist.cListGroup, dbo.sooflist.cItemno, dbo.sooflist.cType, dbo.sooflist.cClass, 
                      dbo.sooflist.cProdline, dbo.sooflist.cType1, dbo.sooflist.cSponCat, dbo.sooflist.nQty, dbo.sooflist.nPrice, dbo.sooflist.nDiscP, dbo.sooflist.lExcept, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.icitem.lmlm
FROM         dbo.soofhead LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soofrule ON dbo.soofhead.cUid = dbo.soofrule.cUid_Head LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.sooflist ON dbo.soofrule.cUid_Head = dbo.sooflist.cUid_head LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.sooflist.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

                      dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.soofrule.cMinValue, dbo.soofhead.nRuletype, dbo.vm_mk_GWP_Forecast.nPriceExl, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_GWP_Forecast.nfrcsqty, dbo.vm_mk_GWP_Forecast.lfree, dbo.vm_mk_GWP_Forecast.lspecial

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_GWPRuleSetup

                      dbo.soofhead.dto, dbo.soofrule.cUid_Head, dbo.soofrule.cCampno AS Expr2, dbo.soofrule.cFromList, dbo.soofrule.cGetList, dbo.soofrule.cMaxQty, 
                      dbo.soofrule.cMaxValue, dbo.soofrule.cMaxPerc, dbo.soofrule.cMinQty, dbo.soofrule.cMinValue, dbo.soofrule.cMinPerc, dbo.soofrule.nValue, dbo.soofrule.nQuantity, 
                      dbo.soofrule.nPerc, dbo.soofrule.nOption, dbo.soofrule.nMaxPromo, dbo.soofrule.cOfferItem, dbo.sooflist.cUid_head AS cRuleRef, dbo.sooflist.cCampno AS Expr5,

                      dbo.sooflist.cType1, dbo.sooflist.cSponCat, dbo.sooflist.nQty, dbo.sooflist.nPrice, dbo.sooflist.nDiscP, dbo.sooflist.lExcept, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, 
                      dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.soofhead INNER JOIN
                      dbo.soofrule ON dbo.soofhead.cUid = dbo.soofrule.cUid_Head AND dbo.soofhead.ccampno = dbo.soofrule.cCampno INNER JOIN

                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.sooflist.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.sooflist.cCampno = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO AND dbo.sooflist.cItemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_GWPSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT socamp.cCampNo, soofhead.cDescrip, soofhead.nRuletype, soofhead.dfrom, soofhead.dto, sostrs.csono, sostrs.citemno, sostrs.nsalesamt, 
                      sostrs.nordqty, sostrs.ndiscamt, sostrs.cdescript, sostrs.lfree, sostrs.ncost, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.ctype, sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.icitem.lmlm
FROM         dbo.socamp AS socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.soofhead AS soofhead ON socamp.cCampNo = soofhead.ccampno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs AS sostrs ON soofhead.cUid = sostrs.ccampuid INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON sostrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
ORDER BY soofhead.cDescrip

FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN

                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_InvoiceUser
AS
SELECT     distinct cinvno, centerby
FROM         dbo.arinvc
union all
SELECT    distinct  cinvno, centerby
FROM         dbo.arinvch

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_itemtospon1
AS
SELECT     CAST(YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS varchar(5)) + CAST(MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS varchar(5)) + CAST(dbo.aritrs.citemno AS varchar(15)) 
                      + CAST(dbo.aritrs.nprice AS varchar(10)) AS arLink, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.csono
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.citemno = '1020102')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_itemtospon2
AS
SELECT     CAST(YEAR(dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS varchar(5)) + CAST(MONTH(dbo.socamp.dFrom) AS varchar(5)) + CAST(dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AS varchar(15)) 
                      + CAST(dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS varchar(10)) AS PPRLink
FROM         dbo.socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
WHERE     (dbo.socamp.ldrp = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Jan_All_Sales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, Invoicemonth, SUM(nshipqty * nprcinctx) AS AllSalesValue
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'm%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'j%')) AND (Invoicemonth = '2016/01/01' OR
                      Invoicemonth = '2017/01/01')
GROUP BY ccustno, Invoicemonth
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Jul2015SponPS
AS
SELECT     csponsor, PersonalSales
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_July2015PS

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_July2015
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(nsalesamt) * 1.14 AS SalesAmount
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2015-07-01') AND (dinvoice <= '2015-07-31') AND (ldscntble = 1) AND (ndiscrate = 25)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_July2015PS
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cstatus, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cLevel, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.CustSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.company, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ltl, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupSales, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalMLM, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupMLM, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.MajorStatus, dbo.vm_mk_July2015.SalesAmount, 
                      dbo.arcust.ccompany AS CustName, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName, dbo.arcust.cphone1
FROM         dbo.arcust RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure ON arcust_1.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor ON 
                      dbo.arcust.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_July2015.ccustno
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth = '2015-07-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_july2016
AS
SELECT     ccustno, SUM(nsalesamt) * 1.14 AS SalesAmount
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2016-07-01') AND (dinvoice <= '2016-08-01') AND (ldscntble = 1) AND (ndiscrate = 25)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_July2016PS
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cstatus, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cLevel, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.CustSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.company, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ltl, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupSales, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalMLM, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupMLM, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.MajorStatus, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS CustName, 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName, dbo.arcust.cphone1, vm_mk_july2016_1.SalesAmount AS July2016, vm_mk_July2015_1.SalesAmount AS July2015, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015.SalesAmount AS [2015SponPS], dbo.vm_mk_july2016.SalesAmount AS [2016SponPS]
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_July2015 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure ON arcust_1.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor ON 
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_july2016 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor = dbo.vm_mk_july2016.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015 AS vm_mk_July2015_1 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = vm_mk_July2015_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_july2016 AS vm_mk_july2016_1 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = vm_mk_july2016_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth = '2016-07-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_JulyResults
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.vm_mk_July2015.SalesAmount AS July2015, dbo.vm_mk_july2016.SalesAmount AS July2016, dbo.arcust.cstatus
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_July2015.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_july2016 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_july2016.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_KitNoComp
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.icikit.ccompno IS NULL)
ORDER BY dbo.icikit.ccompno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_KitTotPrice
AS
SELECT        dbo.icikit.ckititemno, SUM(dbo.icitem.nprice * dbo.icikit.nqty) AS TotKitPrice
FROM            dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                         dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = dbo.icitem.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.icikit.ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_L1_Detail1
AS
SELECT     CAST(Invoicemonth AS smalldatetime) AS Invoicemonth, crevnacc, CustomerClass, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Discount, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Amount, SUM(ncost * nshipqty) 
                      AS Cost
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= '2013/01/01') AND (crevnacc LIKE '300%')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth, crevnacc, CustomerClass

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_L1_GlGroups
AS
SELECT     cacctid, cdescript, ccatgid, CASE WHEN cacctid >= '300100' AND cacctid <= '305000-9999 ' THEN 'B' WHEN cacctid >= '490000' AND 
                      cacctid <= '490000-9999 ' THEN 'C' WHEN cacctid >= '480000' AND cacctid <= '480000-9999 ' THEN 'D' WHEN cacctid >= '400100' AND 
                      cacctid <= '400100-9999' THEN 'E1' WHEN cacctid IN ('550000-0000', '550000-620000', '600000-0000', '470000-4400', '470000-6200', '471000-4300', '471000-4400', 
                      '47200-4400', '474000-6200') THEN 'E3' WHEN (cacctid >= '470000' AND cacctid <= '474000-9999') OR
                      cacctid = '500000-0000' THEN 'E2' WHEN cacctid >= '642150' AND cacctid <= '642150-9999' THEN 'F' WHEN cacctid = '642200-4000' OR
                      cacctid = '642220-4000' OR
                      cacctid = '642220-4200' THEN 'F' WHEN (cacctid >= '642200-0000' AND cacctid <= '642200-9999') THEN 'G' WHEN (cacctid >= '631000' AND cacctid <= '631000-9999') 
                      THEN 'H' WHEN cacctid >= '634000' AND cacctid <= '634000-9999' THEN 'H' WHEN cacctid >= '700800' AND 
                      cacctid <= '700800-9999' THEN 'J' WHEN cacctid >= '690100' AND cacctid <= '695300-9999' THEN 'K' WHEN cacctid >= '700050' AND 
                      cacctid <= '700150-9999' THEN 'L' WHEN cacctid >= '700200' AND cacctid <= '700600-9999' OR
                      cacctid = '700050-2600' THEN 'M' WHEN cacctid >= '800100' AND cacctid <= '802000-9999' THEN 'N' ELSE 'I' END AS Groupnumber, 
                      CASE WHEN cacctid >= '300100' AND cacctid <= '305000-9999 ' THEN 'Revenue' WHEN cacctid >= '490000' AND 
                      cacctid <= '490000-9999 ' THEN 'Discount Allowed' WHEN cacctid >= '480000' AND cacctid <= '480000-9999 ' THEN 'Consultant Rebate' WHEN cacctid >= '400100' AND
                       cacctid <= '400100-9999' THEN 'Cost Of Sales' WHEN cacctid IN ('550000-0000', '550000-620000', '600000-0000', '470000-4400', '470000-6200', '471000-4300', 
                      '471000-4400', '47200-4400', '474000-6200') THEN 'Stock Related' WHEN (cacctid >= '470000' AND cacctid <= '474000-9999') OR
                      cacctid = '500000-0000' THEN 'COS Related' WHEN cacctid >= '642150' AND cacctid <= '642150-9999' THEN 'Despatch and Delivery' WHEN cacctid = '642200-4000' OR
                      cacctid = '642220-4000' OR
                      cacctid = '642220-4200' THEN 'Despatch and Delivery' WHEN cacctid >= '642200-0000' AND 
                      cacctid <= '642200-9999' THEN 'Despatch and Delivery Recoveries' WHEN (cacctid >= '631000' AND cacctid <= '631000-9999') 
                      THEN 'Other Income' WHEN cacctid >= '634000' AND cacctid <= '634000-9999' THEN 'Other Income' WHEN cacctid >= '700800' AND 
                      cacctid <= '700800-9999' THEN 'Management Fees' WHEN cacctid >= '690100' AND 
                      cacctid <= '695300-9999' THEN 'Depreciation Expenses' WHEN cacctid >= '700050' AND 
                      cacctid <= '700150-9999' THEN 'Interest Expenses' WHEN cacctid >= '700200' AND cacctid <= '700600-9999' OR
                      cacctid = '700050-2600' THEN 'Interest Received' WHEN cacctid >= '800100' AND 
                      cacctid <= '802000-9999' THEN 'Tax Expenses' ELSE 'Operating Expenses' END AS Groupname, cExpType, cGlGroup
FROM         dbo.glacct
WHERE     (ccatgid IN ('J1', 'L1', 'M1', 'H1', 'I1', 'T1', 'T2', 'O1', 'L2'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.m_mk_L1_Groups
AS
SELECT     cacctid, cdescript, ccatgid, cExpType, cGlGroup, ccatgtype, CatDescrip, MainGroup, 
                      CASE WHEN MainGroup = 'Sales' THEN 'Gross Profit' WHEN MainGroup = 'Cost of Sales' THEN 'Gross Profit' WHEN MainGroup = 'Discount Allowed' THEN 'Gross Profit'
                       WHEN MainGroup = 'Consultant Rebate' THEN 'Gross Profit' ELSE 'Nett Profit' END AS 'NewGroup'
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_L1_GlGroups

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MelindaJuly
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cstatus, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.cLevel, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.CustSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.company, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ltl, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalSales, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupSales, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.PersonalMLM, 
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.GroupMLM, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.MajorStatus, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS CustName, 
                      arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName, dbo.arcust.cphone1, vm_mk_july2016_1.SalesAmount AS July2016, vm_mk_July2015_1.SalesAmount AS July2015, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015.SalesAmount AS [2015SponPS], dbo.vm_mk_july2016.SalesAmount AS [2016SponPS]
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_july2016 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 INNER JOIN
                      Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure ON arcust_1.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor ON 
                      dbo.vm_mk_july2016.ccustno = Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.csponsor = dbo.vm_mk_July2015.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_July2015 AS vm_mk_July2015_1 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = vm_mk_July2015_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_july2016 AS vm_mk_july2016_1 ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = vm_mk_july2016_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure.Invoicemonth = '2016-07-01')

                      dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.cpagepos, dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.PPRSponType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.cCampNO, dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.lfree

                      dbo.icuprc ON dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.cItemNo = dbo.icuprc.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icuprc.ctype = 'C') AND (dbo.icuprc.dspstart >= GETDATE()) AND (dbo.icuprc.dspstart < DATEADD(month, 12, GETDATE()))
ORDER BY dbo.vm_mk_soppr2.dInvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLM_Historical
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno, RTRIM(rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor) AS csponsor, rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor0, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus1, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cLevel, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ltl, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nSalesamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesdisc, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nsalesdisc, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.nrebate, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngrebateamt, rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccompany, rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone1, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone2, arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, arcust.ccity, arcust.cstate, arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), 
                      GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AS Expr2, 
                      SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1, SR_MLM_Level1_History.Expr1 AS Expr3, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.GRsales, arcust_1.dcreate
FROM         SR_MLM_Personal_Historical INNER JOIN
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY INNER JOIN
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY ON rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      arcust ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = arcust.ccustno ON SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.csponsor = rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND 
                      SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      arcust AS arcust_1 ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = arcust_1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.csponsor AND 
                      rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.cLevel1 AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.date LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Level1_History ON rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = SR_MLM_Level1_History.date AND rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1
WHERE     (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor, rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor0, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus1, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cLevel, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus, rebatedtlMONTHLY.lTL, 0 AS nsalesamt, rebatedtlMONTHLY.ngSalesDisc, 0 AS nSalesDisc, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nGSalesAmt, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebate, 0 AS nGrebateamt, arcust.ccompany, arcust.cphone1, arcust.cphone2, arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, 
                      arcust.ccity, arcust.cstate, arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, 
                      arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, '' AS Expr2, '' AS Expr4, 0 AS Expr3, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, 0 AS Expr5, arcust.dcreate
FROM         arcust INNER JOIN
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY ON arcust.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      SR_MLM_Personal_Historical ON arcust.ccustno = SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.ccustno AND SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112)
WHERE     ((rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 111)) NOT IN
                          (SELECT     csponsor + CONVERT(char(12), dmonth, 111) AS Expr1
                            FROM          rbtmlmMONTHLY)) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor) AND (rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt <> 0 and SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc<> 0 ) AND 
                      (rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno BETWEEN '100000' AND '699999')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLM_Sponsor

                      mlmcust_11.dcreate AS L11_Create, mlmcust_12.ccustno AS L12_Cust, mlmcust_12.dcreate AS L12_Create, mlmcust_13.ccustno AS L13_Cust, 
                      mlmcust_13.dcreate AS L13_Create, mlmcust_14.ccustno AS L14_Cust, mlmcust_14.dcreate AS L14_Create, mlmcust_15.ccustno AS L15_Cust,

                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_7 ON mlmcust_6.ccustno = mlmcust_7.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_8 ON mlmcust_7.ccustno = mlmcust_8.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_9 ON mlmcust_8.ccustno = mlmcust_9.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_10 ON mlmcust_9.ccustno = mlmcust_10.csponsor ON mlmcust_11.csponsor = mlmcust_10.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_12 ON mlmcust_11.date = mlmcust_12.date AND mlmcust_11.ccustno = mlmcust_12.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_13 ON mlmcust_12.ccustno = mlmcust_13.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_14 ON mlmcust_13.ccustno = mlmcust_14.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_15 ON mlmcust_14.ccustno = mlmcust_15.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_16 ON mlmcust_15.ccustno = mlmcust_16.csponsor INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_17 ON mlmcust_16.ccustno = mlmcust_17.csponsor ON mlmcust_2.ccustno = mlmcust_3.csponsor INNER JOIN

WHERE     (mlmcust_1.ccustno = '510708')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLMPerMonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLMSponDetail

                      SponComp, caddr1, caddr2, ccity, cstate, czip, ccountry, Status, nrebateamt, cemail, Co, custstatus, lemail, ReportDate, Expr1, Expr2, cLevel1, Expr3, PSales,

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLMStatus
AS
SELECT     ccustno, YEAR(dmonth) AS MLMYear, MONTH(dmonth) AS MLMMonth, MAX(CASE WHEN cstatus = '' THEN 25 ELSE CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) END) 
                      AS Level0, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 1' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 1' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END)
                       AS Level1, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 2' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 2' AND 
                      STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level2, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 3' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 3' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level3, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 4' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 4' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level4, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 5' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 5' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level5, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 6' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 6' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level6, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 7' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 7' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level7, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 8' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 8' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level8, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 9' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 9' AND
                       STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level9, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 10' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) 
                      WHEN clevel = 'Level 10' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level10, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 11' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) 
                      AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 11' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level11, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 12' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 
                      2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 12' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level12, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 13' AND 
                      STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 13' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level13, 
                      MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 14' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 14' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) 
                      AS Level14, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 15' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 15' AND 
                      STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level15, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 16' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) AS int) 
                      WHEN clevel = 'Level 16' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level16, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 17' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 2, 2) 
                      AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 17' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level17, MAX(CASE WHEN clevel = 'Level 18' AND STATUS <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(Status, 
                      2, 2) AS int) WHEN clevel = 'Level 18' AND STATUS = '' THEN 25 END) AS Level18
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical
WHERE     (dmonth >= '2014/10/01')
GROUP BY ccustno, YEAR(dmonth), MONTH(dmonth)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_MLMTrans
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS nsalesamt, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS nDiscamt, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS InvYear,

GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NewCampKits
AS

                  dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.Campaign.cMonthName AS cDescript, dbo.Campaign.ID AS cCampno, dbo.CampDetail.cItemno AS citemno, dbo.CampDetail.nQtyLimit AS nQtylimit, dbo.CampDetail.nActualunits AS nSales, 
                  dbo.CampDetail.nPrice AS nPriceExl, dbo.CampDetail.nDiscRate AS nDiscount, dbo.Campaign.dTo, dbo.CampDetail.nForeCast AS nFrcqty, dbo.CampDetail.cSponType AS cSpontype, dbo.Campaign.dFrom, 1 AS Expr1, 1 AS ldrp, 15 AS nvatRate, 1 AS lportal
FROM        dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = icitem_1.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.CampDetail ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.CampDetail.cItemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.Campaign ON dbo.CampDetail.CampaignID = dbo.Campaign.ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NewCampMort2b
AS
SELECT     InvYear, InvMonth, citemno, cdescript, ctype, MySpon, iciponcat, crevnacc, nprcinctx, nprice, ncost, SUM(nshipqty) AS ShipQty, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Discounts, SUM(nsalesamt) AS SalesAmnt, 'Actual' AS Expr1, 0 AS Normalprc, dinvoice, cPageNo, cPagepos, 
                  PPRSponType, CustomerClass, cCampno, nPromo AS Offer
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_NewCampMort3b
WHERE     (CustomerClass <> 'export') AND (crevnacc <> '300100-2600') AND (crevnacc LIKE '3%')
GROUP BY InvYear, InvMonth, citemno, cdescript, ctype, MySpon, iciponcat, crevnacc, nprcinctx, nprice, ncost, ndiscamt, nsalesamt, dinvoice, cPageNo, cPagepos, PPRSponType, CustomerClass, cCampno, nPromo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NewCampMort3b
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevncode, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ncost, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprice, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid, dbo.icitem.citemno AS icitemNo, dbo.icitem.cdescript AS icidespript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.csponcat AS iciponcat, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csono, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.nPrice AS nPriceExl, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cPageNo, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cOffer, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cCampno, CASE WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) 
                  = 1 THEN 'January' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 2 THEN 'February' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 3 THEN 'March' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 4 THEN 'April' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) 
                  = 5 THEN 'May' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 6 THEN 'June' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 7 THEN 'July' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 8 THEN 'August' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) 
                  = 9 THEN 'September' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 10 THEN 'October' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 11 THEN 'November' WHEN month(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) = 12 THEN 'December' END AS InvMonth, 
                  YEAR(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) AS InvYear, MONTH(dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dinvoice) AS Monthno, CAST(dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cOffer AS int) AS nPromo, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType, 'Sales' AS TransType, ' ' AS MySpon, ' ' AS PPRSponType, 
                  dbo.icitem.ctype, '' AS cPagepos, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.csppruid = dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cuid
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.crevnacc = '300100-0000') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth = '2022/08/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_newCampsales
AS
SELECT     Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.InvYear, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.InvMonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.cItemno, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.nprcinctx, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.nprice, 
                  Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.ncost, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.dinvoice, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.nshipQty, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.ndiscamt, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.nsalesamt, dbo.icitem.cdescript, 
                  dbo.icitem.csponcat AS iciponcat, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx AS Normalprc, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType AS PPrSponType, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cCampno, dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cPageNo, CAST(dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cOffer AS Int) AS nPromo, 
                  'Consultant' AS CustomerClass, '' AS cPagePos, dbo.icitem.ctype, CASE WHEN dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType = 'F' OR
                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType = 'S' THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType = 'SMS' THEN 'SMS' WHEN dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType = 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cSponType = 'O' THEN 'OBSOLETE' ELSE 'PROMOTION'
                   END AS MYSPON, Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.crevacc AS crevnacc
FROM        Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.cItemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail ON Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_SalesTrans.cuid = dbo.vm_mk_CampDetail.cuid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NewRecruitPerSonsor
AS
SELECT        csponsor, Invoicemonth, COUNT(ccustno) AS NewRecruits
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_Custstarter
GROUP BY csponsor, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NewRecruits
AS
SELECT        COUNT(ccustno) AS Recruits, cclass, COUNT(DISTINCT csponsor) AS Sponsors, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), '01') AS Startermonth
FROM            dbo.arcust
GROUP BY cclass, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), '01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_NoProdMoved
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, SUM(dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty) AS NoItems, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, 'KitItems'as ItemType
FROM         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem = 1) GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth

union all

SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, SUM( dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty) AS NoItems, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, 'NONKitItems'as ItemType

FROM         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ckititemno = dbo.icitem.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.lkititem = 0)  and   dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno <> 'AI/19005/13         '
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cinvno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_OpenOrdersLockdown
AS

FROM        dbo.vm_mk_OpenOrders INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sostrs ON dbo.vm_mk_OpenOrders.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_OrderValues
AS
SELECT        Startermonth, Invoicemonth, cinvno, ccustno, SUM(ncost * nshipqty) AS CostOfSale, SUM(nprice * nshipqty) AS RSPExcl, SUM(nprcinctx * nshipqty) AS RSP
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (Startermonth >= '2021/05/01') AND (ndiscrate > 0) AND (crevnacc LIKE '300%')
GROUP BY Startermonth, Invoicemonth, cinvno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Outlook
AS
SELECT     'OL' AS cType, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(dbo.glabud.cyear + '/03/01' AS DATEtime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt9 AS Amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'OL%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear > '2015')
union ALL 
SELECT     'OL' AS cType, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(dbo.glabud.cyear + '/04/01' AS DATEtime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt10 AS Amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'OL%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear > '2015')

union ALL 
SELECT     'OL' AS cType, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(dbo.glabud.cyear + '/05/01' AS DATEtime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt11 AS Amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glabud.cbudid LIKE 'OL%') AND (dbo.glabud.cyear > '2015')


union ALL 
SELECT     'OL' AS cType, dbo.glbugt.cacctid, dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(dbo.glabud.cyear + '/06/01' AS DATEtime) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt12 AS Amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_RaceMaster
AS
SELECT     COUNT(ccustno) AS 'No of', cRace
FROM         dbo.arcust
WHERE     (cstatus = 'A') AND (cclass = 'Consultant')
GROUP BY cRace

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_reactivated
AS
SELECT        ccustno, MAX(InsUpdDate) AS ReactiveDate
FROM            dbo.changes
WHERE        (InsUpdDate >= '2024-07-01') AND (cfieldname = 'cstatus') AND (codlvalue = 'I')
GROUP BY ccustno

/****** Script for SelectTopNRows command from SSMS  ******/
CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Mk_reactivations
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_rebatemonthlyandTargets
AS

FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_Mk_2016Targets INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY ON Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_Mk_2016Targets.cSponsor = dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_rebatemonthlyandTargets2
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_received
AS
SELECT        cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno, cwarehouse, clineitem, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cdescript, csernum, cmeasure, cinvno, cbin, ctaxcode, drequest, dreceive, lstock, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, nqtydec, ndiscrate,
                          ntaxver, nrecamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfrecamt, nfdiscamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nboqty, nrecqty, ncnlqty, ncost, ncstinctx, nfcost, nfcstinctx
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_AllPOTrs

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_RecentOnders
AS
SELECT     CAST(RIGHT(RTRIM(csono), 6) AS Int) AS SoNo, ccustno, citemno, SUM(nordqty) AS OnOrder, SUM(nshipqty) AS Shipped
FROM        dbo.sostrs
WHERE     (drequest >= DATEADD(d, - 3, GETDATE()))
GROUP BY ccustno, citemno, csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Recruitdates
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS NoRecruits, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dcreate) - 1), dcreate) AS datetime) AS Joinmonth
FROM         dbo.arcust
WHERE     (cclass = 'Consultant')
GROUP BY CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dcreate) - 1), dcreate) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Recruiters
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Recruiter, dbo.arcust.ccustno AS NewCust, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS NewName, dbo.arcust.dstarter AS NEwStart, arcust_1.ccompany AS RecruiterName, 
                         arcust_1.dstarter AS REcruitStart
FROM            dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Mk_RecruitRace
AS
SELECT        dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.dstarter AS Starter, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno, dbo.arcust.cGender, 
                         dbo.arcust.cIdNo, dbo.arcust.cRace, dbo.arcust.dBirthday, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty
FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.cclass = 'Firstkit') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.Invoicemonth >= '2015/11/01') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.CustomerClass = 'Consultant') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno <> 'AI/19041/16 ') AND 
                         (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno <> 'AI/19045/17') AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.nshipqty > 0) AND (dbo.vm_mk_aritrs.citemno <> 'AI/19058/17')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_RecruitsActTarget
AS
SELECT     Month, RecruitTarget as Recruits,'Targets'as Types
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_RecruitTargets

Union all
Select  [Joinmonth] as 'Month', [NoRecruits] as 'Recruits' , 'Actual' as Types
  FROM [amanniquenam].[dbo].[vm_mk_RecruitDates]



union all
Select  [Joinmonth] as 'Month', [NoRecruits] as 'Recruits' , 'Actual' as Types
      
  FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].[vm_mk_Recruitdates]

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Registrations
AS
SELECT        ccustno, ccompany, cstatus, dstarter, dcreate, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dcreate) - 1), dcreate) AS datetime) AS DateCreated, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dstarter) - 1), dstarter) AS datetime) 
                         AS Startermonth
FROM            dbo.arcust

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_revsales
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice ,SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) AS nsalesamnt, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS ndisamnt, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS ntaxamnt1, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt2) AS ntaxamnt2, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt3) AS ntaxamnt3
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.crevncode,dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
UNION
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.crevncode,dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt) AS nsalesamnt, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) AS ndisamn, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1) AS ntaxamnt1, 
                      SUM(dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt2) AS ntaxamnt2, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt3) ASntaxamnt3
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno

GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.crevncode,dbo.arinvch.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_revsales2
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_revsales.crevncode AS crevcode, dbo.vm_mk_revsales.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_revsales.nsalesamnt, dbo.vm_mk_revsales.ndisamnt, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_revsales.ntaxamnt1, dbo.vm_mk_revsales.ntaxamnt2, dbo.vm_mk_revsales.ntaxamnt3, dbo.arrevn.cdescript, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, YEAR(dbo.vm_mk_revsales.dinvoice) AS repyear, MONTH(dbo.vm_mk_revsales.dinvoice) AS repmonth
FROM         dbo.arrevn INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_revsales ON dbo.arrevn.crevncode = dbo.vm_mk_revsales.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_rma
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.crmano, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.racord.ccustno AS RMACust, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.ractrs.citemno, 
                      dbo.ractrs.cdescript, dbo.ractrs.cwarehouse, dbo.ractrs.nshipqty, dbo.ractrs.ncmpqty, dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS arshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.cvernum, dbo.aritrs.ntaxver, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.racrmk.mremark
FROM         dbo.ractrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.racord ON dbo.ractrs.crmano = dbo.racord.crmano INNER JOIN
                      dbo.racrmk ON dbo.racord.crmano = dbo.racrmk.crmano INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.ractrs.crmano = dbo.aritrs.crmano AND dbo.ractrs.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.racord.crmano = dbo.arinvc.crmano
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt < 0)

union all

SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvch.crmano, dbo.arinvch.ccustno, dbo.racordh.ccustno AS RMACust, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.ractrsh.citemno, 
                      dbo.ractrsh.cdescript, dbo.ractrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.ractrsh.nshipqty, dbo.ractrsh.ncmpqty, dbo.arinvch.nfsalesamt, dbo.aritrsh.nordqty, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS arshipqty, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nprice, dbo.aritrsh.cvernum, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxver, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.racrmk.mremark
FROM         dbo.ractrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.racordh ON dbo.ractrsh.crmano = dbo.racordh.crmano INNER JOIN
                      dbo.racrmk ON dbo.racordh.crmano = dbo.racrmk.crmano INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.ractrsh.crmano = dbo.aritrsh.crmano AND dbo.ractrsh.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.racordh.crmano = dbo.arinvch.crmano
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.nfsalesamt < 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_salesAOP
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvg1a
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.arinv, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.dinvoice, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cuid, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cinvno, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cwarehouse, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.csono, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cshipno, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.clineitem, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.crmano, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.crtncode, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.csolineitm, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cshlineitm, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.citemno, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cspeccode1, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cspeccode2, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cdescript, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cmeasure, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ccommiss, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cstatus, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.crevncode, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cbin, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ctaxcode, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lkititem, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lupsell, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lstock, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lmodikit, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ltaxable1, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ltaxable2, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lowrmk, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lptrmk, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nqtydec, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ntaxver, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ndiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ntaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ntaxamt2, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ntaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nfsalesamt, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nfdiscamt, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nftaxamt1, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nftaxamt2, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nftaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nordqty, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nitmcnvqty, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ntrscnvqty, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ncost, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nprice, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nfprice, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nfprcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nweight, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nseq, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ccmpprodln, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cvernum, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nbprice, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nextnddprc, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.lfree, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cgfttype, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cSORefUId, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cSORef, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.cusername, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.nshipcost, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.csppruid, dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.icitem, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ldscntble, CASE WHEN dinvoice >= (DATEADD(month, - 4, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0))) 
                      THEN 'FiveMonth' WHEN dinvoice >= (DATEADD(month, - 5, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0))) 
                      THEN 'Sixmonth' WHEN dinvoice >= (DATEADD(month, - 10, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0))) 
                      THEN 'ElevenMonth' WHEN dinvoice >= (DATEADD(month, - 11, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0))) 
                      THEN 'oneYear' ELSE 'ToOld' END AS whens, DATEADD(month, - 4, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0)) AS FiveMonth, DATEADD(month, - 5, 
                      DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0)) AS Sixmonth, DATEADD(month, - 10, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0)) 
                      AS ElevenMonth, DATEADD(month, - 11, DATEADD(month, DATEDIFF(month, 0, SYSDATETIME()), 0)) AS oneYear, arcust_1.dcreate AS datejoined, arcust_1.ccompany, 
                      arcust_1.cclass, arcust_1.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Sponsorname, arcust_1.ccustno AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1 ON arcust_1.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, MIN(dinvoice) AS mindate, MAX(dinvoice) AS Maxdate, SUM(nfsalesamt) AS sales, SUM(nfsalesamt) / 5 AS Avg
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_saleAvg1
GROUP BY ccustno
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvg3
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Expr1, dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.mindate, dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.Maxdate, 
                      dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.sales, dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.Avg, dbo.arcust.cstatus, dbo.arcust.dcreate
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_salesavg2.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.arcust.dcreate < '2013/10/01')
ORDER BY Expr1

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvgConsult
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.datejoined, dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.ccompany, 
                      SUM(dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.nshipqty * dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.nprice * 1.14) AS InvValue, COUNT(DISTINCT dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.cinvno) 
                      AS NoInv
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.dinvoice >= '2013/08/01') AND (dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.dinvoice <= '2014/07/31') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A')
GROUP BY dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.ccustno, dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.datejoined, dbo.vm_mk_salesAvgNolimit.ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvgConsultAll
AS

                      dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvgConsult.NoInv
FROM         dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvgConsult ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = dbo.vm_mk_SalesAvgConsult.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_salesavgInvoice
