CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesBudget
AS
SELECT     dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(dbo.glabud.cyear - 1))) + '-07-01' AS date) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.cbudid AS Type, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt1 AS amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid
WHERE     (dbo.glbugt.cacctid LIKE '300100-0000%') AND cyear >= 2016
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.glabud.cyear, CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(dbo.glabud.cyear - 1))) + '-08-01' AS date) AS Invoicemonth, dbo.glbugt.cbudid AS Type, 
                      dbo.glbugt.ncpdamt2 AS amount
FROM         dbo.glabud INNER JOIN
                      dbo.glbugt ON dbo.glabud.cbudid = dbo.glbugt.cbudid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesBudNam
AS
SELECT     amount AS salesamount, Invoicemonth, 'Namibia' AS Provice, 'Consultant' AS CustomerClass, 'Outlook' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_salesBudgetNam
where Type like 'OL%'

union all
SELECT     amount AS salesamount, Invoicemonth, 'Namibia' AS Provice, 'Consultant' AS CustomerClass, 'AOP' AS Type
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_salesBudgetNam
where Type like 'AOP%'

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesDash
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.mlmcust.ccustno AS Sponsor, mlmcust_1.ccustno AS L1, mlmcust_1.date AS dGenerate, mlmcust_2.ccustno AS L2, mlmcust_3.ccustno AS L3,
                       mlmcust_4.ccustno AS L4, mlmcust_5.ccustno AS L5, mlmcust_6.ccustno AS L6, mlmcust_7.ccustno AS L7, mlmcust_8.ccustno AS L8, mlmcust_9.ccustno AS L9, 
                      mlmcust_10.ccustno AS L10, mlmcust_11.ccustno AS L11, mlmcust_12.ccustno AS L12, mlmcust_13.ccustno AS L13, mlmcust_14.ccustno AS L14, 
                      mlmcust_15.ccustno AS L15, mlmcust_16.ccustno AS L16, mlmcust_17.ccustno AS L17, mlmcust_18.ccustno AS L18, mlmcust_19.ccustno AS L19, 
                      dbo.mlmcust.dcreate AS SponJoin, mlmcust_1.dcreate AS L1_Joined, mlmcust_2.dcreate AS L2_Joined, mlmcust_3.dcreate AS L3_Joined, 
                      mlmcust_4.dcreate AS L4_Joined, mlmcust_5.dcreate AS L5_Joined, mlmcust_6.dcreate AS L6_Joined, mlmcust_7.dcreate AS L7_joined, 
                      mlmcust_8.dcreate AS L8_Joined, mlmcust_9.dcreate AS L9_Joined, mlmcust_10.dcreate AS L10_Joined, mlmcust_11.dcreate AS L11_Joined, 
                      mlmcust_12.dcreate AS L12_Joined, mlmcust_13.dcreate AS L13_Joined, mlmcust_14.dcreate AS L14_Joined, mlmcust_15.dcreate AS L15_Joined, 
                      mlmcust_16.dcreate AS L16_Joined, mlmcust_17.dcreate AS L17_Joined, mlmcust_18.dcreate AS L18_Joined, mlmcust_19.dcreate AS L19_Joined, 
                      mlmcust_20.ccustno AS L20, mlmcust_20.dcreate AS L20_Joined, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, SYSDATETIME()) - 1), SYSDATETIME()) AS datetime) 
                      AS Currentmonth, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, mlmcust_1.date) - 1), mlmcust_1.date) AS datetime) AS Generatedate
FROM         dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_18 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_19 ON mlmcust_18.ccustno = mlmcust_19.csponsor AND mlmcust_18.date = mlmcust_19.date INNER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_20 ON mlmcust_19.ccustno = mlmcust_20.csponsor AND mlmcust_19.date = mlmcust_20.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_17 ON mlmcust_18.date = mlmcust_17.date AND mlmcust_18.csponsor = mlmcust_17.ccustno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_16 ON mlmcust_17.date = mlmcust_16.date AND mlmcust_17.csponsor = mlmcust_16.ccustno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_15 ON mlmcust_16.csponsor = mlmcust_15.ccustno AND mlmcust_16.date = mlmcust_15.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_14 ON mlmcust_15.csponsor = mlmcust_14.ccustno AND mlmcust_15.date = mlmcust_14.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_13 ON mlmcust_14.csponsor = mlmcust_13.ccustno AND mlmcust_14.date = mlmcust_13.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_12 ON mlmcust_13.csponsor = mlmcust_12.ccustno AND mlmcust_13.date = mlmcust_12.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_11 ON mlmcust_12.csponsor = mlmcust_11.ccustno AND mlmcust_12.date = mlmcust_11.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_10 ON mlmcust_11.csponsor = mlmcust_10.ccustno AND mlmcust_11.date = mlmcust_10.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_9 ON mlmcust_10.csponsor = mlmcust_9.ccustno AND mlmcust_10.date = mlmcust_9.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_8 ON mlmcust_9.csponsor = mlmcust_8.ccustno AND mlmcust_9.date = mlmcust_8.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_7 ON mlmcust_8.csponsor = mlmcust_7.ccustno AND mlmcust_8.date = mlmcust_7.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_6 ON mlmcust_7.csponsor = mlmcust_6.ccustno AND mlmcust_7.date = mlmcust_6.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_5 ON mlmcust_6.csponsor = mlmcust_5.ccustno AND mlmcust_6.date = mlmcust_5.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_4 ON mlmcust_5.csponsor = mlmcust_4.ccustno AND mlmcust_5.date = mlmcust_4.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_3 ON mlmcust_4.csponsor = mlmcust_3.ccustno AND mlmcust_4.date = mlmcust_3.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_2 ON mlmcust_3.csponsor = mlmcust_2.ccustno AND mlmcust_3.date = mlmcust_2.date RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.mlmcust AS mlmcust_1 ON dbo.mlmcust.date = mlmcust_1.date AND dbo.mlmcust.ccustno = mlmcust_1.csponsor ON 
                      mlmcust_2.csponsor = mlmcust_1.ccustno AND mlmcust_2.date = mlmcust_1.date
WHERE     (mlmcust_1.date > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2013-01-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_SalesOL
AS
SELECT     Invoicemonth, MAX(Type) AS Type, SUM(amount) AS amount, MAX(cyear) AS cyear
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_SalesBudget
WHERE     (Type LIKE 'ol%')
GROUP BY Invoicemonth

                  compplanLive.dbo.AFTransactions.Description AS AFDescrip, compplanLive.dbo.AFTransactions.nSaleAmount AS AFSalesAmnt, compplanLive.dbo.AFTransactions.nPerc AS AFPerc, compplanLive.dbo.AFTransactions.OrderID AS AFOrderId, 
                  compplanLive.dbo.AFTransactions.CustomerID AS AFShopNo, dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Custno, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Custnam, dbo.arcust.cphone2 AS CustPhone, arcust_1.ccustno AS Sponsor, arcust_1.cphone2 AS SponPhone, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponName,

CREATE VIEW dbo.VM_MK_SOH
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS SOH
FROM         dbo.icibin
WHERE     (cwarehouse = '4400')
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_sohwhsbin
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS soh
FROM         dbo.icibin
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_soppr
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine, dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, 
                         dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cpageno, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat, dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, dbo.sosppr.cSpontype, dbo.sosppr.cpagepos, dbo.sosppr.nversion, dbo.sosppr.lfree, 
                         dbo.sosppr.lspecial, dbo.sosppr.dfrom, dbo.sosppr.dto, dbo.sosppr.cuid, dbo.sosppr.lportal, dbo.sosppr.csponcat, dbo.sosppr.lInactive, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty, 
                         CASE WHEN cspontype = 'F' THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN cspontype = 'AG' THEN 'SALES AID' WHEN cspontype = 'ATM' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'BB' THEN 'OBSOLETE' WHEN cspontype = 'BYB' THEN
                          'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'EB' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'ELO' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'EXP' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN cspontype = 'FLYER' THEN 'OBSOLETE' WHEN cspontype
                          = 'HG' THEN 'MARKETING AID' WHEN cspontype = 'JG' THEN 'SALES AID' WHEN cspontype = 'JO' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'KIT' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'KYB' THEN 'PROMOTION'
                          WHEN cspontype = 'MA' THEN 'MARKETING AID' WHEN cspontype = 'N' THEN 'NEW' WHEN cspontype = 'O' THEN 'OBSOLETE' WHEN cspontype = 'OO' THEN 'OBSOLETE' WHEN cspontype = 'P' THEN 'PROMOTION'
                          WHEN cspontype = 'GWP' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'RG' THEN 'SALES AID' WHEN cspontype = 'RO' THEN 'PROMOTION' WHEN cspontype = 'S' THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN cspontype = 'SA' THEN 'SALES AID'
                          WHEN cspontype = 'SALES COM' THEN 'SALES AID' WHEN cspontype = 'SMS' THEN 'SMS' ELSE csponcat END AS MySpon, dbo.socamp.ldrp, CASE WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) 
                         = 1 THEN 'January' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 2 THEN 'February' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 3 THEN 'March' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 4 THEN 'April' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) 
                         = 5 THEN 'May' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 6 THEN 'June' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 7 THEN 'July' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 8 THEN 'August' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) 
                         = 9 THEN 'September' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 10 THEN 'October' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 11 THEN 'November' WHEN month(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) = 12 THEN 'December' END AS FrcInvMonth, 
                         YEAR(dbo.sosppr.dfrom) AS FrcInvYear, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 'Forecast' AS cType, dbo.sosppr.nPromo, CAST(dbo.socamp.nVatRate AS Decimal(8, 2)) AS nVatRate
FROM            dbo.sosppr INNER JOIN
                         dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.arrevn ON dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE        (dbo.sosppr.cuid <> '') AND (dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty > 0) AND (dbo.socamp.ldrp = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_soppr_complevel_spon
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty AS Quantity, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) 
                  AS datetime) AS SellDate, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo AS DocNumber,dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cSpontype ,[dfrom]
      ,[dto]
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_soppr INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, 
                  '' AS DocNumber ,dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cSpontype,[dfrom]
      ,[dto]
FROM        dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_soppr_new
AS
SELECT        dbo.socamp.cCampNo, dbo.socamp.cDescript, dbo.socamp.dCreate, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.socamp.lStatus, dbo.socamp.lSpecialPr, dbo.socamp.nTarget, dbo.socamp.nMinSales, 
                         dbo.socamp.nversion, dbo.socamp.ccomment, dbo.socamp.lactive, dbo.socamp.ldrp, dbo.icitem.lmlm AS ic_MLM, dbo.icitem.ldscntble AS ic_Disc, dbo.icitem.nlsprinctx AS ic_RSP, dbo.icitem.nQv AS ic_Qv, 
                         dbo.icitem.nsp AS ic_SP, dbo.sosppr.cCampNO AS pprCampnoExpr1, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo AS prItem, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS ppr_descrip, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine AS pprProdline, 
                         dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode AS pprREvCode, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit AS pprQtLmt, dbo.sosppr.nSales AS pprSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl AS pprRspExl, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount AS pprDiscount, 
                         dbo.sosppr.cpageno AS pprPageNo, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat AS pprMajCat, dbo.sosppr.cclass AS pprClass, dbo.sosppr.nversion AS pprVersion, dbo.sosppr.lfree AS nnrLfree, dbo.sosppr.lspecial AS pprlSpecial, 
                         dbo.sosppr.dfrom AS pprFrom, dbo.sosppr.dto AS pprTo, dbo.sosppr.lportal AS pprPortal, dbo.sosppr.csponcat AS pprSponCat, dbo.sosppr.lInactive AS pprInactive, dbo.sosppr.nfrcsqty AS pprFrcqty, 
                         dbo.sosppr.nPromo AS pprPromo, dbo.sosppr.nQv AS pprQv, dbo.sosppr.nsp AS pprSP, dbo.sosppr.lstarter AS pprStarter
FROM            dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.sosppr.cItemNo INNER JOIN
                         dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_soppr1
AS
SELECT     dbo.socamp.cCampNo, dbo.socamp.cDescript AS CampaignDescrip, dbo.socamp.dCreate, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.lStatus, 
                      dbo.socamp.lSpecialPr, dbo.socamp.nTarget, dbo.socamp.nMinSales, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript AS ItemDesscript, dbo.sosppr.cProdLine, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.sosppr.nSales, dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl, dbo.sosppr.nDiscount, dbo.sosppr.cpageno, dbo.sosppr.cmajorcat, 
                      dbo.sosppr.cclass, dbo.sosppr.cgfttype, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.sosppr.lfree
FROM         dbo.socamp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosppr ON dbo.socamp.cCampNo = dbo.sosppr.cCampNO INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.sosppr.cRevnCode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_soppr2
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_soppr.FrcInvYear AS InvYear, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.FrcInvMonth AS InvMonth, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cmajorcat AS cclass, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.MySpon, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cSpontype AS icisponcat, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr.crevnacc, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl * (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nVatRate / 100 + 1) AS nPcinctx, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl AS nPrice, dbo.icitem.nstdcost AS nCost, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty AS ShipQty, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl / 1.20 AS discounts, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl * 1.15 * dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty AS SalesMnt, 'Forecast' AS ctype, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx AS NormalPrc, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom AS dInvoice, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cpageno, 
                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cpagepos, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.csponcat AS PPRSponType, 'Forecast' AS CustomerClass, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cCampNO, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPromo
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_soppr INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom < '2022/08/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_sopprcomplevel
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ccompno AS cItemNo, dbo.icikit.cdescript, dbo.icikit.nqty * dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty AS Quantity, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) 
                  AS datetime) AS SellDate, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo AS DocNumber
FROM        dbo.vm_mk_soppr INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem ON dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icikit ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cDescript, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cType, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nPriceExl, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) - 1), dbo.vm_mk_soppr.dfrom) AS datetime) AS SellDate, 
                  '' AS DocNumber
FROM        dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_mk_soppr ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.vm_mk_soppr.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lkititem <> 1) AND (dbo.vm_mk_soppr.nfrcsqty <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_Stock1

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_stock2

             dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nboqty, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nrecqty, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.ncnlqty, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.ncost, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.ncstinctx, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nfcost, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.nfcstinctx, 
             dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 1, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month1, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 2, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month2, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 3, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month3, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 4, 
             dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month4, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 5, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month5, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 6, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month6, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 7, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month7, 
             CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 8, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month8, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 9, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month9, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 10, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth) AS datetime) AS Month10, CAST(DATEADD(Month, - 11, dbo.vm_mk_Allrectrs.RecMonth)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_stockbin
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icibin.cbin, dbo.icibin.cwarehouse AS BinWarehouse, dbo.icibin.nonhand, dbo.icibin.nrefillqty, dbo.iciwhs.nallocate, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.lkititem, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.levels.Box_Qty, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.levels.Stock_levels, 
                      dbo.levels.Min_Stock_Level, dbo.icibin.nrefillpt, dbo.icitem.nBoxCount
FROM         dbo.icibin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icibin.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno AND dbo.icibin.cwarehouse = dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.levels ON dbo.icibin.citemno = dbo.levels.[Item number] AND dbo.icibin.cwarehouse = dbo.levels.Warehouse
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 0) AND (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_stockissue_detail
AS

                         dbo.icistih ON dbo.icistrh.cissueno = dbo.icistih.cissueno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_StockMove
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ctrstype, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, dtrs, SUM(nqty) AS Quantity, MAX(ncost) AS Cost, SUM(ntotcost) AS TotalCost, month(dtrs) AS dMonth, 
                      Year(dtrs) AS dYear
FROM         dbo.ictrsn
WHERE     (dcreate >= '2001/01/01') AND (nqty <> 0)
GROUP BY ctrstype, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, dtrs
UNION ALL
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ctrstype, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, dtrs, SUM(nqty) AS Quantity, MAX(ncost) AS Cost, SUM(ntotcost) AS TotalCost, month(dtrs) AS dMonth, 
                      Year(dtrs) AS dYear
FROM         dbo.ictrsnh
WHERE     (dcreate >= '2001/01/01') AND (nqty <> 0)
GROUP BY ctrstype, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, dtrs

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_mk_stockmovedetail
AS
SELECT        dbo.ictrsn.*, CAST(DATEADD(day,  - (DATEPART(day, dtrs) - 1), dtrs) AS datetime) AS Movemonth,CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime) AS Currentmonth
FROM            dbo.ictrsn
UNION ALL
SELECT        dbo.ictrsnh.*, CAST(DATEADD(day,    - (DATEPART(day, dtrs) - 1), dtrs )AS datetime) AS Movemonth,CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, GETDATE()) - 1), GETDATE()) AS datetime) AS Currentmonth

FROM            dbo.ictrsnh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ml_MLMTest
AS
SELECT     ccustno, Level0, Level1, Level2, Level3, Level4, Level5, Level6, Level7, Level8, Level9, Level10, Level11, Level12, Level13, Level15, Level14, Level16, Level17, 
                      Level18, CASE WHEN Level0 >= 40 THEN Level0 - 25 END AS M0, CASE WHEN Level1 >= 40 AND Level0 < 40 THEN Level1 - Level0 END AS M1, 
                      Level2 - Level1 AS M2, Level3 - Level2 AS M3, Level4 - Level3 AS M4, Level5 - Level4 AS M5, Level6 - Level5 AS M6, Level7 - Level6 AS M7, Level8 - Level7 AS M8, 
                      Level9 - Level8 AS M9, Level10 - Level9 AS M10, Level11 - Level10 AS M11, Level12 - Level11 AS M12, Level13 - Level12 AS M13, Level14 - Level13 AS M14, 
                      Level15 - Level14 AS M15, Level16 - Level15 AS M16, Level17 - Level16 AS M17, Level18 - Level17 AS M18
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_MLMStatus

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ml_SponTitleperMonth
AS

FROM         dbo.vm_ml_TitlePerMonth INNER JOIN
                      dbo.CPtitl AS CPtitl_1 ON dbo.vm_ml_TitlePerMonth.Rank = CPtitl_1.iRank INNER JOIN

/****** Script for SelectTopNRows command from SSMS  ******/
CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_ml_TitlePerMonth
AS
SELECT     cCustno, MAX(iRank) AS Rank, MAX(iPARank) AS PARank, MAX(nCRSP) AS CRSP, MAX(nPQV) AS PQV, MAX(nGQV) AS GQV, MAX(nDQV) AS DQV, CAST(DATEADD(day, 
                      - (DATEPART(day, DATEADD(day, - 1, dDate)) - 1), DATEADD(day, - 1, dDate)) AS datetime) AS Invoicemonth
FROM         dbo.cttitlh
GROUP BY cCustno, CAST(DATEADD(day, - (DATEPART(day, DATEADD(day, - 1, dDate)) - 1), DATEADD(day, - 1, dDate)) AS datetime)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_NewSOPortal
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT csono, dcreate, dprinted, cStatus, RIGHT(csono, 7) AS Orderno
FROM            dbo.SOPortal
WHERE        (csono LIKE '%a%') AND (LEN(csono) > 5) AND (dcreate >= '2023/10/01')
ORDER BY dprinted DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_OutPayments
AS
SELECT        ccustno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Available
FROM            dbo.arcash
WHERE        (nappamt = 0)
GROUP BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Pending_Deactive
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cfname, dbo.arcust.cphone2, dbo.arcust.csponsor, a1.ccompany AS SponsorName, a1.cemail AS SponsorEmail, a1.cphone2 AS SponsorPhone, 
                         a1.cphone3 AS SponsorCell, a1.csponsor AS SponsorsSPonsor, a2.ccompany AS SponsorsSponsorName, a2.cemail AS SponsorsSponsorEmail, a2.cphone2 AS SponsorsSponsorPhone, 
                         a2.cphone3 AS SponsorsSponsorCell
FROM            dbo.arcust LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        cCustno, SUM(nRsp) AS nsales
                               FROM            compplanLive.dbo.CTconsv
                               WHERE        (dInvoice >= DATEADD(mm, - 6, '2019-10-01'))
                               GROUP BY cCustno) AS q ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = q.cCustno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS a1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = a1.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS a2 ON a1.csponsor = a2.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.arcust.dstarter < DATEADD(mm, - 6, '2019-10-01')) AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (ISNULL(q.nsales, 0) <= 0) AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno NOT IN ('100000', '100001', 
                         '99999', '99998'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_PR_New1
AS
SELECT     csponsor, Invoicemonth, MAX(PersonalSales) AS PersonalSales, SUM(GroupSales) AS GroupSales, 'Sales'
 as Type
FROM         Annique_Reports.dbo.mk_MonthlyStructure
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= '2016/07/01')
GROUP BY csponsor, Invoicemonth
Union all

SELECT[csponsor]
      ,[Invoicemonth]
      ,sum([Personal]) AS PersonalSales
      ,Sum([Group]) AS GroupSales, 'Recruits'
 as Type

  FROM [Annique_Reports].[dbo].[mk_MonthlyRecruits]
WHERE     (Invoicemonth >= '2016/07/01')
group by  csponsor, Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Pr_New2
AS
SELECT     dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.Newcomer, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.ccompany, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.ccompany2, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.dstarter, 
                      dbo.vm_PR_New1.Invoicemonth, dbo.vm_PR_New1.GroupSales, dbo.vm_PR_New1.PersonalSales, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.cstate, 
                      dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.SponsorName, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.SponsorPhone, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.SponsorEmail, dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.Sponsor, 
                      dbo.vm_PR_New1.Type
FROM         dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vm_PR_New1 ON dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer.Newcomer = dbo.vm_PR_New1.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_PR_Newcomer
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Newcomer, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.ccompany2, dbo.arcust.dstarter, dbo.arcust.cstate, arcust_1.ccompany AS SponsorName, 
                      arcust_1.cphone2 AS SponsorPhone, arcust_1.cemail AS SponsorEmail, arcust_1.ccustno AS Sponsor
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.dstarter >= '2016/07/01') AND (dbo.arcust.dstarter < '2017/06/30') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'Consultant')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SD_Tradings
AS
SELECT     ccustno, Invoicemonth, cinvno, SUM(CASE WHEN ldscntble = 1 THEN (nprcinctx * nshipqty) END) AS Discountable, 
                      SUM(CASE WHEN lmlm = 1 THEN (nprcinctx * nshipqty) END) AS MLMable, SUM(CASE WHEN crevnacc LIKE '300%' THEN nsalesamt END) AS Above, 
                      SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (crevnacc LIKE '300%') THEN nsalesamt END) AS Below, SUM(CASE WHEN ndiscrate <> 50 AND ldscntble = 1 AND 
                      lmlm = 1 THEN (nprcinctx * nshipqty) END) AS Rebateable
FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'M%')) AND (NOT (cinvno LIKE 'J%')) AND (dinvoice >= '2015-07-01')
GROUP BY ccustno, Invoicemonth, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SMS_ActRecruits
AS
SELECT     COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS ActRec, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), 01) AS Invoicemonth
      FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].[arcust]
GROUP BY DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), 01)
union all
SELECT     COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS ActRec, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), 01) AS Invoicemonth
      FROM [amanniquenam].[dbo].[arcust]
GROUP BY DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(dstarter), MONTH(dstarter), 01)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SMS_AllRecrtuits
AS
SELECT     Invoicemonth, SUM(ActRec) AS ActualRecruit
FROM        dbo.vm_SMS_ActRecruits
GROUP BY Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SMS_AllRecrtuits
AS
SELECT     Invoicemonth, SUM(ActRec) AS ActualRecruit
FROM        dbo.vm_SMS_ActRecruits
GROUP BY Invoicemonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SMS_Sales
AS
SELECT     Year, MONTH, DATEFROMPARTS(Year, MONTH, 01) AS Invoicemonth, SUM(Sales) AS ActualSales
FROM        dbo.[vw_SLRE_300100 by class with VAT]
WHERE     (cClass <> 'Export')
GROUP BY Year, MONTH, DATEFROMPARTS(Year, MONTH, 01)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_SMS_SendData
AS
SELECT     TOP (1000) Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.Invoicemonth, Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.AOP, Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.Target, dbo.vm_SMS_AllRecruits.ActualRecruit, dbo.vm_SMS_Sales.ActualSales
FROM        Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets INNER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_SMS_AllRecruits ON Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.Invoicemonth = dbo.vm_SMS_AllRecruits.Invoicemonth LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.vm_SMS_Sales ON Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.Invoicemonth = dbo.vm_SMS_Sales.Invoicemonth
WHERE     (Annique_Reports.dbo.vm_SMS_Targets.Invoicemonth = datefromparts(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 01))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_Starter_Recruits
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcust.csponsor AS Recruiter, dbo.arcust.ccustno AS NewCust, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS NewName, dbo.arcust.dstarter AS NEwStart, arcust_1.ccompany AS RecruiterName, 
                         arcust_1.dstarter AS REcruitStart
FROM            dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_temp
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.changes.ccustno, dbo.changes.cfieldname, dbo.changes.codlvalue, dbo.changes.cnewvalue, dbo.changes.InsUpdDate, dbo.arcust.dstarter
FROM        dbo.changes INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust ON dbo.changes.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.changes.cnewvalue = 'A') AND (dbo.changes.InsUpdDate >= '2023/06/01') AND (dbo.changes.InsUpdDate < '2023/06/30')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vm_xMas_July2017
AS

FROM            dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE        (dinvoice >= '2017/05/01') AND (CustomerClass = 'Consultant')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vmm_TEmpart
AS

FROM         dbo.vm_mk_aritrs
WHERE     (crevnacc = '300100-0000') AND (Invoicemonth >= '2016/11/01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vmm_TempGl

CREATE VIEW dbo.vmMK_STOCK_AS_ON
AS

CREATE VIEW dbo.vn_mk_stock2

CREATE VIEW dbo.vs_SL_rebates
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno, RTRIM(dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor) AS csponsor, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor0, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus1, 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cLevel, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cstatus, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ltl, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.nSalesamt, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesdisc, 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.nsalesdisc, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngsalesamt, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.nrebate, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ngrebateamt, 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccompany, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone1, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.cphone2, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS SponComp, dbo.arcust.caddr1, 
                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.cstatus AS Status, 
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.nrebateamt, dbo.arcust.cemail, 'SA' AS Co, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS custstatus, dbo.arcust.lemail, CAST(CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111) 
                      AS smalldatetime) AS ReportDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AS Expr1, dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AS Expr2, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1, dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.Expr1 AS Expr3, dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSales, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.PSalesDisc, dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 111) AS Date, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.GRsales
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY INNER JOIN
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY ON dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno ON dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.csponsor = dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Personal_Historical.Expr1 = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales ON dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.csponsor AND 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.cLevel1 AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) 
                      = dbo.SR_MLM_Historical_GRSales.date LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History ON dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.csponsor = dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.csponsor AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), 
                      dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.dmonth, 112) = dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.date AND dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.SR_MLM_Level1_History.cLevel1
WHERE     (dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.ccustno = dbo.rebatedtlMONTHLY.csponsor) AND (dbo.rbtmlmMONTHLY.ccustno = '530232')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw MJM Downliner]
AS

FROM         dbo.[MJM Downliner]

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_
AS
SELECT     compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) AS cTitle, q.ccustno, q.citemno, i.cdescript, q.iyear, q.imonth, SUM(q.Amount) AS Amount, SUM(q.Qty) AS Qty
FROM        (SELECT     h.ccustno, i.citemno, YEAR(h.dinvoice) AS iyear, MONTH(h.dinvoice) AS imonth, SUM(i.nsalesamt) AS Amount, SUM(i.nshipqty) AS Qty
                   FROM        dbo.aritrs AS i INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arinvc AS h ON i.cinvno = h.cinvno
                   WHERE     (i.citemno BETWEEN 'AI/40110/18' AND 'AI/40117/19' OR
                                     i.citemno BETWEEN '3102009' AND '3102032') AND (h.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-07-01' AND '2019-01-31')
                   GROUP BY h.ccustno, i.citemno, YEAR(h.dinvoice), MONTH(h.dinvoice)) AS q INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS i ON i.citemno = q.citemno
GROUP BY compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()), q.ccustno, q.citemno, i.cdescript, q.iyear, q.imonth
HAVING     (compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) = 'D') OR
                  (compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) = 'DD') OR
                  (compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) = 'ED') OR
                  (compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) = 'RD')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_1iciwhs.citemno, dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cbin, dbo.vw_1iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.vw_1ictrsn.nqty, 
                      dbo.vw_1iciwhs.nonhand - dbo.vw_1ictrsn.nqty AS ndifference, dbo.vw_1ictrsn.ntotcost, dbo.vw_1ictrsn.ncost
FROM         dbo.vw_1iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_1ictrsn ON dbo.vw_1iciwhs.citemno = dbo.vw_1ictrsn.citemno AND dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.vw_1ictrsn.cwarehouse AND 
                      dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cbin = dbo.vw_1ictrsn.cbin AND dbo.vw_1iciwhs.nonhand <> dbo.vw_1ictrsn.nqty
ORDER BY dbo.vw_1iciwhs.citemno, dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_1iciwhs.cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_1iciwhs
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.icibin.cbin, dbo.icibin.nonhand
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icibin ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icibin.citemno AND dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.icibin.cwarehouse
ORDER BY dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.icibin.cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_1ictrsn
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, SUM(nqty) AS nqty, SUM(ncost) AS ncost, SUM(ntotcost) AS ntotcost
FROM         dbo.vw_ictrsn
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin
ORDER BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_300100
AS
SELECT '1. SA' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day,
c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 1.15)) Sales
FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
[amanniquelive].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniquelive].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
JOIN amanniquelive..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = ''))
and r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY c.cClass, YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)
UNION
SELECT '2. NAM' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day,
c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 1.15)) Sales
FROM [amanniqueNAM].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
[amanniqueNam].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniqueNam].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
JOIN amanniqueNam..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = ''))
AND r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY c.cClass , YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)

AS

                      dbo.sosord.cbphone

                      dbo.vw_af1 ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.vw_af1.csono

                      (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (dbo.vw_af1.citemno IS NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_andre_rev_codes
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.arinvc.cbcompany AS Company, dbo.arinvc.cinvno AS InvNo, dbo.aritrs.citemno AS ItemNo, dbo.aritrs.cdescript AS ItemDesc, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt AS ExclAmt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt AS DiscAmt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS TaxAmt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate AS DiscRate, 
                      dbo.aritrs.crevncode AS RevnCode, dbo.arrevn.cdescript AS RCDescript, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc AS SalesAcc, dbo.arcust.cclass AS CustClass, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS Date
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '01-APR-2012') AND (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ap_preapp
AS
SELECT     cvendno AS Vend, cinvno AS Inv, cdinvno AS PP, ddate AS Date, napplyamt AS 'Local Amt', nfapplyamt AS 'Foreign Amt'
FROM         dbo.apdapp

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_app
AS
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Paid
FROM         dbo.arcapp
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_app_check
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.crcptno, dbo.arcash.nappamt, dbo.vw_app.Paid, dbo.arcash.lvoid
FROM         dbo.arcash INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_app ON dbo.arcash.ccustno = dbo.vw_app.ccustno AND dbo.arcash.crcptno = dbo.vw_app.crcptno
WHERE     (dbo.arcash.lvoid <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ar_exclpos
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.crcptno, dbo.arcash.cdepno, dbo.arcash.cpaycode, dbo.arcash.cbankno, dbo.arcash.cpayref, dbo.arcash.dpaid, dbo.arcash.npaidamt, 
                      dbo.arcpos.ccustno AS Expr1, dbo.arcpos.crcptno AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.arcpos RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash ON dbo.arcpos.crcptno = dbo.arcash.crcptno AND dbo.arcpos.ccustno = dbo.arcash.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcpos.crcptno IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcash.cdepno <> 'VOID')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ar_test
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt + dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1 AS Expr1, dbo.vw_aritrs_test.sales_lines, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs_test ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs_test.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arapp
AS
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arcapp
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno
union all 
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arcapph
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arash
AS
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, npaidamt, nappamt, lvoid
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (lvoid <> 1)
union all
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, npaidamt, nappamt, lvoid
FROM         dbo.arcashh
WHERE     (lvoid <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcapp
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_arcash.*, dbo.arcapp.ccustno AS ccust, dbo.arcapp.cinvno AS invno, dbo.arcapp.crcptno AS rctno, dbo.arcapp.npaidamt AS pdamt
FROM         dbo.vw_arcash LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcapp ON dbo.vw_arcash.RcptNo = dbo.arcapp.crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_arcapp&h]
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcapp.*
FROM         dbo.arcapp
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arcapph.*
FROM         dbo.arcapph

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcapp_issue
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cusername, crcptno, cinvno, date
FROM         dbo.arcapp_T
WHERE     (date = GETDATE())

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcapp_recon
AS
SELECT        dbo.arcapp.*
FROM            dbo.arcapp
union all 
SELECT        dbo.arcapph.*
FROM            dbo.arcapph

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcapp_sum
AS
SELECT        ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS npaidamt
FROM            dbo.vw_arcapp_recon
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcapp_test
AS
SELECT     ccustno, crcptno, SUM(npaidamt) AS Amt, lvoid
FROM         dbo.arcapp
GROUP BY ccustno, crcptno, lvoid
HAVING      (lvoid = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_arcappMAXDATE
AS
SELECT     cinvno, MAX(dpaid) AS dclosed
FROM        dbo.arcapp
WHERE     (lvoid = 0) AND (cinvno <> '') AND (cinvno NOT LIKE '%M%')
GROUP BY cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arcash
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcash.cuid AS Expr2, dbo.arcash.dcreate, dbo.arcash.crcptno AS RcptNo, dbo.arcash.cpaycode, dbo.arcpos.cusername, 
                      dbo.arcpos.cpaycode AS POSPyCD, dbo.arcpos.ccustno, dbo.arcpos.crcptno, CASE WHEN arcpos.npospdamt IS NULL 
                      THEN dbo.arcash.npaidamt ELSE 0 END AS RcptAmt, dbo.arcpos.nPOSpdAmt AS POSpdAmt
FROM         dbo.arcash LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcpos ON dbo.arcash.crcptno = dbo.arcpos.crcptno
WHERE     (dbo.arcash.lvoid = 0)
ORDER BY dbo.arcash.cpaycode, dbo.arcash.dcreate

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_arcash&h]
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcash.*
FROM         dbo.arcash
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arcashh.*
FROM         dbo.arcashh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ardiff
AS
SELECT     dbo.[vw_arcash&h].ccustno, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].crcptno, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].npaidamt, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].nappamt, dbo.vw_arcapp_sum.npaidamt AS napplyamt, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].lvoid, dbo.[vw_arcash&h].dpaid
FROM        dbo.[vw_arcash&h] LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.vw_arcapp_sum ON dbo.[vw_arcash&h].crcptno = dbo.vw_arcapp_sum.crcptno AND dbo.[vw_arcash&h].nappamt <> dbo.vw_arcapp_sum.npaidamt
WHERE     (dbo.[vw_arcash&h].lvoid <> 1) AND (dbo.[vw_arcash&h].dpaid > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2017-01-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_arinvc
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.*
FROM         dbo.arinvc
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.*
FROM         dbo.arinvch

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_aritrs
AS
SELECT        dbo.aritrs.*
FROM            dbo.aritrs
UNION ALL
SELECT        dbo.aritrsh.*
FROM            dbo.aritrsh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_aritrs_test
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ccustno, SUM(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS sales_lines
FROM         dbo.aritrs
GROUP BY cinvno, ccustno

                      dbo.iciwhs.nonhand <> dbo.vw_icibin.Bonhand

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_bridge
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS RSP, sum(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      AS Sales, sum(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Discount, dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt as Freight, sum(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS Tax, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty,dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.aritrsh.ctaxcode, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS RSP, sum(dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt) 
                      AS Sales, sum(dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt) AS Discount, dbo.arinvch.nfrtamt as Freight, sum(dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1) AS Tax, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrsh.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.ctype1, dbo.icitem.ctype2, 
                      dbo.icitem.ctype3, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.icitem.lmlm, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.aritrsh.ctaxcode, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.icitem.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty,dbo.arinvch.nfrtamt
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_bridge_nam

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_bridge_final
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ccustno, cclass, citemno, cdescript, ctype, ctype1, ctype2, ctype3, csponcat, lmlm, ldscntble, crevncode, crevnacc, crtrnacc, cdiscacc, ccogsacc, ctaxcode, 
                      dinvoice, ndiscrate, RSP, Sales, Discount, Freight, Tax, Sales - Discount + Tax + Freight AS NIV, Company
FROM         dbo.vw_bridge

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_camp_NAM
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_From, Date_To, Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked]
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.BA_Camp6_NAM

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_camp_PTA
AS
SELECT     ccampno, Ship_Qty, Qty_Limit * 63 / 100 AS Qty_Limit, cItemNo, Date_From, Date_To, Perc / 100 AS Perc, cDescript, Booked, [Ship + Booked]
