/*ORDER BY MeDate,citemno*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_CampDRP
AS
SELECT meDate, ID, cItemno, SUM(nfrcsqty) AS nfrcsqty, SUM(nfrcsval) AS nfrcsval
FROM     (SELECT d.cItemno, d.cItemno AS Expr1, DATEADD(d, - DAY(DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)) AS meDate, c.ID, SUM(d.nForeCast) AS nfrcsqty, SUM(d.nForeCast * d.nPrice) AS nfrcsval
                  FROM      dbo.Campaign AS c INNER JOIN
                                    dbo.CampDetail AS d ON c.ID = d.CampaignID INNER JOIN
                                    dbo.CampSku AS s ON s.CampaignID = c.ID AND s.ID = d.CampSkuID
                  WHERE   (c.dFrom >=
                                        (SELECT dFrom
                                         FROM      dbo.Campaign
                                         WHERE   (GETDATE() BETWEEN dFrom AND dTo))) AND (s.lKitItem = 0)
                  GROUP BY DATEADD(d, - DAY(DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), c.ID, d.cItemno
                  UNION
                  SELECT ccompno AS citemno, cItemNo AS Expr1, meDate, ID, nForeCast * nqty AS nfrcsqty, nForeCast * nprice AS nfrcsval
                  FROM     (SELECT s.cItemNo, k.ccompno, DATEADD(d, - DAY(DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)) AS meDate, c.ID, SUM(d.nForeCast) AS nForeCast, k.nqty, ISNULL(ks.nPrice, 0) AS nprice
                                    FROM      dbo.Campaign AS c INNER JOIN
                                                      dbo.CampSku AS s ON s.CampaignID = c.ID AND s.lKitItem = 1 INNER JOIN
                                                      dbo.CampDetail AS d ON c.ID = d.CampaignID AND d.CampSkuID = s.ID INNER JOIN
                                                      dbo.icikit AS k ON s.cItemNo = k.ckititemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                                      dbo.CampSku AS ks ON c.ID = ks.CampaignID AND ks.cItemNo = k.ccompno
                                    WHERE   (c.dFrom >=
                                                          (SELECT dFrom
                                                           FROM      dbo.Campaign AS Campaign_1
                                                           WHERE   (GETDATE() BETWEEN dFrom AND dTo)))
                                    GROUP BY s.cItemNo, DATEADD(d, - DAY(DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), DATEADD(m, 1, c.dFrom)), c.ID, k.ccompno, k.nqty, ISNULL(ks.nPrice, 0)) AS Q) AS x
GROUP BY meDate, ID, cItemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_comp_weight
AS
SELECT     dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.icitem.nweight
FROM         dbo.icikit INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.icikit.ccompno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_copy from MJM Downliner]
AS
SELECT     TOP (1000000) Csponsor, Downliner, [Level], RegDate
FROM         dbo.[MJM Downline Total]

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_courier
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_sosptr.cinvno AS InvNo, dbo.vw_sosptr.csono AS SoNo, dbo.vw_sosptr.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.soship.cbcompany AS CustName, dbo.soship.dship AS Date, 
                      dbo.soship.cshipvia AS ShipVia, dbo.soship.nfrtamt AS FreightAmt, dbo.soship.nweight AS Weight, dbo.soship.cparcel AS Parcel, dbo.soship.cSstatus AS Status, 
                      dbo.soship.cCourierinv AS CourierInv, dbo.soship.cWaybillno AS WaybillNo, dbo.soship.nshipcost AS ShipCost, dbo.soship.clastshipstatus AS ShipStatus, 
                      dbo.vw_sosptr.SaleValue, dbo.soship.cbzip
FROM         dbo.soship INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_sosptr ON dbo.soship.cshipno = dbo.vw_sosptr.cshipno AND dbo.soship.csono = dbo.vw_sosptr.csono AND 
                      dbo.soship.ccustno = dbo.vw_sosptr.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.soship.dship > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-03-31 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_credit_notes
AS
SELECT     cinvno, ctype, ccustno, cbcompany, cwarehouse, centerby, dinvoice, nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1 AS Total
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice = GETDATE()) AND (ctype = 'R')
union all
SELECT     cinvno, ctype, ccustno, cbcompany, cwarehouse, centerby, dinvoice, nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1 AS Total
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice = GETDATE()) AND (ctype = 'R')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_CurrentSales
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cuid, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.csono, dbo.aritrs.cshipno, dbo.aritrs.clineitem, 
                      dbo.aritrs.crmano, dbo.aritrs.crtncode, dbo.aritrs.csolineitm, dbo.aritrs.cshlineitm, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode1, dbo.aritrs.cspeccode2, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.cmeasure, dbo.aritrs.ccommiss, dbo.aritrs.cstatus, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, 
                      dbo.aritrs.lkititem, dbo.aritrs.lupsell, dbo.aritrs.lstock, dbo.aritrs.lmodikit, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable1, dbo.aritrs.ltaxable2, dbo.aritrs.lowrmk, dbo.aritrs.lptrmk, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nqtydec, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.ntaxver, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt2, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nfsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.nfdiscamt, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.aritrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nitmcnvqty, dbo.aritrs.ntrscnvqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nfprice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nfprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.nweight, dbo.aritrs.nseq, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, dbo.aritrs.cvernum, dbo.aritrs.nbprice, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.arinvc.centerby
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno AND dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.aritrs.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctype = ' ') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-30 00:00:00', 102)) OR
                      (dbo.arinvc.ctype = 'R') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-30 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_daily_receipts
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dpaid AS Date, SUM(npaidamt) AS RcptAmt
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (lvoid <> 1)
GROUP BY dpaid
ORDER BY Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_daily_sales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dinvoice, SUM(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS Sales
FROM         dbo.arinvc
GROUP BY dinvoice
HAVING      (dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2010-04-30 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_daily_summary
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_daily_receipts.Date, dbo.vw_daily_receipts.RcptAmt, dbo.vw_daily_sales.Sales
FROM         dbo.vw_daily_receipts FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_daily_sales ON dbo.vw_daily_receipts.Date = dbo.vw_daily_sales.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_db_marketing
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, SUM(nshipqty) AS Qty_Sold, SUM(Total) AS R_S_P, Month, Year, Revenue_Code, ProdLine1, cprodline, cclass, nprcinctx, cslpnno
FROM         dbo.vw_marketing
GROUP BY citemno, cdescript, Month, Year, Revenue_Code, ProdLine1, cprodline, cclass, nprcinctx, cslpnno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_db_marketing1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_db_marketing.citemno, dbo.vw_db_marketing.cdescript, dbo.vw_db_marketing.Qty_Sold, dbo.vw_db_marketing.R_S_P, 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.Month, dbo.vw_db_marketing.Year, dbo.vw_db_marketing.Revenue_Code, dbo.vw_db_marketing.ProdLine1, dbo.vw_db_marketing.cprodline, 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.cclass, CASE WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 0 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 75 THEN '75' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 74.99 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 150 THEN '150' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 149.99 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 200 THEN '200' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 199.99 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 250 THEN '250' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 249.99 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 300 THEN '300' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 299.99 AND 
                      dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx < 400 THEN '400' WHEN dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx > 399.99 THEN '401' ELSE 0 END AS Price_Points, 
                      dbo.vw_portrs_sum.Received_Amt, dbo.vw_portrs_sum.Received_Qty, dbo.vw_db_marketing.nprcinctx, dbo.vw_db_marketing.cslpnno, dbo.vw_iciwhs.WHS_Onhand, 
                      dbo.vw_portrs_sum.cvendno, dbo.vw_portrs_sum.Supplier
FROM         dbo.vw_db_marketing LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_iciwhs ON dbo.vw_db_marketing.citemno = dbo.vw_iciwhs.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_portrs_sum ON dbo.vw_db_marketing.citemno = dbo.vw_portrs_sum.Item_No
WHERE     (dbo.vw_db_marketing.Year > '2008')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_db_marketing.Revenue_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_dlastinvc
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, MAX(dinvoice) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_arinvc
GROUP BY ccustno
ORDER BY ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_drp_amended
AS
SELECT     Item, cdescript, Date, Username, Units, Value, Changed, [New Units], [New Value], cstatus, ddate
FROM         dbo.vw_drp_amended1
WHERE     (ddate = CONVERT(char(12), GETDATE(), 111)) AND (cstatus = 'Updated')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_drp_amended1
AS
SELECT     dbo.dpibdg_T.citemno AS Item, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.dpibdg_T.dEndDate AS Date, dbo.dpibdg_T.cusername AS Username, dbo.dpibdg_T.nunits AS Units, 
                      dbo.dpibdg_T.ndollars AS Value, CAST(DATENAME(year, dbo.dpibdg_T.ddate) + '/' + DATENAME(month, dbo.dpibdg_T.ddate) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Changed, 
                      dbo.dpibdg_T.nunits1 AS [New Units], dbo.dpibdg_T.ndollars1 AS [New Value], dbo.dpibdg_T.cstatus, CONVERT(char(12), dbo.dpibdg_T.ddate, 111) AS ddate
FROM         dbo.dpibdg_T INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg_T.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.dpibdg_T.dEndDate >= CAST(DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) + '/' + DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) + '/01' AS smalldatetime)) AND 
                      (dbo.dpibdg_T.dEndDate <= CAST(DATENAME(year, GETDATE()) + '/' + DATENAME(month, GETDATE()) + '/01' AS smalldatetime) + 180) AND (DATEDIFF(month, 
                      GETDATE(), dbo.dpibdg_T.dEndDate) < 4)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_drp_error
AS
SELECT     cuid, csono, ccustno, clineitem, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cdescript, cwarehouse, cmeasure, ccommiss, crevncode, ctaxcode, drequest, lkititem, lupsell, 
                      lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate, ntaxver, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, 
                      nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, nbuiltqty, nordqty, nshipqty, nadvqty, nitmcnvqty, ntrscnvqty, nweight, ncost, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, nseq, nstock, 
                      cvernum, ccmpprodln, nbprice, nextnddprc, lfree, cgfttype, cinvno, cSORefUId, cSORef
FROM         dbo.sostrs
WHERE     (nitmcnvqty = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_drp_inactive
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.ldrp, dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits
FROM         dbo.dpibdg INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.cstatus = 'I') AND (dbo.dpibdg.nUnits <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_drp_po
AS
SELECT     DATENAME(year, dbo.popord.drequest) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.popord.drequest) AS Month, SUM((dbo.poptrs.nordqty - dbo.poptrs.nrecqty) * dbo.poptrs.ncost) 
                      AS Total
FROM         dbo.popord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.poptrs ON dbo.popord.cpono = dbo.poptrs.cpono
WHERE     (dbo.poptrs.nrecqty <> dbo.poptrs.nordqty)
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dbo.popord.drequest), DATENAME(month, dbo.popord.drequest)
union all
SELECT     DATENAME(year, dbo.popordh.drequest) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.popordh.drequest) AS Month, SUM((dbo.poptrsh.nordqty - dbo.poptrsh.nrecqty) * dbo.poptrsh.ncost) 
                      AS Total
FROM         dbo.popordh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.poptrsh ON dbo.popordh.cpono = dbo.poptrsh.cpono
WHERE     (dbo.poptrsh.nrecqty <> dbo.poptrsh.nordqty)
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dbo.popordh.drequest), DATENAME(month, dbo.popordh.drequest)

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_DRPItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno AS [ITEM NO], dbo.icitem.cdescript AS DESCR, dbo.icitem.cstatus AS STATUS, dbo.icitem.ldrp AS DRP, dbo.iciwhs.nreordpt AS SAFETY, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nreordqty AS MOQ, dbo.dpitem.nLeadTime AS [LEAD TIME], dbo.icitem.csponcat AS SPON, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode AS [REVENUE CODE]
FROM         dbo.icitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.dpitem ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.dpitem.cItemNo
WHERE     (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4000')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_efts
AS
SELECT     '0000004067382423' AS Bank, 'Annique Skin Care Products (Pt' AS Company, '632005' AS Branch, LEFT(dbo.arcust.chldrname, 20) AS Customer, 
                      CASE WHEN len(cbankacc) = 6 THEN '0000000000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 7 THEN '000000000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) 
                      = 8 THEN '00000000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 9 THEN '0000000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 10 THEN '000000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) 
                      = 11 THEN '00000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 12 THEN '0000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 13 THEN '000' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) 
                      = 14 THEN '00' + cbankacc WHEN len(cbankacc) = 15 THEN '0' + cbankacc ELSE cbankacc END AS Account, LEFT(dbo.arcust.chldrname, 30) AS Customers, 
                      dbo.arcust.cbranchno, 'Annique - Annique Sk' AS Reference, dbo.arrfnd.nbankamt
FROM         dbo.arrfnd INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arrfnd.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_eof_beaute
AS
SELECT     citemno, cdescript, nprcinctx AS Price, ndiscrate, 101 AS Qty_Available, ctype1
FROM         dbo.icitem
WHERE     (citemno BETWEEN '3101000' AND '3102101')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_cost
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.cbin, 'INV' AS ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty) AS Qty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS TotCost, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), dbo.aritrs.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrsh.cbin, 'INV' AS ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) 
                      AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty) AS Qty, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, SUM(dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty * dbo.aritrsh.ncost) 
                      AS TotCost, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrsh.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), dbo.aritrsh.ncost, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrsh.cbin, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_cos_com
AS
SELECT     *, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_cos
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, '2.NAM' as Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_nam_ernest_cos

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_cos_tot
AS
SELECT     citemno, ctype, Year, Month, SUM(TotCost) AS TotCost, Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_cos_com
GROUP BY citemno, ctype, Year, Month, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsn.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsn.cbin, dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Month, SUM(dbo.ictrsn.nqty) AS Qty, dbo.ictrsn.ncost, SUM(dbo.ictrsn.ntotcost) AS TotCost, dbo.icitem.csponcat
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ictrsn ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ictrsn.citemno
WHERE     ctrstype <> 'CADJ'
GROUP BY dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsn.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsn.cbin, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs, dbo.ictrsn.ncost, dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype, 
                      dbo.icitem.csponcat
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsnh.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsnh.cbin, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Month, SUM(dbo.ictrsnh.nqty) AS Qty, dbo.ictrsnh.ncost, SUM(dbo.ictrsnh.ntotcost) AS TotCost, dbo.icitem.csponcat
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ictrsnh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ictrsnh.citemno
WHERE     ctrstype <> 'CADJ'
GROUP BY dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsnh.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsnh.cbin, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs, dbo.ictrsnh.ncost, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype, 
                      dbo.icitem.csponcat

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn_com
AS
SELECT     *, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, '2.NAM' as Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_nam_ernest_ictrsn

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn_tot
AS
SELECT     citemno, ctype, Year, Month, SUM(TotCost) AS TotCost, csponcat, Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn_com
GROUP BY citemno, ctype, Year, Month, csponcat, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_jnl
AS
SELECT     'JNL' AS ctype, DATENAME(year, dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dtrs) AS Month, SUM(ntrsamt) AS totcost, ' ' AS csponcat, '0.JNL' AS rep, '1.SA' AS Company
FROM         dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (csource = 'GL') AND (cacctid = '130100-2600') and dtrs is not null and cdescript not like ('Correction%') and creference not like ('YTD%')
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dtrs), DATENAME(month, dtrs)
union all
SELECT     'JNL' AS ctype, DATENAME(year, dtrs) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dtrs) AS Month, SUM(ntrsamt) AS totcost, ' ' AS csponcat, '0.JNL' AS rep, '2.NAM' AS Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (csource = 'GL') AND (cacctid = '130100-2600') and dtrs is not null and cdescript not like ('Correction%') and creference not like ('YTD%')
GROUP BY DATENAME(year, dtrs), DATENAME(month, dtrs)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_onh
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs_monthly.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.cwarehouse, ' ' AS cbin, 'OH' AS ctrstype, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dyear AS Year, 
                      dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dmonth AS Month, SUM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.nonhand) AS Qty, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.ncost, SUM(dbo.iciwhs_monthly.ntotcost) AS TotCost, 
                      dbo.iciwhs_monthly.csponcat
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs_monthly ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs_monthly.citemno
GROUP BY dbo.iciwhs_monthly.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dyear, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.dmonth, 
                      dbo.iciwhs_monthly.ncost, dbo.iciwhs_monthly.csponcat

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_onh_com
AS
SELECT     *, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_onh
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, '2.NAM' as Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_nam_ernest_onh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_onh_tot
AS
SELECT     citemno, ctype, Year, Month, SUM(TotCost) AS TotCost, csponcat, Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_onh_com
GROUP BY citemno, ctype, Year, Month, csponcat, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_rep
AS
SELECT     ctype, rtrim(Year) AS Year, rtrim(Month) AS Month, TotCost, ' ' AS csponcat, '1.COS' AS Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_cos_tot
UNION ALL
SELECT     ctype, rtrim(Year) AS Year, rtrim(Month) AS Month, TotCost, csponcat, '2.ICTRSN' AS Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_ictrsn_tot
UNION ALL
SELECT     ctype, rtrim(Year) AS Year, rtrim(Month) AS Month, TotCost, csponcat, '3.ONH' AS Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_onh_tot
UNION ALL
SELECT     ctype, rtrim(Year) AS Year, rtrim(Month) AS Month, TotCost, ' ' AS csponcat, '4.STD' AS Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_std_tot
union all
SELECT     ctype, rtrim(Year) AS Year, rtrim(Month) AS Month, TotCost, ' ' AS csponcat, '0.JNL' AS Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_jnl

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_rep_bal
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs_daily.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.csponcat, dbo.iciwhs_daily.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs_daily.nonhand, 
                      dbo.iciwhs_daily.ncost, dbo.iciwhs_daily.ntotcost, DATENAME(year, dbo.iciwhs_daily.dcurrent) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.iciwhs_daily.dcurrent) AS Month, 
                      DATENAME(day, dbo.iciwhs_daily.dcurrent) AS Day
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_daily INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs_daily.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_rep_total
AS
SELECT     ctype, Year, Month, SUM(TotCost) AS TotCost, csponcat, Rep, company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_rep
GROUP BY ctype, Year, Month, csponcat, Rep, company

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_spon
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) 
                      AS Month
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
where dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln <> ' '
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, 
                      dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
where dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln <> ' '
GROUP BY dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.ccmpprodln, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice), DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_std
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsn.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsn.cbin, dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs) AS Month, SUM(dbo.ictrsn.nqty) AS Qty, dbo.ictrsn.ncost, SUM(dbo.ictrsn.ntotcost) AS TotCost, dbo.icitem.csponcat
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ictrsn ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ictrsn.citemno
WHERE     ctrstype = 'CADJ'
GROUP BY dbo.ictrsn.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsn.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsn.cbin, dbo.ictrsn.dtrs, dbo.ictrsn.ncost, dbo.ictrsn.ctrstype, 
                      dbo.icitem.csponcat
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsnh.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsnh.cbin, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype, DATENAME(year, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Year, 
                      DATENAME(month, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs) AS Month, SUM(dbo.ictrsnh.nqty) AS Qty, dbo.ictrsnh.ncost, SUM(dbo.ictrsnh.ntotcost) AS TotCost, dbo.icitem.csponcat
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ictrsnh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ictrsnh.citemno
WHERE     ctrstype = 'CADJ'
GROUP BY dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.ictrsnh.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsnh.cbin, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs, dbo.ictrsnh.ncost, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype, 
                      dbo.icitem.csponcat

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_std_com
AS
SELECT     *, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_std
UNION ALL
SELECT     *, '2.NAM' as Company
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_nam_ernest_std

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ernest_std_tot
AS
SELECT     citemno, ctype, cdescript, ctrstype, Year, Month, SUM(Qty) AS Qty, ncost, SUM(TotCost) AS TotCost, Company
FROM         dbo.vw_ernest_std_com
GROUP BY citemno, ctype, cdescript, ctrstype, Year, Month, ncost, Company

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_free_points
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder, SUM(dbo.sostrs.nprcinctx * dbo.sostrs.nordqty) AS Points
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sosord.cpono NOT LIKE 'W%') AND (dbo.sosord.cpono <> ' ') AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno IN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cItemNo
                            FROM          dbo.socmpq)) AND (dbo.sosord.dorder >= '2012-05-31')
GROUP BY dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_fwsms
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID, dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno, dbo.fw_items.cLabelno, dbo.soship.ccustno, dbo.soship.cbaddrno, dbo.soship.dship, dbo.soship.cWaybillno, dbo.soship.cfrgtcode, 
                   LTRIM(RTRIM(IIF(arcust.ccustno='ASHOP1',soship.cbPhone,dbo.arcust.cphone2))) AS cphone2, dbo.vw_FWsms1.cinvno
FROM     dbo.fw_consignment WITH (nolock) INNER JOIN
                  dbo.fw_items WITH (nolock) ON dbo.fw_consignment.cConsignmentID = dbo.fw_items.cConsignmentID INNER JOIN
                  dbo.soship WITH (nolock) ON dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno = dbo.soship.cshipno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust WITH (nolock) ON dbo.soship.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.vw_FWsms1 WITH (nolock) ON dbo.soship.cshipno = dbo.vw_FWsms1.cshipno
WHERE  (LEFT(dbo.soship.dship, 11) = LEFT(GETDATE(), 11)) AND (dbo.soship.cshipno > '1000287711')
ORDER BY dbo.soship.dship

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_FWsms1
AS
SELECT     cshipno, cinvno, dship
FROM         dbo.sosptr WITH (nolock)
GROUP BY cshipno, cinvno, dship
HAVING      (dship > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2015-02-20 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_gl_error
AS
SELECT     cbatcno, cacctid, cdescript, cobjno, cyear, cpdno, ctrstype, dtrs, ntrsamt
FROM         dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (cacctid = '130100-2600') AND (csource = 'GL')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_GLTrsnComp
AS
SELECT     dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.ctrsno, dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.cacctid, dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.Expr1, dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld.Expr1 AS Expr2
FROM        dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr INNER JOIN
                  dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld ON dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.ctrsno = dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld.ctrsno AND dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.cacctid = dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld.cacctid AND dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr.Expr1 <> dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld.Expr1

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_GLTrsnCurr
AS
SELECT     ctrsno, cacctid, SUM(ntrsamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.gltrsn
WHERE     (dtrs BETWEEN '2017-03-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2017-05-31 00:00:00.000') AND (cbatcno NOT IN ('104787    '))
GROUP BY ctrsno, cacctid

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_GLTrsnOld
AS
SELECT     ctrsno, cacctid, SUM(ntrsamt) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.gltrsn_pe1
WHERE     (dtrs BETWEEN '2017-03-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2017-05-31 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY ctrsno, cacctid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_header
AS
SELECT     cinvno, SUM(nsalesamt + ntaxamt1 - ndiscamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arinvc
WHERE     (dinvoice >= '2010-05-01 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iciadj_rep
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciadj.cmodule, dbo.iciadj.cwarehouse, dbo.iciadj.ctrstype, DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) AS month, 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) AS year, dbo.iciadj.nadjqty, dbo.iciadj.ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadj ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadj.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) = 'April') AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) IN ('2012'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciadjh.cmodule, dbo.iciadjh.cwarehouse, dbo.iciadjh.ctrstype, DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) AS month, 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) AS year, dbo.iciadjh.nadjqty, dbo.iciadjh.ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadjh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadjh.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) = 'April') AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) IN ('2012'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iciadj_rep11
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciadj.cmodule, dbo.iciadj.cwarehouse, dbo.iciadj.ctrstype, DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) AS month, 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) AS year, dbo.iciadj.nadjqty, dbo.iciadj.ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadj ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadj.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) = 'April') AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadj.dadjust) IN ('2011'))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciadjh.cmodule, dbo.iciadjh.cwarehouse, dbo.iciadjh.ctrstype, DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) AS month, 
                      DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) AS year, dbo.iciadjh.nadjqty, dbo.iciadjh.ntotcost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadjh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadjh.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(month, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) = 'April') AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.iciadjh.dadjust) IN ('2011'))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iciadj_repall
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno,cwarehouse, sum(dbo.iciadj.nadjqty) as qty, sum(dbo.iciadj.ntotcost) as cost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadj ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadj.citemno
WHERE     dadjust between '2011-04-01' and '2011-08-01'
group by dbo.icitem.citemno, cwarehouse
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, cwarehouse, sum(dbo.iciadjh.nadjqty) as qty, sum(dbo.iciadjh.ntotcost) as cost
FROM         dbo.icitem RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.iciadjh ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciadjh.citemno
WHERE     dadjust between '2011-04-01' and '2011-08-01'
group by dbo.icitem.citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_icibine
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS Bonhand
FROM         dbo.icibin
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_icibin
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, SUM(nonhand) AS Bonhand
FROM         dbo.icibin
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_icibinold
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, SUM(nonhand) AS Bonhand
FROM         dbo.icibin
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_icicstchk
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS Conhand
FROM         dbo.icicst
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_icisti
AS
SELECT    *
FROM         dbo.icisti
UNION all
SELECT    *
FROM         dbo.icistih

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_icisti with date]
AS
SELECT     cissueno, cwarehouse, cremark, cissueacc, centerby, ctogl, dcreate, dissue, lprtissue, ntotcost, cshipvia, cparcel, cSstatus, clastshipstatus, cCourierinv, cWaybillno, 
                      cscompany, csaddrno, csaddr1, csaddr2, cscity, csstate, cszip, cscountry, nshipcost, csphone
FROM         dbo.icisti
WHERE     (dissue > '2011-11-01') AND (dissue < '2012-03-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_icistih with dates]
AS
SELECT     cissueno, cwarehouse, cremark, cissueacc, centerby, ctogl, dcreate, dissue, lprtissue, ntotcost, cshipvia, cparcel, cSstatus, clastshipstatus, cCourierinv, cWaybillno, 
                      nshipcost, csphone
FROM         dbo.icistih
WHERE     (dissue > '2011-11-01') AND (dissue < '2012-03-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_icitsp
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS Tonhand
FROM         dbo.icitsp
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_icitsp_vs_whs
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.vw_icitsp.Tonhand
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_icitsp ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.vw_icitsp.citemno AND dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.vw_icitsp.cwarehouse AND 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nonhand <> dbo.vw_icitsp.Tonhand

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_icitspbin
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, SUM(nonhand) AS Tonhand
FROM         dbo.icitsp
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse, cbin

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_icitspbincompare
AS
SELECT     dbo.VW_icitspbin.citemno, dbo.VW_icitspbin.cwarehouse, dbo.VW_icitspbin.cbin, dbo.VW_icitspbin.Tonhand, dbo.VW_icibinold.Bonhand
FROM         dbo.VW_icitspbin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_icibinold ON dbo.VW_icitspbin.citemno = dbo.VW_icibinold.citemno AND dbo.VW_icitspbin.cwarehouse = dbo.VW_icibinold.cwarehouse AND 
                      dbo.VW_icitspbin.cbin = dbo.VW_icibinold.cbin AND dbo.VW_icitspbin.Tonhand <> dbo.VW_icibinold.Bonhand

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iciwhs
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS WHS_Onhand
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
GROUP BY citemno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[vw_iciwhs_chk]
AS
SELECT     citemno, SUM(nonhand) AS WHS_Onhand,cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
GROUP BY citemno,cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iciwhs_icitrs_chk
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_icicstchk.citemno, dbo.vw_icicstchk.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_icicstchk.Conhand, dbo.vw_whschk.wonhand, 
                      dbo.vw_icicstchk.Conhand - dbo.vw_whschk.wonhand AS difference
FROM         dbo.vw_icicstchk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_whschk ON dbo.vw_icicstchk.citemno = dbo.vw_whschk.citemno AND dbo.vw_icicstchk.cwarehouse = dbo.vw_whschk.cwarehouse
WHERE     (dbo.vw_icicstchk.Conhand - dbo.vw_whschk.wonhand <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.vw_icicstchk.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iconhand
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.icibin.cbin, 
                      dbo.icibin.nonhand AS Expr1, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.icitem.cbuyer
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icibin ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icibin.citemno AND dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.icibin.cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ictrsn
AS
SELECT     dbo.ictrsn.*
FROM         dbo.ictrsn
union all
SELECT     dbo.ictrsnh.*
FROM         dbo.ictrsnh

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_ictrsn union]
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.ictrsn
UNION ALL
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.ictrsnh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM
AS
SELECT     cwarehouse, citemno, SUM(nqty) AS QTY, SUM(ntotcost) AS TotalCost
FROM         dbo.vw_ictrsn
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse
HAVING      (SUM(nqty) <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_ID_customer
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, cemail, cphone2, cdear
FROM         dbo.arcust

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_incorrect_applied_payments
AS
SELECT     dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.crcptno, dbo.arcash.nappamt, dbo.vw_arcapp_test.Amt
FROM         dbo.arcash INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arcapp_test ON dbo.arcash.ccustno = dbo.vw_arcapp_test.ccustno AND dbo.arcash.crcptno = dbo.vw_arcapp_test.crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_invoice_tax
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.cbin, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.ctaxcode, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS Total, dbo.aritrs.nordqty, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2012-06-01' AND '2012-06-30')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_iS_check
AS
SELECT     dbo.arrevn.crevnacc AS AccountID, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) 
                      AS sales, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS discount, SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) AS vat
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice), DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice)
HAVING      (DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) = '2012')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_Item_master
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.comisc.cdescript AS Class, comisc_1.cdescript AS [Product Line], 
                      dbo.icitem.cstatus, dbo.icitem.ctype
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc ON dbo.icitem.cclass = dbo.comisc.ccode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.comisc AS comisc_1 ON dbo.icitem.cprodline = comisc_1.ccode
WHERE     (dbo.comisc.ctype = 'ITEMCLASS') AND (comisc_1.ctype = 'ITEMPRODLN')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_item_rev
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.iciwhs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_ItemClass
AS
SELECT     ctype, ccode, cdescript, cfdescript, lactive
FROM         dbo.comisc
WHERE     (ctype = 'itemCLASS')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_ItemList
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.icwhse.cdescript AS Expr1, '1' AS Expr2, dbo.icitem.dcreate, 
                      CASE WHEN dbo.iciwhs.ncost = 0 THEN dbo.icitem.nstdcost ELSE dbo.iciwhs.ncost END AS Expr3, dbo.icitem.nprice, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand, 0 AS Expr4, 
                      dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.iciwhs.nbook, dbo.icitem.cvendno, dbo.apvend.ccompany, '1' AS Expr5, dbo.iciwhs.nreordqty, 0 AS Expr6, 0 AS Expr7, 0 AS Expr8, 
                      0 AS Expr9, dbo.iciwhs.nreordpt, 0 AS Expr10, dbo.icitem.ctype, dbo.icitem.cclass, CASE WHEN dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1 THEN 'KIT' ELSE '' END AS Expr11
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icwhse ON dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = dbo.icwhse.cwarehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.apvend ON dbo.icitem.cvendno = dbo.apvend.cvendno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.citemno BETWEEN '1020000' AND 'AS/50001/09')
ORDER BY dbo.icitem.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_k1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.arsktr.ckitno, dbo.arsktr.nqty, 
                      dbo.arsktr.ncost, dbo.arsktr.citemno AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arsktr ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arsktr.cinvno AND dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arsktr.clineitem
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.citemno IN ('1420018', '2020015', '2020016')) AND (dbo.arsktr.ckitno IS NULL) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice < CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-06-24 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_kit_weight
AS
SELECT     ckititemno, SUM(nweight) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_comp_weight
GROUP BY ckititemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_kits
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno, dbo.arsktr.ckitno, dbo.arsktr.cwarehouse, 
                      dbo.arsktr.citemno AS ItemNo, dbo.arsktr.nqty AS KitQty, dbo.arsktr.ncost, dbo.icikit.ncost AS IC_Cost, dbo.icikit.nqty AS Ic_KitQty, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse AS WAREHOUSE
FROM         dbo.aritrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arsktr ON dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arsktr.clineitem AND dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arsktr.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icikit ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icikit.ckititemno
WHERE     (dbo.arsktr.cinvno IS NULL) AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-05-31 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.icitem.lkititem = 1)
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_l1l2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arcust.ccustno AS Pccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Pcompany, arcust_1.ccustno AS L1ccustno, arcust_1.ccompany AS L1ccompany, 
                      arcust_1.dcreate AS L1dcreate, arcust_2.ccustno AS l2ccustno, arcust_2.ccompany AS l2ccompany, arcust_2.dcreate AS L2Dcreate
FROM         dbo.arcust INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.ccustno = arcust_1.csponsor LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_2 ON arcust_1.ccustno = arcust_2.csponsor
WHERE     (arcust_1.dcreate >= '2012-APR-01') AND (arcust_1.dcreate <= '2012-DEC-31') AND (arcust_2.dcreate >= '2012-APR-01') AND (arcust_2.dcreate <= '2012-DEC-31') AND 
                      (dbo.arcust.ccustno <> '100000') OR
                      (arcust_1.dcreate >= '2012-APR-01') AND (arcust_1.dcreate <= '2012-DEC-31') AND (arcust_2.dcreate IS NULL) AND (dbo.arcust.ccustno <> '100000')
ORDER BY Pccustno, L1ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_line_amend
AS
SELECT     cinvno AS Invoice#, citemno AS Item#, cusername, nshipqty AS [Ship Qty], ndiscrate AS [Disc%], nprice AS Price, nprcinctx AS [Price INCL], ctrantype AS Type, 
                      dmodified AS Date
FROM         dbo.aritrs_T
WHERE     (dmodified > GETDATE() - 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_line_revcode
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.ctogl, dbo.arrevn.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, 
                      dbo.aritrs.citemno AS [as ARcitemno], dbo.aritrs.clineitem, dbo.arikit.citemno
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arikit ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arikit.cinvno AND dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arikit.clineitem
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.ctogl <> 'X') AND (dbo.aritrs.lkititem = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_lines
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 + dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice >= '2010-05-01 00:00:00.000')
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_lines_final
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_lines.cinvno, dbo.vw_lines.Expr1 + dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.vw_lines INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.vw_lines.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_marketing
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.cslpnno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.arinvc.csaddrno, dbo.arinvc.cscompany, dbo.aritrs.citemno, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.nprice, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.aritrs.cuid, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, DATENAME(Year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, 
                      CASE WHEN aritrs.ndiscrate <> 0 THEN aritrs.nshipqty * aritrs.nprcinctx ELSE 0 END AS Comm, 
                      CASE WHEN aritrs.ndiscrate = 0 THEN aritrs.nshipqty * aritrs.nprcinctx ELSE 0 END AS Non_Comm, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Total, 
                      dbo.icitem.nprcinctx AS RSP, dbo.icitem.cprodline, dbo.icitem.cclass, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ncost AS Avg_Cost, 
                      dbo.icvend.cvendno AS Supplier, 0 AS nadjqty, dbo.icitem.cbarcode1 AS ProdLine1, dbo.aritrs.crevncode AS Revenue_Code, dbo.arinvc.ctype, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ncost * dbo.aritrs.nshipqty AS Cost_value
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icvend ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icvend.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > '31-Jul-2007')
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.cslpnno, dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, dbo.arinvch.cbcompany, dbo.arinvch.csaddrno, dbo.arinvch.cscompany, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.nprice, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.cuid, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month, DATENAME(Year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, 
                      CASE WHEN aritrsh.ndiscrate <> 0 THEN aritrsh.nshipqty * aritrsh.nprcinctx ELSE 0 END AS Comm, 
                      CASE WHEN aritrsh.ndiscrate = 0 THEN aritrsh.nshipqty * aritrsh.nprcinctx ELSE 0 END AS Non_Comm, dbo.aritrsh.nprcinctx * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Total, 
                      icitem_1.nprcinctx AS RSP, icitem_1.cprodline, icitem_1.cclass, dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.ncost AS Avg_Cost, 
                      icvend_1.cvendno AS Supplier, 0 AS nadjqty, icitem_1.cbarcode1 AS Prodline1, dbo.aritrsh.crevncode AS Revenue_Code, dbo.arinvch.ctype, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.ncost * dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty AS Cost_value
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icvend AS icvend_1 ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = icvend_1.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem AS icitem_1 ON dbo.aritrsh.citemno = icitem_1.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice > '31-Jul-2007')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_mk_fastway
AS
SELECT        InvNo AS Invoicenumber, SoNo, Date AS Waybilldate, WaybillNo AS Waybilno, SaleValue AS TotalValue, 'Fastway' AS courier
FROM            dbo.vw_SL_Fastway_data
WHERE        (InvNo LIKE '%1306527')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_mk_shipmentdata
AS
SELECT     dbo.soship.cshipno, dbo.soship.csono, dbo.soship.cCourierinv, dbo.soship.nshipcost, dbo.soship.cWaybillno, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno AS shipno, dbo.fw_items.cConsignmentID, dbo.fw_items.cColour, 
                      dbo.vw_sosptr.cinvno, dbo.vw_sosptr.ccustno, dbo.vw_sosptr.SaleValue, dbo.vw_sosptr.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvc.cinvno AS Expr1, dbo.arinvc.dcreate
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_sosptr ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_sosptr.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.vw_sosptr.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.be_waybill ON dbo.soship.cWaybillno = dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.fw_items INNER JOIN
                      dbo.fw_consignment ON dbo.fw_items.cManifestid = dbo.fw_consignment.cManifestid ON dbo.soship.cshipno = dbo.fw_consignment.cShipno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_mlm_prog_final
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccustno, SUM(dbo.vw_mlm_progress.Total) AS Total, SUM(dbo.vw_mlm_progress.Disc) AS Disc, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_mlm_progress.Tax) AS Tax, SUM(dbo.vw_mlm_progress.TotInc) AS TotalInc, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.MLM, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccompany, 
                      dbo.vw_mlm_progress.Contact, dbo.genreb.cStatus, dbo.genreb.nRebateamt, dbo.genreb.nPSales, dbo.genreb.nGroupSales, dbo.genreb.dGenerate, 
                      dbo.genreb.cleveld, dbo.genreb.csponsord, dbo.genreb.nrebated, dbo.genreb.nrebateamtd, dbo.genreb.nsalesamtd, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.caddr1, 
                      dbo.vw_mlm_progress.caddr2, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccity, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.cstate, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.czip, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccountry, 
                      'alexk@accountmate.co.za' AS email
FROM         dbo.vw_mlm_progress INNER JOIN
                      dbo.genreb ON dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccustno = dbo.genreb.cCustNo
WHERE     (DATENAME(month, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.dinvoice) = DATENAME(month, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(year, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.dinvoice) = DATENAME(year, 
                      GETDATE())) AND (dbo.genreb.csponsord = '200082')
GROUP BY dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccustno, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.MLM, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccompany, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.Contact, dbo.genreb.cStatus, 
                      dbo.genreb.nRebateamt, dbo.genreb.nPSales, dbo.genreb.nGroupSales, dbo.genreb.dGenerate, dbo.genreb.cleveld, dbo.genreb.csponsord, dbo.genreb.nrebated, 
                      dbo.genreb.nrebateamtd, dbo.genreb.nsalesamtd, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.caddr1, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.caddr2, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccity, 
                      dbo.vw_mlm_progress.cstate, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.czip, dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccountry
HAVING      (dbo.genreb.dGenerate = CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-09-19 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dbo.vw_mlm_progress.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_mlm_progress
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt) IS NULL) THEN ('0') ELSE (SUM(dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt)) 
                      END AS Total, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt) IS NULL) THEN ('0') ELSE (SUM(dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt)) END AS Disc, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1) 
                      IS NULL) THEN ('0') ELSE (SUM(dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1)) END AS Tax, CASE WHEN (SUM(dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * aritrs.nshipqty) IS NULL) THEN ('0') 
                      ELSE (SUM(dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx * aritrs.nshipqty)) END AS TotInc, CASE WHEN (dbo.icitem.ldscntble IS NULL) THEN (0) ELSE (dbo.icitem.ldscntble) END AS MLM, 
                      dbo.arcust.ccompany, CASE WHEN (dbo.arcust.cphone2 IS NULL) THEN (dbo.arcust.cphone1) ELSE (dbo.arcust.cphone2) END AS Contact, dbo.arcust.caddr1, 
                      dbo.arcust.caddr2, dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.arcust.cemail
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.aritrs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.icitem.ldscntble, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cphone1, dbo.arcust.cphone2, dbo.arcust.caddr1, dbo.arcust.caddr2, 
                      dbo.arcust.ccity, dbo.arcust.cstate, dbo.arcust.czip, dbo.arcust.ccountry, dbo.arcust.cemail, dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx
ORDER BY dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_MLM_PSales
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.VW_MLM_SalesTot.nPSalesAmt, dbo.VW_MLM_SalesDisc.nPSalesDisc, dbo.VW_MLM_SalesTot.ccustno
FROM         dbo.VW_MLM_SalesDisc RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_MLM_SalesTot ON dbo.VW_MLM_SalesDisc.ccustno = dbo.VW_MLM_SalesTot.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_MLM_SalesDisc
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.ccustno, ROUND(SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx), 2) AS nPSalesDisc
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) =
                          (SELECT     CASE WHEN DAY(getdate()) = 1 THEN MONTH(GETDATE() - 1) ELSE MONTH(GETDATE()) END AS Expr1)) AND (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate NOT BETWEEN 49 AND 
                      90) AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno NOT IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1
                            WHERE      (ldscntble = 0))) AND (YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) = CASE WHEN DAY(getdate()) = 1 AND MONTH(getdate()) = 1 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) 
                      - 1 ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) END)
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_MLM_SalesTot
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.aritrs.ccustno, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate BETWEEN 49 AND 90 THEN ((dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx) 
                      * (dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate / 100)) ELSE dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.nprcinctx END), 2) AS nPSalesAmt
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.aritrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (MONTH(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) =
                          (SELECT     CASE WHEN DAY(getdate()) = 1 THEN MONTH(GETDATE() - 1) ELSE MONTH(GETDATE()) END AS Expr1)) AND (dbo.aritrs.citemno <> 'MLM') AND 
                      (YEAR(dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) = CASE WHEN DAY(getdate()) = 1 AND MONTH(getdate()) = 1 THEN YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 ELSE YEAR(GETDATE()) END) AND 
                      (dbo.aritrs.citemno IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.icitem AS icitem_1
                            WHERE      (lmlm = 1)))
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno
ORDER BY dbo.aritrs.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_MN_arcapp
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cinvno, SUM(paidamt) AS paidamt, SUM(discamt) AS discamt, SUM(adjamt) AS adjamt, SUM(debtamt) AS debtamt
FROM         dbo.vw_mn_arcapp1
GROUP BY ccustno, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_MN_arcapp_arinvc
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.ccustno, dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.cinvno, dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.paidamt, dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.discamt, dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.adjamt, 
                      dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.debtamt, dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.vw_MN_arcapp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.ccustno = dbo.arinvc.ccustno AND dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno AND 
                      dbo.vw_MN_arcapp.paidamt <> dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid
ORDER BY dbo.arinvc.dinvoice

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_mn_arcapp1
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cinvno, SUM(npaidamt) AS paidamt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS discamt, SUM(nadjamt) AS adjamt, SUM(ndebtamt) AS debtamt
FROM         dbo.arcapp
GROUP BY ccustno, cinvno
UNION
SELECT     ccustno, cinvno, SUM(npaidamt) AS paidamt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS discamt, SUM(nadjamt) AS adjamt, SUM(ndebtamt) AS debtamt
FROM         dbo.arcapph
GROUP BY ccustno, cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_MT Test Book Qty]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT w.citemno, w.nbook, ISNULL(x.nboqty, 0) AS nboqty
FROM            dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        dbo.sostrs.citemno, SUM(dbo.sostrs.nordqty - dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AS nboqty
                               FROM            dbo.sosord WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.sostrs WITH (NOLOCK) ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
                               WHERE        (dbo.sosord.lquote = 0) AND (dbo.sostrs.lmodikit = 0) AND (dbo.sostrs.nordqty > dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AND (dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse = '4400') OR
                                                         (dbo.sosord.lquote = 0) AND (dbo.sostrs.nordqty > dbo.sostrs.nshipqty) AND (dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse = '4400') AND EXISTS
                                                             (SELECT        citemno
                                                               FROM            dbo.icitem WITH (NOLOCK)
                                                               WHERE        (lkititem = 0) AND (lprebkit = 0))
                               GROUP BY dbo.sostrs.citemno) AS x ON w.citemno = x.citemno
WHERE        (w.cwarehouse = '4400') AND (w.nbook <> ISNULL(x.nboqty, 0))
ORDER BY w.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_NamGLError
AS
SELECT     csource, amt
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.gltfererror

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_namrbtmlm
AS
SELECT     ccustno, csponsor, csponsor0, cstatus1, cLevel, cstatus, ltl, nSalesamt, ngsalesdisc, nsalesdisc, ngsalesamt, nrebate, ngrebateamt, ccompany, cphone1, 
                      cphone2
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.rbtmlm

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_non autoinvoke kit orders]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sostrs.cdescript, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, 
                      dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sosord.lautoinvk, dbo.sosord.centerby, dbo.sosord.dexpire, dbo.sostrs.cinvno, dbo.sosord.cpono, dbo.sosord.dcreate
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.citemno IN ('3220078', '3220079', '3220080', '3220081', '3220082', '3220082', '3220083', '3220084', '3220085', '3220111', '3220112', '3220113', 
                      '3220114', '3220115', '3220116', '3220117', '3220118', '3220122', '3220123', '3220124', '3220125', '3220126', '3220127', '3220128', '3203030', '3203054')) AND 
                      (dbo.sosord.lautoinvk = 2)
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sosord.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_onhand_spon
AS
SELECT     Item, Descript, SPON, Warehouse, OH, Cost, Price, [FC Units], [FC Qty]
FROM         dbo.vw_onhand_spon_tot

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_onhand_spon_tot
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno as Item, dbo.icitem.cdescript as Descript, dbo.icitem.csponcat as SPON, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse as Warehouse, dbo.iciwhs.nonhand as OH, dbo.iciwhs.ntotcost as Cost, dbo.icitem.nprice as Price, 0 as 'FC Units', 
                      0 AS 'FC Qty'
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     nonhand <> 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     dpibdg.cItemNo as Item, cdescript as Descript, csponcat as SPON, '4000' AS Warehouse, 0 AS OH, 0 AS Cost, 0 AS Price, SUM(nUnits) AS 'FC Units', SUM(nDollars) AS 'FC Qty'
FROM         dbo.dpibdg JOIN
                      icitem ON dpibdg.citemno = icitem.citemno
WHERE     nunits <> 0
GROUP BY dpibdg.cItemNo, cdescript, csponcat

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_open_inv_cr
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cbcompany, dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.nbalance, dbo.arcust.nopencr
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.arinvc.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.nbalance > 0) AND (dbo.arcust.nopencr <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_open_rep
AS
SELECT     citemno, nonhand, ntotcost, DATENAME(year, dcurrent) AS Expr1, DATENAME(month, dcurrent) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_daily
WHERE     (dcurrent IN ('Mar 31 2012 11:00PM                   '))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_open_repaug
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, nonhand, ntotcost, DATENAME(year, dcurrent) AS Expr1, DATENAME(month, dcurrent) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_daily
WHERE     (dcurrent IN ('Aug  1 2011 11:00PM                   ')) AND (nonhand <> 0) OR
                      (dcurrent IN ('Aug  1 2011 11:00PM                   ')) AND (ntotcost <> 0)
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[VW_OpenSO]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nordqty - nshipqty) AS OpenQty
FROM            dbo.sostrs
WHERE        (nordqty - nshipqty > 0) AND (csono NOT IN
                             (SELECT        csono
                               FROM            dbo.sosord
                               WHERE        (lquote = 1)))
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse
union all
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT soskit.citemno, sostrs.cwarehouse, SUM((sostrs.nordqty - sostrs.nshipqty)*nqty) AS OpenQty
FROM     sostrs INNER JOIN
                  soskit ON sostrs.csono = soskit.csono AND sostrs.clineitem = soskit.clineitem
WHERE  (sostrs.nordqty - sostrs.nshipqty > 0) AND (sostrs.csono NOT IN
                      (SELECT csono
                       FROM      sosord
                       WHERE   (lquote = 1)))
GROUP BY sostrs.citemno, sostrs.cwarehouse, soskit.citemno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[VW_OpenSOKit]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(OpenQty) AS OpenQty
FROM         dbo.VW_OpenSO
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse
ORDER BY citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_order_fin
