CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_orders_com
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, csono, Stock, Non_Stock
FROM         dbo.vw_order_nonstock
union all
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, csono, Stock, Non_Stock
FROM         dbo.vw_orders_stock

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_orders_fin_bal
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_order_fin.ccustno, dbo.vw_order_fin.ccompany, dbo.vw_order_fin.Stock, dbo.vw_order_fin.NonStock, dbo.arcust.nopencr, dbo.arcust.nbalance, 
                      dbo.arcust.nbalance + dbo.vw_order_fin.Stock + dbo.vw_order_fin.NonStock AS Net_Bal
FROM         dbo.vw_order_fin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_order_fin.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_orders_stock
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, csono, nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1 AS 'Stock', 0 AS 'Non_Stock'
FROM         dbo.vw_orders1
WHERE     (Type2 = 'STOCK')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_orders2
AS
SELECT     ccustno, ccompany, csono, Type, Type2, SUM(nsalesamt) AS nsalesamt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS ndiscamt, SUM(ntaxamt1) AS ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.vw_orders
GROUP BY ccustno, ccompany, csono, Type, Type2

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_pastrecon_nam
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cdepno, cbankno, dpaid, npaidamt, dstmtend, crcptno
FROM         amanniquenam.dbo.vw_pastrecon_nam

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_pastrecon_sa
AS
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.cdepno, dbo.arcash.cbankno, dbo.arcash.dpaid, dbo.arcash.npaidamt, dbo.brctrl.dstmtend, dbo.arcash.crcptno
FROM         dbo.arcash INNER JOIN
                      dbo.brctrl ON dbo.arcash.cbankno = dbo.brctrl.cbankno
GROUP BY dbo.arcash.ccustno, dbo.arcash.cdepno, dbo.arcash.lvoid, dbo.arcash.cbankno, dbo.arcash.dpaid, dbo.arcash.npaidamt, dbo.brctrl.dstmtend, 
                      dbo.arcash.crcptno
HAVING      (dbo.arcash.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.arcash.cdepno IN
                          (SELECT     cdepno
                            FROM          dbo.brctrl AS brctrl_1))
union all
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.arcashh.ccustno, dbo.arcashh.cdepno, dbo.arcashh.cbankno, dbo.arcashh.dpaid, dbo.arcashh.npaidamt, dbo.brctrlh.dstmtend, dbo.arcashh.crcptno
FROM         dbo.arcashh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.brctrlh ON dbo.arcashh.cbankno = dbo.brctrlh.cbankno
GROUP BY dbo.arcashh.ccustno, dbo.arcashh.cdepno, dbo.arcashh.lvoid, dbo.arcashh.cbankno, dbo.arcashh.dpaid, dbo.arcashh.npaidamt, dbo.brctrlh.dstmtend, 
                      dbo.arcashh.crcptno
HAVING      (dbo.arcashh.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.arcashh.cdepno IN
                          (SELECT     cdepno
                            FROM          dbo.brctrlh AS brctrlh_1))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_po_dates
AS
SELECT     dbo.popord.cpono, dbo.popord.cvendno, dbo.popord.dorder, dbo.porecg.dreceive, dbo.apinvc.cpono AS [InvPO], dbo.apinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.apinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.porecg ON dbo.apinvc.cpono = dbo.porecg.cpono RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.popord ON dbo.porecg.cpono = dbo.popord.cpono
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.popordh.cpono, dbo.popordh.cvendno, dbo.popordh.dorder, dbo.porecgh.dreceive, dbo.apinvch.cpono AS [InvPO], dbo.apinvch.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.apinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.porecgh ON dbo.apinvch.cpono = dbo.porecgh.cpono RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.popordh ON dbo.porecgh.cpono = dbo.popordh.cpono

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_POBackOrder
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nordqty - nrecqty) AS Expr1
FROM        dbo.poptrs
WHERE     (nordqty > nrecqty) AND (cpono IN
                      (SELECT     cpono
                       FROM        dbo.popord
                       WHERE     (lquote = 0) AND (lnobo = 0) AND (lvoid = 0)))
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_portrs
AS
SELECT     dbo.portrs.citemno AS Item_No, dbo.portrs.nrecamt, dbo.portrs.nrecqty, dbo.portrs.cvendno, dbo.portrs.dreceive, dbo.apvend.ccompany
FROM         dbo.portrs LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.apvend ON dbo.portrs.cvendno = dbo.apvend.cvendno
WHERE     (dreceive > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2008-06-01 00:00:00', 102))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.portrsh.citemno AS Item_No, dbo.portrsh.nrecamt, dbo.portrsh.nrecqty, dbo.portrsh.cvendno, dbo.portrsh.dreceive, dbo.apvend.ccompany
FROM         dbo.portrsh LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.apvend ON dbo.portrsh.cvendno = dbo.apvend.cvendno
WHERE     (dreceive > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2008-06-01 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_portrs_mjm
AS
SELECT     dbo.portrs.*
FROM         dbo.portrs
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.portrsh.*
FROM         dbo.portrsh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_portrs_sum
AS
SELECT     Item_No, SUM(nrecamt) AS Received_Amt, SUM(nrecqty) AS Received_Qty, MAX(cvendno) AS cvendno, MAX(ccompany) AS Supplier, cvendno AS Expr1, 
                      ccompany
FROM         dbo.vw_portrs
GROUP BY Item_No, cvendno, ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_Prodline
AS
SELECT     ctype, ccode, cdescript, cfdescript, lactive
FROM         dbo.comisc
WHERE     (ctype = 'itemprodln')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_PurchaseLineTotals
AS
SELECT     crcptno, SUM(nrecamt) AS nrecamt, SUM(ntaxamt1) AS ntaxamt1, SUM(nfrecamt) AS nfrecamt, SUM(nftaxamt1) AS nftaxamt1, cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.portrsh
GROUP BY crcptno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_rc_corr
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.clineitem, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, 
                      dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.arsktr.citemno AS kcitemno, dbo.arsktr.crevncode AS kcrevncode, dbo.arsktr.nqty, 
                      dbo.arsktr.ncost AS kncost, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arsktr.cuid
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arsktr ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arsktr.cinvno AND dbo.aritrs.clineitem = dbo.arsktr.clineitem AND dbo.aritrs.crevncode <> dbo.arsktr.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arsktr.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2012-02-29 00:00:00', 102))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_receipt_error
AS
SELECT     dbo.podist.cpono, dbo.podist.cvendno, dbo.podist.cglacc, dbo.podist.dtrs, dbo.portrs.citemno, dbo.podist.namount
FROM         dbo.podist INNER JOIN
                      dbo.portrs ON dbo.podist.cpono = dbo.portrs.cpono AND dbo.podist.clineitem = dbo.portrs.clineitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.portrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.podist.ctrs = 'I') AND (dbo.podist.cglacc <> '130100-2600') AND (dbo.icitem.citemno NOT IN ('FA', 'RENTAL', 'MISC.ITEM')) AND 
                      (dbo.podist.cglacc <> '550000-0000                   ') AND (dbo.icitem.lchkonhand = '1') AND (dbo.icitem.lupdonhand = '1')
union all
SELECT     dbo.podisth.cpono, dbo.podisth.cvendno, dbo.podisth.cglacc, dbo.podisth.dtrs, dbo.portrsh.citemno, dbo.podisth.namount
FROM         dbo.podisth INNER JOIN
                      dbo.portrsh ON dbo.podisth.cpono = dbo.portrsh.cpono AND dbo.podisth.clineitem = dbo.portrsh.clineitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.portrsh.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (dbo.podisth.ctrs = 'I') AND (dbo.podisth.cglacc <> '130100-2600') AND (dbo.icitem.citemno NOT IN ('FA', 'RENTAL', 'MISC.ITEM')) AND 
                      (dbo.podisth.cglacc <> '550000-0000                   ') AND (dbo.icitem.lchkonhand = '1') AND (dbo.icitem.lupdonhand = '1')

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_ReconInvRec
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.arinvc.dinvoice AS InvDate, dbo.arinvc.centerby AS [User], dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, dbo.arinvc.cinvno AS InvNo, 
                      dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt + dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1 AS InvAmt, dbo.arinvc.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.arcapp.npaidamt AS AppliedAmt, 
                      dbo.arcapp.ccinvno AS CrNoteNo, dbo.arcapp.lvoid AS ApplyVoided, dbo.arcash.crcptno AS RcptNo, dbo.arcash.dpaid AS PaymDate, dbo.arcash.cpaycode AS Paycode, 
                      dbo.arcash.npaidamt AS RcptAmt, dbo.arcash.lvoid AS Voided, dbo.arcpos.nPOSpdAmt, dbo.arcpos.cdepno AS DepositNo, dbo.arinvc.coriginvno AS OrigInvNo, 
                      dbo.arcpos.cpaycode AS POSPaycode
FROM         dbo.arcpos RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcash ON dbo.arcpos.crcptno = dbo.arcash.crcptno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcapp ON dbo.arcash.crcptno = dbo.arcapp.crcptno FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.arcapp.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse <> '') AND (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-05-04 00:00:00.000' AND '2010-05-31 00:00:00.000') AND (dbo.arinvc.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') 
                      AND (dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt + dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1 <> 0)
ORDER BY InvDate, [User], Warehouse, InvNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_reg_alert
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.arinvc.nbalance, dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvc.cbaddr1, dbo.arinvc.cbaddr2, dbo.arinvc.cbcity, dbo.arinvc.cbstate, dbo.arinvc.cbzip, dbo.arinvc.cbcountry, 
                      dbo.arinvc.cbphone, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.cmeasure, dbo.arcust.cemail
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') and arinvc.dinvoice > '2011-02-28' and arinvc.ctype <> 'R'
union all
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.arinvch.ccustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.arinvch.nsalesamt, dbo.arinvch.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvch.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.arinvch.nbalance, dbo.arinvch.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvch.cbaddr1, dbo.arinvch.cbaddr2, dbo.arinvch.cbcity, dbo.arinvch.cbstate, dbo.arinvch.cbzip, dbo.arinvch.cbcountry, 
                      dbo.arinvch.cbphone, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.cmeasure, dbo.arcust.cemail
FROM         dbo.aritrsh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.aritrsh.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvch ON dbo.aritrsh.cinvno = dbo.arinvch.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.aritrsh.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') and arinvch.dinvoice > '2011-02-28' and arinvch.ctype <> 'R'

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_reg_alert2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT cinvno, ccustno, ccompany, dinvoice, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, ntaxamt1, nbalance, cwarehouse, cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, cbstate, cbzip, cbcountry, 
                      cbphone, citemno, cdescript, nshipqty, cmeasure, RTRIM(cemail) AS cemail
FROM         dbo.vw_reg_alert
WHERE     (cemail <> '')
ORDER BY cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_register_alert
AS
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.regcan.ccustno, dbo.regcan.citemno, dbo.regcan.cdescript, dbo.regcan.cwarehouse, RTRIM(LTRIM(dbo.arcust.cemail)) AS cemail
FROM         dbo.regcan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.regcan.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.arcust.cemail <> ' ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_rereg
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.cbcompany, dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.lquote, dbo.sosord.lvoid, dbo.sosord.lnobo, 
                      dbo.sostrs.nsalesamt, dbo.sostrs.ndiscamt, dbo.sostrs.ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.sostrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.sostrs.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sosord.lquote = 0) AND (dbo.sosord.lvoid = 0) AND (dbo.sosord.lnobo = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_rereg_shona
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_rereg.ccustno AS Member, dbo.vw_rereg.cbcompany AS MemberName, dbo.arcust.cstatus AS Status, dbo.vw_rereg.csono AS SoNo, 
                      dbo.vw_rereg.citemno AS ItemNo, dbo.vw_rereg.dorder AS OrderDate, dbo.vw_rereg.nsalesamt + dbo.vw_rereg.ntaxamt1 AS AmountIncl, 
                      dbo.vw_dlastinvc.Expr1 AS InvoiceDate
FROM         dbo.vw_rereg LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_rereg.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_dlastinvc ON dbo.vw_rereg.ccustno = dbo.vw_dlastinvc.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_rev_comp
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_sa_rev.citemno, dbo.vw_sa_rev.crevncode, dbo.vw_sa_rev.crevnacc, dbo.vw_sa_rev.crtrnacc, dbo.vw_sa_rev.cdiscacc, dbo.vw_sa_rev.ccogsacc, 
                      livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.citemno AS Expr1, livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.crevncode AS Expr2, livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.crevnacc AS Expr3, 
                      livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.crtrnacc AS Expr4, livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.cdiscacc AS Expr5, livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.ccogsacc AS Expr6, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.vw_sa_rev.crevnacc <> livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.crevnacc) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS sales, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.vw_sa_rev.crtrnacc <> livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.crtrnacc) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS rtrn, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.vw_sa_rev.cdiscacc <> livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.cdiscacc) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS disc, 
                      CASE WHEN (dbo.vw_sa_rev.ccogsacc <> livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.ccogsacc) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS cost
FROM         dbo.vw_sa_rev LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev ON dbo.vw_sa_rev.citemno = livejournals.dbo.vw_live_rev.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sa_rev
AS
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.iciwhs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SafeStock
AS
SELECT DISTINCT citemno, nreordpt
FROM        dbo.iciwhs
WHERE     (nreordpt <> 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sales
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ctype, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.arinvc.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice,datename(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) as Month, datename(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) as Year, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.cdescript, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.cdescript AS Rev_Desc
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.arinvch.cinvno, dbo.arinvch.ctype, dbo.arinvch.ccustno, dbo.arinvch.cwarehouse, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice,datename(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) as Month, datename(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) as Year, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.cdescript, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.crevncode, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.ncost, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.cdescript AS Rev_Desc
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.aritrsh.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sales_rev
AS
SELECT     crevncode AS Rev_Code, SUM(nsalesamt) AS Sales_Amt, SUM(ndiscamt) AS Disc_Amt, crevnacc, Rev_Desc, Month, Year, citemno
FROM         dbo.vw_sales
GROUP BY crevncode, crevnacc, Rev_Desc, Month, Year, citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sales_test
AS
SELECT     dbo.arinvc.cinvno, dbo.arinvc.ccustno, dbo.vw_aritrs_test.sales_lines, dbo.arinvc.nsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt + dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1 AS sales_headers, 
                      dbo.arinvc.dinvoice
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_aritrs_test ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.vw_aritrs_test.cinvno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SalesCategories
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc, dbo.ictype.ctypedesc, dbo.VW_ItemClass.cdescript AS Expr1, dbo.VW_Prodline.cdescript AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.iciwhs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ictype ON dbo.icitem.ctype = dbo.ictype.ctype INNER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_ItemClass ON dbo.icitem.cclass = dbo.VW_ItemClass.ccode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_Prodline ON dbo.icitem.cprodline = dbo.VW_Prodline.ccode
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.citemno IN
                          (SELECT     citemno
                            FROM          dbo.arrevnmap))

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL sales by rev acc]
AS
SELECT TOP (10000) i.cinvno, i.ctype, i.dinvoice, i.ccustno, g.crevnacc, a.cdescript, SUM(l.nsalesamt) AS SAles, c.cclass
FROM     dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust AS c ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.aritrs AS l ON i.cinvno = l.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.arrevn AS g ON l.crevncode = g.crevncode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.glacct AS a ON a.cacctid = g.crevnacc
WHERE  (c.cclass <> 'EXPORT') AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (i.lmlm = 0) AND (i.cmlmlink = '') AND (l.cinvno IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY i.cinvno, i.ctype, i.dinvoice, i.ccustno, g.crevnacc, a.cdescript, c.cclass
HAVING (i.dinvoice >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2020-08-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY i.dinvoice DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_SL_001 ADDRESS]
AS
SELECT dbo.arcadr.ccustno, dbo.arcadr.caddrno, dbo.arcadr.ccompany, dbo.arcadr.caddr1, dbo.arcadr.caddr2, dbo.arcadr.ccity, dbo.arcadr.cstate, dbo.arcadr.czip, dbo.arcadr.ccountry, dbo.arcust.cphone2
FROM     dbo.arcadr INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust ON dbo.arcadr.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE  (dbo.arcadr.caddrno = '001') AND (dbo.arcust.cstatus = 'A') AND (dbo.arcust.cclass = 'CONSULTANT')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sl_2620173
AS
SELECT     dbo.soship.csono, dbo.soship.ccustno, dbo.soship.dship, dbo.sostrs.clineitem, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.soship.dorder, dbo.sostrs.cdescript, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse, dbo.sostrs.nsalesamt, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty
FROM        dbo.soship INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sostrs ON dbo.soship.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.soship.dorder > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2018-11-20 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.sostrs.citemno = '2620173')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_4400 on hand]
AS
SELECT     Company, Month, Year, LTRIM(RTRIM(Item)) AS Item, SUM(Qty) AS Onhand
FROM         dbo.AG_ONHAND_MONTHLY
GROUP BY Company, Month, Year, LTRIM(RTRIM(Item)), Qty

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sl_accountsWithParents
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT b.ccustno AS ParentAccount, b.ccompany AS ParentName, a.ccustno, a.ccompany, a.cpcustno
FROM         dbo.arcust AS a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS b ON a.cpcustno = b.ccustno
ORDER BY ParentAccount, a.ccompany

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_active and inactive]
AS
SELECT     ccustno, cnewvalue, MAX(InsUpdDate) AS Latest_Month, DATENAME(YEAR, InsUpdDate) AS YEAR, DATENAME(MONTH, InsUpdDate) AS MONTH, Account, cuser, 
                      nbalance
FROM         dbo.changes
WHERE     (InsUpdDate > '2013-12-31') AND (codlvalue IN ('A', 'I'))
GROUP BY ccustno, cnewvalue, InsUpdDate, Account, cuser, nbalance

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_adj on stock]
AS
SELECT     citemno, ctrstype, cmodule, ckitno, centerby, dcreate, nqty, ncost, ntotcost
FROM         dbo.ictrsn

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_adjust on stock with remark]
AS
SELECT     cadjno, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, centerby, cadjacc, cremark, ctrstype, dadjust, DATENAME(year, dadjust) AS year, DATENAME(month, dadjust) AS month, 
                      nadjqty, ncost, ntotcost
FROM         dbo.iciadj
WHERE     (dadjust > '2011-04-30') AND (dadjust < '2012-06-01')

ViewName: vw_SL_adjust on stock with remark hist
ViewDefinition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_adjust on stock with remark hist]
AS
SELECT     cadjno, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, centerby, cadjacc, cremark, ctrstype, dadjust, nqtydec, nadjqty, ncost, ntotcost
FROM         dbo.iciadjh
WHERE     (dadjust > '2011-04-30') AND (dadjust < '2012-08-01')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SL_AE0832508
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT citemno, cwarehouse, nonhand, nonorder, ninprocess, nallocate, nbook, nintransit, ncost, dcurrent
FROM         dbo.iciwhs_daily
WHERE     (citemno LIKE 'AE/08325/0%') AND (cwarehouse = '4400')
ORDER BY dcurrent

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_ammended invoices]
AS
SELECT     TOP (1000) cuid, cinvno, crevision, ctype, ccustno, cwarehouse, coriginvno, corderby, cslpnno, centerby, cbaddrno, cbcompany, cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, cbstate, 
                      cbzip, cbcountry, cbphone, cbcontact, csaddrno, cscompany, csaddr1, csaddr2, cscity, csstate, cszip, cscountry, csphone, cscontact, cshipvia, cfob, cpono, crmano,

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SL_arcash
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT o.ccustno, i.cinvno, l.csono, i.dinvoice, i.nsalesamt, i.ndiscamt, i.nfrtamt, i.ntaxamt1, i.nfrttax1, i.nfadjamt, o.nsalesamt AS o_salesamt, o.ndiscamt AS o_ndiscamt, o.nfrtamt AS o_nfrtamt, 
                         o.ntaxamt1 AS o_ntaxamt1, o.nfrttax1 AS o_frttax1, o.nfadjamt AS o_nfadjamt, i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt AS InvoiceTotal, 
                         o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END AS OrderTotal, 
                         (i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END) AS Diff, 
                         c.nfpaidamt AS Paid, c.nappamt AS Applied
FROM            dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, csono
                               FROM            dbo.aritrs) AS l ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o ON l.csono = o.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         dbo.arcash AS c ON l.csono = c.csono
WHERE        (LEFT(i.cinvno, 1) <> 'M') AND (i.ctype = '') AND (l.csono <> '') AND (ABS((i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) 
                         - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END)) > 1)

ViewName: vw_SL_autoinvk with expire date and contact
ViewDefinition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_autoinvk with expire date and contact]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_SL_sosord.csono AS OrderNo, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.cbcompany AS Name, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.dcreate AS OrderCreate, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_sosord.lautoinvk AS AutoInvk, dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.citemno AS ItemCode, dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.cdescript AS ItemDescr, dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.nsalesamt AS Amount, dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.cSORef AS IfClaimed, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_sosord.dexpire AS ExpireDate, dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.nordqty AS Qty, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.cbphone AS Contact1, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.cbcontact AS ContactName1, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.csphone AS Contact2, 
                         dbo.vw_SL_sosord.cscontact AS ContactName2, dbo.vw_SL_sosord.lvoid AS [Voided - 1 is yes], dbo.arcust.csponsor, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.arcust.cemail
FROM            dbo.vw_SL_sosord INNER JOIN
                         dbo.vw_SL_sostrs ON dbo.vw_SL_sosord.csono = dbo.vw_SL_sostrs.csono INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_SL_sosord.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.csponsor = arcust_1.ccustno
WHERE        (dbo.vw_SL_sosord.dcreate > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2017-03-30 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.vw_SL_sosord.lautoinvk = 2)
ORDER BY Name, OrderCreate DESC

                  dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt1, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt2, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nftaxamt3, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nordqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.nitmcnvqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ntrscnvqty, dbo.vm_mk_all_aritrs.ncost,

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_Berco freigh report]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.DECLARED_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.DIMENSIONS, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.FINANCE_STATUS, dbo.be_waybill.FINANCE_STATUS_NAME, dbo.be_waybill.FREIGHT_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_DATE, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_NUMBER, dbo.be_waybill.POD_IMAGE_CODE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_QUANTITY_DELIVERED, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_BY, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_TIME, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE1, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE2, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE3, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_CONTACT, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_NAME, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_POSTALCODE, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_SUBURB, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_TELNO, dbo.be_waybill.SERVICE_TYPE, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_CHARGE_UNITS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_MASS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_PARCELS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VOLUME, dbo.be_waybill.VAT, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS_NAME, dbo.soship.csono, a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.arinvc.nfsalesamt - dbo.arinvc.nfdiscamt + dbo.arinvc.nffrtamt + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt1 + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt2 + dbo.arinvc.nftaxamt3 + dbo.arinvc.nfadjamt AS our_invoice_amount,
                       dbo.arinvc.cinvno AS [our inv no], dbo.arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.arinvc.nfrtamt, dbo.arinvc.ntotpaid, dbo.arinvc.ntaxamt1, dbo.soship.nfrtamt AS recover
FROM         dbo.be_waybill LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.soship.cWaybillno = dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, cshipno
                            FROM          dbo.aritrs) AS a ON a.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON a.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
ORDER BY dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_NUMBER

                      dbo.be_waybill.INVOICE_NUMBER, dbo.be_waybill.POD_IMAGE_CODE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_QUANTITY_DELIVERED, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_BY, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_DATE, dbo.be_waybill.POD_RECEIVED_TIME, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE1, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE2, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_ADDRESSLINE3, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_CONTACT, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_NAME, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_POSTALCODE, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_SUBURB, dbo.be_waybill.RECEIVER_TELNO, dbo.be_waybill.SERVICE_TYPE, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_CHARGE_UNITS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_MASS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_PARCELS, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_SUNDRY_CHARGES, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VALUE_EXCL, dbo.be_waybill.TOTAL_VOLUME, dbo.be_waybill.VAT, dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS, 
                      dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_STATUS_NAME, dbo.soship.csono, a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.nfsalesamt - dbo.vw_arinvc.nfdiscamt + dbo.vw_arinvc.nffrtamt + dbo.vw_arinvc.nftaxamt1 + dbo.vw_arinvc.nftaxamt2 + dbo.vw_arinvc.nftaxamt3 + dbo.vw_arinvc.nfadjamt
                       AS our_invoice_amount, dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno AS [our inv no], dbo.vw_arinvc.ndiscamt, dbo.vw_arinvc.nfrtamt, dbo.vw_arinvc.ntotpaid, 
                      dbo.vw_arinvc.ntaxamt1
FROM         dbo.be_waybill LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.soship ON dbo.soship.cWaybillno = dbo.be_waybill.WAYBILL_NUMBER LEFT OUTER JOIN
                          (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, cshipno
                            FROM          dbo.aritrs) AS a ON a.cshipno = dbo.soship.cshipno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_arinvc ON a.cinvno = dbo.vw_arinvc.cinvno

                      dbo.vw_SL_Dec15.dinvoice, dbo.vw_SL_Dec15.nweight, dbo.vw_SL_Dec15.lmlm, dbo.vw_SL_Dec15.crevnacc, dbo.icikit.ckititemno, dbo.icikit.ccompno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_Diff betw order and inv]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT i.cinvno, l.csono, i.dinvoice, i.nsalesamt, i.ndiscamt, i.nfrtamt, i.ntaxamt1, i.nfrttax1, i.nfadjamt, o.nsalesamt AS o_salesamt, o.ndiscamt AS o_ndiscamt, o.nfrtamt AS o_nfrtamt, 
                         o.ntaxamt1 AS o_ntaxamt1, o.nfrttax1 AS o_frttax1, o.nfadjamt AS o_nfadjamt, i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt AS InvoiceTotal, 
                         o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END AS OrderTotal, 
                         (i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END) 
                         AS Diff
FROM            dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, csono
                               FROM            dbo.aritrs) AS l ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o ON l.csono = o.csono
WHERE        (LEFT(i.cinvno, 1) <> 'M') AND (l.csono <> '') AND (i.ctype = '') AND (ABS((i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) 
                         - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END)) > 1)
ORDER BY i.dinvoice DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_SL_DOWNLINER TOTAL COPY]

                       dbo.arcust.cclass, dbo.arcust.cstatus

                      (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Csponsor <> '100001') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Csponsor <> '99999') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L15') AND 
                      (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L14') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L13') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L12') AND 
                      (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L11') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L10') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L09') AND 
                      (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L08') AND (dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] <> 'L07')
ORDER BY dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].Csponsor, dbo.[MJM Union Downliner].[Level] DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SL_FromRodneySoandINVdiff
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT i.cinvno, l.csono, i.dinvoice, i.nsalesamt, i.ndiscamt, i.nfrtamt, i.ntaxamt1, i.nfrttax1, i.nfadjamt, o.nsalesamt AS o_salesamt, o.ndiscamt AS o_ndiscamt, o.nfrtamt AS o_nfrtamt, 
                         o.ntaxamt1 AS o_ntaxamt1, o.nfrttax1 AS o_frttax1, o.nfadjamt AS o_nfadjamt, i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt AS InvoiceTotal, 
                         o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END AS OrderTotal, 
                         (i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END) 
                         AS Diff
FROM            dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, csono
                               FROM            dbo.aritrs) AS l ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o ON l.csono = o.csono
WHERE        (LEFT(i.cinvno, 1) <> 'M') AND (l.csono <> '') AND (i.ctype = '') AND (ABS((i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) 
                         - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END)) > 1)
ORDER BY i.dinvoice DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SL_InvToOrd
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT i.cinvno, l.csono, i.dinvoice, i.nsalesamt, i.ndiscamt, i.nfrtamt, i.ntaxamt1, i.nfrttax1, i.nfadjamt, o.nsalesamt AS o_salesamt, o.ndiscamt AS o_ndiscamt, o.nfrtamt AS o_nfrtamt, 
                         o.ntaxamt1 AS o_ntaxamt1, o.nfrttax1 AS o_frttax1, o.nfadjamt AS o_nfadjamt, i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt AS InvoiceTotal, 
                         o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END AS OrderTotal, 
                         (i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END) 
                         AS Diff
FROM            dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT cinvno, csono
                               FROM            dbo.aritrs) AS l ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o ON l.csono = o.csono
WHERE        (LEFT(i.cinvno, 1) <> 'M') AND (i.ctype = '') AND (l.csono <> '') AND (ABS((i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.nfrtamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfadjamt) 
                         - (o.nsalesamt - o.ndiscamt + o.nfrtamt + o.ntaxamt1 + o.nfadjamt + CASE WHEN LEFT(LTRIM(l.csono), 1) = 'W' THEN o.nfrttax1 ELSE 0 END)) > 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_Monthly Sales RR]

                         dbo.iciwhs.nonorder, dbo.iciwhs.nallocate, dbo.iciwhs.nbook
FROM            dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                         dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno
WHERE        (dbo.icitem.cclass = 'ROYALTEARW') AND (dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse = '4400')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_Months Sales]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END AS MaxSOH_component, 
                         ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty), 0) AS Ordered, ISNULL(SUM(s.nshipqty), 0) AS Shipped, ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty - s.nshipqty), 0) AS [Still to Ship], c.lportal, c.cCampNO, c.cclass AS Classification
FROM            dbo.sosppr AS c WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                         dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON w.citemno = c.cItemNo AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sostrs AS s WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.cItemNo = s.citemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o WITH (NOLOCK) ON s.csono = o.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        k.ckititemno, MIN(((w.nonhand - w.nbook) - p.nbook * k.nqty) / k.nqty) AS qty
                               FROM            dbo.icikit AS k WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ccompno = w.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.iciwhs AS p WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ckititemno = p.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400'
                               WHERE        (k.nqty > 0)
                               GROUP BY k.ckititemno) AS q ON s.citemno = q.ckititemno
WHERE        (c.cCampNO = 'CAMPAIGN-12 JUN 20BB') AND (o.dorder >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2020-06-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (o.dorder BETWEEN c.dfrom AND c.dto)
GROUP BY c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END, c.lportal, c.cCampNO, c.cclass
ORDER BY c.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_Months Sales RR]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END AS MaxSOH_component, 
                         ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty), 0) AS Ordered, ISNULL(SUM(s.nshipqty), 0) AS Shipped, ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty - s.nshipqty), 0) AS [Still to Ship], c.lportal, c.cCampNO, c.cclass AS Classification
FROM            dbo.sosppr AS c WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                         dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON w.citemno = c.cItemNo AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sostrs AS s WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.cItemNo = s.citemno INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o WITH (NOLOCK) ON s.csono = o.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        k.ckititemno, MIN(((w.nonhand - w.nbook) - p.nbook * k.nqty) / k.nqty) AS qty
                               FROM            dbo.icikit AS k WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ccompno = w.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.iciwhs AS p WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ckititemno = p.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400'
                               WHERE        (k.nqty > 0)
                               GROUP BY k.ckititemno) AS q ON s.citemno = q.ckititemno
WHERE        (o.dorder >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2019-06-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (o.dorder BETWEEN c.dfrom AND c.dto)
GROUP BY c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END, c.lportal, c.cCampNO, c.cclass
HAVING        (c.cclass = 'ROYALTEARW') AND (c.dfrom >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2019-06-01 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY c.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sl_re_blackfriday
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END AS MaxSOH_component, ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty), 0) AS Ordered, 
                  ISNULL(SUM(s.nshipqty), 0) AS Shipped, ISNULL(SUM(s.nordqty - s.nshipqty), 0) AS [Still to Ship], c.lportal
FROM        dbo.sosppr AS c WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                  dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON w.citemno = c.cItemNo AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sostrs AS s WITH (NOLOCK) ON c.cItemNo = s.citemno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.sosord AS o WITH (NOLOCK) ON s.csono = o.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      (SELECT     k.ckititemno, MIN(((w.nonhand - w.nbook) - p.nbook * k.nqty) / k.nqty) AS qty
                       FROM        dbo.icikit AS k WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                         dbo.iciwhs AS w WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ccompno = w.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400' INNER JOIN
                                         dbo.iciwhs AS p WITH (NOLOCK) ON k.ckititemno = p.citemno AND w.cwarehouse = '4400'
                       WHERE     (k.nqty > 0)
                       GROUP BY k.ckititemno) AS q ON s.citemno = q.ckititemno
WHERE     (c.cCampNO = 'CAMPAIGN-5 NOV 18 BB') AND (o.dorder >= CONVERT(DATETIME, '2018-11-01 00:00:00', 102)) AND (o.dorder BETWEEN c.dfrom AND c.dto)
GROUP BY c.cItemNo, c.cDescript, c.csponcat, c.dfrom, c.dto, c.nQtylimit, c.nfrcsqty, CASE WHEN s.lkititem = 1 THEN ISNULL(q.qty, 0) ELSE w.nonhand - w.nbook END, c.lportal
ORDER BY c.cItemNo

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SL_sales by revenue]
AS
SELECT TOP (100000) c.cclass, i.cinvno, i.ctype, i.dinvoice, i.ccustno, g.crevnacc, a.cdescript, SUM(l.nsalesamt) AS Sales, SUM(l.ndiscamt) AS Discount, SUM(l.ntaxamt1) AS TAX, SUM(i.nfrtamt) AS freight
FROM     dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust AS c ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.aritrs AS l ON i.cinvno = l.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.arrevn AS g ON l.crevncode = g.crevncode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                  dbo.glacct AS a ON a.cacctid = g.crevnacc
WHERE  (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R')) AND (i.lmlm = 0) AND (i.cmlmlink = '') AND (l.cinvno IS NOT NULL) AND (i.dinvoice >= '2020-08-01') AND (i.dinvoice < '2020-09-01')
GROUP BY c.cclass, i.cinvno, i.ctype, i.dinvoice, i.ccustno, g.crevnacc, a.cdescript
ORDER BY i.dinvoice DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SL_TEST_CONSEARN
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor AS Customer, dbo.arcust.ccompany AS Name, dbo.arcust.cpcustno AS Parent, DATENAME(YEAR, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date) AS YEAR, DATENAME(MONTH, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date) AS MONTH, SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.ngrebateamt) AS [GS Rebate], 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt AS [PS Rebate], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25 AS [PS VolDisc], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales AS [PS Total], 
                      SUM(dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.GRsales) AS [GS Total (add PS Total)], dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.cstatus, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.cLevel
FROM         dbo.SR_MLM_Historical INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust AS arcust_1 ON dbo.arcust.cpcustno = arcust_1.ccustno
GROUP BY dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.csponsor, dbo.arcust.cpcustno, dbo.arcust.csponsor, dbo.arcust.ccompany, arcust_1.ccompany, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.dmonth, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSales, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.nrebateamt, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.PSalesDisc * .25, 
                      dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.cstatus, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.cLevel
HAVING      (dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date > '2014/01/31') AND (dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.cLevel = 'Level 1')
ORDER BY Customer, YEAR, MONTH, dbo.SR_MLM_Historical.Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SL_tradedFromRodney
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT d1.cCustno, dbo.arcust.ccompany, ISNULL(d1.n2016_11, 0) AS [Traded 2016], ISNULL(d1.n2017_11, 0) AS [Traded 2017], ISNULL(d2.n2016_11, 0) AS [Sales 2016], ISNULL(d2.n2017_11, 0) 
                         AS [Sales 2017], ISNULL(t.TargetValue, 0) AS [Target Value]
FROM            compplanLive.dbo.ctdashboard AS d1 INNER JOIN
                         compplanLive.dbo.ctdashboard AS d2 ON d1.cCustno = d2.cCustno AND d2.fmtID = 125 INNER JOIN
                         dbo.arcust WITH (nolock) ON d1.cCustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         Annique_Reports.dbo.TurnoverTarget AS t ON t.cSponsor = dbo.arcust.ccustno AND t.iYear = 2017 AND t.iMonth = 11
WHERE        (d1.fmtID = 156)
ORDER BY d1.cCustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_SL_WILBERT QUERY ON UNALLOC]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT i.ccustno, q.csono, i.cinvno, i.nsalesamt - i.ndiscamt + i.ntaxamt1 + i.nfrtamt + i.nadjamt AS amt, i.ntotpaid, i.nbalance, i.dinvoice
FROM            dbo.arinvc AS i INNER JOIN
                             (SELECT DISTINCT dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.csono
                               FROM            dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                                                         dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno) AS q ON q.cinvno = i.cinvno
WHERE        (i.ntotpaid = 0) AND (q.csono IN
                             (SELECT        csono
                               FROM            dbo.arcash
                               WHERE        (nfpaidamt <> nfappamt))) AND (i.nbalance NOT BETWEEN - 1 AND 1) AND (i.ctype NOT IN ('R', 'N', 'C')) AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%') AND (i.dinvoice >= '2017-12-01 00:00:00.000')
ORDER BY i.ccustno DESC

                      dbo.vw_aritrs.crevncode, dbo.vw_aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.vw_aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.vw_aritrs.ntaxamt1, dbo.vw_arinvc.dinvoice, dbo.vw_aritrs.nweight,

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_ staff purchases at RSP]

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SLRE_300100
AS
SELECT '1. SA' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day,
c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 1.15)) Sales
FROM [amanniquelive].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
[amanniquelive].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniquelive].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
JOIN amanniquelive..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = ''))
and r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY c.cClass, YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)
UNION
SELECT '2. NAM' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day,
c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 1.15)) Sales
FROM [amanniqueNAM].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
[amanniqueNam].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniqueNam].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
JOIN amanniqueNam..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = ''))
AND r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY c.cClass , YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_Address Issues]
AS
SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT i.cCustno, i.cAddrno, i.ErrorMsg, c.caddr1 AS arcust_caddr1, c.caddr2 AS arcust_caddr2, c.ccity AS arcust_ccity, c.cstate AS arcust_cstate, c.czip AS arcust_czip, c.ccountry AS arcust_ccountry, a.caddrno AS Expr1, 
                  a.caddr1, a.caddr2, a.ccity, a.cstate, a.czip, a.ccountry
FROM     dbo.ad_AddressIssues AS i INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcust AS c ON i.cCustno = c.ccustno INNER JOIN
                  dbo.arcadr AS a ON i.cCustno = a.ccustno AND a.caddrno = i.cAddrno
WHERE  (c.ccountry = 'South Africa')

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_SLRE_BANDS ON ARINVC SUMM]
AS
SELECT     ValueRange, COUNT(DISTINCT ccustno) AS Customers, COUNT(DISTINCT cinvno) AS Invoices
FROM        (SELECT     i.cinvno, i.ccustno, CASE WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) < 750 THEN '1. <750' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) BETWEEN 750 AND 1500 THEN '2. 750-1500' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) BETWEEN 1500 AND 
                                     2750 THEN '3. 1500-2750' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) > 2750 THEN '4. 2750+' END AS ValueRange
                   FROM        dbo.aritrs AS l INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arinvc AS i ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arcust AS c ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
                   WHERE     (c.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (i.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-03-01' AND '2018-03-31') AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
                   GROUP BY i.cinvno, i.ccustno, i.dinvoice, l.csono, i.ddate, c.cemail
                   UNION
                   SELECT     i.cinvno, i.ccustno, CASE WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) < 750 THEN '1. <750' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) BETWEEN 750 AND 1500 THEN '2. 750-1500' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) BETWEEN 1500 AND 
                                     2750 THEN '3. 1500-2750' WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt * 1.15) > 2750 THEN '4. 2750+' END AS ValueRange
                   FROM        dbo.aritrsh AS l INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arinvch AS i ON l.cinvno = i.cinvno INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arcust AS c ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
                   WHERE     (c.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (i.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-03-01' AND '2018-03-31') AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%') AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
                   GROUP BY i.cinvno, i.ccustno) AS q
GROUP BY ValueRange

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_beautes by title]
AS
SELECT     compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()) AS cTitle, q.ccustno, q.citemno, i.cdescript, q.iyear, q.imonth, SUM(q.Amount) AS Amount, SUM(q.Qty) AS Qty
FROM        (SELECT     h.ccustno, i.citemno, YEAR(h.dinvoice) AS iyear, MONTH(h.dinvoice) AS imonth, SUM(i.nsalesamt) AS Amount, SUM(i.nshipqty) AS Qty
                   FROM        dbo.aritrs AS i INNER JOIN
                                     dbo.arinvc AS h ON i.cinvno = h.cinvno
                   WHERE     (i.citemno BETWEEN 'AI/40110/18' AND 'AI/40117/19' OR
                                     i.citemno BETWEEN '3102009' AND '3102032') AND (h.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-07-01' AND '2019-01-31')
                   GROUP BY h.ccustno, i.citemno, YEAR(h.dinvoice), MONTH(h.dinvoice)) AS q INNER JOIN
                  dbo.icitem AS i ON i.citemno = q.citemno
GROUP BY compplanLive.dbo.fn_get_titlecode(q.ccustno, GETDATE()), q.ccustno, q.citemno, i.cdescript, q.iyear, q.imonth

CREATE VIEW dbo.[VW_SLRE_INVOICES IN BANDS]
AS
select i.cinvno, i.ccustno, CASE WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15)<750 then '1. <750' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) BETWEEN 750 and 1500 then '2. 750-1500' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) BETWEEN 1500 and 2750 then '3. 1500-2750' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) >2750 then '4. 2750+' end ValueRange 
FROM aritrs l 
join arinvc i on l.cinvno=i.cinvno
join arcust c on i.ccustno=c.ccustno
WHERE (c.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') 
AND (i.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-03-01' and '2018-03-31') 
AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%' AND i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
GROUP BY i.cinvno, i.ccustno, i.dinvoice, l.csono, i.ddate, c.cemail

UNION

select i.cinvno, i.ccustno, CASE WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15)<750 then '1. <750' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) BETWEEN 750 and 1500 then '2. 750-1500' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) BETWEEN 1500 and 2750 then '3. 1500-2750' 
WHEN SUM(l.nSalesAmt*1.15) >2750 then '4. 2750+' end ValueRange 
FROM aritrsh l 
join arinvch i on l.cinvno=i.cinvno
join arcust c on i.ccustno=c.ccustno
WHERE (c.cclass = 'CONSULTANT') 
AND (i.dinvoice BETWEEN '2018-03-01' and '2018-03-31') 
AND (i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'M%' AND i.cinvno NOT LIKE 'J%')
GROUP BY i.cinvno, i.ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_orders with no free items]
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT l.csono, ISNULL(f.FreeShipped, 0) AS FreeShipped, SUM(l.nshipqty) AS shipped, l.ccustno
FROM            dbo.sostrs AS l INNER JOIN
                         dbo.sosord AS o ON l.csono = o.csono LEFT OUTER JOIN
                             (SELECT        csono, csppruid, ccampuid, SUM(nshipqty) AS FreeShipped
                               FROM            dbo.sostrs
                               WHERE        (citemno = '2520000')
                               GROUP BY csono, csppruid, ccampuid) AS f ON f.csono = o.csono
WHERE        (o.dorder BETWEEN '2019-03-01' AND '2019-03-31') AND (l.citemno IN ('AE/08327/08', 'AE/08364/17', 'AE/08367/18', 'AE/08378/18')) AND (l.nshipqty > 0)
GROUP BY l.csono, f.FreeShipped, l.ccustno
HAVING        (ISNULL(f.FreeShipped, 0) < SUM(l.nshipqty))
ORDER BY l.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_Sales by day]
AS
SELECT        '1. SA' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day, 
                         clASS = CASE WHEN c.cClass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN c.cClass = 'INTERNET' THEN 'SHOP' WHEN c.cClass = 'STAFF' THEN 'STAFF' ELSE 'SALES' END, SUM(nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 
                         1.15)) Sales
FROM            [amanniquelive].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
                         [amanniquelive].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
WHERE        dinvoice >= '2020-05-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = '')) AND c.cClass IN ('EXPORT', 'CONSULTANT', 'INTERNET', 'STAFF')
GROUP BY CASE WHEN c.cClass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN c.cClass = 'INTERNET' THEN 'SHOP' WHEN c.cClass = 'STAFF' THEN 'STAFF' ELSE 'SALES' END, YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)
UNION
SELECT        '2. NAM' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day, 
                         clASS = CASE WHEN c.cClass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN c.cClass = 'INTERNET' THEN 'SHOP' WHEN c.cClass = 'STAFF' THEN 'STAFF' ELSE 'SALES' END, SUM(nSAlesAMT * IIF(c.cClass = 'EXPORT', 1, 
                         1.15)) Sales
FROM            [amanniqueNAM].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
                         [amanniqueNam].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
WHERE        dinvoice >= '2020-05-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = '')) AND c.cClass IN ('EXPORT', 'CONSULTANT', 'INTERNET', 'STAFF')
GROUP BY CASE WHEN c.cClass = 'EXPORT' THEN 'EXPORT' WHEN c.cClass = 'INTERNET' THEN 'SHOP' WHEN c.cClass = 'STAFF' THEN 'STAFF' ELSE 'SALES' END, YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_sales by day by class]
AS
SELECT '1. SA' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day, 
    c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT + l.ntaxamt1) Sales
FROM   [amanniquelive].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
       [amanniquelive].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
	   LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniquelive].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
	   JOIN amanniquelive..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE  dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = '')) 
and r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY c.cClass, YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)
UNION
SELECT '2. NAM' AS Co, YEAR(dInvoice) Year, Month(dInvoice) MONTH, DAY(dInvoice) Day, 
c.cClass , SUM(l.nSAlesAMT+ l.ntaxamt1) Sales
FROM     [amanniqueNAM].[dbo].arinvc i WITH (NOLOCK) JOIN
          [amanniqueNam].[dbo].arcust c WITH (NOLOCK) ON i.ccustno = c.ccustno
 LEFT OUTER JOIN [amanniqueNam].[dbo].aritrs l ON i.cinvno=l.cinvno
	   JOIN amanniqueNam..arrevn r on l.crevncode=r.crevncode
WHERE  dinvoice >= '2020-07-01' AND (i.ctype IN (' ', 'R') AND (lMlm = 0 AND cmlmlink = '')) 
AND r.crevnacc like '300100%'
GROUP BY  c.cClass , YEAR(dInvoice), Month(dInvoice), DAY(dInvoice)

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_SLRE_websoh
AS
SELECT citemno, minstockQuantity, StockQuantity, lUpdateonhand, nfrcsqty, nQtyLimit, cSponcat, cSponType, nOrdQty, nAvailable, ForcastAvail, wsPending, AvailPercent, cStatus, dDate
FROM     dbo.fn_get_wsavailability(NULL) AS fn_get_wsavailability_1

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_SLRE_WS showing what is pending]
AS
SELECT citemno, minstockQuantity, StockQuantity, lUpdateonhand, nfrcsqty, nQtyLimit, cSponcat, cSponType, nOrdQty, nAvailable, wsPending, ForcastAvail, AvailPercent, cStatus, dDate
FROM     dbo.fn_get_wsavailability(NULL) AS fn_get_wsavailability_1

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sms
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT '27' + SUBSTRING(cphone2, 2, 20) AS cphone2
FROM            dbo.arcust
WHERE        (lsms = '1') AND (cstatus = 'A') AND (cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (cphone2 <> ' ')
ORDER BY cphone2

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sms_nam
AS
SELECT        TOP (100) PERCENT '264' + SUBSTRING(cphone2, 2, 20) AS cphone2
FROM            amanniquenam.dbo.arcust
WHERE        (lsms = '1') AND (cstatus = 'A') AND (cclass = 'CONSULTANT') AND (cphone2 <> ' ') AND (ccurrcode = 'NAM') AND (czip = '9000') OR
                         (cclass = 'STAFF') AND (cphone2 <> '                    ')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_so_camp
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosppr.cCampNO, dbo.socamp.dFrom, dbo.socamp.dTo, dbo.sosppr.cItemNo, dbo.sosppr.cDescript, dbo.sosppr.nQtylimit, dbo.dpibdg.nUnits, 
                      dbo.sosppr.nPriceExl
FROM         dbo.sosppr INNER JOIN
                      dbo.socamp ON dbo.sosppr.cCampNO = dbo.socamp.cCampNo INNER JOIN
                      dbo.dpibdg ON dbo.sosppr.cItemNo = dbo.dpibdg.cItemNo AND dbo.socamp.dTo = dbo.dpibdg.dEndDate

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_so_chck
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_sostrs_test.csono, dbo.vw_sostrs_test.ccustno, dbo.vw_sostrs_test.SO_Lines, 
                      dbo.sosord.nsalesamt - dbo.sosord.ndiscamt + dbo.sosord.ntaxamt1 AS SO_header, dbo.sosord.dorder
FROM         dbo.vw_sostrs_test INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sosord ON dbo.vw_sostrs_test.csono = dbo.sosord.csono
ORDER BY dbo.sosord.dorder DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_so_summary
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.vw_sotrs.csono AS SO_No, dbo.vw_sotrs.ccustno AS CustNo, dbo.vw_sotrs.centerby AS SalesPerson, 
                      dbo.vw_sotrs.cbcompany AS Customer, dbo.vw_sotrs.lprtsord, dbo.vw_sotrs.lprtlist AS Printed_Pick_List, dbo.vw_sotrs.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, 
                      SUM(dbo.vw_sotrs.nordqty) AS Ord_Qty, SUM(dbo.vw_sotrs.nshipqty) AS Inv_Qty, SUM(dbo.vw_sotrs.Total) AS Order_Amt, dbo.vw_sotrs.dorder, dbo.vw_sotrs.dcreate,
                       dbo.vw_sotrs.On_Hold, dbo.vw_sotrs.Quote, dbo.arcust.csponsor
FROM         dbo.vw_sotrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_sotrs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arcust ON dbo.vw_sotrs.ccustno = dbo.arcust.ccustno
WHERE     (dbo.icitem.lregitem = 0)
GROUP BY dbo.vw_sotrs.csono, dbo.vw_sotrs.ccustno, dbo.vw_sotrs.centerby, dbo.vw_sotrs.cbcompany, dbo.vw_sotrs.lprtsord, dbo.vw_sotrs.lprtlist, 
                      dbo.vw_sotrs.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_sotrs.dorder, dbo.vw_sotrs.dcreate, dbo.vw_sotrs.On_Hold, dbo.vw_sotrs.Quote, dbo.arcust.csponsor
ORDER BY SO_No

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_so1
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, crcptno, npaidamt, nappamt, csono, dpaid
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (npaidamt = 192) AND (nappamt = 0) AND (dpaid > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-02-28 00:00:00', 102))
ORDER BY dpaid

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_so2
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sostrs.citemno, dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
WHERE     (dbo.sostrs.citemno = 'AI/19009/02') AND (dbo.sosord.dcreate > CONVERT(DATETIME, '2011-02-28 00:00:00', 102)) AND (dbo.sostrs.nshipqty = 0)
ORDER BY dbo.sostrs.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SOCombined
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.*
FROM         dbo.sosord
union all

SELECT     dbo.sosordh.*
FROM         dbo.sosordh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_soship
AS
SELECT        dbo.soship.*
FROM            dbo.soship
UNION ALL
SELECT        dbo.soshiph.*
FROM            dbo.soshiph

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[vw_soshipFastWay]
AS
SELECT   s.cShipno, s.dship,
    s.cscity,
    s.cszip,
    s.cbcompany,q.cinvno
FROM  dbo.soship  s WITH (NOLOCK) 
OUTER APPLY (select top 1 cInvno from ARITRS i WHERE i.cshipno=s.cShipno) q

where cshipvia='FASTWAY'  AND s.dship > DATEADD(month, -13, GETDATE())
UNION ALL
SELECT  cShipno, s.dship,
    s.cscity,
    s.cszip,
    s.cbcompany,q.cinvno
FROM            dbo.soshiph s
OUTER APPLY (select top 1 cInvno from ARITRSH i WHERE i.cshipno=s.cShipno) q
where s.cshipvia='FASTWAY'  AND s.dship > DATEADD(month, -13, GETDATE())

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sosord
AS
SELECT        dbo.sosord.*
FROM            dbo.sosord
UNION ALL
SELECT        dbo.sosordh.*
FROM            dbo.sosordh

CREATE VIEW dbo.[vw_sosord union]
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.*
FROM         dbo.sosord
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sosordh.*
FROM         dbo.sosordh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sosptr
AS
SELECT     cshipno, csono, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, SUM(nsalesamt) - SUM(ndiscamt) + SUM(ntaxamt1) AS SaleValue
FROM         dbo.sosptr
GROUP BY cshipno, csono, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sostrs
AS
SELECT     dbo.sostrs.*
FROM         dbo.sostrs
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sostrsh.*
FROM         dbo.sostrsh

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sostrs_test
AS
SELECT     csono, ccustno, SUM(nsalesamt - ndiscamt + ntaxamt1) AS SO_Lines
FROM         dbo.sostrs
GROUP BY csono, ccustno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sotrs
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.csono, dbo.sosord.ccustno, dbo.sosord.centerby, dbo.sosord.cbcompany, dbo.sosord.lprtsord, dbo.sosord.lprtlist, dbo.sostrs.citemno, 
                      dbo.sostrs.cdescript, dbo.sostrs.cwarehouse, dbo.sostrs.nordqty, dbo.sostrs.nshipqty, dbo.sostrs.nsalesamt - dbo.sostrs.ndiscamt + dbo.sostrs.ntaxamt1 AS Total, 
                      dbo.sosord.dorder, dbo.sosord.dcreate, dbo.sosord.lhold AS On_Hold, dbo.sosord.lquote AS Quote
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
union all
SELECT     dbo.sosordh.csono, dbo.sosordh.ccustno, dbo.sosordh.centerby, dbo.sosordh.cbcompany, dbo.sosordh.lprtsord, dbo.sosordh.lprtlist, dbo.sostrsh.citemno, 
                      dbo.sostrsh.cdescript, dbo.sostrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.sostrsh.nordqty, dbo.sostrsh.nshipqty, dbo.sostrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.sostrsh.ndiscamt + dbo.sostrsh.ntaxamt1 AS Total, 
                      dbo.sosordh.dorder, dbo.sosordh.dcreate, dbo.sosordh.lhold AS On_Hold, dbo.sosordh.lquote AS Quote
FROM         dbo.sosordh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrsh ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.sostrsh.csono

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_SR_MissingKitComponents
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.cinvno, dbo.aritrsh.citemno AS Expr1, dbo.arsktrh.citemno AS Expr2, dbo.ictrsnh.cuid, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrstype, dbo.ictrsnh.cmodule, dbo.ictrsnh.ctrsno, 
                      dbo.ictrsnh.corigno, dbo.ictrsnh.citemno, dbo.ictrsnh.cspeccode1, dbo.ictrsnh.cspeccode2, dbo.ictrsnh.cwarehouse, dbo.ictrsnh.cbin, dbo.ictrsnh.csernum, 
                      dbo.ictrsnh.ckitno, dbo.ictrsnh.clotno, dbo.ictrsnh.centerby, dbo.ictrsnh.dcreate, dbo.ictrsnh.dtrs, dbo.ictrsnh.nqty, dbo.ictrsnh.ncost, dbo.ictrsnh.ntotcost, 
                      dbo.arsktrh.nqty AS Expr4, dbo.arsktrh.ncost AS Expr5
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.arsktrh ON dbo.aritrsh.clineitem = dbo.arsktrh.clineitem LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ictrsnh ON dbo.arsktrh.citemno = dbo.ictrsnh.citemno AND dbo.aritrsh.cshipno = dbo.ictrsnh.ctrsno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvch.dinvoice = '2010-06-15 00:00:00.000') AND (dbo.aritrsh.cshipno <> '')

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sr_price
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      citemno, cdescript, Datename(month, dinvoice) AS Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) AS Year, ((aritrsh.nsalesamt - aritrsh.ndiscamt) / aritrsh.nshipqty) AS price
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
WHERE     dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000' AND lstock = 1 AND citemno BETWEEN 'A' AND 'AS/50001/09' AND 
                      nshipqty > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      citemno, cdescript, Datename(month, dinvoice) AS Month, Datename(YEAR, dinvoice) AS Year, ((aritrs.nsalesamt - aritrs.ndiscamt) / aritrs.nshipqty) AS price
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
WHERE     dinvoice BETWEEN '2010-04-01 00:00:00.000' AND '2010-09-30 00:00:00.000' AND lstock = 1 AND citemno BETWEEN 'A' AND 'AS/50001/09' AND 
                      nshipqty > 0

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sr_price1
AS
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.vw_sr_price.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.vw_sr_price.Month, dbo.vw_sr_price.Year, dbo.vw_sr_price.price, dbo.ad1.ad
FROM         dbo.vw_sr_price INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.vw_sr_price.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ad1 ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.ad1.Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_std
AS
SELECT     citemno, CASE WHEN (nonhand = 0) THEN 0 ELSE ntotcost / nonhand END AS std
FROM         dbo.iciwhs

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_std_alert
AS
SELECT     dbo.atstdc.citemno, dbo.atstdc.cwarehouse, dbo.atstdc.cuser, dbo.atstdc.nonhand, dbo.atstdc.noldval, dbo.atstdc.nnewval, dbo.atstdc.dadj, '1.SA' AS Country, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.atstdc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.atstdc.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(year, dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(year, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(month, dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(month, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(day, 
                      dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(day, GETDATE()))
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.atstdc.citemno, dbo.atstdc.cwarehouse, dbo.atstdc.cuser, dbo.atstdc.nonhand, dbo.atstdc.noldval, dbo.atstdc.nnewval, dbo.atstdc.dadj, '2.NAM' AS Country, 
                      dbo.icitem.cdescript
FROM         dbo.atstdc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.atstdc.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno
WHERE     (DATENAME(year, dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(year, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(month, dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(month, GETDATE())) AND (DATENAME(day, 
                      dbo.atstdc.dadj) = DATENAME(day, GETDATE()))

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_std_diff
AS
SELECT     dbo.iciwhs.citemno, dbo.iciwhs.ncost, dbo.icitem.nstdcost, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse
FROM         dbo.iciwhs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icitem ON dbo.iciwhs.citemno = dbo.icitem.citemno AND dbo.iciwhs.ncost <> dbo.icitem.nstdcost

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_Stock_Age
AS
SELECT     dbo.icicst.citemno AS [Item #], CASE WHEN (str(month(ditem)) + str(year(ditem))) = (str(month(getdate())) + str(year(getdate()))) 
                      THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [Current !], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 1, 
                      getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [30 Days], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) 
                      + str(month(dateadd(m, - 2, getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [60 Days], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, 
                      (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 3, getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [90 Days], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) 
                      = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 4, getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [120 Days], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) 
                      + str(month(ditem)) = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 5, getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [150 Days], 
                      CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) = str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 6, getdate()))) 
                      THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [180 Days], CASE WHEN str(year(ditem)) + str(month(ditem)) <= str(year(dateadd(yy, 0, (getdate())))) + str(month(dateadd(m, - 7, 
                      getdate()))) THEN ncost * nonhand ELSE 0 END AS [210 Days], dbo.icicst.cwarehouse AS Warehouse, dbo.VW_Item_master.Class, dbo.VW_Item_master.[Product Line],
                       dbo.icicst.ncost * dbo.icicst.nonhand AS TOTAL, dbo.icicst.ditem, dbo.icicst.nonhand, dbo.VW_Item_master.ctype, dbo.VW_Item_master.cclass
FROM         dbo.icicst LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.VW_Item_master ON dbo.icicst.citemno = dbo.VW_Item_master.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_stock_chk
AS
SELECT     dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.citemno, dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.cwarehouse, dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.WHS_Onhand, dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM.QTY
FROM         dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM ON dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.citemno = dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM.citemno AND dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.cwarehouse = dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM.cwarehouse AND 
                      dbo.vw_iciwhs_chk.WHS_Onhand <> dbo.vw_ictrsnSUMM.QTY

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_sum_group
AS
SELECT     centerby, dorder, SUM(LineNum) AS Num
FROM         dbo.vw_user_trf
GROUP BY centerby, dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_update_gl
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.gltfer.cuid, dbo.gltfer.cbatcno, dbo.gltfer.cjeid, dbo.gltfer.cacctid, dbo.gltfer.cdescript, dbo.gltfer.creference, dbo.gltfer.ccurrcode, 
                      dbo.gltfer.cyear, dbo.gltfer.cpdno, dbo.gltfer.cstatus, dbo.gltfer.csource, dbo.gltfer.cobjno, dbo.gltfer.ctrsno, dbo.gltfer.ctrstype, dbo.gltfer.cinterfund, dbo.gltfer.dtrs, 
                      dbo.gltfer.ntrsamt, dbo.gltfer.nftrsamt, dbo.gltfer.nxchgrate, dbo.vw_line_revcode.cinvno, dbo.vw_line_revcode.dinvoice, dbo.vw_line_revcode.ctogl, 
                      dbo.vw_line_revcode.crevncode, dbo.vw_line_revcode.crevnacc, dbo.vw_line_revcode.crtrnacc, dbo.vw_line_revcode.cdiscacc, dbo.vw_line_revcode.ccogsacc, 
                      dbo.vw_line_revcode.citemno
FROM         dbo.vw_line_revcode INNER JOIN
                      dbo.gltfer ON dbo.vw_line_revcode.cinvno = dbo.gltfer.ctrsno AND dbo.vw_line_revcode.ccogsacc <> dbo.gltfer.cacctid AND 
                      dbo.vw_line_revcode.citemno = dbo.gltfer.cobjno
WHERE     (dbo.vw_line_revcode.ctogl <> 'X') AND (dbo.gltfer.ctrstype = 'INVC') AND (dbo.gltfer.cdescript LIKE 'COGS%')
ORDER BY dbo.vw_line_revcode.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_user_num
AS
SELECT     dbo.sosord.centerby, dbo.sosord.dorder, COUNT(dbo.sostrs.citemno) AS 'LineNum'
FROM         dbo.sosord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrs ON dbo.sosord.csono = dbo.sostrs.csono
GROUP BY dbo.sosord.centerby, dbo.sosord.dorder
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.sosordh.centerby, dbo.sosordh.dorder, COUNT(dbo.sostrsh.citemno) AS 'LineNum'
FROM         dbo.sosordh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sostrsh ON dbo.sosordh.csono = dbo.sostrsh.csono
GROUP BY dbo.sosordh.centerby, dbo.sosordh.dorder

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_user_transfer
AS
SELECT     centerby, dtrs, COUNT(citemno1) AS LineNum
FROM         dbo.icitrf
GROUP BY centerby, dtrs
union all
SELECT     centerby, dtrs, COUNT(citemno1) AS LineNum
FROM         dbo.icitrfh
GROUP BY centerby, dtrs

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_user_trf
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.vw_user_num
union all
select *
from           dbo.vw_user_transfer

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_whschk
AS
SELECT     citemno, cwarehouse, SUM(nonhand) AS wonhand
FROM         dbo.iciwhs
GROUP BY citemno, cwarehouse

CREATE VIEW dbo.WAR_STD
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.STD_Rep.citemno, dbo.STD_Rep.cdescript, dbo.STD_Rep.cwarehouse, dbo.STD_Rep.nonhand, dbo.ICIWHS_Rep.ncost, 
                      dbo.STD_Rep.nstdcost, dbo.STD_Rep.ntotcost AS STD_Tot, dbo.ICIWHS_Rep.ntotcost AS WAR_Tot, dbo.ICIWHS_Rep.ntotcost - dbo.STD_Rep.ntotcost AS VAR
FROM         dbo.STD_Rep INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ICIWHS_Rep ON dbo.STD_Rep.citemno = dbo.ICIWHS_Rep.citemno AND dbo.STD_Rep.cwarehouse = dbo.ICIWHS_Rep.cwarehouse
ORDER BY dbo.STD_Rep.citemno

CREATE VIEW dbo.Ware_Month
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrs.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice) AS Month, dbo.arinvc.dinvoice, 
                      dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.aritrs.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrs.ndiscamt + dbo.aritrs.ntaxamt1 AS NIS, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.arinvc INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrs ON dbo.arinvc.cinvno = dbo.aritrs.cinvno
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.aritrsh.cwarehouse, dbo.aritrsh.ccustno, DATENAME(year, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Year, DATENAME(month, dbo.arinvch.dinvoice) AS Month, 
                      dbo.arinvch.dinvoice, dbo.aritrsh.citemno, dbo.aritrsh.nshipqty, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscrate, dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt, dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt, dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1, 
                      dbo.aritrsh.nsalesamt - dbo.aritrsh.ndiscamt + dbo.aritrsh.ntaxamt1 AS NIS, '1.SA' as Company
FROM         dbo.arinvch INNER JOIN
                      dbo.aritrsh ON dbo.arinvch.cinvno = dbo.aritrsh.cinvno
union all
select * from amanniquenam.dbo.ware_month

CREATE VIEW dbo.Ware_Rev
AS
SELECT     dbo.icitem.citemno, dbo.icitem.cdescript, dbo.iciwhs.cwarehouse, dbo.iciwhs.cinvtacc, dbo.iciwhs.cintracc, dbo.iciwhs.crevncode, dbo.arrevn.crevnacc, 
                      dbo.arrevn.crtrnacc, dbo.arrevn.cdiscacc, dbo.arrevn.ccogsacc
FROM         dbo.icitem INNER JOIN
                      dbo.iciwhs ON dbo.icitem.citemno = dbo.iciwhs.citemno INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arrevn ON dbo.iciwhs.crevncode = dbo.arrevn.crevncode

CREATE VIEW dbo.Xen_Void_Report
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT ccustno, crcptno, cdepno, dcreate, npaidamt, centerby
FROM         dbo.arcash
WHERE     (cdepno = 'VOID')
ORDER BY crcptno

CREATE VIEW dbo.XXX_Aritrs
AS
SELECT     dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, SUM(dbo.aritrs.nshipqty * dbo.aritrs.ncost) AS cost, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate
FROM         dbo.aritrs INNER JOIN
                      dbo.arinvc ON dbo.aritrs.cinvno = dbo.arinvc.cinvno
WHERE     (dbo.arinvc.dinvoice BETWEEN '2012/02/01' AND '2012/02/29')
GROUP BY dbo.aritrs.cinvno, dbo.aritrs.citemno, dbo.aritrs.nshipqty, dbo.aritrs.ncost, dbo.aritrs.crevncode, dbo.aritrs.ndiscrate

CREATE VIEW dbo.XXX_GLTFER
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Company, 'Accounts Receivable' AS Module, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Year, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Month, 
                      CAST(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Year + '/' + dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Month + '/01' AS smalldatetime) AS Date, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.GL_Code AS crevenacct, dbo.AG_glacct.cdescript, 
                      'Cost of Sales' AS Type, SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.ntrsamt) AS Amount, 'Discountable' AS Discountable, SUM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.ntrsamt) AS AmountEx, 0 AS DRP, 
                      '' AS citemno, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Item)) AS itemcode, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.ctrsno)) AS cinvno, dbo.AG_glacct.cacctid
FROM         dbo.AG_REP_AR4 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_glacct ON dbo.AG_REP_AR4.GL_Code = dbo.AG_glacct.cacctid AND dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Company = dbo.AG_glacct.Company
GROUP BY dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Company, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Year, dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Month, CAST(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Year + '/' + dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Month + '/01' AS smalldatetime),
                       dbo.AG_REP_AR4.GL_Code, dbo.AG_glacct.cdescript, LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Item)), LTRIM(RTRIM(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.ctrsno)), dbo.AG_REP_AR4.ctrsno, 
                      dbo.AG_REP_AR4.Item, dbo.AG_glacct.cacctid
HAVING      (NOT (LEFT(dbo.AG_REP_AR4.GL_Code, 6) IN ('490000', '480000', '460000')))

CREATE VIEW dbo.XXX_Join
AS
SELECT     dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Company, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Year, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Month, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Date, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.cinvno, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.itemcode, 
                      MAX(dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Amount) AS Amount, SUM(dbo.XXX_SPLIT.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.crevenacct, CASE WHEN (SUM(total_cost) 
                      <> MAX(amount)) THEN SUM(total_cost) WHEN (SUM(total_cost) IS NULL) THEN MAX(amount) ELSE MAX(amount) END AS nexcost, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.cclass, 
                      dbo.XXX_GLTFER.cdescript, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.ndiscrate, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.kititem
FROM         dbo.XXX_GLTFER LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.XXX_SPLIT ON dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Company = dbo.XXX_SPLIT.Company AND dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Year = dbo.XXX_SPLIT.year AND 
                      dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Month = dbo.XXX_SPLIT.month AND dbo.XXX_GLTFER.itemcode = dbo.XXX_SPLIT.Component_Code AND 
                      dbo.XXX_GLTFER.cinvno = dbo.XXX_SPLIT.cinvno
GROUP BY dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Company, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Year, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Month, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.Date, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.cinvno, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.itemcode, 
                      dbo.XXX_GLTFER.crevenacct, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.cclass, dbo.XXX_GLTFER.cdescript, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.ndiscrate, dbo.XXX_SPLIT.kititem

CREATE VIEW dbo.XXX_JOIN2
AS
SELECT     Company, Year, Month, Date, cinvno, itemcode, Amount, CASE WHEN (Total_Cost <> Amount) THEN amount ELSE total_cost END AS totalCost, ndiscrate, 
                      crevenacct AS Account, nexcost, cclass, kititem, Total_Cost, cdescript AS Description
FROM         dbo.XXX_Join

CREATE VIEW dbo.XXX_SPLIT
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.CB_New5a.Company, dbo.CB_New5a.year, dbo.CB_New5a.month, dbo.CB_New5a.date, dbo.CB_New5a.Component_Code, 
                      dbo.CB_New5a.cinvno, SUM(dbo.CB_New5a.Total_Cost) AS Total_Cost, dbo.CB_New5a.COS, MAX(dbo.CB_New5a.ndiscrate) AS ndiscrate, 
                      dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.ccustno, dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass, CASE WHEN (kititem = '') THEN component_code ELSE kititem END AS kititem
FROM         dbo.CB_New5a INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader ON dbo.CB_New5a.Company = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.Company AND dbo.CB_New5a.cinvno = dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.invoice INNER JOIN
                      dbo.AG_Arcust ON dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.ccustno = dbo.AG_Arcust.ccustno AND dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.Company = dbo.AG_Arcust.Company
GROUP BY dbo.CB_New5a.Company, dbo.CB_New5a.year, dbo.CB_New5a.month, dbo.CB_New5a.date, dbo.CB_New5a.Component_Code, dbo.CB_New5a.cinvno, 
                      dbo.CB_New5a.COS, dbo.AG_InvoiceHeader.ccustno, dbo.AG_Arcust.cclass, CASE WHEN (kititem = '') THEN component_code ELSE kititem END
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.CB_New5a.Total_Cost) <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.CB_New5a.Component_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.xxx_test
AS
SELECT     Year, Month, Date, 'Cost of Sales' AS Type, CASE WHEN (ndiscrate = 0 AND cclass <> 'Export') THEN 'Non Discountable' WHEN (ndiscrate) IS NULL 
                      THEN 'Other' WHEN (cclass = 'Export') THEN 'Export' WHEN ((cclass <> 'Export') AND (ndiscrate <> 0) AND (ndiscrate IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'Discountable' END AS Sub,
                       Account, Description, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS SA_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS NAM_AR_AmountIncl, 
                      0 AS NAM_AR_AmountEx, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountIncl, 0 AS NAM_GL_AmountExcl, 0 AS asDRP, 0 AS SA_Bud, 0 AS NAM_Bud, kititem AS itemcode, nexcost AS SA_Disc, 
                      0 AS NAM_DISC, CASE WHEN (ndiscrate IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE ndiscrate END AS Disc, cinvno, Company
FROM         dbo.XXX_JOIN2
WHERE     (Company = '1.SA') AND (Date BETWEEN '2012/04/01' AND '2012/04/30') AND (itemcode = 'AA/00080/02')

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[ZZ_arcapp]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt) AS npaidamt
FROM         arcapp
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno
UNION ALL
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt)
FROM         arcapph
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[ZZ_arcappPmt]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(npaidamt) AS npaidamt
FROM         ZZ_arcapp
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[ZZ_arcashPmt]
AS
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(nappamt) AS nappamt
FROM         arcash
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno
UNION ALL
SELECT     crcptno, ccustno, sum(nappamt)
FROM         arcashh
WHERE     crcptno <> ''
GROUP BY crcptno, ccustno
